announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Puravankara Limited has informed the Exchange about Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores Rupees) on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited shareholders have approved the transfer of a business undertaking to its subsidiary, Mahindra Blossom Developers Limited, on a slump sale basis. The resolutions were passed by the requisite majority via postal ballot, with the voting results declared on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hind Rectifiers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HIRECT Announces Availability of Advanced Copper Conductors forHigh-Power Transformers from Expanded India Facility".
announcements.ai_summary: Hind Rectifiers Limited (HIRECT) has announced the commercial availability of advanced copper products, including Continuously Transposed Conductors (CTC), Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (PICC), and Enameled Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (EPICC). These products are manufactured at their newly inaugurated state-of-the-art copper processing plant in Nashik, India, and will be exported globally for high-power transformers and wound components.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LTM Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "LTM Expands BlueVerseTM Tech with AppIQ, AgentIQ and FusionIQ to Accelerate AI-Led Engineering".
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has completed the acquisition of an additional 30.58% equity stake in its subsidiary, Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL). The transaction involved acquiring 41,650,638 equity shares from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company for Rs. 12,540.68 million. Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL, a listed entity, has filed an intimation with the stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A copy of KFIL's intimation is enclosed for reference.

announcements.ai_summary: Hi-Klass Trading and Investment Limited has confirmed that it does not fall under the definition of a "Large Corporate" as per the criteria specified in SEBI Operational Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, as of March 31, 2026. Therefore, the company is not subject to the disclosure requirements related to fund raising by issuance of debt securities by large corporates. The company's incremental borrowing in FY 2025-26 was NIL, and there was no mandatory borrowing required through debt securities. Consequently, there is no shortfall in borrowing through debt securities for the financial year.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of New Branch
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened a New Branch on April 10 2026 at West Mambalam Chennai and as on date the Bank has 950 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 10, 2026, City Union Bank Ltd opened a new branch located at West Mambalam, Chennai. This expansion brings the total number of branches for the bank to 950 as of the reporting date. The new branch is identified by the branch number 950 and CBS Code 00955. The address of the new branch is Door No. 18 & 22, Station Road, West Mambalam, Chennai - 600 033. This information is provided in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015.

announcements.subject: Thomas Cook (India) Ltd - 500413 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We are enclosing herewith the Press Release dated April 10, 2026 titled, "Deepti Sheth elevated as President & Group Head - Human Resources at Thomas Cook India Group".
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited announced on April 10, 2026, the elevation of Deepti Sheth as President & Group Head – Human Resources. This appointment reinforces the company's commitment to strengthening leadership and its people strategy across the Group. In her new role, Deepti Sheth will oversee the Group HR function, focusing on talent, leadership development, employee experience, diversity, inclusion, and digital transformation. Her tenure with the Group spans over a decade, during which she has been instrumental in enhancing HR frameworks and aligning people practices with business growth. She previously served as Senior Vice President & Head – Human Resources at SOTC Travel Ltd.

announcements.subject: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd - 544537 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Corrigendum to Intimation dated March 30, 2026 under Regulation 30 - Acquisition of Equity Shares in Captive Generating Plant Companies for Captives Use of Electricity.
announcements.ai_summary: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd has issued a corrigendum to its earlier intimation dated March 30, 2026, regarding the acquisition of equity shares in Captive Generating Plant (CGP) companies for captive electricity use. The correction pertains to the acquisition price for Sea Sindu Green Energy Private Limited. The company will acquire 26% shareholding in Sea Sindu Green Energy Private Limited for Rs. 26,000, 26% in Sri Kamakshi Wind Power Private Limited for Rs. 13,00,000, and 26% in OM Sakthi Wind Power Private Limited for Rs. 60,83,000. The total consideration for these acquisitions is Rs. 74,09,000. This corrigendum, dated April 10, 2026, clarifies the pricing details for the acquisition of shares in these CGP companies, which are established for the company's captive use of electricity.

announcements.subject: Dev Information Technology Ltd - 543462 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation Regarding Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Limited (DEV IT) has secured a significant mandate worth ₹26 crore from the National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) for the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System (NPRTS). This project, under the Pharmacy Council of India, involves the design, development, system integration, and maintenance of a centralized, web-based platform for national pharmacist registration and tracking. The contract is on a fixed-cost basis with an execution timeline of approximately three years, providing medium-term revenue visibility. DEV IT's Chairman, Pranav Pandya, highlighted the company's capability in delivering large-scale digital solutions, reinforcing its position in government and enterprise digital transformation programs. The announcement was made on April 10, 2026.

announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform that the Company has opened a new store of Style Baazar at Baghajatin, West Bengal, today.
announcements.ai_summary: Baazar Style Retail Ltd has opened a new retail store in Baghajatin, West Bengal, on April 10, 2026. This marks the opening of their 267th store as of today. The company is informing the exchange as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This expansion is a step towards increasing their retail footprint. Investors should note this physical expansion of the company's operations.

announcements.subject: ADC India Communications Ltd-$ - 523411 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 For  Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Annual Declaration Under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 received from Promoters of the Company for the financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The company has received an annual declaration under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from its promoters for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is a routine compliance requirement for promoters to inform the exchange about their shareholding status. Investors should note that this is an annual declaration and does not indicate any new transaction or change in promoter holdings at this time. The company is ADC India Communications Ltd.

announcements.subject: Mini Diamonds India Ltd - 523373 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Domestic Order for Fancy Coloured Lab Grown Polished Diamonds amounting to INR 14.00 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mini Diamonds (India) Limited has secured a significant domestic order valued at INR 14.00 Crores for the supply of fancy coloured cut and polished lab grown diamonds. This order was received on April 9, 2026, from a Mumbai-based existing client. The order signifies an expansion into a new product category for this repeat customer, demonstrating growing market acceptance and confidence in MDIL's offerings. This development is crucial for strengthening the company's domestic business and building larger, more diverse client relationships, especially in the current uncertain global business environment.

announcements.subject: Godrej Properties Ltd - 533150 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Godrej Properties Limited (GPL) announced its highest ever bookings, collections, operating cash flow, and business development for FY2026. The company achieved a booking value of INR 34,171 crore, marking a 16% year-on-year growth and a 3-year CAGR of 41%, making it the highest booking value reported by an Indian real estate developer in a financial year. Collections grew by 17% to INR 19,965 crore in FY2026, also a record for an Indian real estate developer. Direct construction spend increased by 62%, and operating cash flow rose by 5% to INR 7,830 crore. GPL added INR 42,100 crore of future sales potential through portfolio additions, exceeding its guidance by over 200% and achieving 59% year-on-year growth. The company also delivered projects aggregating 12.1 million sq. ft., meeting 121% of its guidance. These results were announced on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: TIL Ltd - 505196 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Raising of Funds
announcements.detail: Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held on 9th April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: TIL Limited, through its Rights Issue Committee meeting held on April 09, 2026, has approved the allotment of 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares on a Rights Basis. These shares were allotted to eligible shareholders and/or renouncees as per the Letter of Offer dated March 20, 2026. On application, ₹123.75 per Rights Equity Share has been paid, which includes a premium of ₹116.25 per Rights Equity Share. The balance amount will be payable on future calls. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital includes 7,03,52,056 fully paid-up Equity Shares of ₹10 each, amounting to ₹70,35,20,560, and 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares of ₹10 each (₹7.50 paid-up), amounting to ₹9,06,88,200.

announcements.subject: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd - 544510 - Disclosure Made By Promoters And Promoters Group Of The Company Under Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 For The Financial Year Ended On March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Dusclosure made By Promoters And Promoters Group of the Company under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquistion of Shares and Takeovers) nRegulations, 2011 for the Financial Year ended on MArch 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd has submitted its yearly disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure pertains to the financial year ended on March 31, 2026, and has been made by the Promoters and Promoter Group of the company. The filing is a routine requirement for promoters to report their shareholding and any changes therein to ensure compliance with takeover regulations. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: International Conveyors Ltd - 509709 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, we wish to inform you that International Conveyors Limited ("the Company") has acquired the equity shares of "Religare Enterprise Ltd."
announcements.ai_summary: International Conveyors Limited has acquired 1,40,000 equity shares of Religare Enterprise Limited for a cash consideration of ₹3.13 Crore. Religare Enterprise Limited is an investment company and the holding entity for a diversified financial services group, offering services such as SME loans, affordable housing finance, health insurance, and capital markets. The acquisition, which was completed on April 09, 2026, is for investment purposes and does not involve related parties. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals were required for this transaction.

announcements.subject: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd - 533274 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Prestige Estates Projects Limited has entered into a joint venture with ABIL Group through Aaramnagar Realty LLP to develop a significant residential project in Versova, Mumbai. This venture will develop a land parcel of approximately 6 acres, offering a total development potential of around 1.7 million square feet. The estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) for this project is projected to exceed ₹9,000 crores. The development is planned as a premium residential offering, targeting the strong demand for high-quality housing in Mumbai's western suburbs. This strategic move aligns with Prestige Group's objective to expand its presence in high-demand, supply-constrained urban markets. The company aims to sustain its growth momentum by building a robust project pipeline and maintaining a focus on execution and timely delivery.

announcements.subject: JSW Energy Ltd - 533148 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 in relation to the exercise of Call Option for acquiring the balance 26% Equity Stake in JSW Mahanadi Power Company Limited by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Energy Limited has exercised its call option to acquire the remaining 26% equity stake in JSW Mahanadi Power Company Limited (JMPCL). This acquisition is in accordance with the Approved Resolution Plan sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Hyderabad Bench, and the Securities Holders’ Agreement dated March 6, 2025. JSW Energy had previously acquired 74% of JMPCL's equity share capital. The company will provide further information required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, at the time of the actual acquisition of the balance 26% equity shareholding.

announcements.subject: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd - 532540 - Audio Of Earnings Conference Call For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Audio of earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Consultancy Services Limited has announced the audio recording of its earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The call, held on April 9, 2026, discussed the company's audited standalone and consolidated financial results. These results were approved by the Board of Directors at their meeting on the same date, April 9, 2026. Investors can access the audio recording via a provided link on the company's investor relations website. This announcement follows the board's approval of the financial statements for the period.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Copy Of The Letter Of Offer Together With The Addendum To The Letter Of Offer Received By The Company From Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited In Relation To The Open Offer To The Public Shareholders Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Please find attached the copy of the Letter of Offer together with the addendum to the Letter of Offer received by the Company from Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited in relation to the open offer to the public shareholders of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has received a Letter of Offer and an Addendum from Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited concerning an open offer to its public shareholders. The open offer, made by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, acting in concert with IHC Capital Holding LLC, aims to acquire up to 34,17,54,286 equity shares, representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital. These shares have a face value of INR 2 each. The offer is being made in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The addendum, dated April 09, 2026, provides additional information and disclosures related to the acquirer, PAC, target company, and the open offer, supplementing the original Letter of Offer dated April 03, 3036.

announcements.ai_summary: Kesar India Ltd has reported that there were no deviations or variations in the utilization of proceeds from its Preferential Issue during the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This statement of utilization has been reviewed by the Audit Committee and taken on record by the Board of Directors at their respective meetings held on April 8, 2026. The company is providing this update pursuant to Regulation 32 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Circular No. CIR/CFD/CMD1/162/2019.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Update Regarding Full Settlement Of Outstanding Dues With Phoenix ARC
announcements.detail: Disclosure under regulation 30 regarding full settlement of outstanding dues with Phoenix ARC is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited has successfully repaid and settled its entire outstanding dues with Phoenix ARC Private Limited. This settlement was financed by the proceeds from the Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the company. As a result of this full repayment, the previously reported default, which was being disclosed quarterly in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is now fully cured and resolved. This repayment is expected to trigger a write-back of approximately Rs. 300 Crore pertaining to previous debt settlement liabilities.

announcements.subject: Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd - 500830 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find herewith attached Media Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited has issued a media release on April 8, 2026, titled "Colgate Makes Preventive Dental Care Accessible to All with FREE Dental Check-Ups." This initiative aims to enhance the accessibility of preventive dental care across India by offering free dental check-ups. The program builds upon its success in 2024-25, having facilitated over 4.5 million dental screenings. To address the issue of dentist availability in rural areas, where the dentist: patient ratio is 1:250,000, Colgate has partnered with Bajaj Health to integrate a Virtual Consultation option. Consumers can also access personalized Dental Screening Reports and find participating dentists by scanning a QR code on Colgate Toothpaste packs.

announcements.subject: Trishakti Industries Ltd - 531279 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of Order Received - Larsen & Toubro Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Trishakti Industries Limited has secured a significant work order from Larsen & Toubro Limited for the deployment of advanced machinery and skilled manpower. This domestic order involves the hiring of machines with manpower and is for an initial contract period of 06 months. The total contract value is expected to be upwards of ₹75 Lacs, inclusive of taxes. The execution of this order is scheduled to be completed by the end of April. This award reinforces the trust of top-tier corporates in Trishakti Industries' execution capabilities and asset strength, which is anticipated to lead to stronger revenue visibility and profitability in the upcoming quarters.

announcements.subject: Bharti Airtel Ltd - 532454 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has received a notice from the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) imposing a penalty of ₹1,04,000. This penalty is for alleged violations of subscriber verification norms, as identified during a Customer Application Form (CAF) Audit conducted by the DoT for December 2025. The company is required to ensure adequate verification of customers before enrolling them as subscribers, as per its license agreement. Bharti Airtel has stated that the information provided in the disclosure is true, correct, and complete to the best of its knowledge and belief.

announcements.subject: PTC India Financial Services Ltd - 533344 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Statement containing the data related to ISINs for debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PTC India Financial Services Ltd has submitted its half-yearly report containing data related to ISINs for debt securities, as per SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The report, outstanding as of March 31, 2026, details two outstanding debenture issues by the company. The first issue, with ISIN INE560K07102, has an issuance date of March 30, 2012, a maturity date of March 30, 2027, and a coupon rate of 9.15% annually, with an outstanding amount of Rs. 2,13,70,000. The second issue, ISIN INE560K07110, also matures on March 30, 2027, with a 9.15% cumulative coupon rate and an outstanding amount of Rs. 6,44,55,000. Both issues have a put option available annually after seven years from the allotment date, which was March 30, 2019.

announcements.subject: Yash Chemex Ltd - 539939 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Retirement
announcements.detail: We are Submitting herewith Disclosure under Regulation of SEBI(LODR), Regulations 2015 - Retirement of Independent Director.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Yash Chemex Ltd has announced the retirement of Mrs. Angee Rajendrakumar Shah, a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective April 8, 2026. Her tenure concluded upon the completion of her second consecutive term as an Independent Director. The company has provided the necessary disclosures as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The current board of directors, effective April 9, 2026, includes Mr. Pritesh Yashwantlal Shah (Managing Director), Mrs. Dimple Priteshkumar Shah (Whole-Time Director), Mr. Rushabh Anilkumar Shah (Non-Executive Independent Director), Mr. Dhanik Jayeshkumar Mehta (Non-Executive Independent Director), and Mr. Bhaveshkumar Rajnikant Shah (Non-Executive Independent Director).

announcements.subject: Royal Orchid Hotels Ltd - 532699 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed the Press Release regarding "Strategic Agreement with Royal Orchid Hotels for launching of 125 New Hampton by Hilton Hotels".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Royal Orchid Hotels Ltd has announced a strategic agreement with Hilton to launch 125 new Hampton by Hilton hotels across Western and Southern India by 2035. This partnership aims to address a significant supply gap in emerging Indian cities and commercial hubs. The franchised hotels will primarily be developed in states including Goa, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana. This initiative is expected to accelerate Hilton’s upper midscale expansion in India, driven by rising domestic travel and demand from the expanding middle class. The agreement signifies a strategic leap for Royal Orchid Hotels in its 50-year journey, complementing its focus on the mid-market segment with globally renowned Hampton brand standards.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Quarterly Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: Quarterly Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd provided a Quarterly Update for Q4 FY26 on April 08, 2026. The company reported a significant YoY revenue increase of 40% for FY26, reaching ₹10,744 crore, with Q4 FY26 revenue growing by 124% YoY to ₹3,552 crore. The Retail segment saw 102% YoY growth in Q4 FY26, driven by strong wedding and festive season demand. Franchise Operations grew by 132% YoY and E-commerce by 67% YoY. Gold category volumes increased by 27% YoY, silver by 37% YoY, and diamond volumes by 125% YoY, contributing to a studded jewellery mix. Same-store sales growth (SSSG) for the quarter was a robust 86% YoY. The company also added 8 COCO stores and 4 FOCO stores during the quarter, bringing the total store count to 78.

announcements.subject: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd-$ - 507205 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR we are enclosing herewith the Press Release dated April 08, 2026 titled "Tilaknagar Industries Named Among FinanceAsia''s Best Companies in Asia 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd announced on April 08, 2026, that it has been recognized among FinanceAsia's Best Companies in Asia 2026. The company secured a Bronze Medal in the Best Managed Company in India category and a Silver Medal in the Best Managed Company in India (Consumer Staples) category. This recognition highlights the company's strong management practices, sustained performance, and industry leadership. Tilaknagar Industries is known for its Indian-Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL) brands, including Mansion House and Courrier Napoleon.

announcements.subject: Cyient Ltd - 532175 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - Acquisition update
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cyient Ltd announced on April 8, 2026, the successful closure of its majority-stake investment in Kinetic Technologies for USD $85 million. Kinetic Technologies is a global power semiconductor solutions provider. This acquisition aims to establish a scaled semiconductor platform anchored in India for global markets, focusing on custom silicon and ASSP-led solutions. The combined entity will leverage Cyient Semiconductors' engineering expertise with Kinetic Technologies' power management and protection IC portfolio. Kinetic Technologies will continue to operate under its current leadership, with strategic oversight from Cyient Semiconductors, and will benefit from expanded global presence and increased R&D investments.

announcements.subject: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd - 532321 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Zydus receives final approval from USFDA for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg.
announcements.ai_summary: Zydus Lifesciences Limited has received final approval from the United States Food and Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg. These tablets are indicated for improving glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus. With this approval, Zydus is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity in the United States. The Dapagliflozin tablets will be manufactured at the group's formulation manufacturing facility in SEZ, Ahmedabad. The annual sales of Dapagliflozin tablets in the United States were USD 10.2 billion as of February 2026. This marks Zydus's 436th approval and adds to its portfolio of filed ANDAs. The press release was dated April 8, 2026.

announcements.subject: TVS Motor Company Ltd - 532343 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: TVS MOTOR LAUNCHES THE ARMADO 200, BUILT FOR THE TOUGH TERRAIN IN INDONESIA
announcements.ai_summary: TVS Motor Company has launched the TVS Armado 200 in Indonesia, a new three-wheeler designed for tough terrain and commercial use. The vehicle is powered by a 197.75 cc oil-cooled engine and features a 2-meter cargo bed with a payload capacity of up to 840 kg. It is available in three colors (Blue, Red, and White) with an introductory price of IDR 34,900,000 (OTR Jakarta), down from the normal price of IDR 35,900,000. Flexible financing options are also available. This launch signifies TVS Motor's commitment to the Indonesian market and its growing commercial and logistics industries. The company is also supplying TVS Armado vehicles to the AGRINAS and Merah Putih Co-operatives initiative. The launch event took place on April 8, 2026.

announcements.subject: Easy Trip Planners Ltd - 543272 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: EaseMyTrip Foundation signs MoU with Delhi PWD for Flyover Adoption and Urban Enhancement , Strengthening its sustainability and Community Initiatives.
announcements.ai_summary: EaseMyTrip Foundation has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Public Works Department (PWD), Government of Delhi, to adopt and enhance two flyovers: Mayur Vihar Phase 1 Flyover and Apsara Flyover. This initiative aims to improve urban infrastructure and promote sustainable city development through a public-private partnership. The foundation will be responsible for the beautification, maintenance, and landscaping of these areas, ensuring cleanliness and enhancing their visual appeal. The MoU signing ceremony was attended by dignitaries including the Hon’ble Chief Minister of Delhi and the Hon’ble Cabinet Minister (PWD). This collaboration aligns with EaseMyTrip Foundation's commitment to community initiatives and responsible corporate citizenship. The announcement was made on April 8, 2026.

announcements.ai_summary: HFCL Ltd has announced that its material subsidiary, HTL Limited, has secured orders worth approximately INR 1366 crore (Rupees One Thousand Three Hundred Sixty Six Crore only) from a renowned Tier-1 customer for the supply of optical fiber cables. These orders are expected to be executed by December 2026. The orders are for the supply of optical fiber cables as per customer specifications and are domestic in nature. The company stated that these orders reaffirm customer confidence in its manufacturing capabilities, technological excellence, and product quality. The details of the orders were provided in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026.

announcements.subject: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd - 539404 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Business Updates
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Business Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Satin Creditcare Network Limited has provided business updates for Q4 and the full fiscal year 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. As of March 31, 2026, the company's consolidated Assets Under Management (AUM) grew by 19% year-on-year to INR 15,275 crores, driven by increased disbursements. Consolidated disbursements for FY26 rose by 17% year-on-year to INR 12,516 crores. The company added 7,39,501 new borrowers during FY26, with 2,46,281 new borrowers in Q4 FY26. Credit cost for FY26 was between 3.8%-4.0%, a decrease from 4.6% in FY25. Satin Creditcare Network Limited added 392 new branches in FY26, bringing the total branch count to 1,841 as of March 31, 2026, with a consolidated branch count of 2,015. The company also raised approximately INR 10,830 crores through various debt instruments during the fiscal year and achieved a debut score of 59 in the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment.

announcements.subject: Angel One Ltd - 543235 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly Business updates for month of March 2026, Q4 FY 26 and FY 26.
announcements.ai_summary: Angel One Limited has released its monthly business updates for March 2026, along with figures for Q4 FY26 and the full FY26. The company reported a client base of 37.39 million in March 2026, a 1.3% increase from February 2026 and a 20.5% year-on-year growth from March 2025. Gross client acquisition for March 2026 was 0.51 million. The average client funding book stood at ₹55.05 billion in March 2026, a 43.0% increase year-on-year. Total orders in March 2026 reached 139.98 million, a 37.1% increase compared to March 2025. Angel One's Average Daily Turnover (ADTO) based on notional turnover was ₹49,957 billion in March 2026, up 37.3% year-on-year. The company also saw significant growth in ADTO based on option premium turnover, reaching ₹2,109 billion, a 145.1% year-on-year increase. For Q4 FY26, the client base grew to 37.39 million, a 4.7% quarter-on-quarter increase and a 20.5% year-on-year increase. The average client funding book for Q4 FY26 was ₹58.49 billion, a 45.0% year-on-year increase.

announcements.subject: Lupin Ltd - 500257 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Lupin Announces the Approval of Dapagliflozin Tablets in the United States
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Global pharmaceutical company Lupin Limited has announced that it has received approval from the United States Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Dapagliflozin Tablets, in both 5 mg and 10 mg strengths. The U.S. FDA has confirmed that Lupin's Dapagliflozin Tablets are bioequivalent to Farxiga® for the indicated uses. This approval marks a significant milestone for Lupin in the United States market. Lupin is a global pharmaceutical leader with products distributed in over 100 markets and a strong presence in India and the U.S. across various therapeutic areas.

announcements.subject: Indian Hotels Company Ltd - 500850 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed copy of press release titled "IHCL accelerates portfolio expansion; reaches 628 hotels marks a year of inorganic & sustained organic growth with 373 in operations and a pipeline of 255 hotels"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL) has announced a significant expansion of its hotel portfolio, reaching a total of 628 hotels, with a pipeline of 255 properties. This growth was driven by both inorganic and organic strategies, with 373 hotels currently in operation. The company added over 100 operating hotels through acquisitions this year, bringing the total operating hotels to 373 with over 33,000 rooms. IHCL aims to achieve its goal of a 700-hotel portfolio under its "Accelerate 2030" strategy. Key expansions include the onboarding of Claridges Collection, acquisition of a controlling stake in Atmantan, and majority stake acquisitions in ANK and Pride hospitality, bolstering the midscale segment. The company also saw organic growth across its brands, including 19 signings in Taj, with a new hotel in Cairo and a 500-key hotel in Patna.

announcements.subject: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd - 541233 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 - Approval Of Competition Commission Of India
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015, the Company hereby intimates that the Competition Commission of India has grated its approval for the acquisition of certain equity shares of Fleur Hotels Limited by Coastal Cedar Investments BV and the internal restructuring of the Company group through amalgamation and demerger.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has announced that the Competition Commission of India (CCI) has granted its approval, vide a communication dated April 7, 2026, for the acquisition of certain equity shares of Fleur Hotels Limited by Coastal Cedar Investments BV. This approval, under Section 31(1) of the Competition Act, 2002, also covers the internal restructuring of the Lemon Tree group through amalgamation and demerger. This development follows the company's prior intimation dated January 9, 2026, and is a significant step towards the consummation of the proposed transactions. The company is awaiting the detailed order from the CCI and will proceed with the transactions in accordance with applicable laws.

announcements.subject: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd - 532811 - Clarification On Dated 09-07-2024 Reply To NSE On 12-07-2024 But Missed With BSE
announcements.detail: Reply to BSE which was pending/ Missed to BSE, The Query raised from NSE accordingly reply to NSE on 12-07-2024
announcements.ai_summary: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd has submitted a clarification to BSE Limited regarding a non-compliance with Regulation 21(3C) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company inadvertently missed intimating BSE about a warning letter received from NSE on July 9, 2024. The Risk Management Committee meetings were held on February 13, 2023, and November 10, 2023, with a gap of 270 days, which exceeded the 180-day limit stipulated by the regulation. The company acknowledges the unintentional delay in intimation to BSE and assures future compliance.

announcements.subject: Kalind Ltd - 526935 - Intimation Under Regulation 31A Of The SEBI LODR 2015 - Submission Of Application To BSE Limited Upon Receipt Of Request For Re-Classification From "Promoter/Promoter Group" To "Public" Category.
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation with respect to submission of application to Stock Exchange (BSE Limited) upon receipt for Reclassification from Promoter/Promoter Group to Public Category pursuant to Reg 31A of SEBI LODR.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kalind Limited has submitted an application to BSE Limited seeking a "no-objection" for the re-classification of certain individuals from the 'Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. This application is made in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The individuals named in the application, Yagnik Bharatkumar Tank and Deniis Bhupendra Desai, currently hold 0 shares and 0% of shares, respectively, and are listed as 'Promoter' in the current classification. The company will make further disclosures regarding material developments in this regard.

announcements.subject: Persistent Systems Ltd - 533179 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The Press Release titled ''Persistent Among India''s Most Sustainable Companies, Signaling Discipline at Scale'', is as enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Persistent Systems Limited has been recognized among India's Most Sustainable Companies by BW Businessworld Group for 2024-25, securing 3rd position overall and 2nd in the IT and Digital Services sector. This recognition, part of the BW Sustainable World Awards 2026, highlights the company's disciplined scaling and the integration of sustainability into its operations, capital allocation, and client delivery. The assessment evaluated organizations on ESG disclosures, governance, SDG alignment, and demonstrated impact. Persistent Systems emphasizes that sustainability is engineered into its operating model, influencing decisions from risk management to talent practices and client delivery, which is crucial for scaling AI responsibly and building enterprise trust.

announcements.subject: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 533573 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited receives USFDA Final Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg. These tablets are therapeutically equivalent to AstraZeneca's Farxiga Tablets. Dapagliflozin is indicated to reduce the risk of hospitalization for heart failure in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus and either established cardiovascular disease or multiple cardiovascular risk factors, and as an adjunct to diet and exercise for glycemic control. Alembic is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity as an early ANDA applicant. The estimated market size for Dapagliflozin tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, was US$ 10,487 million for the twelve months ending December 2025. Alembic Pharmaceuticals has a cumulative total of 235 ANDA approvals from the USFDA.

announcements.subject: Telogica Ltd - 532975 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 As Of March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Disclosure Under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI(SAST) Regulations, 2011 as of March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: This announcement is a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The promoters and persons acting in concert (PAC) of Telogica Limited collectively hold 1,18,14,373 shares as of March 31, 2026. The company confirms that no encumbrance, either direct or indirect, was made on these shares during the financial year. As of March 31, 2026, there were NIL shares of the company encumbered or pledged by the promoters and PAC. This information is submitted for the records of BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Aartech Solonics Ltd - 542580 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Purchase Order by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Aartech Solonics Limited has received a purchase order valued at ₹1,26,15,144.00 (Rupees One Crore Twenty-Six Lakh Fifteen Thousand One Hundred Forty-Four Only), inclusive of all applicable taxes. This is the first order received by the company for its "BestCase" product line for the financial year 2026-27. The order has been received in the normal course of business and strengthens the company's existing order book, enhancing revenue visibility. The company has provided the required details as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024.

announcements.subject: Dynacons Systems & Solutions Ltd - 532365 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation for securing project from Jammu and Kashmir Bank for ERP solution
announcements.ai_summary: Dynacons Systems & Solutions Ltd has secured a significant project from Jammu & Kashmir Bank for an Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Solution. The project involves designing, implementing, and supporting a centralized, enterprise-wide ERP platform to modernize and integrate the bank's core financial and operational processes. This initiative aims to standardize and automate operations, establish a single source of truth for organizational data, and strengthen decision-making through real-time reporting. The contract is for a duration of 5 years and has a broad consideration of Rs. 25 Crores (Excluding GST). The company is a domestic entity, and the scope of work includes ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements and supporting future growth with a scalable system.

announcements.subject: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd - 543300 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on achievement of significant production milestones by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd announced on April 7, 2026, that it has achieved significant production milestones, manufacturing 500 million differential gears and 10 million differential assemblies since its inception. This achievement reinforces its position as a key global driveline solutions provider. The company, a leading global provider of mobility technology solutions, designs and manufactures components for Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV), Passenger Vehicles, Commercial Vehicles, and Off-highway Vehicles. Sona Comstar held an estimated 8.7% global market share in differential gears in CY25, an increase from 4.5% in 2019. Production began in 1999 at its Gurugram plant, followed by its Pune facility in 2005, with accelerated production in recent years.

announcements.subject: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd - 532143 - Updates
announcements.detail: Updates
announcements.ai_summary: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd has issued an update confirming the absence of bird flu incidents in its poultry farms, particularly in Tamil Nadu, where all its operations are located. The company clarified that it has no operations in Kerala, where avian influenza cases were previously reported. Their farms are recognized by the Government of India as avian influenza-free compartment farms, with continuous and rigorous surveillance for diseases like avian influenza, Newcastle disease, and salmonella. Enhanced biosecurity measures, including securing bird waste areas and restricting external visitors, are in place. The company assures stakeholders that the health of its layer birds remains stable, and egg production continues uninterrupted.

announcements.subject: Lodha Developers Ltd - 543287 - Key Operational Updates For Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Key Operational Updates For Q4FY26 is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lodha Developers Ltd has announced key operational updates for Q4 FY26, achieving its best-ever quarterly pre-sales of ₹ 58.9 billion, a 23% year-on-year increase. For the full year FY26, pre-sales stood at ₹ 205.3 billion, a 16% year-on-year growth, though March sales were impacted by the Iran war, falling ₹ 4.7 billion below guidance. Collections for Q4 FY26 were ₹ 52.3 billion, an 18% year-on-year increase, with FY26 collections reaching ₹ 151.6 billion, a 5% year-on-year rise. The company added twelve projects across MMR, Pune, Bengaluru, and NCR in FY26 with a Gross Development Value (GDV) of approximately ₹ 600 billion, significantly exceeding its annual guidance. As of April 1, 2026, the company has approximately ₹ 2 trillion in GDV available for sale. Net debt reduced by ₹ 8.0 billion to ₹ 53.7 billion during the quarter, with the Net debt/Equity ratio standing at 0.23x.

announcements.subject: Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd - 543278 - Q4 Update
announcements.detail: Quarterly Update - Q4 Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd has reported a strong Q4 FY2026 performance with consolidated revenue growth of approximately 64% compared to the same period in the previous financial year. For the full year FY2026, consolidated revenue grew by approximately 42% year-on-year. India operations saw revenue growth exceeding 65% in Q4 FY2026, driven by robust same-store-sales-growth (SSSG) of over 45% in key markets, with both wedding and discretionary demand remaining strong. The international operations recorded revenue growth of approximately 45% in Q4 FY2026, with the Middle East contributing approximately 39% growth, despite some impact from geopolitical situations in March. International markets accounted for approximately 11% of consolidated revenue in the quarter. The digital platform, Candere, achieved revenue growth of over 360% in the quarter.

announcements.company: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd
announcements.subject: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd - 533107 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 7, 2026 titled "SDHI secures India''s First Ammonia Dual-Fuel Bulk Carrier Order".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited (SDHI) has secured a shipbuilding contract with Energy ONE Limited for the construction of four (4) 92,500 DWT dual-fuel ammonia bulk carriers. This marks India's first order for such vessels and represents one of the largest commercial vessels ever to be built at an Indian shipyard. Each vessel will be 229.5m in length with a beam of 37m and will feature an ammonia-fuelled propulsion system. The vessels will be designed by KMS-EMEC, South Korea, and classed by Det Norske Veritas (DNV). The first vessel is scheduled for delivery in October 2029, with subsequent deliveries at four-month intervals.

announcements.subject: Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd - 532966 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Press Release issued by Titagarh Naval Systems Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd has announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Titagarh Naval Systems Limited (TNSL), has received an in-principle approval from the Directorate General of Shipping, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways. This approval is for a proposed Brownfield Capacity Expansion Project at Falta under the Shipbuilding Development Scheme (SbDS). The project is eligible for Capital Assistance (subsidy) of up to ₹1,28,89,06,006, subject to final approval and compliance. This development signifies a potential significant expansion for TNSL's shipbuilding capabilities, supported by a government scheme. The press release was issued on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd - 543257 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - IRFC opens financial year with Rs. 1,000 crore disbursal to MAHAGENCO
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd (IRFC) has announced the disbursal of a INR 1,000 crore term loan to Maharashtra State Power Generation Company Limited (MAHAGENCO) on April 6, 2026. This marks a strong start to the new financial year for IRFC. The company, a Navratna CPSE under the Ministry of Railways, has expanded its role as a diversified infrastructure financier beyond railway infrastructure to sectors like power generation. This disbursal follows a recent INR 12,842 crore loan agreement with Hindustan Urvarak & Rasayan Limited. The Chairman and Managing Director, Manoj Kumar Dubey, expressed confidence in the partnership and emphasized maintaining financial discipline while deepening engagement across infrastructure sectors.

announcements.subject: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd - 544141 - Receipt Of In Principle Approval For Issue And Allotment Of 16,00,000 Convertible Warrants
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith announcement under Reg 30 of SEBI (LODR),2015 for receipt of in principle approval for issue and allotment of 16,00,000 convertible warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pune E-Stock Broking Limited has received an in-principle approval from BSE Limited for the issuance and allotment of 16,00,000 convertible warrants. These warrants are convertible into one fully paid-up equity share each, with a face value of ₹10 per share. The allotment will be on a preferential basis to promoter and non-promoter categories at an issue price of ₹234 per warrant. The total consideration for this issuance is ₹37,44,00,000. The company has been advised to obtain undertakings from allottees regarding no intra-day trading and to strengthen internal controls before allotment to ensure compliance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations.

announcements.subject: Vipul Ltd - 511726 - Vipul Limited Has Informed The Exchange About The Reason Of Delay In Providing Material Information Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Vipul Limited has informed the Exchange about the reason of delay in providing material information under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vipul Limited has informed the exchange regarding a delay in disclosing material information. The delay was primarily due to the non-availability of requisite details with the management within the prescribed timeline. Furthermore, the process of obtaining necessary confirmations was impacted by extended weekly offs and a company holiday observed for Holi. Vipul Limited remains committed to ensuring timely and accurate disclosures in compliance with regulatory requirements. The company will submit the relevant information to the stock exchanges promptly upon receipt and confirmation by the management.

announcements.subject: PDS Ltd - 538730 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchange regarding press release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PDS Limited has secured a strategic sourcing mandate from a leading US value retailer, a contract expected to drive sourcing volumes of approximately ₹450 crore. This engagement will be executed through PDS subsidiary, GSCL, under the leadership of Michael Yee, who is spearheading PDS's efforts to scale its US business. The contract signifies a crucial step in strengthening PDS's presence in key markets through on-ground leadership and execution capabilities. The company highlighted that this partnership reflects the resilience of the PDS platform and the strength of its global ecosystem, with its widespread sourcing network and ability to deliver agile solutions positioning it as a partner of choice for leading global retailers. Continued investments in cost transformation, digital capabilities, and AI-led initiatives have enhanced PDS's sourcing platform and value proposition, as evidenced by this new partnership.

announcements.subject: Valencia Nutrition Ltd - 542910 - Press Release-Strategic Manufacturing Agreement Between Valencia Beverages And Superwaters P Ltd And Virchow Laboratories Ltd
announcements.detail: Valencia Beverages and Superwaters Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Valencia Nutrition Limited has entered into a definitive business agreement with Virchow Laboratories Limited for manufacturing of its juice product profile.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Valencia Nutrition Ltd, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Valencia Beverages and Superwaters Private Limited, has entered into a strategic manufacturing agreement with Virchow Laboratories Limited. This agreement covers the manufacturing of Valencia's juice product portfolio, including 8 SKUs such as Mango, Guava, and Apple variants. A committed monthly production volume has been secured, representing approximately 15% of Valencia Beverages Unit II's installed capacity in Hyderabad. This partnership aims to enhance Valencia's manufacturing capabilities and leverage Virchow Laboratories' expertise to improve production efficiency and meet growing demand. The collaboration is expected to contribute to optimal capacity utilization at Valencia's Hyderabad facility.

announcements.subject: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd - 544457 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Brigade Group and Hyatt Announce Plans for Grand Hyatt Chennai ECR and Hyatt House Bengaluru Devanahalli
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd has announced plans for two new Hyatt-branded hotels. The company, through its subsidiary BCV Developers Private Limited, has signed a management agreement with Hyatt for Hyatt House Bengaluru Devanahalli, which is planned to open in 2027 and will feature 135 serviced apartments. Brigade Hotel Ventures Limited had previously signed a management agreement with Hyatt for Grand Hyatt Chennai ECR, a beachfront hotel with approximately 200 guest rooms, expected to open in 2029. These developments are part of Brigade Group's expansion in the hospitality sector.

The disclosure has been submitted to BSE Limited and the Audit Committee of the company.

announcements.subject: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd - 543384 - Reply To Clarification Sought With Reference To News Appearing In Https://Economictimes.Indiatimes.Com/ Dated April 6, 2026 Quoting "Nykaa In Talks To Buy Majority Stake In Deepika Padukone''s Skincare Brand 82°E"
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the Response letter
announcements.ai_summary: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd has responded to a news item published on economictimes.indiatimes.com on April 6, 2026, regarding potential talks to buy a majority stake in Deepika Padukone's skincare brand 82°E. The company stated that it continuously evaluates strategic opportunities for growth and expansion and remains in discussions with concerned parties, including the one mentioned. FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd also noted that it had filed its "Nykaa – Quarterly Revenue Update - Q4 FY2026" on the same day, which is a regular filing. The company confirmed that there are no pending legal or regulatory proceedings related to this matter and will make appropriate disclosures as required by law.

announcements.subject: Greenlam Industries Ltd - 538979 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Greenlam Industries Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiaries, Greenlam Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Greenlam Industries SDN. BHD. (Malaysia), have jointly acquired the entire 33% local shareholding of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific in Indonesia. Previously, the Singapore subsidiary held 67% of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific. Following this acquisition, the Indonesian entity has become a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of Greenlam Industries Limited, with the collective shareholding of the Singapore and Malaysia subsidiaries now at 100%. The turnover of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific for FY 2024-25 was IDR 13,169,408,093, with a comprehensive income of IDR (7,318,172,587). This transaction aims to rationalize the group's holding structure and minimize compliance requirements. The announcement was made on April 6, 2026.

announcements.detail: Special Resolution passed through Postal Ballot

announcements.subject: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd - 532424 - Quarterly Update Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: The attached file is self explanatory.
announcements.ai_summary: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd has provided a quarterly update for Q4 FY26, indicating steady demand conditions in the domestic FMCG sector. The company expects its standalone business to achieve double-digit underlying sales growth and high-single digit underlying volume growth, with volume growth in double-digits excluding soaps. Standalone EBITDA margins are anticipated to remain within the normative range due to cost savings. The Indonesia business is showing stabilization with mid-single digit volume growth and sustained market share. The GAUM (Godrej Africa, USA, and Middle East) business is expected to deliver double-digit sales growth and high-single digit volume growth. Consolidated revenue growth is projected to be close to double-digit, with EBITDA growth broadly in line with revenue. The company is monitoring the impact of rising crude oil prices on input costs.

announcements.subject: Tulive Developers Ltd - 505285 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Update On Voluntary Delisting - Formation Of Independent Director Committee
announcements.detail: In relation to voluntary delisting of equity shares of the Company from BSE Limited, pursuant to regulation 28(1) of SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021 and Detailed Public Announcement published in newspapers on April 06, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company has constituted a Committee of Independent Directors to provide reasoned recommendations on the delisting offer
announcements.ai_summary: Tulive Developers Ltd has announced the formation of a Committee of Independent Directors to provide recommendations on its voluntary delisting offer from BSE Limited. This action is in accordance with Regulation 28(1) of the SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021. The committee members are Mr. Jacob George Kandathil (Chairman), Mr. Pradeep Bhandari, and Mrs. Bhumika Jignesh Shah. The company will publish the committee's reasoned recommendations and voting pattern details at least two working days before the bidding period commences, in the same newspapers where the Detailed Public Announcement (DPA) was published on April 06, 2026. Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited is the Manager to the Delisting Offer.

announcements.subject: VTM Ltd - 532893 - Declaration That The Company Is Not A Large Corporate As Per SEBI Circular For March 2026
announcements.detail: Declaration that the company is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI Circular for March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: VTM Ltd has declared that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a "Large Corporate" as per the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. This declaration is relevant for companies intending to raise funds by issuing debt securities. By not being categorized as a Large Corporate, VTM Ltd is not subject to the specific disclosure requirements outlined in the SEBI circular for such entities. This information is important for investors to understand the company's regulatory standing regarding potential future debt issuances. The company has informed the Bombay Stock Exchange of this declaration.

announcements.subject: United Drilling Tools Ltd - 522014 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order

The order is to be executed within a period of 1.5 to 2.00 months. The estimated contract value for this order is Rs. 57,06,480.00. This is a commercial order awarded in the ordinary course of business. The company has confirmed that neither the promoter nor the promoter group has any interest in the entity that awarded the order. This award signifies new business for the company within its operational segment.

announcements.subject: Visa Steel Ltd - 532721 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: Conversion of 16500000 Warrants into Equity Shares of equivalent number.
announcements.ai_summary: Visa Steel Ltd has announced the allotment of 1,65,00,000 equity shares following the conversion of warrants. This allotment is pursuant to a preferential issue approved by the members at an EOGM on November 2, 2025, and subsequent approvals. The company received Rs. 49,50,00,000 on April 4, 2026, representing the balance subscription amount of Rs. 30 per warrant. These newly allotted shares rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares. Consequently, the company's issued and paid-up share capital has increased to Rs. 1,45,78,95,000, comprising 14,57,89,500 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The warrants were initially allotted to VISA Industries Limited, a member of the Promoter Group.

announcements.subject: Globus Spirits Ltd - 533104 - Press Release - Launch Of TERAI Tequila
announcements.detail: Press Release - Launch of TERAI Tequila
announcements.ai_summary: Globus Spirits Limited has announced the launch of TERAI Tequila, marking its entry into the premium tequila market. This new product is positioned as India's first authentic, CRT-certified tequila to be bottled domestically. TERAI Tequila is crafted in Jalisco, Mexico, at the La Huaracha Distillery using 100% Blue Weber Agave and traditional methods. The spirit is then imported to India and bottled under the strict supervision of the Consejo Regulador del Tequila (CRT). The initial offering is a Blanco expression, highlighting the purity of the agave. This launch signifies Globus Spirits' strategy to cater to evolving Indian consumer preferences for global, authentic, and luxury spirits.

announcements.company: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd-$
announcements.subject: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd-$ - 522165 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - General Announcements
announcements.detail: We enclose herewith the intimation regarding an upgradation of the Company''s power receiving substation at Garbham, Vizianagram unit from 33kV to 132 kV. This upgradation is expected to result in reduction of electricity tariff cost for the said unit.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd has upgraded its power receiving substation at the Garbham, Vizianagaram unit from 33 kV to 132 kV. This significant infrastructure enhancement is expected to lead to a reduction in electricity tariff costs for the unit. The company has informed the BSE Limited about this development on April 6, 2026, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This upgrade is a strategic move to improve operational efficiency and cost management at the Vizianagaram facility.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Business Update For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Business Update
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, reporting a standalone revenue growth of approximately 32% year-on-year for the quarter and 49% year-on-year for FY2026. The company has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the National Skill Development Corporation to act as an Industry/Franchise Partner for the Gems & Jewellery Sector, aiming to develop up to 2,00,000 micro-entrepreneurs across India over 5 years under the PC Jeweller Brand. This initiative is expected to expand the company's retail footprint and contribute to employment generation. Additionally, PC Jeweller Ltd has reduced its outstanding bank debt by approximately 23% under a Joint Settlement Agreement and one of its subsidiaries has incorporated PCJ Mining SARL in the Republic of Chad to explore precious metal ore extraction, potentially leading to vertical integration. The company is preparing for the summer wedding season and Akshay Tritiya in Q1FY2027.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Ltd - 544569 - SIAM Report - January To March 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the SIAM Report - January to March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Motors Ltd has submitted the SIAM Report for the period January to March 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This report details the production, domestic sales, and exports of Tata Motors Limited during the specified quarter. The report is self-explanatory and provides a breakdown of vehicle models and their respective sales figures for the current period compared to the same period in the previous year. This information is for the exchanges and members to record.

announcements.subject: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Ltd - 512608 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Meeting Of Board Of Directors Of Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited (The Company) - Revision In The Utilisation Of Funds Raised In Rights Issue Concluded In March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting for modification in utilisation of funds raised through rights issue due to under subscription.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited's Board of Directors met on April 6, 2026, to revise the utilization of funds raised from a rights issue concluded in March 2026, due to under-subscription. The rights issue was only 48.44% subscribed. As of March 31, 2026, Rs. 678 Lakhs were utilized for repayment of MSME and pressing creditors, suppliers, and rights issue expenses. The remaining funds, totaling Rs. 2378.41 Lakhs, will be utilized by June 30, 2026, primarily for long-term working capital and rights issue expenses. The company has deferred the object of payment of long-term loans and will limit the use of funds for general corporate purposes.

announcements.subject: Medicamen Biotech Ltd-$ - 531146 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Intimation Regarding Incorrect Event Disply On  NSDL Portal
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding Incorrent Event Display on NSDL Portal
announcements.ai_summary: Medicamen Biotech Ltd has issued a clarification regarding an incorrect event display on the NSDL portal. The company states that an event is being shown on the NSDL portal under its login credentials, but this has not been initiated, authorized, or undertaken by Medicamen Biotech Ltd. The company believes the display is inadvertent and incorrect and has contacted NSDL for verification and rectification. Medicamen Biotech Ltd confirms that there is no material event or information requiring disclosure from their end related to this matter.

announcements.company: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Ltd
announcements.subject: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Ltd - 544142 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Update
