announcements.ai_summary: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Limited (SCILAL) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Synergy Marine Group, Singapore, on April 06, 2026. This collaboration is aimed at working together in the areas of maritime training, research, and knowledge exchange. The event occurred at 1530 hours IST on April 06, 2026. This MOU signifies a strategic partnership to enhance capabilities within the maritime sector.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd - 500570 - SIAM Report - January To March 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the SIAM Report - January to March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited (formerly Tata Motors Limited) has submitted a SIAM Report for the period of January to March 2026, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This report details the production, domestic sales, and exports of the company's passenger vehicles. The report includes figures for various vehicle categories such as Micro, Compact, UVC, UV1, UV2, and UV3, comparing data for January-March 2025 with January-March 2026. The company notes that these figures have not been independently verified and audited, and final figures after audit may vary.

announcements.subject: B.R.Goyal Infrastructure Ltd - 544335 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of LOA from Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation Limited (MPRDC).
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: B.R.Goyal Infrastructure Limited has received a work order from Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation Limited (MPRDC) for the construction of a Hockey and Athletic Stadium with allied Infrastructure works at Nanakheda, Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The accepted contract value for this order is Rs. 23,37,10,448/-. The work is to be executed within 24 months, including the rainy season, from the date of signing the contract agreement. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd - 544176 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)

The report includes a list of active ISINs as of March 31, 2026. The table details 15 different NCD series, with issuance dates ranging from November 16, 2016, to August 17, 2023, and maturity dates extending up to September 29, 2028. Coupon rates vary from 8.50% to 10.00% for fixed-rate NCDs, with some linked to benchmark rates like Mumbai Inter-Bank Outright Rate and Repo rate. The total amount issued across these series ranges from Rs. 3.00 Crores to Rs. 351.00 Crores, with outstanding amounts also detailed. This submission is a regulatory compliance for the company's debt instruments.

This confirmation has been submitted to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: Info Edge (India) Ltd - 532777 - Company Update On Naukri Jobspeak Report
announcements.detail: Company Update on Naukri Jobspeak Report
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Ltd has announced the release of its Naukri Jobspeak Index Report for March 2026. This monthly index, which represents the state of the Indian job market and hiring activities, is based on new job listings and recruiter searches on Naukri.com. The report captures hiring activity across various industries, cities, functional areas, and experience bands. Investors and interested parties can access the report on the company's website at https://www.infoedge.in/InvestorRelations/NaukriJobSpeak.

announcements.subject: Vivimed Labs Ltd - 532660 - Initial Disclosure
announcements.detail: Initial disclosure- Not Large corporate

This declaration is made in compliance with the SEBI circular. The company requests that this information be taken on record and acknowledged.

announcements.subject: Midwest Gold Ltd - 526570 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Regulations) 2015.
announcements.detail: Midwest Energy Devices Private Limited, Step-down subsidiary company has commenced trial production at its Lithium Battery Assembly Line and Certification - Led BESS Platform.
announcements.ai_summary: Midwest Gold Ltd announced that its step-down subsidiary, Midwest Energy Devices Private Limited, has commenced trial production at its Lithium Battery Assembly Line and Certification-Led BESS Platform. This facility, located in Bengaluru, has a semi-automated, process-driven manufacturing platform with an initial annual capacity of 1 GWh, which has a roadmap to scale up to 3 GWh. The production line is designed for traceability, process control, validation rigor, and certification readiness, verifying each battery cell before production and testing finished units. The platform offers flexibility to handle different cell types, pack capacities, and configurations, supporting Midwest's branded BESS products, contract manufacturing, and customized battery pack requirements. The company is currently advancing two flagship BESS platforms under certification-led development, including a 418 kWh Outdoor BESS Unit.

announcements.subject: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd - 533326 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has received an order from Southern Railway valued at Rs. 39.26 crores (excluding taxes). The order is for the Design, Supply, Erection, Testing, and Commissioning of 25kV Traction Over Head Equipment (OHE) on the proposed doubling of track between Thiruvananthapuram and Eraniel stations, including modifications to existing OHE in the Thiruvananthapuram division. The entire work is to be completed within 36 months from the date of the Letter of Acceptance. This announcement was made on April 6, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has confirmed that its promoter, promoter group, or group companies do not have any interest in the entity awarding the order.

announcements.company: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd has executed a contract with Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL), Mumbai Refinery, Mahul, for the supply of Metallic drums/barrels. The aggregate contract value is Rs. 1,06,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Six Lakh only). The supplies will be made to BPCL at their Mumbai Refinery. This order reinforces the company's long-standing relationship with BPCL and its position as a trusted supplier, highlighting its manufacturing capabilities and commitment to quality. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and was announced on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Neetu Yoshi Ltd - 544434 - Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Neetu Yoshi Ltd announced on April 6, 2026, that it has fully repaid all its outstanding bank borrowings, making the company debt-free as of that date. This repayment was funded through internal accruals. The company expects this development to strengthen its financial statements, improve its debt-equity position, enhance financial flexibility, and reduce future finance costs. Neetu Yoshi Ltd plans to continue focusing on strengthening its financial position, improving operational efficiencies, and pursuing growth opportunities.

The total amount issued for these NCDs is Rs. 23,00,00,000. The company has also submitted these details to the depositories.

announcements.subject: Ethos Ltd - 543532 - Opening Of Ethos Watch Boutiques At Jodhpur
announcements.detail: Opening of Ethos Watch Boutiques at Jodhpur
announcements.ai_summary: The company Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, located at Upper Ground Floor, UG, Shop No.02, K Mall, Plot 13 -18, Pali Road, Sushil Nagar. This expansion marks a significant milestone in strengthening their luxury brand portfolio and further consolidates their presence in a prominent luxury retail market in India. With this new launch, Ethos Limited now operates 94 boutiques across India, aiming to make exclusive brands more accessible to discerning customers and deliver unparalleled luxury experiences. The company has not provided any specific financial figures related to this expansion.

announcements.subject:
Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd - 531910 - Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Go-Live Of Content Integration With Airtel Xstream Platform
announcements.detail: Go-Live of Content Integration with Airtel Xstream Platform
announcements.ai_summary: JOJO Limited, formerly known as Madhuveer Com 18 Network Limited, has announced the successful go-live of its content integration with Airtel Xstream Platform. The company's technical team has completed the development, testing, and deployment of API servers for content metadata and updates in the production environment. This integration ensures JOJO App's availability to Airtel's user base, and Airtel has commenced content consumption through the app. This development signifies an expansion of JOJO Limited's digital distribution presence across Airtel's ecosystem and network.

announcements.subject: Waaree Energies Ltd - 544277 - Commencement Of Commercial Production
announcements.detail: Commencement of Commercial Production by Sangam Solar One Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary at Samakhiali-Kutch, Gujrat, India.
announcements.ai_summary: Waaree Energies Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Sangam Solar One Private Limited, has commenced commercial production at its facility in Samakhiali-Kutch, Gujarat, India, effective April 06, 2026, at 10:00 am. The subsidiary has established four solar module line manufacturing facilities, each with an annual capacity of 750 MW, totaling 3000 MW per annum. This commencement of operations is a significant development for the company's manufacturing capabilities in the solar energy sector.

announcements.subject: Nimbus Projects Ltd - 511714 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Nimbus Projects Ltd has successfully listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) on April 06, 2026, in addition to its existing listing on the BSE since 2000. This dual listing is expected to enhance stock liquidity, improve price discovery, and provide broader access to institutional and retail investors. The stock opened at INR 199 on the NSE on its listing day. The company, a real estate developer, has approximately 3 million square feet under development, focusing on residential and mixed-use assets. With over three decades of experience, Nimbus Projects has a market capitalization in the range of ₹350-365 crore, with shares trading close to book value.

announcements.subject: Bharti Airtel Ltd - 532454 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We are enclosing herewith a press release dated April 06, 2026 titled ''Airtel expands its 5G network footprint across UP East with over 4300+ new sites'' being issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has announced the expansion of its 5G network footprint across UP East, deploying over 4300 new sites in the last 12 months. This expansion covers 48 districts and aims to strengthen network presence for approximately 34 million people across urban, growth towns, and rural areas. The company is averaging the deployment of 12 new sites daily to enhance high-speed connectivity for work, education, entertainment, and digital payments. Customers in cities like Lucknow, Kanpur, Varanasi, and Ayodhya will benefit from this enhanced coverage, supporting the digital needs of citizens, students, micro-entrepreneurs, enterprises, and government institutions. This initiative underscores Airtel's commitment to strengthening digital connectivity and making sustained investments in advanced network infrastructure in UP East.

announcements.subject: Max Estates Ltd - 544008 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Max Estates Limited announced its pre-sales performance for the financial year 2026, achieving total pre-sales of approximately INR 5,305 crore, marking the second consecutive year of surpassing INR 5,000 crore. The fourth quarter of FY2026 contributed significantly with approximately INR 3,392 crore in bookings. Key project performances include Estate 105 (Noida) which booked approximately INR 1,783 crore within 10 days of its March 20 launch, and Estate 361 (Gurugram) which achieved pre-sales of approximately INR 1,704 crore since its December 2025 launch. The company has a total Gross Development Value (GDV) pipeline of over INR 16,000 crore for FY27 onwards.

The associate company contributed INR 417.95 Lakhs in turnover and INR 198.97 Lakhs in net worth during the last financial year, representing 4.06% and 1.93% of the listed entity's respective figures. The company has provided the required details as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

This declaration is made in reference to SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144. The company has requested the exchange to take note of this non-applicability.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of Secured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures On Private Placement Basis
announcements.detail: Outcome of board meeting held on 06.04.2026 regarding allotment of 7500 secured, rated, listed, redeemable Non-convertible Debentures on private placement basis aggregating to Rs. 75 crore is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited's board of directors, in a meeting held on April 6, 2026, has approved the allotment of 7,500 Secured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). These NCDs have a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each, aggregating to a total of Rs. 75 Crores. The allotment is being made on a private placement basis to Special Situation India Fund at a coupon rate of 18% per annum. The NCDs are intended to be listed on BSE Limited. This action follows previous communications regarding the issuance of these debentures.

announcements.subject: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd - 544111 - Press Release On Launch Of Three New Hotels
announcements.detail: Press Release on launch of three new hotels
announcements.ai_summary: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Limited has announced the launch of three new hotels on March 31, 2026, as part of its growth strategy. These new properties include Zone by The Park Darjeeling, Zone Connect by The Park Gangtok, and Zone Connect by The Park Katra. The launch in Darjeeling marks the company's entry into a key hill destination, offering its signature design-forward approach. Zone Connect by The Park Gangtok aims to cater to both leisure and adventure travelers in a popular hill location. Zone Connect by The Park Katra will serve pilgrims and travelers in a prominent spiritual destination. This expansion strengthens the company's position in India's design-led and mid-scale hospitality segments.

announcements.subject: Greaves Cotton Ltd - 501455 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
Please find enclosed herewith Press Release issued by Greaves Electric Mobility Limited, subsidiary of the Company, with the heading "Ampere Mangus Grand by Greaves Electric Mobility Wins Bike India Electric Scooter of the Year 2026".

Kindly take the same on record.
announcements.ai_summary: Greaves Cotton Limited has announced that its subsidiary, Greaves Electric Mobility Limited, has received the "Bike India Electric Scooter of the Year 2026" award for its Ampere Magnus Grand e-scooter. This award recognizes the Ampere Magnus Grand for its balance of performance, technology, and everyday usability, particularly its positioning within the affordable EV segment under ₹1 Lakh. The e-scooter features a dual-frame chassis for stability and durability, and is powered by a Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) battery with a 5-year or 75,000 km warranty. This recognition highlights Greaves Electric Mobility's focus on delivering reliable, practical, and accessible electric mobility solutions for Indian consumers.

announcements.subject: Bank of Baroda - 532134 - Bank Of Baroda Outstanding Bonds As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Outstanding Bonds as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of Baroda has submitted a statement of its outstanding bonds as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with Chapter VIII, Clause 10.1 (a) of the SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021. The statement details nine outstanding bond issuances with varying maturity dates, coupon rates, and payment frequencies. Notably, the bank has perpetual bonds with coupon rates ranging from 7.95% p.a. to 8.00% p.a., and other bonds with maturity dates extending up to September 11, 2034. The total outstanding amount across these bonds as of March 31, 2026, is ₹204,23,00,00,000.

announcements.subject: LTIMindtree Ltd - 540005 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Ltd (now LTM Limited) has issued a press release announcing that it will offer MIT Open Learning's Universal AI program to its workforce in cooperation with upGrad Enterprise. This initiative aims to institutionalize foundational AI reasoning across LTM's talent pool, empowering employees in both tech and non-tech functions. The Universal AI program, developed by MIT Open Learning faculty, covers 16 foundational modules and vertical-specific modules, requiring no coding and suitable for all skill levels. This upskilling effort is intended to equip employees with scientific thinking and first-principles reasoning skills for success in an AI-driven economy and for long-term career development.

announcements.subject: Praruh Technologies Ltd - 544538 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31(4) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: With reference to the captioned subject and in terms of the disclosure required under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, we are pleased to submit the copy of declaration received from promoter and promoters'' group that they have not made any encumbrance, directly or indirectly, during the Financial Year 2025-26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Praruh Technologies Ltd has received a declaration from its promoter and promoter group confirming that no encumbrance has been made, directly or indirectly, on the company's shares during the Financial Year 2025-2026. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) and (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company will provide necessary disclosures in case of any future creation, invocation, or release of encumbrances on the shares held by the promoter and promoter group. The declaration was submitted on April 06, 2026.

announcements.subject: UCO Bank - 532505 - Provisional Business Figures Of The Bank As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures of the Bank as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: UCO Bank has released its provisional business figures as of March 31, 2026. The bank's total business stood at Rs. 5.89 lakh crore, marking a 6.32% quarter-on-quarter growth and a 14.59% year-on-year growth. Total advances reached Rs. 2.62 lakh crore, with a 7.38% Q-o-Q and 19.09% Y-o-Y increase. Total deposits were Rs. 3.27 lakh crore, showing a 5.48% Q-o-Q and 11.22% Y-o-Y growth. Domestic advances grew by 8.84% Q-o-Q and 20.00% Y-o-Y to Rs. 2.34 lakh crore, while domestic deposits increased by 4.11% Q-o-Q and 10.14% Y-o-Y to Rs. 3.04 lakh crore. The CASA Ratio (Domestic) was 38.48% and the CD Ratio was 80.12%. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the Bank's Statutory Central Auditors.

announcements.subject: Goldiam International Ltd - 526729 - Intimation Of Opening Of Twenty-Second (22Nd) And Twenty-Third (23Rd) Retail Stores For Lab-Grown Diamond Jewellery Under The Brand Name 'ORIGEM'.
announcements.detail: Intimation of opening of 22nd & 23rd retail stores-ORIGEM
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Goldiam International Ltd has opened its 22nd and 23rd retail stores for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name 'ORIGEM'. The new stores commenced operations on April 6, 2026, and are located at Shop No 2, Ground Floor, Sama Towers, Himayathnagar, Hyderabad 500029, and No:27, Aljosan, New BEL Road, Bangalore, 560054. This expansion is part of the company's strategy to increase its retail footprint and enhance customer engagement. The company previously announced the opening of 19 other retail stores. This development is in line with Goldiam International Ltd's growth objectives.

announcements.subject: Keystone Realtors Ltd - 543669 - Key Operational Updates
announcements.detail: Key Operational Updated for Q4FY26 & FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Keystone Realtors Limited has provided key operational updates for Q4FY26 and FY26. For FY26, the company achieved its highest ever pre-sales of INR 40.22 billion, a 33% YoY growth from INR 30.28 billion in FY25, and its highest ever collections of INR 26.21 billion, a 13% YoY growth from INR 23.27 billion in FY25. In Q4FY26, pre-sales reached INR 13.46 billion, a 58% YoY increase from INR 8.54 billion in Q4FY25, and collections were INR 8.53 billion, a 14% YoY increase from INR 7.47 billion in Q4FY25. The company launched 7 projects in FY26 with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of INR 98.13 billion, a 96% YoY growth from FY25, achieving 140% of its launch guidance. Additionally, Keystone Realtors added 5 projects in FY26 with an estimated GDV of INR 104.20 billion, a significant increase from INR 47.83 billion in FY25.

announcements.subject: Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd - 543411 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Sales Volume Update Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hi-Tech Pipes Limited has announced its highest-ever sales volume for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4FY26), reaching 1,47,125 MT. This represents a significant increase of approximately 27% compared to 1,16,032 MT in Q4FY25 and an 8% sequential growth from 1,38,6067 MT in Q3FY26. For the full fiscal year FY26, the company achieved its highest-ever annual sales volume of 5,32,437 MT, a growth of approximately 10% over FY25's volume of 4,85,447 MT. The company attributes this strong performance to its focus on operational efficiency, capacity utilization, and market presence. Hi-Tech Pipes operates six integrated manufacturing facilities with a combined installed capacity of 10,50,000 MTPA and has a direct marketing presence in over 20 states with more than 550 dealers and distributors.

announcements.subject: Bank of Maharashtra - 532525 - Disclosure Of Provisional Business Figures As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Provisional Business Figures as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bank of Maharashtra has disclosed its provisional business figures as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The bank reported a Total Business of ₹6,42,700 crores as of March 31, 2026, representing an 18% year-on-year growth from ₹5,46,979 crores on March 31, 2025. Total Deposits grew by 14% to ₹3,50,585 crores, while CASA Deposits increased by 13% to ₹1,84,110 crores, maintaining a CASA percentage of 53%. Global Advances saw a significant 22% increase to ₹2,92,115 crores, with RAM Advances growing by 21% to ₹1,79,847 crores. The Domestic CD Ratio improved to 82% from 78%. These figures are provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: Calcom Vision Ltd - 517236 - Sales Performance For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Sales Performance for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Calcom Vision Ltd has provided an update on its sales performance for the quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. The company is adhering to SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. This announcement is intended to inform stakeholders about the sales figures for the specified periods. Further details regarding the sales performance are expected to be available in the enclosed document.

announcements.subject: Jindal Steel Ltd - 532286 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Steel has announced a significant advancement in India's energy sector by pioneering the use of swadeshi coal through advanced coal gasification. The company achieved a global first by establishing India's first coal gasification-based Direct Reduced Iron (DRI) plant, utilizing syngas for iron-making. In response to fuel shortages, Jindal Steel has successfully deployed syngas in galvanizing and color coating line furnaces, a first for the steel industry, to mitigate supply disruptions. Furthermore, the company has pioneered syngas injection into its blast furnace, reducing reliance on imported coking coal and lowering carbon emissions per tonne of steel. This integrated approach across the steelmaking value chain aims to enhance efficiency, sustainability, and energy self-reliance, supported by government policies like the National Coal Gasification Mission.

announcements.subject: Desco Infratech Ltd - 544387 - Intimation Regarding Incorporation Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company In Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone (RAKEZ), UAE
announcements.detail: details attached
announcements.ai_summary: Desco Infratech Limited has announced the incorporation of its wholly owned subsidiary, DESCO GLOBAL FZ LLC, in Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone (RAKEZ), UAE. The incorporation date was March 25, 2026, with the Certificate of Incorporation issued by the Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority on the same date. This follows the company's board approval on January 17, 2026, to establish this subsidiary. DESCO GLOBAL FZ LLC has a registered office in RAKEZ, UAE, with registration number 0000004084240. The subsidiary has 10 shares with a share capital of AED 10000. The size and turnover are not yet applicable as the business has not commenced.

announcements.subject: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd - 524804 - Transfer Of Company''s Domestic Branded Pharmaceutical Formulation Business To Auropharm Limited, A Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of The Company.,
announcements.detail: Intimation of transfer of Company''s domestic branded pharmaceutical formulation business to Auropharm Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Aurobindo Pharma Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 6, 2026, approved the transfer of the company's domestic branded generic pharmaceutical formulations business to Auropharm Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary. This transfer will be executed on a going concern basis through a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA). The move aligns with Aurobindo Pharma's strategy to further streamline and accelerate its domestic business for faster growth. The domestic branded pharmaceutical formulation business contributed Rs. 1,753.40 Million, or 0.55%, to the consolidated turnover of the listed entity in the last financial year. Its net worth contribution was Rs. 1,481.40 Million, or 0.45%, of the consolidated net worth. The Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) was executed on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Trent Ltd - 500251 - Update For Q4FY26 And FY26
announcements.detail: Update for Q4FY26 and FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Trent Ltd has provided an update on its revenue and store count for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, standalone revenue from operations (excluding GST) was Rs. 4,937 crore, a 20% year-on-year growth from Rs. 4,106 crore in Q4 FY25. For the full FY26, standalone revenue reached Rs. 19,701 crore, an 18% increase from Rs. 16,668 crore in FY25. Revenue from the sale of merchandise grew by 21% in Q4 FY26 and 19% in FY26. As of March 31, 2026, Trent's portfolio comprises 1286 stores, including 300 Westside stores, 963 Zudio stores (with 6 in the UAE), and 23 stores across other lifestyle concepts. The standalone revenue figures are subject to audit.

announcements.subject: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd - 544447 - Press Release - 'Smartworks Expands Multi-City Managed Office Deal With Forbes 2000 Global CX Leader ; Client Portfolio Now Spans Four Cities With Over 5,000 Seats ; Expected Rental Revenue From All Locations Exceeds INR 155 Cr.'
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Press Release dated 06th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited has announced the expansion of its multi-city managed office deal with a Forbes 2000 global CX leader. The client's portfolio now spans four cities: Bengaluru, Kolkata, Hyderabad, and Mumbai, with an increased total seat count of over 5,000 seats, including an additional 1,150 seats at the Tata Intellion Park in Navi Mumbai. The combined expected rental revenue from all these locations is projected to exceed INR 155 Cr. This includes the newly signed Mumbai managed office deal valued at INR 51 Cr. The company has also made the press release available on its investor website.

announcements.subject: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd - 540750 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: IEX Power Market Update FISCAL''26, Q4FY''26 & March''26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd (IEX) has announced its power market update for Fiscal Year 2026 (FY’26), the fourth quarter of FY’26 (Q4FY’26), and March 2026. In FY’26, IEX achieved a record 141 Billion Units (BU) of electricity traded, a 17% year-on-year (YoY) increase, with the Real-Time Market (RTM) growing by 41% YoY and the Green Market by 23% YoY. IEX also recorded its highest ever yearly trade of Renewable Energy Certificates (RECs), with 187.20 lakh RECs traded, a 5% YoY increase. The average DAM price was Rs 3.86/unit, down 13.7% YoY, and the average RTM price was Rs 3.59/unit, down 16% YoY. In Q4FY’26, IEX saw its highest ever quarterly traded electricity volume of 39.4 BU, up 24.3% YoY, with RTM growing 48.2% YoY and the Green Market up 26.5% YoY. March 2026 marked the highest ever monthly traded electricity volume of 13.90 BU, a 23.5% YoY increase, with RTM growing 41.7% YoY and the Green Market up 28.3% YoY.

announcements.subject: Wipro Ltd - 507685 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Press Release - Wipro Wins One of its Largest Strategic Transformation Engagements from Food and Agri-Business Leader Olam Group
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Wipro Limited has secured a multi-year strategic transformation deal with Olam Group, a leading food and agri-business headquartered in Singapore with revenues exceeding US$50 billion. This engagement, expected to exceed US$1 billion in contract value with a committed spend of US$800 million over 8 years, will see Wipro deliver end-to-end transformation services using a consulting-led and AI-powered approach. As part of this deal, Wipro will also acquire Olam Group’s IT and digital services business, Mindsprint. The transformation will focus on Olam Group's 'farm-to-fork' value chain, including farming, forecasting, trading, supply chain operations, and customer engagement, aiming to improve operational effectiveness and support long-term growth. The announcement was made on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: AXIS Bank Ltd - 532215 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: AXIS Bank Ltd has provided an update on its key financial figures as of March 31, 2026, which are provisional and subject to audit. Gross Advances reached ₹12,442 billion, a 6.3% quarter-on-quarter and 18.4% year-on-year increase. Total Deposits stood at ₹13,358 billion, up 6.0% QoQ and 13.9% YoY. CASA deposits were ₹5,289 billion (up 7.3% QoQ, 10.6% YoY), while Term Deposits were ₹8,069 billion (up 5.1% QoQ, 16.1% YoY). Quarterly Average Total Deposits were ₹12,265 billion, with Average CASA at ₹4,583 billion and Average Term Deposits at ₹7,682 billion. This information is provided in accordance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Godavari Biorefineries Ltd - 544279 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: The highest crushing during the current sugarcane crushing session 25-26
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Godavari Biorefineries Ltd, has announced a significant operational achievement. As of April 5, 2026, they have recorded the highest sugarcane crushing volume to date during the 25-26 crushing session at their Sameerwadi unit, reaching 2.5 million tonnes. This figure represents the highest crushing volume in the company's history for a single crushing session. The current crushing session is scheduled to conclude on April 7, 2026. This update is for informational purposes and records.

announcements.subject: Windsor Machines Ltd - 522029 - Update
announcements.detail: General Update about the Application for Promoter Reclassification (Erstwhile Promoters i.e. Castle Equipments Private Limited and Ghodbunder Developers Private Limited)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Windsor Machines Limited has filed an application for promoter reclassification on February 19, 2026. This application pertains to the erstwhile promoters, Castle Equipments Private Limited and Ghodbunder Developers Private Limited, who will now be classified as public. This update is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543942 - Provisional Business Updates For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026 (Un-Audited)
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Updates for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 (Un-audited)
announcements.ai_summary: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd has released its provisional business updates for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Total disbursements for Q4 FY26 reached ₹4,207 crore, a 30.1% year-on-year increase from ₹3,235 crore in Q4 FY25. The Gross Loan Portfolio stood at ₹19,333 crore as of March 31, 2026, a slight decrease of 1.7% from ₹19,666 crore in the previous year, with the Non-JLG Loan Portfolio growing by 29.5% to ₹13,544 crore. Total Deposits increased by 0.4% year-on-year to ₹21,654 crore, driven by a 19.6% rise in Retail Term Deposits to ₹12,720 crore, while CASA Deposits grew by 10.6% to ₹5,196 crore. The CASA Ratio improved to 24.0% and the CASA + Retail Term Deposits Ratio stood at 82.7%. The Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) was 177% as of March 31, 2026. This information is provisional and subject to audit and board approval.

announcements.subject: Belrise Industries Ltd - 544405 - Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, ('SEBI Listing Regulations') Read With Para B Of Part A Of Schedule III
announcements.detail: Belrise Industries Ltd informed the exchange regarding issue of corporate guarantee.
announcements.ai_summary: Belrise Industries Ltd has issued a Corporate Guarantee in favour of Mr. Alan Brian Brown, Ms. Carole Amy Brown, Mr. Philip Graham Brown, Ms. Sarah Louise Hoyle, and Mr. Dean David Halsey (collectively the "Sellers"). The guarantee is for the payment of deferred consideration amounting to GBP 1,980,000, representing the "Maximum Liability". This Corporate Guarantee has been issued as security in connection with a Share Purchase Agreement dated March 18, 2026, between Belrise UK Holdings Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of the company, and the shareholders of Chester Hall Precision Engineering Holdings Limited. The guarantee provides financial support to the step-down subsidiary for the transaction and represents a contingent liability for Belrise Industries Ltd. The disclosure containing required details is annexed as 'Annexure A' and will be hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Indusind Bank Ltd - 532187 - Intimation Under SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the captioned intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: IndusInd Bank Limited has provided an intimation under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. The bank has disclosed key financial metrics as of March 31, 2026, compared to December 31, 2025, and March 31, 2025. Net advances stood at Rs. 3,15,154 crores as of March 31, 2026, showing a year-on-year decrease of 8.7% and a quarter-on-quarter decrease of 0.8%. Deposits were Rs. 4,00,178 crores as of March 31, 2026, a year-on-year decrease of 2.6% and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 1.6%. The CASA ratio was 31.3% as of March 31, 2026. Retail deposits and deposits from small business customers amounted to Rs. 1,91,276 crores as of March 31, 2026. This information is subject to audit by the statutory auditors and has been uploaded on the bank's website.

announcements.subject: Shree Cement Ltd - 500387 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: It is hereby informed that Board of Directors of the Company has today (i.e. on 4th April, 2026), approved setting up of an Integrated Cement Plant having Clinker capacity of 0.95 MTPA and Cement capacity of 0.99 MTPA at Village Daistong, East Jaintia Hills District in the state of Meghalaya.
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Cement Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the establishment of a new Integrated Cement Plant in Meghalaya. The proposed plant, located at Village Daistong, East Jaintia Hills District, will have a clinker capacity of 0.95 MTPA and a cement capacity of 0.99 MTPA. The company plans to add this new capacity by the quarter ending March 2028. The estimated investment required for this expansion is Rs. 1800 crores, which will be financed through internal accruals and debt. This strategic move is aimed at business expansion for the company.

announcements.subject: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543942 - Business Updates For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: un- audited /provisional Business update for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd has provided its un-audited/provisional business updates for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Total disbursements for Q4 FY26 were INR 4,207 crore, a 30.1% year-on-year increase from INR 3,235 crore in Q4 FY25. Gross Loan Portfolio stood at INR 19,333 crore, a slight decrease of 1.7% from INR 19,666 crore in the previous year, with the Non-JLG Loan Portfolio growing by 29.5% to INR 13,544 crore. Total Deposits increased by 0.4% to INR 21,654 crore in Q4 FY26, with CASA Deposits rising by 10.6% to INR 5,196 crore. The CASA Ratio improved to 24.0% from 21.8% in Q4 FY25. Micro-banking asset quality shows a strong X Bucket Collection Efficiency of 99.7% and an SMA Pool of 1.3% as of Q4 FY26. The Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) was 177% as of March 31, 2026. This information is provisional and subject to audit by the Joint Statutory Auditors and approval by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors.

announcements.company: IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd
announcements.subject:
IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd - 532907 - Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount For Loans
                    Including Revolving Facilities Like Cash Credit From Banks / Financial Institutions
announcements.detail:
Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount for loans including revolving
                    facilities like cash credit from banks / financial institutions
announcements.ai_summary: IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd has disclosed defaults on payment of interest and principal amounts for loans from banks and financial institutions as of March 31, 2026. The total outstanding amount for loans and revolving facilities like cash credit from banks/financial institutions is INR 2,627.51 crore, with the entire amount being in default as of the reporting date. There are no defaults reported for unlisted debt securities such as NCDs and NCRPS. The company's total financial indebtedness, including short-term and long-term debt, stands at INR 3,097.07 crore. No interest is being accrued or provided post the cutoff date, as defined by the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal order dated March 12, 2020, except for interest on the Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL).

The CASA ratio stood at 35.1% (including CDs), and the Credit to Deposit Ratio was 85.4%. The Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) was 119.0%. This information is preliminary and subject to approval by the Audit Committee, Board of Directors, and statutory auditors before official announcement.

announcements.subject: Mangalam Global Enterprise Ltd - 544273 - General-Update
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited has informed the exchange that the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has passed a Settlement Order dated March 30, 2026, in a matter involving the company and certain individuals. The individuals have settled the matter under the SEBI (Settlement Proceedings) Regulations, 2018, by paying settlement amounts without admitting or denying the findings. The proceedings initiated by SEBI via a Show Cause Notice dated February 10, 2025, are now disposed of. The alleged violations pertained to misstatement and misrepresentation of financial statements and the recording of fictitious accounting entries. The company has taken the order on record based on its availability on SEBI's official website, as it has not yet received formal communication.

announcements.subject: KP Green Engineering Ltd - 544150 - Press Release - KP Group Joins Delhi Capitals As Associate Sponsor For Indian Premier League (IPL) Seasons 2026-2028
announcements.detail: KP Green Engineering Limited has informed the exchange regarding Press Release titled 'KP Group joins Delhi Capitals as Associate Sponsor for Indian Premier League (IPL) Seasons 2026-2028.' The Disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: KP Green Engineering Ltd has announced a significant sponsorship deal, with KP Group becoming an Associate Sponsor for the Delhi Capitals in the Indian Premier League (IPL) for the seasons 2026, 2027, and 2028. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the company's brand visibility and engage with stakeholders by leveraging the widespread appeal of cricket. The sponsorship, involving entities like KPI Green Energy Limited, KP Green Engineering Limited, and K.P. Energy Limited, will provide a platform for brand visibility and fan engagement across digital, on-ground, and team-led initiatives. The company intends to promote its renewable energy and sustainability vision to a broader audience, connecting with millions of cricket fans across India and beyond. This initiative is expected to amplify the group's vision and establish a more prominent national and international brand presence.

announcements.subject: K.P. Energy Ltd - 539686 - Press Release - KP Group Joins Delhi Capitals As Associate Sponsor For Indian Premier League (IPL) Seasons 2026-2028
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited informed the Exchange regarding press release titled KP Group joins Delhi Capitals as Associate Sponsor for Indian Premier League (IPL) Seasons 2026-2028.
announcements.ai_summary: K.P. Energy Limited has announced that the KP Group, which includes KPI Green Energy Limited and KP Green Engineering Limited, has become an Associate Sponsor for the Delhi Capitals team for the Indian Premier League (IPL) seasons from 2026 to 2028. This sponsorship is expected to boost the company's brand visibility and stakeholder engagement by tapping into the massive audience of the IPL. The KP Group aims to use this platform to extend its renewable energy and sustainability message beyond the industry and connect with millions of cricket fans. This partnership is viewed as a significant step in amplifying the group's vision and expanding its renewable energy footprint globally. The announcement was made on April 4th, 2026.

announcements.subject: ESAF Small Finance Bank Ltd - 544020 - Key Business Updates For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Key Business Updates for the Quarter ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: ESAF Small Finance Bank Ltd has provided key business updates for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Total deposits grew by 11.05% year-on-year to ₹25,850 Crore, with CASA deposits increasing by 6.88% YoY to ₹6,181 Crore, resulting in a CASA ratio of 23.91%. Gross advances saw a significant increase of 19.42% YoY to ₹22,426 Crore, driven by a 37.88% growth in retail and other loans to ₹13,680 Crore. The bank's customer base reached 1.02 Crore as of March 31, 2026, with 8.01 lakh new customers added during the year. The distribution network comprises 804 branches, 720 ATMs, and 1049 Customer Service Centres across 24 states and 2 union territories. The bank also reported the sale of NPAs amounting to ₹1,019 Crore during the financial year. This information is provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: Nutricircle Ltd - 530219 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI (LODR) 2015- SSP Project Agreement
announcements.detail: ENCLOSED HEERWITH AGREEMENT ENTERED BY COMPANY FOR SSP PROJECT ON DATED 02/04/2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nutricircle Limited has entered into an SSP Project Agreement with Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR-CFTRI) on April 2nd, 2026. The purpose of this agreement is to develop fermented chickpea ingredients, aiming to enhance protein bioavailability and techno-functional properties. CSIR-CFTRI possesses expertise in microbiology and fermentation technology, which will be utilized for this development activity. The agreement outlines Phase I of the project, which involves strain screening to select superior microbial strains based on proteolytic activity, probiotic potential, and the ability to degrade anti-nutritional factors. This collaboration is a binding agreement not in the normal course of business for Nutricircle Limited.

Secondly, the company will provide a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 5,00,00,000 (Rs. Five Crore) to Standard Chartered Bank for Avyom Foodtech Private Limited. This corporate guarantee is subject to the approval of shareholders in a General Meeting. The meeting commenced at 3:57 PM and concluded at 4:05 PM.

announcements.subject: Shreeji Shipping Global Ltd - 544490 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are pleased to inform you that our Company has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from Kerwa Coal Limited (KCL) as Mine developer &  Operator along with lead bid member M/s. Nuravi Imports and Exports Private Limited (Nuravi), for a period of twenty years from the date of execution of agreement and may be extended for another period of five years at the sole discretion of KCL, pursuant ....
announcements.ai_summary: Shreeji Shipping Global Limited has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from Kerwa Coal Limited (KCL) to act as a Mine Developer & Operator. The company is part of a consortium with M/s. Nuravi Imports and Exports Private Limited, where Shreeji Shipping Global Limited will hold a 49% stake and Nuravi will hold 51%. This award is for a period of twenty (20) years, with a potential extension of five (5) years at KCL's discretion. The award was granted to the consortium as the second eligible bidder (H2 bidder) after the first bidder failed to meet obligations. The company received the communication of this award on March 27, 2026, with the delay in disclosure attributed to late physical courier receipt. The LOA is contingent on fulfilling certain conditions precedent, including the submission of a Security Deposit and/or Performance Bank Guarantee by May 15, 2026. Upon fulfillment of these conditions, the contract will become effective, and the company will proceed with the project execution.

announcements.subject: Fabtech Technologies Ltd - 544558 - Announcement On Order Booking And Business Updates
announcements.detail: Please find attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Fabtech Technologies Limited has announced a consolidated order book exceeding ₹900 crore as of March 31, 2026. The company has successfully navigated global volatility, including logistics disruptions and cost escalations, with minimal impact on its performance. Key strategic projects secured and advanced during the year include entry and expansion in the animal health segment, vaccine and advanced pharmaceutical projects in Saudi Arabia, and large-scale pharmaceutical and infrastructure projects across Africa. These developments strengthen the company's position in high-growth sectors and geographies. Fabtech Technologies Limited is optimistic about its future growth trajectory, supported by its robust order book and expanding market presence. Detailed financial results will be announced separately.

announcements.subject: Senco Gold Ltd - 543936 - Business Update Q4 & FY 26
announcements.detail: Business Update Q4 & FY 26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Senco Gold Ltd has reported a significant business update for Q4 and the full fiscal year 2026. The company achieved a wedding season-led revenue growth of approximately 46% year-on-year (YoY) in Q4 FY26, contributing to a ~35% YoY growth for FY26, a substantial increase from the 21% YoY growth in FY25. This growth was supported by a same-store sales growth (SSSG) of ~34% in Q4. The company expanded its showroom network by launching 7 new showrooms in Q4, bringing the total to 201 showrooms, comprising 102 Company-Owned Company-Operated (COCO) stores and 85 Franchisee (FRN) stores. Despite high gold price volatility in Q4 FY26, with prices surging 79% YoY to ₹1,51,783/10gm, Senco Gold managed to maintain customer purchases and gross margins by focusing on product mix optimization, particularly its 9k jewellery collection named "Cloud 9," and a pioneering virtual experience called "Shape of You."

announcements.subject: Arman Financial Services Ltd - 531179 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)

The report contains details of International Securities Identification Numbers (ISINs) for debt securities issued under the SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The company has issued five series of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with varying maturity dates and coupon rates. For instance, INE109C07105 was issued on June 5, 2025, with a maturity date of June 5, 2028, and a coupon rate of 11.65% paid monthly, with an issued amount of Rs. 40,00,00,000 and an outstanding amount of Rs. 30,00,04,000. Another series, INE109C07147, was issued on March 25, 2026, maturing on September 25, 2028, with a 10.90% coupon rate paid quarterly, and an issued and outstanding amount of Rs. 1,25,00,00,000. The company is complying with Chapter VIII of Clause 9.1 (a) of the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025.

The revised release announces an exclusive strategic partnership with UAE-based Tahaluf Al Emarat Technical Solutions L.L.C S.P.C ("Tahaluf") for advanced AI/IoT solutions in India. Under this agreement, ACS Technologies becomes Tahaluf’s Exclusive PAN India Reseller, authorized to distribute and implement Tahaluf’s AI and IoT solutions across government, defence, enterprise, and commercial segments. This partnership aims to bring internationally recognized AI innovation to India, leveraging Tahaluf’s platforms to support smart governance. The revision updates and refines content from the previous press release submitted on March 31, 2026. The company is requesting the stock exchanges to take the revised press release on record and substitute the earlier version.

announcements.subject: Zydus Wellness Ltd-$ - 531335 - Receipt Of Order By Step Down Subsidiary From Spanish Tax Authority
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order by step down subsidiary from Spanish Tax Authority
announcements.ai_summary: Comfort Click Limited (CCL), a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Zydus Wellness Ltd, has received an Order from the Spanish Tax Authority. The order alleges unpaid value-added tax (VAT) for Q1 2021 and imposes a penalty of EUR 19,472.57 due to an incorrect mapping of VAT payments. CCL believes it has strong grounds to appeal the order and intends to do so. The company has stated that this order will not have any impact on the financial, operational, or other activities of Zydus Wellness Ltd or CCL, as the impact will be limited to the final tax liability and any potential penalty. The order was received on April 3, 2026.

announcements.subject: Indokem Ltd - 504092 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31 (4) & 31 (5) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeover) Regulation, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 31(4) & 31(5) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulation, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Indokem Limited has submitted its yearly disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure pertains to the Promoter and Promoters Group of the company for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The filing is made pursuant to Regulation 31(5) of the same SEBI regulations. The company has requested that this information be taken on record by the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release issued by Hindustan Copper Limited regarding Strong Operational Performance for FY 2025-26 is submitted.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Ltd (HCL) has announced strong operational performance for the financial year 2025-26, reporting a Metal in Concentrate (MIC) production of 27,421 tonnes, a 9% increase from FY 2024-25 and the highest in seven years. Ore production reached 3.67 million tonnes, a 6% increase year-on-year. Sales of Copper MIC for the fiscal year were 27,367 tonnes, marking the best in the last five years. These achievements were driven by coordinated efforts across functional domains and HCL's resilience in a challenging operating environment. The company is progressing towards its strategic goal of achieving 12.2 MTPA mining capacity by 2030. Key milestones include the resumption of operations at Kendadih, Kolihan, and Surda mines, progress in securing statutory clearances, and advancements in greenfield projects in India and overseas. The paste fill plant at Malanjkhand Copper Project is a notable implementation of paste backfill technology.

announcements.subject: AWL Agri Business Ltd - 543458 - Quarterly Updates Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Quarterly Updates Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Ltd (formerly Adani Wilmar Ltd.) has provided quarterly updates for Q4 FY26, highlighting preliminary standalone performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported double-digit volume growth, primarily driven by strong performance in its Edible Oil and Industry Essentials segments, supported by stable consumer demand and improved distribution. The Food & FMCG business remained flat due to the consolidation of institutional rice exports. Domestically, the food business grew by 13% year-on-year, with Rice and Wheat contributing 65% of the portfolio. Sales under the Fortune and Kohinoor brands saw over 30% year-on-year volume growth, while the Wheat Flour business achieved high-single-digit volume growth. The Food & FMCG business, excluding Rice and Wheat, grew by 30% year-on-year. Detailed financial results will be disclosed after Board approval.

announcements.subject: Meghmani Organics Ltd - 543331 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 04Th April, 2026.
announcements.detail: Board approved the scheme of amalgamation of Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited being wholly owned subsidiaries with Meghmani Organics Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Meghmani Organics Limited has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation for the merger of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited, with Meghmani Organics Limited. This amalgamation will transfer all businesses, assets, liabilities, rights, and employees of the transferor companies to the transferee company on a going concern basis. The appointed date for this scheme is January 1, 2026. The merger will become effective upon the filing of the certified order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) with the Registrar of Companies. The scheme is contingent upon obtaining necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including sanctions from the NCLT, Central Government, and the shareholders and creditors of the involved companies. The draft scheme will be filed with the stock exchanges as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Disclosure Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited has disclosed that it received a Demand Notice on April 3, 2026, from the District Mining Office, Ramgarh, Jharkhand. The notice alleges the extraction of approximately 1,62,40,399 MT of coal from the Company’s West Bokaro Colliery in excess of permissible limits during the financial years 2000-01 to 2006-07. This has resulted in an aggregate demand of ₹1755,10,54,029/-. Tata Steel Limited believes the demand lacks justification and plans to pursue suitable legal remedies. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bandhan Bank Ltd - 541153 - Unaudited Financial Figures For The Quarter/ Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Unaudited Financial Figures for the Quarter/ Year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Bandhan Bank Limited has disclosed its unaudited financial figures for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. As of March 31, 2026, the bank's Loans & Advances stood at ₹154,235 crore, representing a 12.6% year-on-year increase and a 6.2% quarter-on-quarter increase. Total Deposits reached ₹166,344 crore, up 10.0% year-on-year and 6.1% quarter-on-quarter. CASA Deposits grew to ₹48,751 crore, a 2.8% year-on-year increase and a significant 14.1% quarter-on-quarter rise. Retail Deposits, including CASA, were ₹122,547 crore, up 17.7% year-on-year. The Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) was approximately 131.76% as of March 31, 2026. Pan-bank collection efficiency (excluding NPA) for March 2026 was 98.9%. These figures are provisional and subject to review by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors, as well as audit by the Statutory Auditors.

announcements.subject: Himalaya Food International Ltd - 526899 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release BSE -Himalaya Food International Ltd. Secures Landmark OTS Extension Approval; Achieves Decisive Breakthrough in Debt Resolution.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Himalaya Food International Ltd announced on April 4, 2026, that its consortium of lenders, led by the State Bank of India, has approved an extension for its One Time Settlement (OTS) proposal. The OTS has been extended until September 2026, providing a clear runway for its closure. The company has already deposited ₹21.50 Crore, representing 50% of the final settlement amount of ₹43 Crore, and has paid a total of ₹77 Crores to date. This breakthrough is expected to de-risk the company's balance sheet and pave the way for asset monetization, capital infusion, and expansion of export-driven verticals.

The application, initially submitted on November 14, 2025, sought to reclassify two promoters, Mr. Mahavir Golechha and Ms. Shailaja Katar, from the "Promoter" category to the "Public" category. However, these promoters have now decided to withdraw their application via letters dated April 1, 2026. Consequently, Mr. Mahavir Golechha and Ms. Shailaja Katar will continue to be classified as part of the Promoters of Filatex Fashions Limited. The company has requested the stock exchanges to note this withdrawal in their records.

announcements.detail: Intimation under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Bank Limited has provided an update on its financial performance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The bank's average advances under management grew by approximately 10.0% year-on-year to ₹ 29,644 billion, with period-end gross advances reaching ₹ 29,600 billion, a 12.0% increase from ₹ 26,435 billion in March 2025. Average deposits grew by 12.8% to ₹ 28,511 billion, and period-end deposits stood at ₹ 31,055 billion, a 14.4% increase. Period-end CASA deposits grew 12.3% to ₹ 10,605 billion.

announcements.company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd
announcements.subject: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd - 500312 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - ONGC stabilises Fire Incident at SHP Platform, Mumbai High
announcements.ai_summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) has announced that a fire incident at its SHP Platform, Mumbai High Asset, which occurred at approximately 17:45 PM on April 3, 2026, has been stabilized and extinguished. Ten personnel sustained minor injuries and are under medical care, with all reported to be stable. Operations at the platform have been normalized. The press release was issued by ONGC's Corporate Communications department in New Delhi.

announcements.subject: Triton Valves Ltd - 505978 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: please find enclosed an intimation with regard to company receipt of a contract  from an international customer, kindly refer to the attached document for detailed information.
announcements.ai_summary: Triton Valves Ltd has secured a significant contract with Aumovio Germany GmbH, a German automotive technology company. This agreement, effective from the end of the third quarter of FY 2027-28, is for the supply of TPMS Valves and has a potential duration of 7 years. For its India-based entity, Aumovio will require Triton Valves to supply 4.7 crore parts between Calendar Year 2027 and Calendar Year 2031. This is expected to generate approximately INR 112 crore in revenue over the initial five-year period. The contract is anticipated to enhance the company's profitability and cash flow, demonstrating the international acceptance of its products and its technical capabilities. While the current agreement details sales volumes for the first five years, both parties are optimistic about future volumes for the sixth and seventh years. The exact value for the full seven-year term may increase due to international commodity prices and market conditions.

announcements.subject: Diligent Industries Ltd - 531153 - Allotment Of Oil Palm Mandals Under The Government Of Andhra Pradesh'S Oil Palm Development Initiative
announcements.detail: Allotment of Oil Plam Mandals under the Government of Andhra Pradesh''s Oil Palm Development Initiative.
announcements.ai_summary: Diligent Industries Limited has been allotted 9 mandals by the Government of Andhra Pradesh under the Oil Palm Development Programme, as part of the National Mission on Edible Oils – Oil Palm (NMEO-OP). The allotment was made via G.O. Ms. No. 16 dated April 2, 2026. Specifically, the company has been allocated 3 mandals in Guntur District (Tadikonda, Medikonduru, and Prathipadu) and 6 mandals in Palnadu District (Narasaraopet, Rompicharla, Atchampet, Krosuru, Nekarikallu, and Pedakurapadu). This allotment is expected to significantly strengthen the company's backward integration in oil palm cultivation, enhance long-term raw material security, and expand its operational footprint in the edible oil segment, potentially leading to the establishment of an integrated processing facility.

announcements.subject: Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 544319 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Media Release
announcements.ai_summary: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the formation of a strategic joint venture in the United States through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Senores Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (SPI). The company executed a formal Operating Agreement on April 2, 2026, to establish a Joint Venture entity named Amerisyn, LLC. This JV is designed to position Senores for supplies to the U.S. Federal and Defense sectors, enabling the company to facilitate the supply of its products to the U.S. Federal Government, veterans affairs, and military supply contracts. The company expects this partnership to be a significant driver of growth and a substantial contributor to its international business volumes by unlocking a high-entry-barrier market.

announcements.subject: Amber Enterprises India Ltd - 540902 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations we are hereby intimating the exchange that, the Company has executed a Share Purchase Agreement for acquisition of remaining 50% equity stake in Amber Resojet Private Limited, on 3rd April 20026, consequent to this acquisition Amber Resojet will cease as a Joint Venture and become a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Amber Enterprises India Ltd has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) to acquire the remaining 50% equity stake in Amber Resojet Private Limited from LCGC Resolute Appliances LLP. This acquisition, for an aggregate consideration of approximately INR 1.74 Crore, will result in Amber Resojet becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Amber Enterprises India Ltd, ceasing to be a joint venture. The transaction involves the purchase of 10,000 equity shares representing 50% of Amber Resojet's paid-up share capital. The company has also provided disclosures as required by SEBI LODR Regulations, and the intimation is available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Shree Hari Chemicals Export Ltd - 524336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: Allotment of equity shares pursuant to conversion of CCDs
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Hari Chemicals Export Ltd announced on April 3, 2026, the allotment of 7,74,946 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 69/- per share. This allotment was made to Shubhalakshmi Polyesters Limited upon the conversion of an equal number of Zero Coupon Compulsorily Convertible Debentures (CCDs) with a face value of Rs. 79/- each. The Committee of Directors approved this allotment at their meeting held on April 3, 2026, which commenced at 5:30 p.m. and concluded at 6:00 p.m. These newly allotted equity shares will be subject to a lock-in period as per Regulation 167 of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. This follows previous intimations made by the company on November 15, 2024, March 15, 2025, and December 04, 2025.

announcements.subject: VIP Clothing Ltd - 532613 - Lapse Of 1,14,05,000 Fully Convertible Warrants And Forfeiture Of Upfront Amount
announcements.detail: As per the attached file.
announcements.ai_summary: VIP Clothing Limited announced on April 3, 2026, that 1,14,05,000 Fully Convertible Warrants have lapsed. These warrants were initially allotted on a preferential basis, and the holders had a period of 18 months from the allotment date, up to April 2, 2026, to exercise their conversion option into equity shares. The company has also stated that the upfront subscription amount paid for these warrants, totaling ₹12,83,06,250 (which represents 25% of the issue price), will be forfeited. This lapse is in accordance with Regulation 169(3) of Chapter V of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018, and the specific terms of the warrant issue. The announcement lists 15 allottees, including Prajal Bhandari, Rekha Bhandari, and VKC Corporate Solutions Pvt Ltd, who did not exercise their conversion rights.

announcements.subject: Vedanta Ltd - 500295 - Production Release
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vedanta Limited has released its production figures for the fourth quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. The company achieved its highest-ever annual Aluminium and Alumina production, with Lanjigarh Alumina production increasing by 104% year-on-year (YoY) in Q4 FY26 and 48% YoY for the full year, reaching an exit run rate of 4 MTPA. Total Aluminium production for the full year FY26 was 2,456 thousand tonnes, a 1% YoY increase. Zinc India recorded record quarterly and annual mined metal production of 1,114 thousand tonnes for FY26, a 2% YoY increase. Refined Zinc production for the full year FY26 was 851 thousand tonnes, up 3% YoY. Silver production in Q4 FY26 increased by 11% quarter-on-quarter (QoQ) to 5.7 million ounces. The company also noted that Hindustan Zinc Alloys, a 100% subsidiary of HZL, contributed to refined zinc production.

announcements.subject: Dabur India Ltd - 500096 - Quarterly Update - Q4 FY2025-26
announcements.detail: Update on the performance and demand trends witnessed during the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dabur India Limited has provided a quarterly update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY26), highlighting steady momentum in its domestic India business driven by a stable macroeconomic environment. This performance helped to offset challenges in international markets, particularly the Middle East, due to geopolitical tensions. The India FMCG business is expected to record high single-digit growth, while the Home & Personal care business is likely to maintain its double-digit growth trajectory, growing in the mid-teens, led by Hair Oils, Shampoo, and Home Care. Key brands like Dabur Amla, Vatika Shampoo, and Odonil are expected to show healthy volume-led growth. The Healthcare vertical is anticipated to report low single-digit growth, with Dabur Honey and Honitus expected to show robust double-digit growth, though Dabur Glucose was impacted by unseasonal rains. The F&B vertical is expected to register low single-digit growth. Detailed financial results will be announced after the Board of Directors approves the consolidated and standalone financial results.

announcements.subject: Eco Recycling Ltd - 530643 - Board Meeting Outcome for PROCEEDINGS OF BOARD MEETING OF ECO RECYCLING LIMITED HELD ON FRIDAY, APRIL 03, 2026.
announcements.detail: Further to our letter dated March 31, 2026 and pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015, we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company, at its meeting held today, i.e., April 03, 2026 has, inter-alia, approved issuance of upto 3,00,000 warrants of the Company at a price of Rs. 408/- (Rupees Four Hundred Eight only) per Warrant ("Warrant'), (at Premium of Rs. 398/-) ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eco Recycling Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 03, 2026, approved the issuance of up to 3,00,000 warrants at a price of Rs. 408/- per warrant, which includes a premium of Rs. 398/-. This preferential allotment, aggregating to Rs. 12,24,00,000/-, is to be made to promoter/promoter group for cash consideration. The relevant date for this issuance is April 02, 2026. The approval is subject to statutory and regulatory approvals, including the approval of the company's members through a postal ballot. A postal ballot notice and detailed resolution will be dispatched shortly, and an application for in-principal approval will be made to the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) on the date of dispatch.

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Virat Crane Industries Ltd has submitted a certificate confirming the non-applicability of provisions related to large entities for the Financial Year 2025-26, as per the SEBI circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. The company has stated that it does not fall under the definition of a "Large Corporate" as per the framework provided in the circular. Consequently, Virat Crane Industries Ltd is not obligated to file any disclosures related to fund raising by issuance of Debt Securities for the Financial Year 2025-26. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: L&T Finance Ltd - 533519 - Company''s Business Update
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation regarding Company''s Business update for Q4FY2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: L&T Finance Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Retail disbursements for Q4 FY2025-26 are estimated at approximately Rs. 24,080 crores, marking a significant 62% year-on-year growth. For the full financial year, retail disbursements are projected to reach around Rs. 83,190 crores, a 39% increase compared to the previous year. The company's retail loan book is estimated to be Rs. 1,19,550 crores as of March 31, 2026, reflecting a 26% year-on-year growth. The retailisation percentage is expected to increase from 97% in Q4 FY2024-25 to 98% in Q4 FY2025-26. This information is provisional and subject to audit by the company's statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd - 508869 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: As per annexure enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Division Bench - II, Chennai, dated March 26, 2026, concerning a proposed composite scheme of arrangement. This scheme involves Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited, Apollo Healthco Limited (Transferor Company 1), Keimed Private Limited (Transferor Company 2), and Apollo Healthtech Limited (Resultant Company). The Tribunal has allowed the application and issued directions for convening meetings of equity shareholders, secured creditors, and unsecured creditors to consider and approve the scheme. The scheme is still subject to shareholder and creditor approvals, necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, and the final sanction of the Tribunal.

announcements.detail: Company update at the end of Quarter (Q4) of Financial year 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Avenue Supermarts Ltd has reported its standalone revenue from operations for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, amounting to INR 17,204.50 crores. This represents a significant increase compared to INR 14,462.39 crores for the same quarter in the previous year (ended March 31, 2025). The company's total number of stores reached 500 as of March 31, 2026, including one store that is currently closed for reconstruction. The reported revenue for the quarter is subject to audit by the company's statutory auditors. These quarterly updates are also available on the company's website at https://www.dmartindia.com.

announcements.subject: IDFC First Bank Ltd - 539437 - Provisional Numbers For Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: IDFC First Bank Ltd has released its provisional financial numbers for the year ended March 31, 2026. Loans and Advances grew by 20.0% year-on-year to Rs. 2,90,362 crores as of March 31, 2026, from Rs. 2,41,926 crores on March 31, 2025. Customer Deposits increased by 17.2% year-on-year to Rs. 2,84,327 crores as of March 31, 2026, compared to Rs. 2,42,543 crores on March 31, 2025. The CASA Ratio stood at 49.8% as of March 31, 2026, an increase from 46.9% on March 31, 2025. The average LCR for Q4-FY26 remained stable at 114%, and the asset quality of the MFI book has returned to normalcy. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the bank's statutory auditors.
