announcements.subject: Sobha Ltd - 532784 - Sobha Limited Has Informed The Exchange About Operational Update Q4 FY 2025-26.
announcements.detail: Sobha limited has informed the exchange about Operational Update Q4 2025-26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sobha Limited has provided an operational update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, indicating a strong performance in FY 2026 despite global uncertainties. The company achieved its highest-ever annual sales in FY 2026, recording ₹81.36 Billion with 5.54 million sq ft of new sales area at an average realization of ₹14,675 per sq ft. Bangalore led sales with ₹44.78 Billion (55%), followed by NCR with ₹24.55 Billion (30%), Kerala with ₹8.08 Billion (10%), and other cities with ₹3.96 Billion (5%). In Q4-FY26, Sobha recorded ₹20.39 Billion in sales value from 1.34 million sq ft of new sales area at an average price of ₹15,268 per sq ft, with Bangalore contributing ₹10.37 Billion (51%). The company's strategic focus for FY 2027 will be on new project launches, operational excellence, and disciplined financial management.

announcements.subject: Omax Autos Ltd - 520021 - Update On Cyber Security Incident
announcements.detail: Please find attached update on cyber Security Incident.
announcements.ai_summary: Omax Autos Ltd has issued an update on a cyber security incident on April 3, 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations. Further to their previous disclosure on March 27, 2026, which confirmed a ransomware attack on the company's IT infrastructure, Omax Autos has successfully completed all necessary restoration, containment, and security measures. The company confirms that all critical IT systems, applications, and operational functionalities are now fully restored and functioning normally. A detailed investigation by internal and external experts has concluded that there has been no material impact on core systems, operations, or business continuity, and no sensitive operational or financial data has been compromised. The company has also enhanced its cyber security controls and continues to monitor its IT environment proactively.

announcements.subject: Borosil Ltd - 543212 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('The Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.
announcements.ai_summary: Borosil Limited has provided an update on its production activities on April 3, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations. Following an earlier intimation on March 11, 2026, regarding production disruptions due to LPG supply restrictions stemming from a force majeure event in the Middle East, the company is pleased to report that normal operations have resumed. Borosil has successfully secured LPG supplies from Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs), leading to the full restoration of production at its Borosilicate Glass Furnace for Pressware Products and Opal Glass Furnaces in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The company acknowledges the support from OMCs and government authorities in facilitating the resumption of operations, which remains contingent on continued LPG availability.

announcements.subject: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd - 543237 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 03, 2026, titled "Strengthening Maritime Prowess: INS Taragiri Commissioned into the Indian Navy".
announcements.ai_summary: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd (MDL) has announced the commissioning of INS Taragiri, an indigenously built stealth frigate, into the Indian Navy on April 3, 2026, at Visakhapatnam. This marks a significant advancement in India's warship design and construction capabilities, as INS Taragiri is the third vessel in the Project 17A series. The ship, measuring 149.02 meters in length and 17.8 meters in width, has a displacement of 6400 tons and is powered by a CODOG propulsion system, enabling a speed of over 28 knots. Equipped with advanced stealth features, weapon systems, sensors, and automation, INS Taragiri is expected to substantially enhance India's maritime security and operational reach in the Indian Ocean Region. The commissioning ceremony was presided over by the Hon’ble Raksha Mantri, Shri Rajnath Singh.

Following earlier intimation on March 26, 2024, regarding a capital expenditure not exceeding Rs 250 Crore, the company has now commenced trial batches. Samples from these trial runs will be sent to customers for their approval. NOCIL Limited will separately inform the exchanges about the commencement of commercial production. This update is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Ltd - 500109 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half Yearly Statement of NCDs ( Debt Securities) as on March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL), a subsidiary of Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited, has submitted its Half Yearly Statement of Non-convertible Debentures (NCDs) as of March 31, 2026. This filing is in compliance with SEBI Circular Ref. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The statement details three series of NCDs: one issued on January 13, 2020, with a maturity date of April 12, 2030, and a coupon rate of 7.40%, with an outstanding amount of INR 1000 crore; another issued on January 29, 2020, maturing on January 29, 2030, with a coupon rate of 1.135%, and an outstanding amount of INR 1060 crore; and a third issued on February 27, 2021, maturing on April 14, 2032, with a coupon rate of 7.48%, and an outstanding amount of INR 1200 crore.

announcements.subject: Moil Ltd - 533286 - Information Relating To Fixation Of Price Of Different Grades Of Manganese Ore.
announcements.detail: Information relating to fixation of price of different grades of Manganese Ore.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: MOIL Limited has announced the fixation and revision of prices for different grades of Manganese Ore and other products, effective from April 1, 2026. For the quarter April-June 2026 and specifically for the month of April 2026, prices for all Ferro grades of manganese ore with a Manganese content of Mn- 44% and above have been increased by 15% compared to prices prevailing since March 1, 2026. Similarly, prices for all other Ferro grades with Manganese content below Mn-44%, as well as SMGR (Mn -30%), SMGR (Mn 25%), Fines grades, and Chemical grades, have been increased by 17.5% on the prices prevailing since March 1, 2026. The basic price of EMD has been continued at Rs. 1,80,000/- PMT for April 2026, as it was since March 1, 2026. This information was disclosed on April 3, 2026.

announcements.subject: ARCL Organics Ltd - 543993 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Update on Regulation 30 dated 06.12.2025 that the Company has purchases land and machinery in Gujarat.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ARCL Organics Ltd has provided an update on a previously announced Memorandum of Understanding. On April 3, 2026, the company announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement and has completed the purchase of land and machinery in Gujarat. The Sale Deed for the land was executed by Mr. Sandeep Patel and Mr. Hasmukhbhai Patel in favor of ARCL Organics Ltd. The company has also taken possession of the plant and machinery of Angel Resins, located at Survey No: 357 and 358, Village – Kadadra, Zak -Kadadra Road, Ta -Dehgam, District Gandhinagar, Gujarat – 382305. The total consideration for this acquisition is Rs. 3 Crores. Regulatory approvals have been obtained, and ARCL Organics Ltd will now apply for name changes on various licenses. This acquisition is expected to strengthen the company's manufacturing footprint and enhance operational capacity.

announcements.subject: Shankara Buildpro Ltd - 544517 - Shankara Buildpro Surpasses FY 26 Volume Target Of 1 Million Tonnes, Delivers 32% YOY Growth
announcements.detail: Shankara Buildpro surpasses FY26 Volume Target of 1 million tonnes, delivers 32% YOY Growth
announcements.ai_summary: Shankara Buildpro Limited has announced that it surpassed its financial year 2026 (FY26) volume target of 1 million tonnes, achieving a total volume of 10.2 lakh tonnes for the year ended March 31, 2026. This represents a significant year-on-year growth of 32%, compared to 7.7 lakh tonnes in FY25. The company attributes this achievement to its marketplace strategy, portfolio expansion, and increased distribution across new geographies. The Managing Director, Mr. Sukumar Srinivas, expressed pride in meeting and exceeding the target, highlighting the company's execution capability and the strength of its marketplace and distribution franchise. Growth was observed across key categories such as Pipes & Tubes, Flats, and Roofing products, providing confidence for the upcoming financial year FY27.

announcements.subject: Ruchira Papers Ltd - 532785 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulation, 2011

This disclosure confirms that no encumbrance has been created on the shares of the company, either directly or indirectly, by the Promoter and Promoter Group during the aforementioned financial year. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited about this submission. This is for their information, records, and necessary action.

announcements.subject: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd - 544124 - Intimation Regarding New Product Launch
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd has provided an update on its new product launch, specifically High Mast Lightning Poles and Monopoles. The company had previously anticipated a launch by the end of March 2026 but has now revised the expected launch date to the end of June 2026. This revision is due to current market conditions, where there is no immediate demand for these products owing to geographic and other situations. The products are categorized under Infrastructure & Utility Structures and will cater to the domestic market. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Provisional Sales Performance Of Hindustan Copper Ltd (HCL) For FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Provisional Sales performance of Hindustan Copper Limited for FY 2025-26 is submitted
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Ltd (HCL) has reported provisional sales performance for the financial year 2025-26, achieving sales of 27,367 tonnes of Metal-in-Concentrate (MIC). This figure represents a 12% increase compared to the previous year. The company submitted this update in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This provisional sales data is for informational purposes, and further details will be provided upon finalization.

announcements.subject: Metropolis Healthcare Ltd - 542650 - Business Update For Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Business update for Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Metropolis Healthcare Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, indicating strong consolidated revenue growth of approximately 23% year-on-year. This growth was driven by increased traction in the TruHealth wellness segment and specialized testing, with both B2B and B2C channels showing robust performance. The company reported a ~19% increase in B2C revenue and a ~30% increase in B2B revenue year-on-year. Acquisitions completed in the previous year are integrating well, contributing to positive outcomes and an improving margin in Core Diagnostics, which is in the high single-digit range for Q4FY26. MHL Organic revenue grew by approximately 14.5% year-on-year, with EBITDA margins improving due to operating leverage and efficiency gains. The detailed financial results for Q4FY26 are subject to audit and will be approved by the Board of Directors.

announcements.subject: Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd-$ - 504614 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd announced outcomes from its Board Meeting held on April 3, 2026. The board approved the incorporation of a new company for real estate development with Chhattisgarh Investment Ltd, a promoter group company, where Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd will hold a 50% stake, involving an estimated investment of ₹25 crore. Additionally, the company's wholly-owned subsidiary, Sarda Energy Limited (SEL), received approval to acquire a majority stake in Adishankar Khuitam Power Pvt. Ltd. (AKPPL), which has rights to develop a 66 MW hydro power plant in Arunachal Pradesh. The acquisition cost is ₹25 crores, subject to adjustments, and is subject to required approvals, including from the Government of Arunachal Pradesh, which has been received. The acquisition is expected to be completed immediately upon execution of agreements and achievement of pre-conditions. Furthermore, Mr. Partha Sarthi Dutta Gupta was appointed as Executive Director – Power & Corporate Affairs, effective April 3, 2026.

The disclosure confirms that there have been no encumbrances on these shares, either directly or indirectly, during the financial year ended March 2026, with NIL encumbrances as of March 31, 2026.

announcements.company: S H Kelkar and Company Ltd
announcements.subject: S H Kelkar and Company Ltd - 539450 - Business Update For Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Business Update for Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: S H Kelkar and Company Ltd provided a business update for Q4 FY 2025-26, reporting consolidated revenues of Rs.2,355 crore for the year ended March 31, 2026, representing an approximate 11.5% growth over the previous year. Gross margins remained stable sequentially during the quarter. As of March 31, 2026, the company's net debt stood at Rs. 789 crore, reflecting ongoing investments in capacity expansion and capability building. The company is navigating a fluid operating environment with inflationary pressures and supply-side dynamics, focusing on uninterrupted supplies and margin protection. Inventory levels were reduced during the quarter, with adequate coverage maintained for commodities affected by the Middle East crisis. This financial information is provisional and unaudited.

announcements.subject: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd - 544225 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the exchange regarding a Press Release dated April 3, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has announced that its Roadster X+ 4.5 kWh electric motorcycle has received the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Certification for its compliance with eligibility assessment requirements under the PLI Scheme for Automobile and Auto Components (PLI-Auto Scheme). This certification was granted by the Global Automotive Research Centre (GARC) and confirms a minimum Domestic Value Addition (DVA) for the Roadster X+ 4.5 kWh. This makes it the first motorcycle in Ola Electric's Roadster portfolio to achieve PLI certification, signifying a key step in the company's expansion into the electric motorcycle segment. The certification makes all units of the Roadster X+ 4.5 kWh eligible for incentives under the PLI-Auto Scheme. This development, announced on April 3, 2026, underscores Ola Electric's commitment to localization and building an indigenous EV ecosystem.

announcements.subject: A B Infrabuild Ltd - 544281 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order

announcements.ai_summary: A B Infrabuild Limited has received a letter of acceptance for a new project involving the construction of a Road Over Bridge (ROB). The project is located at Railway Km 662/9-11 in lieu of LC. No -358, under Khurdha Road Division, and is awarded by East Coast Railways, Indian Railways. The contract has a duration of 24 months and a broad commercial consideration of ₹42,68,20,821.94 (Rupees Forty-Two Crore Sixty-Eight Lakh Twenty Thousand Eight Hundred and Twenty-One Rupees and Ninety-Four Paise Only). The company has confirmed that there is no promoter or group company interest in the awarded entity and the transaction is at arm's length.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Auto Ltd - 532977 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Sales for the month of March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bajaj Auto Ltd has announced its sales figures for March 2026. The company sold 2,21,021 units of 2-wheelers domestically, a 20% increase year-on-year, and exported 1,59,452 units, up 21%. Total 2-wheeler sales reached 3,80,473 units, a 21% rise. For commercial vehicles, domestic sales were 45,269 units (up 20%) and exports were 19,635 units (up 21%), bringing the total commercial vehicle sales to 64,904 units, a 20% increase. Overall, Bajaj Auto sold 4,45,377 vehicles in March 2026, a 20% increase compared to March 2025. For the financial year-to-date (April-March 2026), total sales stood at 51,17,667 units, a 10% increase from the previous year.

announcements.subject: Max Financial Services Ltd - 500271 - Disclosure Under The Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR') - Approval For Issuance Of Equity Shares On Preferential Basis By Axis Max Life Insurance Limited To Axis Bank Limited
announcements.detail: As per the disclosure attached
announcements.ai_summary: Max Financial Services Limited has disclosed that its subsidiary, Axis Max Life Insurance Limited, has received approval from its Board of Directors for a capital infusion. Axis Max Life will issue equity shares of Rs. 10/- each to Axis Bank Limited for an aggregate investment of up to Rs. 389 crores. This preferential issuance is intended to meet Axis Max Life's funding requirements and support its future growth initiatives. Following this infusion, Axis Bank Limited will collectively hold 19.99% of the equity share capital of Axis Max Life, with Max Financial Services Limited holding approximately 80.01%. Axis Bank has already received the requisite approval from the RBI for this infusion. The proposal is subject to the approval of the shareholders of Axis Max Life. This information was disclosed on April 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bank of Baroda - 532134 - Provisional Business Figures - March 2026
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures - March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of Baroda has released its provisional business figures for March 2026, showing significant year-on-year growth. As of March 31, 2026, the bank's Global Business grew by 13.93% YoY to ₹ 30.79 trillion. Global Advances increased by 16.23% YoY to ₹ 14.30 trillion, while Global Deposits rose by 12.00% YoY to ₹ 16.49 trillion. Domestic Deposits also saw a healthy increase of 12.83% YoY to ₹ 14.01 trillion, and Domestic Advances grew by 14.56% YoY to ₹ 11.70 trillion. Domestic Retail Advances experienced a substantial growth of 17.93% YoY, reaching ₹ 3.03 trillion. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the bank's Statutory Central Auditors. The bank has intimated these figures in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Union Bank of India - 532477 - Intimation Under SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures as 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Union Bank of India has released its provisional business figures as of March 31, 2026. The bank reported a 9.76% Year-on-Year (YoY) growth in Total Gross Advances and a 10.06% YoY growth in Total Domestic Advances. RAM Advances (Domestic) saw a growth of 12.59% YoY. Domestic CASA Deposits grew by 7.90% YoY and 10.82% Quarter-on-Quarter (QoQ). Total Global Business stood at Rs. 23,85,679 Crores, with Global Advances at Rs. 10,78,779 Crores and Global Deposits at Rs. 13,06,900 Crores. The Domestic CASA Deposits reached Rs. 4,59,988 Crores, representing 35.21% of total deposits. This information is provisional and subject to audit by the Statutory Central Auditors.

announcements.subject: 3i Infotech Ltd - 532628 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation letter that Company has received an Order from a leading Private Sector Bank.
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Limited has secured a new order from a leading private sector bank in India, dated April 2, 2026, for a digitization and document management project. The project involves handling legacy credit card application records, including inventory preparation, data entry, scanning, indexing, storage, retrieval, and shredding, with secure data handling and compliance. This is a rate card-based contract with an approximate value of Rs. 2.04 Crore, exclusive of applicable taxes, based on anticipated volumes. The contract duration is 12 months, and 3i Infotech will focus on enhancing the visibility, accessibility, and compliance of historical customer records.

announcements.subject: IRM Energy Ltd - 544004 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith press release on the subject -Commissioned 150th CNG Station.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IRM Energy Limited has announced a significant milestone with the commissioning of its 150th Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) station located in Banaskantha, Gujarat, on March 31, 2026. During the financial year 2025-26, the company commissioned a total of 39 CNG stations, demonstrating its commitment to expanding green energy infrastructure within its authorized geographical areas. This expansion aims to drive the transition towards sustainable and eco-friendly transportation solutions. IRM Energy Limited operates under authorizations from the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) in four Geographical Areas: Banaskantha (Gujarat), Fatehgarh Sahib (Punjab), Diu & Gir Somnath (Gujarat), and Namakkal & Tiruchirappalli (Tamil Nadu). CNG currently represents approximately 60% of the company's volumes and is considered the primary growth driver.

announcements.subject: Highway Infrastructure Ltd - 544477 - General Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR 2015
announcements.detail: Company received a show cause notice from NHAI
announcements.ai_summary: Highway Infrastructure Ltd has received a show cause notice from NHAI, imposing a penalty of Rs. 26,33,000 due to the withdrawal of the Letter of Acceptance (LOA) for the operations of Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh. The Board of Directors had decided to withdraw the LOA on March 26, 2026. The penalty is due within 03 days from the date of the notice. The company has provided detailed disclosure regarding the penalty and its reasons as per SEBI circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023. There is no quantifiable financial or operational impact beyond the penalty amount.

announcements.subject: Dishman Carbogen Amcis Ltd - 540701 - DISCLOSURE PURSUANT TO REGULATIONS 30 AND 51 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 : Amendment In Terms Related To Financial Covenants For FY Ended 31St March, 2026 In Respect Of Non-Convertible Debentures ('NCDS') Issued Under ISIN INE385W07059
announcements.detail: Pls. find enclosed herewith the intimation under Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dishman Carbogen Amcis Ltd has received a letter from Axis Trustee Services Limited, the Debenture Trustee, dated March 31, 2026, proposing amendments to financial covenants for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, concerning Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued under ISIN INE385W07059. The NCDs, totaling INR 50,00,00,000 (Rupees Fifty Crores only) with a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each, were issued on a private placement basis. The proposed amendments include a waiver on the Total Net Debt to EBIDTA covenant (previously 4 times), a waiver on the Adjusted Debt Service Coverage Ratio (previously at least 1.15x), and a waiver on the Interest Coverage Ratio (previously at least 2x). The Net Debt to Tangible Net Worth covenant of 1.75 times remains unchanged. These amendments are in relation to the Debenture Trust Deed dated January 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - RBL Bank Limited Informs The Exchange About Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange that Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C) has received the approval of RBI to acquire an aggregate of upto 74% of paid-up share capital of the Bank.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RBL Bank Limited has received a significant update regarding its acquisition by Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C). The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has approved Emirates NBD Bank's acquisition of up to 74% of RBL Bank's paid-up share capital through a letter dated April 1, 2026. This approval mandates that Emirates NBD Bank must maintain at least a 51% shareholding, classifying RBL Bank as a foreign bank in subsidiary mode. RBL Bank will need to amend its Articles of Association, subject to RBI approval. The RBI has no objection to Emirates NBD Bank being classified as the promoter of RBL Bank, subject to SEBI regulations. However, Emirates NBD Bank's voting rights will be capped at 26% of RBL Bank's total voting rights as per the Banking Regulation Act, 1949. The RBI approval is valid for one year and is contingent on receiving necessary approval from the Government of India for investment exceeding 49% and compliance with various banking regulations.

announcements.subject: Jhaveri Credits & Capital Ltd - 531550 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached
announcements.ai_summary: Jhaveri Credits & Capital Ltd announced changes in its board of directors following a Board Meeting held on April 02, 2026. Mr. Vishnukumar Vitthaldas Patel's designation has been changed from Non-Executive Director to Chairman and Non-Executive of the Company, effective April 02, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, Mr. Ghanshyambhai Hargovindbhai Engineer has been appointed as Managing Director for a period of five years, effective April 02, 2026, also subject to shareholder approval. Ms. Chetna Rahul Vyas has been appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent) for a term of 5 consecutive years, effective April 02, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Ms. Bijal Kiran Parikh's designation has been changed from Non-Executive Director to Executive Director, effective April 02, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Adani Power Ltd - 533096 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of (LODR) - Letter Of Award From Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Limited
announcements.detail: Adani Power Limited has informed the Exchange about Letter of Award from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Power Limited has received a Letter of Award (LoA) from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Limited (MSEDCL) for the supply of 2500 MW RE RTC power. This contract is for a period of 25 years, commencing from the Scheduled Commencement Date of Supply, following Adani Power being declared the successful bidder in the e-RA results. The LoA was received by the company on April 1, 2026. The terms and conditions are in accordance with the tender floated by MSEDCL and the conditions stated in the LoA. This is a domestic contract for the long-term supply of RE RTC power.

announcements.subject: Ambuja Cements Ltd - 500425 - Clarification On Media Report Appearing On NDTV Profits Dated March 30, 2026
announcements.detail: Clarification on media report appearing on NDTV Profits dated March 30,2026 titled "Ambuja Cements-Penna Cement Merger Gets Green Light from NCLT Ahmedabad"
announcements.ai_summary: The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has sanctioned the Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited on March 30, 2026. This follows previous disclosures made by Ambuja Cements to the stock exchanges, including the Board's approval of the Scheme on December 17, 2024, receipt of NOC from stock exchanges on April 30, 2025, and the NCLT order directing an equity shareholders meeting on November 2, 2025. The company had also disclosed the outcome of the equity shareholders' meeting on December 30, 2025. Ambuja Cements Limited has confirmed that all relevant updates regarding the Scheme have been disclosed, and the media report on NDTV Profits dated March 30, 2026, does not have any material impact on the company.

announcements.subject:
LE Lavoir Ltd - 539814 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome And Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail:
Outcome and Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of LE Lavoir Ltd held a meeting on Thursday, April 2, 2026, at the company's registered office in Rajkot, Gujarat. The meeting, which commenced at 6:00 PM and concluded at 7:00 PM, resulted in several key decisions. Firstly, Mr. Amit Kumar Bera (DIN: 05228122) was appointed as an Additional Non-Executive and Independent Director, effective from April 2, 2026. Secondly, Mr. Samrat Mondal (DIN: 05228118) was also appointed as an Additional Non-Executive and Independent Director, effective from the same date. Following these appointments, the Board reconstituted its committees. The Audit Committee now includes Mr. Himanshu Keshubhai Togadiya as Chairperson, Mr. Samrat Mondal as Member, and Mr. Ashok Dilipkumar Jain as Member. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee and the Stakeholders Relationship Committee were also reconstituted with the same composition: Mr. Himanshu Keshubhai Togadiya as Chairperson, Mr. Samrat Mondal as Member, and Mr. Ashok Dilipkumar Jain as Member.

announcements.subject: National Aluminium Company Ltd - 532234 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: NALCO delivers historic FY26 performace, setting new benchmarks in production and sales.
announcements.ai_summary: National Aluminium Company Limited (NALCO) has announced a historic performance for the financial year 2025-26, setting new benchmarks in production and sales. The company achieved its highest-ever bauxite excavation at 77.01 Lakh Tonne and bauxite transportation at 77.07 Lakh Tonne. Significant production records were also set for Alumina Hydrate (23.00 Lakh Tonne), Calcined Alumina (22.75 Lakh Tonne), Cast Metal (4.72 Lakh Tonne), Net Power Generation (6,953 MU), and Coal Production (40 Lakh Tonne). In terms of sales, NALCO recorded its highest-ever total Alumina Sale at 14.46 Lakh Tonne, with domestic Alumina Sale at 1.38 Lakh Tonne. Aluminium Metal Sale reached a record 4.74 Lakh Tonne, including a domestic sale of 4.61 Lakh Tonne. This performance underscores NALCO's leadership as an integrated player in the alumina and aluminium sector.

announcements.subject: Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd - 514402 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Rights Issue Committee
announcements.detail: Outcome of Right Issue Committee Meeting, the due date for the payment of Reminder - First Call Money has been extended to April 13, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Rights Issue Committee of Eco Hotels and Resorts Ltd, in a meeting held on April 2, 2026, has approved an extension for the payment of the first call money on partly paid-up equity shares. The original due date for this payment was April 2, 2026, and it has now been extended to April 13, 2026. The call money amount is ₹3.80 per partly paid-up equity share, which includes ₹2.50 towards paid-up value and ₹1.30 towards premium. Shareholders are requested to make the payment by the revised due date of April 13, 2026. All other terms and conditions mentioned in the previous notice remain unchanged. Failure to pay by the extended due date may result in actions such as interest levy or forfeiture of shares, as per the company's Articles of Association and applicable law.

announcements.subject: Rama Steel Tubes Ltd - 539309 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Rama Steel Tubes Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 02, 2026, titled "Media Release / Press Release regarding the Sales Volume Performance for 12MFY26 and Q4FY26."
announcements.ai_summary: Rama Steel Tubes Ltd has issued a press release on April 2, 2026, detailing its sales volume performance for the 12 months ending FY26 (12MFY26) and the fourth quarter of FY26 (Q4FY26). For 12MFY26, the company reported a sales volume of 215,114.20 Ton, an increase of 10.20% year-on-year compared to 195,212.53 Ton in 12MFY25. In Q4FY26, the sales volume was 43,178.42 Ton, a decrease from 55,256.30 Ton in Q4FY25. The press release also highlights the company's position as a leading manufacturer of steel tubes and pipes in India and its global presence.

announcements.subject: Marico Ltd - 531642 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Marico Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Marico South East Asia Corporation (MSEA), has successfully completed the acquisition of 75% of the total share capital of Skinetiq Joint Stock Company. Skinetiq is a Vietnamese company that owns the digital-first skincare brand 'Candid' and holds exclusive distribution rights for the brand 'Murad' in Vietnam. This transaction, which was completed on April 2, 2026, makes Skinetiq a subsidiary of MSEA and consequently a subsidiary of Marico Limited. This acquisition is expected to strengthen Marico's presence in the Southeast Asian market.

announcements.subject: Electronics Mart India Ltd - 543626 - Commencement Of Commercial Operations
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Reg 30 (4) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that Electronics Mart India Limited has commenced the commercial operations of a new multi-brand store under the brand name of "BAJAJ ELECTRONICS" in Kavali, Andhra Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Electronics Mart India Ltd has commenced commercial operations for a new multi-brand store under the brand name "BAJAJ ELECTRONICS" in Kavali, Andhra Pradesh. The store is located at 11-1-31B, Ground, First & Second Floor, Survey No. 1923/1-2B, Trunk Road, Ramamurthy Peta, Kavali, Andhra Pradesh-524201, covering an area of 5,400 Square Feet. This expansion is in line with the company's strategy to increase its retail footprint. The commercial operations began on April 2, 2026. Investors should note this development as a step towards potential revenue growth.

announcements.subject: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd - 544088 - Intimation On Receipt Of No-Objection Letter(S) From The Stock Exchanges In Relation To Reclassification Of Certain Promoters From 'Promoter And Promoter Group' Category To 'Public' Category
announcements.detail: As enclosed

The entities approved for reclassification are Bessemer India Capital Holdings II Ltd, Bessemer Health Capital LLC, Bessemer Venture Partners Trust, Perfios Software Solutions Private Limited, Lentra AI Private Limited, and Plobal Apps Inc. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 31A (8) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Mamata Machinery Ltd - 544318 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR') - Winning Of Award
announcements.detail: Company has won EEPC -"STAR Performer" Award in EEPC INDIA-42nd Western Regional Export Performance Award for the Year 2023-24.
announcements.ai_summary: Mamata Machinery Limited has been honored with the EEPC India's Western Regional Export Performance Award for the year 2023-24. The company has won the "STAR PERFORMER" award in the "HEAVY INDUSTRIES - INDUSTRIAL MACHINERY FOR PAPER, CEMENT, CHEMICALS AND TEXTILES" category, specifically for Medium Enterprises. This award recognizes Mamata Machinery's export achievements. The award presentation ceremony is planned to be scheduled during May 2026, with further details to be communicated in due course.

announcements.subject: Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd - 543597 - Submission Of An Application For Migration From BSE SME Platform To BSE & NSE Mainboard

announcements.subject: Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd - 542649 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of LOA from South Central Railway
announcements.ai_summary: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from South Central Railway for a significant project. The contract involves the "Design, Supply, Erection, Testing and Commissioning for OHE upgradation of existing 1X25kV system to 2X25kV AT Feeding System with Feeder and Earthing works" in the Ongole (OGL) to Gudur (GDR) section. This project spans a total of 154 Route Kilometers (RKM) and 462 Track Kilometers (TKM) within the Vijayawada Division. The total consideration for this order is Rs 242,49,86,547.22, including applicable taxes. The execution of this work is expected to be completed within 24 months from the award date. This order falls within the normal course of RVNL's business.

announcements.company: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd
announcements.subject: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd - 543308 - Pursuant To Provisions Of Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, KIMS Swastha Private Limited ('The KIMS'), A Wholly-Owned Subsidiary Of Krishna Institute Of Medical Sciences Limited Has Entered Into Definitive Agreements With Avitis Super Speciality Hospitals Private Limited.
announcements.detail: Intimation u/r 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 2, 2026, Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, KIMS Swastha Private Limited, has entered into definitive agreements with Avitis Super Speciality Hospitals Private Limited. These agreements pertain to the Operations and Management of a 210-bedded facility and the sub-lease of land and hospital building for a period of 20 years, effective from April 2, 2026. KIMS Swastha Private Limited will be responsible for the exclusive supervision and efficient management of the super specialty hospital located in Palakkad, Kerala. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Punjab National Bank - 532461 - Provisional Business Figures For The Period Ended 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures for the period ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 2, 2026, Punjab National Bank submitted its provisional business figures for the period ended March 31, 2026, to BSE Limited. The bank reported a Global Business of Rs. 28,45,220 crores, with a growth of 2.93% compared to the previous period. Global Deposits stood at Rs. 17,11,476 crores, showing a growth of 3.08%, while Global Advances were Rs. 12,61,420 crores, with a growth of 2.45%. These figures are subject to audit by the statutory central auditors of the bank.

announcements.subject: Supertech Ev Ltd - 544428 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31 (4) Of SEBI (SAST) Reg, 2011

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 2, 2026, Yetender Sharma, a promoter of Supertech Ev Ltd, along with persons acting in concert, declared that they have not made any encumbrances on the shares of the company held directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration is in compliance with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. Gettanjali Sharma, also a promoter, made a similar declaration. The company has submitted this information to the BSE Limited for record.

announcements.subject: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd - 508869 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting
announcements.detail: As per annexure enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd, in a meeting held on April 2, 2026, approved the establishment of a multi-speciality hospital in Dwarka, New Delhi. The project will be developed on a 9.33-acre land parcel leased from the Delhi Development Authority (DDA) for a period of 55 years. The company will incorporate a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) for the project's execution. The annual license fee for the land will be Rs. 33.3 crore, starting from the fifth year, with annual escalations. The Board meeting commenced at 4:00 p.m. and concluded at 5:45 p.m. The detailed disclosure as required under SEBI Circular is enclosed.

announcements.subject: Sambhv Steel Tubes Ltd - 544430 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release Titled "Sales Volume Update" dated April 02, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Sambhv Steel Tubes Limited announced its highest-ever sales volume in Q4 FY26, achieving a grand total of 1,07,785 tons. This significant milestone was driven by strong contributions across all segments, particularly in Value Added Products, which reached 95,797 tons in Q4 FY26, an increase from 73,005 tons in Q4 FY25. The company's strategic focus on scaling its high-value product portfolio, including Structural Pipes and Tubes (58,755 tons in Q4 FY26) and Pre-Galvanised (GP) Coils and Pipes (22,857 tons in Q4 FY26), contributed to this record performance. Despite global disruptions, the company's sales volume for FY26 reached 3,96,731 tons, a substantial increase from 290,581 tons in FY25. This update was released on April 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd - 500184 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled " Himadri Speciality Chemical Limited Recognised as ''India''s Leading ESG Entity'' by Dun & Bradstreet"
announcements.ai_summary: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd has been recognized as 'India's Leading ESG Entity' by Dun & Bradstreet in their report "ESG Horizons: Now and Next 2026." This prestigious recognition is based on Dun & Bradstreet's ESG Intelligence Framework Rating, which evaluates companies on key environmental, social, and governance parameters for FY25. The company's inclusion highlights its deep commitment to integrating ESG principles into its core business strategy, operations, and its efforts in driving sustainable growth and responsible manufacturing. Mr. Anurag Choudhary, CMD & CEO, stated that this recognition reaffirms the company's commitment to sustainability, clean technologies, resource efficiency, and creating long-term value. The press release was issued on April 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Vedanta Ltd - 500295 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Insights By Vedanta
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vedanta Ltd has released its "Insights by Vedanta" for March 2026, providing updates on the company's performance, portfolio, and purpose. The report highlights a significant trend of women investors in India becoming more active in financial markets, with approximately 80% starting to invest before age 35 and a strong preference for SIPs and long-term compounding. The insights indicate that 56% of women now invest independently, and there has been a 129% growth in women's demat accounts since 2021, with women now representing 24% of investors and 33% of Assets Under Management. The company also shared its latest advertisement film and emphasized its "Her at the Core" philosophy.

announcements.subject: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd - 544516 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receiving of Order  Value of Rs. 1.23 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd has secured a new order worth ₹1.23 Crores from Integral Coach Factory, Chennai - 600038, received on April 2, 2026. The order is for the supply of End Walls for 3PH Memu/TC Coaches as per specification. The total order value is ₹1.23 Crores, with a quantity tolerance of up to 5% of the order quantity, provided the value of excess receipt does not exceed ₹8 lakh. The delivery is scheduled to be completed within a period of 12 months at the Shell Depot/ICF, Chennai. Payment terms are 100% on receipt note after acceptance of material.

announcements.subject: Ajmera Realty & Infra India Ltd - 513349 - Intimation Of Cancellation Of Investor Meeting Scheduled On April 03, 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015 - update on cancellation of Investor Meeting scheduled on April 03, 2026

announcements.subject: Mega Corporation Ltd - 531417 - Declaration Under Regulation 31(4) & 31(5) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Pursuant to regulation 31(4) & 31(5) of SEBI (SAST)regulation, 2011 declaration by promoter on behalf by other promoter and (PAC) for no encumbrances in the securities of the Company other than which was already disclosed during the FY2025-26.

This declaration was made by Kunal Lalani, a promoter, on behalf of the promoters and PAC for the year ended March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd - 532734 - Receipt Of Consent To Operate For 6.91 MW Waste Heat Recovery Based Power Plant.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the intimation regarding receipt of consent to Operate for 6.91 MW Waste Heat Recovery Based Power Plant situated at Siltara Industrial Area, Raipur, Chhattisgarh.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd has received the Consent to Operate for its 6.91 MW Waste Heat Recovery Based Power Plant located in Siltara Industrial Area, Raipur, Chhattisgarh. The consent was granted by the Chhattisgarh Environment Conservation Board on April 2, 2026. The plant, which utilizes waste heat from the Pellet Plant and Ferro Alloys Division at the company's integrated steel plant, commenced its trial run on April 2, 2026. Commercial operations are expected to begin by the end of April 2026. This information has been recorded by the company.

announcements.subject: CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd - 519477 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 -For Approval Of Scheme Of Amalgamation By The Board Of Directors
announcements.detail: Announcement under Reg 30- For approval of Scheme of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd, at its meeting held on April 02, 2026, approved a Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. This scheme involves the amalgamation of M/s. Varron Aluminiumm Private Limited, M/s. Sec- One Sales & Marketing Private Limited, M/s. Vyankatesh Engineers & Contractors Private Limited, M/s. Manas Power Ventures Private Limited, M/s. Avenzer Electricals & Infrastructure Private Limited, and M/s. Manas Agro Industries & Infrastructure Limited with M/s. CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Limited. The amalgamation is subject to approvals from the respective shareholders and creditors of all involved entities. Furthermore, the scheme requires sanction from the jurisdictional bench of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) and any other competent authorities as directed by the NCLT, including approvals from stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd - 540168 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Corporate Office Address

announcements.subject: Narmada Agrobase Ltd - 543643 - DISCLOSURE UNDER REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - RECEIPT OF ADMINISTRATIVE WARNING LETTER
announcements.detail: Please find the attached disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 in the attached PDF.
announcements.ai_summary: Narmada Agrobase Ltd has received an Administrative Warning Letter from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) dated April 01, 2026. This warning is due to the company's failure to update its "Policy for Determination of Materiality" in compliance with amendments to the LODR Regulations within the stipulated timelines, violating Regulation 30(4)(ii) of the LODR Regulations. The company acknowledges the warning and has initiated internal steps to strengthen its compliance framework to prevent future occurrences. SEBI has indicated there is no financial or material impact on the company's operations. Narmada Agrobase Ltd has confirmed its commitment to adhering to all regulatory requirements.

announcements.subject: Nagreeka Exports Ltd-$ - 521109 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

The declaration is made pursuant to Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. A list of persons acting in concert with the acquirer, along with their respective PANs, has been attached as Annexure 1.

Ltd., including their address and contact information, have been provided. The change in RTA has been effected in the CDSL system on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: PNB Housing Finance Ltd - 540173 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNB Housing Finance Ltd has received a communication from the National Housing Bank (NHB) on April 01, 2026, advising the company to disclose a divergence in asset classification and provisioning for the financial year ended March 31, 2023. The additional NPA due to inspection observations amounts to INR 933.58 crore, bringing the total Gross NPA to INR 3,204.94 crore. This divergence relates to two corporate/project finance loan accounts where interest rates were reduced. The company states there is no financial impact as of date and the threshold for disclosure under Regulation 30 is not applicable, but this disclosure is being made as a good governance practice. The company will make the necessary disclosure in the balance sheet for FY2025-26 as advised by NHB.

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SJ Corporation Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the closure of its branch office located at 207, Panchratna, Opera House, Mama Parmanand Marg, Mumbai - 400004, Maharashtra, India. This closure is effective from March 31, 2026. The company is making this disclosure in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - Execution Of The EPC Agreement.
announcements.detail: Execution of the EPC Agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has executed an Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) Agreement with West Central Railway for the construction of a new railway line. The project involves earthwork, bridges, viaducts, tunnels, track work, and station buildings for the Sidhi-Singrauli new rail link project in Madhya Pradesh. The project cost is INR 1897.51 crore, and the completion period is 900 days from the appointed date. The agreement was executed on April 02, 2026.

announcements.subject: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd - 500108 -  COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 & 51 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015- NON FUNDING OF 11Th SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES V (INE153A08089)
announcements.detail: LETTER ATTACHED
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd (MTNL) has informed about its non-funding of the 11th semi-annual interest payment for its Bond Series V (INE153A08089) into the escrow account maintained with Bank of India. The interest payment was due on April 12, 2026. As per the Tri-Partite Agreement (TPA) between MTNL, the Department of Telecommunications, and Beacon Trusteeship Limited, MTNL is required to fund the escrow account 10 days before the due date. Due to insufficient funds, MTNL was unable to meet this obligation. All MTNL bonds are sovereign guaranteed by the Government of India, which will be invoked in case of default. This information is provided in compliance with Regulations 30 & 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Provisional Production Performance Of Hindustan Copper Ltd For FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Provisional Production performance of Hindustan Copper Ltd for FY 2025-26 is submitted.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hindustan Copper Ltd (HCL) has announced its provisional production performance for the Financial Year 2025-26. The company achieved a Metal in Concentrate (MIC) production of 27,421 tonnes, which is a 9% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, HCL produced 3.67 million tonnes of ore during FY 2025-26, marking a 6% rise year-on-year. These figures are provisional and submitted in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sagility Ltd - 544282 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Transcript of Investors and Analyst Day held on March 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sagility Ltd has released the transcript of its Investor & Analyst Day held on March 25, 2026. This event provided insights into the company's strategic roadmap and future intentions. The transcript is now available on the company's website at https://sagility.com/investor-relations/financial-summary/. The company previously communicated related information on March 13, 2026, and March 25, 2026. This announcement is for informational purposes and record-keeping.

announcements.subject: Punjab & Sind Bank - 533295 - Provisional Business Figures Of The Bank
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures Of The Bank
announcements.ai_summary: Punjab & Sind Bank has released its provisional business figures for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The bank's total business stood at Rs.2,63,750 crore, marking a 14.98% year-on-year growth from Rs.2,29,379 crore in the audited figures for March 31, 2025. Total deposits reached Rs.1,45,830 crore, an increase of 12.37% year-on-year. CASA deposits grew by 10.01% to Rs.44,873 crore, resulting in a CASA percentage of 30.77%, a slight decrease from 31.43% in the previous year. Gross advances saw a significant rise of 18.39% to Rs.1,17,920 crore. The CD Ratio improved to 80.86% from 76.75% in the prior year. These provisional figures are subject to audit by the bank's Central Statutory Auditors.

announcements.company: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd
announcements.subject: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd - 532921 - Operational Performance Update
announcements.detail: Operational performance update
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited (APSEZ) has reported strong operational performance for FY26, handling a record 500.8 million metric tons (MMT) of cargo, an 11% year-on-year increase. In March 2026 alone, APSEZ achieved its highest-ever monthly cargo volume of 46 MMT, up 11% year-on-year, primarily driven by a 14% increase in container handling. The company's CWIT terminal surpassed the 1 million TEU milestone in FY26, handling 1.06 million TEUs, and recorded its highest monthly volume of 134,960 TEUs in March 2026. The Haifa port also showed operational progress, handling 0.77 MMT in March 2026. While logistics rail volume saw a slight decrease of 7% year-on-year in March 2026 to 55,237 TEUs, it increased by 8% year-on-year for FY26, reaching 695,517 TEUs.

announcements.subject: Firstsource Solutions Ltd - 532809 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Firstsource Solutions Limited, an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, has announced that it has been named a Leader in the Everest Group Healthcare Payer Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and a Leader in the Overall Market Segment of NelsonHall’s Healthcare Payer Agility & Innovation NEAT Evaluation 2026. In the Everest Group assessment, Firstsource is among nine Leaders evaluated globally, highlighting its market impact, vision, and delivery capability in payer back-office intelligent operations, including double-digit revenue growth driven by BPaaS and intelligent operations. NelsonHall recognized Firstsource for its production-ready AI workflows, the relAI™ platform, UnBPO™ approach, and R&D investments, noting a ~70% reduction in manual effort through AI-generated feedback loops. This dual recognition, announced on April 02, 2026, underscores the company's platform-led, AI-powered approach to transforming healthcare payer operations.

announcements.subject: Finkurve Financial Services Ltd - 508954 - Pursuant To Regulation 31(4) Of The SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeover) Regulations, 2011, Enclosed Herewith The Declaration Required.

The declaration, dated April 02, 2026, confirms that no encumbrance, direct or indirect, has been made on the equity shares of Finkurve Financial Services Limited, other than those already disclosed to the stock exchange during the financial year 2025-26. The disclosure covers Mr. Ketan Kothari, Mrs. Mohinidevi Kothari, Mrs. Kalawati Kothari, Mrs. Devkumari Kothari, Mrs. Bhavna Bafna, and Mrs. Namita Kothari.

announcements.subject: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd - 539551 - Summary Of Proceedings Of The General Meeting Of The Equity Shareholders, Secured Creditors, Unsecured Creditors  Of The Co Held On April 02, 2026 Pursuant To The Order Dated February 13, 2026 By The Hon''''ble NCLT, Bengaluru

These meetings were held pursuant to an order dated February 13, 2026, from the Hon’ble NCLT, Bengaluru Bench, and in compliance with the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI Listing Regulations. The meetings, held via Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means, were to consider and approve a Scheme of Arrangement between NH Integrated Care Private Limited (Demerged Company) and Narayana Hrudayalaya Limited (Resulting Company). The summary of the proceedings of these meetings, including those of the creditors, has been enclosed as Annexure-A, with further details as per SEBI Master Circular enclosed as Annexure-B. The proceedings are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Optiemus Infracom Ltd - 530135 - Update Regarding Proposed Investment In Wholly Owned Subsidiary

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Optiemus Infracom Limited has announced a revision to its earlier intimation dated March 9, 2026, regarding a proposed investment in its wholly owned subsidiary, Optiemus Electronics Limited (OEL). OEL has reassessed its funding needs and determined that the planned infusion of funds through a rights issue is not required at this stage due to its current working capital position. Consequently, the proposed investment in OEL is not being pursued at this time, and the prior approval stands revised. This decision was communicated on April 02, 2026.

announcements.subject: Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd - 544120 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Key Business Highlights for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd has announced its key business highlights for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Gross Advances reached ₹8,687 crores, showing a year-on-year growth of 20.9% and a quarter-on-quarter growth of 6.4%. Disbursements during the quarter were ₹919 crore, a 20.1% increase from Q4FY25. Gross NPAs improved to 2.54% as of March 31, 2026, down from 2.68% in Q3FY26 and 2.58% in Q4FY25. Total Deposits crossed ₹10,000 crores, standing at ₹10,018 crores, a 20.4% year-on-year growth. The CASA ratio was 34.7% as of March 31, 2026. This information is provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: LCC Infotech Ltd - 532019 - Pre-Offer Advertisement cum Corrigendum to Detailed Public Statement and Draft Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Grow House Wealth Management Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Pre-Offer Advertisement cum Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement and Draft Letter of Offer to the Public Shareholders of LCC Infotech Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Grow House Wealth Management Pvt Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer for Mr. Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel, has submitted a Pre-Offer Advertisement cum Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement and Draft Letter of Offer for LCC Infotech Ltd. The open offer is for the acquisition of 4,38,34,271 equity shares, representing 26.00% of the emerging voting share capital, at an Offer Price of ₹4.55 per equity share. The corrigendum was published on April 2, 2026, in the Financial Express, Jansatta, Mumbai Lakshadeep, and Duranta Barta.

announcements.subject: CSB Bank Ltd - 542867 - Business Updates For The Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Business Updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: CSB Bank Ltd has released its business updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Total deposits grew by 20% year-on-year to ₹44,246 crore, with Term Deposits increasing by 27% to ₹35,414 crore, while CASA deposits saw a 1% decrease to ₹8,832 crore. Gross advances increased by 27% to ₹40,364 crore. Advances against Gold & Gold Jewellery (excluding receivables secured against gold) surged by 53% to ₹21,567 crore. This data is provisional and subject to audit by the bank's Joint Statutory Auditors.

announcements.subject: JSW Energy Ltd - 533148 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of Observation Letters from BSE Limited ('BSE') and National Stock Exchange of India ('NSE') in relation to Scheme of Arrangement between GE Power India Limited ('Demerged Company') and JSW Energy Limited ('Resulting Company' or 'the Company') and their respective shareholders under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 ('Scheme')
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Energy Limited has received Observation Letters with "no adverse observations" from BSE and "No objection" from NSE regarding the Scheme of Arrangement for the demerger of GE Power India Limited. This follows the Board's approval of the Scheme on September 18, 2025, and subsequent filings with the exchanges on September 26, 2025. The Scheme remains subject to further regulatory and other approvals. The Observation Letters were received on April 1, 2026. The details of the Scheme are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd - 532209 - Provisional Business Figures
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jammu and Kashmir Bank Limited has reported its provisional business figures for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Total business stood at Rs. 290,340.57 crores, representing a year-on-year growth of 13.61%. Total deposits reached Rs. 165,354.04 crores, an increase of 11.30% year-on-year. CASA deposits grew by 8.07% to Rs. 75,478.40 crores. Gross advances increased by 16.83% to Rs. 124,986.53 crores. Gross investments saw a decrease of 1.55% to Rs. 41,319.50 crores. announcements.subject: Hariom Pipe Industries Ltd - 543517 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Received direction from Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board (TNPCB) for closure of the factory/unit of the Company located at SIPCOT, Industrial Centre, Perundurai, Erode District, Tamil Nadu.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hariom Pipe Industries Limited has received closure directions from the Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board (TNPCB) through the Electricity Board for the temporary closure of its factory unit located at SIPCOT Industrial Growth Centre, Perundurai, Erode District, Tamil Nadu. The company received this communication on April 02, 2026. The closure is due to certain observations relating to environmental compliance under applicable pollution control norms. Hariom Pipe Industries has initiated necessary steps to rectify the proceedings and restore operations at the earliest. During this period, the company will continue its operations through its Telangana unit to mitigate any potential impact on sales.

announcements.subject: Emami Ltd-$ - 531162 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Emami to acquire complete stake in Axiom Ayurveda Pvt Ltd ("AloFrut")
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Emami Limited has entered into a definitive agreement on April 1, 2026, to acquire the remaining approximately 73.5% stake in Axiom Ayurveda Pvt. Ltd. ("Axiom"), marking Emami's formal entry into the beverage sector. This acquisition follows Emami's initial acquisition of approximately 36.7% additional stake, adding to its existing 26.5% stake in Axiom. The transaction, approved by Emami's Board of Directors, has an aggregate consideration not exceeding Rs. 200 crores and is expected to be completed in a phased manner over the next three months, subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory requirements. Axiom's portfolio includes the "AloFrut" beverage brand, "Axiom Jeevan Ras" health juices, and "Mukti Gold" beauty products.

announcements.subject: Softtech Engineers Ltd - 543470 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: SoftTech launched India''s First TDR Trading Exchange Platform-e-TDR (A Government of Maharashtra & BMC Initiative)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SoftTech Engineers Limited has been appointed as the technology partner for the e-TDR platform, India's first unified digital platform for Transfer of Development Rights (TDR) transactions. This initiative is launched by the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) under the direction of the UDD, Government of Maharashtra. The platform is designed to serve over 18,000 registered developers and TDR owners within BMC. Key features include online payments, real-time bidding, digital contracts with IGR integration, AI-enabled analytics, and blockchain-anchored TDR certificate issuance. The e-TDR platform aims to eliminate opaque pricing, reduce transaction cycle times, and prevent fraud by replacing manual processes with automated, auditable workflows. This launch sets a national benchmark for GovTech-driven urban development.

announcements.subject: Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd - 500296 - DEMAT REPORT FOR THE MONTH OF MARCH, 2026
announcements.detail: DEMAT REPORT FOR THE MONTH OF MARCH, 2026 IS ENCLOSED
announcements.ai_summary: Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd has submitted its Demat Report for the month of March 2026. During March 2026, a total of 1,841 equity shares were dematerialized after verification of share certificates. Following this dematerialization, the corresponding share certificates have been cancelled, and the Depository has been registered as the owner in the company's records. As of the date of the report, the total holding of National Securities Depository Ltd. (NSDL) and Central Depository Services Ltd. (CDSL) combined stands at 35,667,873 equity shares. This report is in compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Zinc Ltd - 500188 - Production Release For The Fourth Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited announced its production results for the fourth quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. The company achieved its best-ever quarterly mined metal production of 315 kt in 4QFY26 and a record annual mined metal production of 1,114 kt in FY26. Refined metal production reached a record quarterly high of 282 kt in 4QFY26, driven by debottlenecking projects and improved operational efficiency. For the full fiscal year FY26, refined zinc production was 851 kt, up 3% year-on-year, due to commissioning of debottlenecking projects and full-year pyro operations on zinc-lead mode. Refined lead production for FY26 was 197 kt, a decrease of 13% year-on-year. Silver production in 4QFY26 was 176 metric tonnes, and for FY26, it was 627 metric tonnes. Wind power generation in 4QFY26 was 56 MU, and for FY26, it was 372 MU.

announcements.subject: Silverline Technologies Ltd - 500389 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Business Update.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Business Update.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Silverline Technologies Limited has provided a business update on April 02, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company's primary digital platform will undergo scheduled maintenance for 24 to 72 hours to upgrade backend infrastructure due to a recent 45% surge in Daily Active Users (DAU). Additionally, the company is strategically pivoting its Artificial Intelligence (AI) branch to focus on developing proprietary AI solutions for Cyber Warfare, Supply Chain Management, and Energy Management, citing macroeconomic conditions and global geopolitics. These updates are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd - 500570 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant o Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith a Press Release issued by Jaguar Land Rover Automotive plc (JLR) titled, "JLR reports its Wholesale and Retail Sales for Q4FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jaguar Land Rover Automotive plc (JLR), a wholly owned subsidiary of Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited, has reported its wholesale and retail sales for the fourth quarter of FY26 (ending March 31, 2026) and the full fiscal year. In Q4 FY26, wholesale volumes were 95,300 units, a 14.5% decrease year-on-year but a 61.1% increase quarter-on-quarter, reflecting a recovery after a cyber incident. Full-year FY26 wholesale volumes were 307,900 units, down 23.2% from FY25, impacted by US tariffs, China market challenges, the wind-down of legacy Jaguar models, and production stoppages due to the cyber incident. Retail sales in Q4 FY26 were 92,700 units, down 14.3% year-on-year and up 16.2% quarter-on-quarter. Full-year FY26 retail sales were 352,300 units, a 17.8% decrease from FY25. The press release was issued on April 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: GPT Infraprojects Ltd - 533761 - Intimation Of Award Of Arbitration Proceedings
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Intimation of award of Arbitration Proceedings
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: GPT Infraprojects Ltd has announced an arbitration award declared on April 2, 2026, in favour of the GPT-SMC JV. The award pertains to the construction of a Jetty and Raw Water Pumping Station at Ma-Er Ghat for the Dhapa Water Treatment Plant. The Sole Arbitrator, Justice Retired Mr. Shahidullah Munshi, has ruled that the GPT-SMC JV is entitled to receive an amount of Rs. 3.89 Crores from the Kolkata Municipal Corporation (KMC). The company has stated that there is no negative impact on its financial position due to this settlement.

announcements.subject: Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd - 509732 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 -Receiving Of Orders/Contracts- Amendment In Service Contract
announcements.detail: contract
announcements.ai_summary: Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd announced on April 2nd, 2026, an amendment to an existing service contract with Integral Coach Factory (ICF), Chennai. The amendment increases the contract quantity for hiring forklift trucks along with drivers, fuel, and associated staff from 100% to 125%, representing a 25% quantity enhancement. The revised total contract value is approximately ₹6.33 Crores, inclusive of GST. The contract period has also been extended up to July 24, 2026. The original contract value was ₹5,06,43,224.85, with the 25% quantity enhancement adding ₹1,26,60,806.21.

announcements.subject: KFin Technologies Ltd - 543720 - Grant Of Perpetual Certificate Of Registration To Act As Central Recordkeeping Agency Under The National Pension System Architecture

announcements.subject: Indian Bank - 532814 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Interest Rates Updates
announcements.detail: Revision in Benchmark Rates
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Bank announced on April 2nd, 2026, a revision in its benchmark rates as decided by the Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO). The Treasury Bills Linked Lending Rate (TBLR) for tenors of up to 3 months has been revised downwards from 5.35% to 5.30%. Rates for tenors greater than 3 months and up to 1 year, as well as for tenors greater than 1 year and up to 3 years, remain unchanged at 5.50% and 5.60% respectively. The revised TBLR is effective from April 3rd, 2026. The Marginal Cost of Funds based Lending Rate (MCLR), Base Rate, Benchmark Prime Lending Rate (BPLR), Policy Repo Rate, and Repo Linked Benchmark Lending Rates (RBLR) remain unchanged.

announcements.detail: In Continuation to our intimation dated November 13, 2025, we are pleased to announce Investment in Celliimune Biotech Private Limited.

The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd - 590072 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding a fire incident occurred at our Plant II situated at TSKP2,  Kariapatti, Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 2nd, 2026, Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd experienced a fire incident at its Plant II in Kariapatti, Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu, around 5:25 AM IST. The fire was controlled promptly, and fortunately, there were no casualties or injuries. However, the affected operations will be temporarily shut down. The estimated damage is approximately ₹2.66 crores. The company has confirmed that the assets at the affected plant are adequately insured and has already informed the insurance company. An insurance survey is expected to be conducted in due course to assess the loss.

announcements.subject: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 544210 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release Titled "Emcure Pharma Reduces Poviztra Starting Dose Price by 55% to Expand Patient Access."
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has announced a significant price reduction for its weight management drug, Poviztra® (semaglutide injection), effective April 3, 2026. The starting dose price will now be Rs. 999/- per week or Rs. 3,999/- per month, representing a 55% reduction in the starting dose price and an average reduction of 47% across all doses. The company aims to expand patient access to this therapy, which is a second brand of Novo Nordisk’s semaglutide injection for obesity. The price revision brings the innovator molecule, backed by extensive clinical and real-world evidence, within reach of a larger patient base in India, addressing the growing public health challenge of obesity.

announcements.subject: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543243 - Business Updates For The Quarter/Year Ended March 31,2026
announcements.detail: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited has informed the Exchanges regarding the Business updates for the quarter/year ended March 31,2026
announcements.ai_summary: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Gross advances grew by 21.58% year-on-year and 6.74% quarter-on-quarter, reaching Rs. 46,183 Crore. This growth was driven by robust disbursements of Rs. 7,347 Crore, a 12.05% increase from the previous quarter and a significant 72.19% rise year-on-year. Total deposits increased by 7.96% year-on-year to Rs. 46,533 Crore. The bank's Credit Deposit (CD) ratio stood at 93.69% as of March 31, 2026. The 1-90 days past due (DPD) for microfinance and micro loans has shown a consistent reduction, standing at 1.43% as of March 2026, down from 4.34% in October 2025. Collection efficiencies in the microfinance segment have also improved, with the X-bucket collection efficiency reaching 99.71% for Q4FY26.

announcements.subject: Consolidated Construction Consortium Ltd - 532902 - General Updates Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI SAST Regulation 2011
