Sarabeswar and Mr. S. Sivaramakrishnan, pursuant to Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The declaration confirms that the promoters and persons belonging to the promoter group have not made any encumbrances, directly or indirectly, other than those already disclosed to the Company during the financial year 2025-26. This disclosure is a routine annual filing to ensure compliance with takeover regulations.

announcements.subject: Sundaram Multi Pap Ltd - 533166 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Company takes positive step towards sustainability with installation of solar roof panels
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Multi Pap Limited has taken a significant step towards sustainability by installing solar roof panels at its factory premises in Palghar. This initiative aims to accelerate the transition to renewable energy sources and reduce carbon emissions. The newly installed solar panels are projected to generate clean, renewable energy annually, significantly decreasing the company's reliance on non-renewable energy sources and cutting carbon emissions. The project was carried out in partnership with Polaris Renewable Energy Solutions Pvt. Ltd. The installation is expected to lead to reduced energy costs, enabling Sundaram to reinvest savings, and enhance resilience against fluctuating energy prices. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Raymond Realty Ltd - 544420 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Raymond Realty Limited has announced a strong operational performance for the fourth quarter and the full fiscal year 2026. The company reported pre-sales of `1,519 Cr for Q4FY26, which is nearly the combined momentum of the previous nine months. This performance was driven by successful launches and sustained sales across the MMR region, including projects like Ten X District 9 (Thane), Park Street (Thane), The Address by GS (Thane and Wadala), and Invictus by GS in BKC. For the full fiscal year 2026 (FY26), pre-sales reached `3,023 Cr, a 31% increase compared to FY25's `2,314 Cr. Collections for Q4FY26 stood at `515 Cr, a 4% increase year-on-year. The company highlights exceptional launch momentum, with Ten X District 9 (Thane) securing substantial bookings shortly after its launch. This press release is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd - 526365 - Offer Opening Public Announcement
announcements.detail:
Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Offer Opening Public announcement under Regulation 18(7) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended for the attention of the eligible Equity Shareholders of Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd
("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Mr. Mahendra Madanlal Chordia, Mrs. Asha M Chordia, and Mr. Sunny Mahendra Chordia, along with Swarnsarita Jewellers Private Limited (collectively the "Acquirers"), are making an open offer to acquire up to 47,94,987 fully paid-up equity shares of Swarnsarita Jewels India Limited. The offer price is `32.15 per equity share, with a face value of `10 each, representing 22.97% of the Target Company's voting share capital. This announcement follows previous disclosures including a Public Announcement on January 22, 2026, a Detailed Public Statement on January 30, 2026, a Draft Letter of Offer on February 06, 2026, and a Letter of Offer on March 18, 2026. The Committee of Independent Directors has reviewed the offer and opined that the Offer Price of `32.15 per Equity Share is fair and reasonable in accordance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The offer is being made to the public shareholders of Swarnsarita Jewels India Limited.

announcements.subject: Trishakti Industries Ltd - 531279 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 - Capex Update
announcements.detail: General Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 on Capex Update
announcements.ai_summary: Trishakti Industries Ltd has announced a significant capital expenditure update on April 2, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company has undertaken a capital expenditure of approximately ₹20 Crores for the acquisition of new equipment. This brings the company's cumulative capital expenditure to approximately ₹258 Crores (including GST). Trishakti Industries Ltd has exceeded its FY26 CapEx guidance of ₹100 Crores, having already achieved approximately ₹210 Crores of fresh CapEx for FY26. The newly acquired machines are projected to generate revenues of approximately ₹26 Crores over the next 12 months, marking a continued expansion of the company's operational fleet and strengthening its revenue visibility.

announcements.subject: Kalind Ltd - 526935 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Regulation 31(A)(8) Of SEBI (LODR), 2015 Following Receipt Of Request For Re-Classification From The Promoter Category

announcements.ai_summary: Kalind Ltd announced on April 2, 2026, that it has received a request from its promoters, Yagnik Bharatkumar Tank and Dennis Bhupendra Desai, seeking reclassification from the "Promoter" category to the "Public" category. This request is made under Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The reclassification will require the approval of the Board of Directors of Kalind Ltd and the BSE Limited. The company will undertake the necessary processes and make the requisite application to the stock exchange in due course.

announcements.subject: Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd - 532371 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please see attached intimation regarding press release dated April 2, 2026 regarding TTBS wins five prestigious honours at ET Telecom Awards 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd (TTBS) has been honored with five prestigious awards at the ET Telecom Awards 2026 on April 2, 2026. These awards recognize TTBS's leadership in enterprise innovation and customer excellence, including "Enterprise Service Provider of the Year," "Enterprise Digital Transformation of the Year," and "Best Customer Service." The company also received jury recognition for "Best Wi-Fi Infrastructure Provider" and "Best Brand Awareness." Vishal Rally, President & Chief Revenue Officer, stated that these accolades reflect customer trust in TTBS to power their digital journeys. TTBS continues to offer integrated solutions in connectivity, collaboration, cloud, and cybersecurity to help businesses, especially SMEs, build resilience and compete in a digital-first world. The ET Telecom Awards celebrate excellence and innovation in the Indian telecommunications and enterprise technology ecosystem.

announcements.detail: Pursuant to SEBI Circular dated 26th November 2018 in respect of fund raising by issuance of Debt Securities by Large Entities and Disclosures and compliances thereof by such large Corporates, we hereby confirm that Kotia Enterprises Limited does not fall in the category of Large Corporates.

The company has requested that this confirmation be taken into its records.

announcements.subject: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Ltd - 542904 - Key Business Numbers Q4 FY2025-26
announcements.detail: Key Business Numbers Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Ltd has released its key business numbers for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Total Deposits stood at ₹45,661 crore as of March 31, 2026, an increase of 21.3% year-on-year from ₹37,630 crore as of March 31, 2025. CASA deposits grew by 35.8% year-on-year to ₹13,055 crore, resulting in a CASA Ratio of 28.6%. The Gross Loan Book grew by 26.6% year-on-year to ₹40,655 crore. Overall Disbursements for Q4 FY26 were ₹9,763 crore, up 31.4% year-on-year. Asset quality showed improvement with PAR (%) at 3.54% and GNPA at 2.27% as of March 31, 2026. The bank also reported strong collection efficiency of 99.81% for Micro Banking (GL & IL) Bucket X in March 2026. This information is disclosed under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bondada Engineering Ltd - 543971 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)_Receipt of Orders
announcements.ai_summary: Bondada Engineering Limited has announced the receipt of multiple orders aggregating to Rs. 42.50 Crores. One order is from Telangana Police Housing, Infratech & Consultancy Services Corporation Limited (TGPICS) for the supply of self-supported communication towers and prefabricated equipment rooms across Telangana, which is part of a critical communication infrastructure initiative for the Telangana Police IT&C Department. Another order is from Fixity Technologies Private Limited for the execution of Plastic Waste Management Units (PWMU) under the Swachh Andhra Corporation (SAC). This latter project will be executed through the Company’s subsidiary, ATPOLE Technologies, utilizing its BLDC motors technology, aligning with sustainable waste management practices. These orders strengthen the company's order book in telecom infrastructure and environmental sustainability segments. The announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd - 543989 - Q4 FY 26 And FY 2025-26 Business Update
announcements.detail: Q4 FY 26 and FY 2025-26 Business update
announcements.ai_summary: For Q4 FY 2025–26, Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd reported a turnover of Rs. 419 crores, a 5% increase compared to Rs. 399 crores in Q4 FY 2024–25. For the full financial year FY 2025–26, the company achieved a turnover of Rs. 1,653 crores, marking a 13% growth from Rs. 1,462 crores in FY 2024–25. During FY 2025–26, the company expanded its retail presence by launching 13 new stores, adding 78,618 sq. ft. of retail space. These new stores include 4 under the Kanchipuram Varamahalakshmi Silks format, 8 under the Valli Silks format, and 1 under the Kalamandir format. This expansion brings the total store network to 81 stores, covering approximately 7.94 lakh sq. ft. of retail area. This business update is subject to audit and has been disclosed as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sejal Glass Ltd - 532993 - Intimation Of TV Interview.
announcements.detail: Intimation of TV Interview of Mr. Amrut S Gada, Founder and Promoter of the Company with NDTV Profit
announcements.ai_summary: Sejal Glass Ltd has announced that its Founder and Promoter, Mr. Amrut S Gada, is scheduled to participate in a TV interview. The interview, titled "Small Cap Buzzers," will be broadcast on NDTV Profit on Thursday, April 2nd, 2026, at 01:30 P.M. The discussions during the interview will be based solely on publicly available information, and no unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) will be disclosed. The company has noted that the schedule of this interview is subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances. This intimation is provided under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: YOGI Ltd - 511702 - Board Meeting Outcome for Meeting Held On 02Nd April, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find the attached Outcome of Board Meeting  for Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to Conversion of Warrants
announcements.ai_summary: YOGI Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 2nd, 2026, approved the allotment of 18,40,000 Equity Shares upon the conversion of 18,40,000 convertible warrants. This allotment is on a preferential basis and follows a special resolution passed by shareholders on October 24th, 2024, and in-principle approval from BSE Limited. The allottee, Mr. Tirth Ghanshyam Patel, has paid the balance 75% of the consideration, amounting to INR 4,41,60,000, to exercise the conversion right. The face value of each equity share is Rs. 10. Consequently, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 45,00,00,000, comprising 4,50,00,000 equity shares. The newly issued shares rank pari passu with existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: Alkem Laboratories Ltd - 539523 - Please Find Attached Herewith Intimation About Increase In Investment To Be Made For Setting Up Of Manufacturing Facility Of The Company In Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh.

The company will make a copy of this disclosure available on its website.

announcements.subject: United Breweries Ltd-$ - 532478 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - Update On New Tax Litigation
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015 regarding New Tax Litigation
announcements.ai_summary: United Breweries Ltd has received an order from the Deputy Commissioner of State Tax, Maharashtra State VAT Department, dated March 30, 2026, and received on April 01, 2026. The order pertains to the non-submission of declaration forms in C & F for a concessional rate of tax. This has resulted in a demand for additional tax of ₹9,65,72,053, interest of ₹10,42,97,818, and a penalty of ₹2,41,43,013, totaling ₹22,50,12,884 for the Financial Year 2021-22. The company believes it has a strong case to defend the issue before the appellate authority and does not anticipate any significant financial impact beyond a minimal statutory pre-deposit required for appeal admission. The company is currently evaluating its course of action.

announcements.subject: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd - 532626 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Demise
announcements.detail: Intimation of demise of Mr. Anil Kumar Bansal, Promoter, Chairman and Whole-time Director of the Company (DIN: 00232223)
announcements.ai_summary: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd has announced the sad demise of Mr. Anil Kumar Bansal, who was a Promoter, Chairman, and Whole-time Director of the company (DIN: 00232223). Mr. Bansal passed away on April 1, 2026. The company has conveyed its deep sympathy and condolences to his family, acknowledging his significant contributions and legacy. The Board of Directors expressed that his hard work, dedication, values, and guidance will continue to inspire and be remembered. The company deeply mourns the loss of its Chairman, who was an integral part and pillar of strength.

announcements.subject: Baazar Style Retail Ltd - 544243 - Business Update At The End Of Fourth Quarter Of FY2026 (Q4 FY26)
announcements.detail: We hereby enclose the Quarterly Business updates of the Company at the end of the Fourth Quarter (Q4 FY 26) and Year ended on March 31,2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Baazar Style Retail Limited (BSRL) has reported its business update for the Fourth Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The company achieved its highest-ever standalone revenue from operations in FY26, with a year-on-year (YoY) growth of 37% to Rs 18,421 million, surpassing its guidance. In Q4 FY26, standalone revenue from operations grew by 35% YoY to Rs 4,662 million. Sales per square foot stood at Rs 731 per month in FY26 and Rs 698 per month in Q4 FY26. Same Store Sales Growth (SSSG) was 3% in FY26 and 8% in Q4 FY26. As of March 31, 2026, BSRL operated 263 stores, covering a total rental area of 24.53 lakh square feet. During Q4 FY26, 11 new stores were opened, and no stores were closed. For the full FY26, 56 new stores were added, and 7 stores were closed.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Coforge Limited announced on April 2, 2026, a strategic partnership with Solstice Innovations, Inc., aimed at redefining P&C Insurance Modernization through Agentic AI. Under this agreement, Coforge will establish a dedicated Center of Excellence (CoE) utilizing its Forge-X AI platform to accelerate client onboarding, system integration, migration, quality engineering, and business process transformation for Solstice and its customers. The partnership combines Solstice's agentic Equinox™ platform with Coforge's Forge-X AI-driven delivery engine to offer an end-to-end modernization proposition for P&C insurers, promising faster and more confident transitions from legacy environments to the Equinox platform with reduced risk and implementation costs.

announcements.subject: GE Power India Ltd - 532309 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: As enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: GE Power India Limited has received an observation letter with 'No Adverse Observations' from BSE Limited on April 1, 2026, and a 'No Objection' letter from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 1, 2026, regarding the proposed Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves GE Power India Limited (Demerged Company) and JSW Energy Limited (Resulting Company) and their respective shareholders, under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company had previously informed the exchanges about the Board's approval of the scheme on September 18, 2025. The Scheme of Arrangement remains subject to further regulatory and other approvals.

announcements.subject: Latent View Analytics Ltd - 543398 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we have enclosed herewith the press release on the Strategic Investment made by M/s. LatentView Analytics Corporation (Incorporated in New Jersey), a Material & Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company in M/s. Healtheon AI INC.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Latent View Analytics Limited announced a strategic investment of $3 million made by its material and wholly owned subsidiary, LatentView Analytics Corporation (New Jersey), into Healtheon AI INC. This investment, detailed in a press release dated April 2, 2026, targets the healthcare Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) sector, focusing on Agentic AI solutions. Healtheon AI develops AI teammates to automate complex tasks in healthcare finance. LatentView Analytics views this as a step towards its AI vision and aims to leverage Healtheon AI's solutions with its clients. The partnership is expected to enhance efficiency and address healthcare finance challenges.

The promoters, promoter group, and persons acting in concert have declared that they have not made any encumbrance of shares, either directly or indirectly, during this period. This filing is a compliance measure with the SEBI regulations. The disclosure was made on April 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Banganga Paper Industries Ltd - 512025 - Offer Opening Public Announcement
announcements.detail: Navigant Corporate Advisors Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Offer Opening Public Announcement to the Shareholders of Banganga Paper Industries Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Asgard Alcobev Limited, formerly known as Banganga Paper Industries Limited, is the subject of an open offer to acquire up to 9,17,41,759 equity shares. These shares represent 26.00% of the expanded equity and voting share capital. The offer price is Rs. 1.45 per fully paid-up equity share of face value of Re. 1/-. The acquirers are Ronak Jain, Sarita Jain, Priyanka Jain, and K K Impex & Trading Private Limited, along with persons acting in concert (PACs) Karan Jain, Karishma Rohit Jain, and Radhika Karan Jain. Navigant Corporate Advisors Ltd is acting as the Manager to the Offer. The pre-offer advertisement was published on April 2, 2026, in various newspapers including Business Standard (English and Hindi), Pratahkal (Marathi), and Prahaar (Marathi).

This announcement is a regulatory requirement for listed entities to inform stakeholders about any such financial defaults.

announcements.subject: Astra Microwave Products Ltd - 532493 - Receipt Of Order By Astra Rafael Comsys Private Limited, Joint Venture Company.

This order is for the supply of Software Defined Radio (SDR) for HAL, Bangalore. Astra Microwave Products Ltd expects to receive a portion of the business from this order. The disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and relevant SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd - 544290 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) has announced securing five major project wins in March 2026, with a combined value of INR 1,481 Crores. These new projects include a significant INR 1070 Cr order in the Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) segment, with a combined capacity of 930 MWH across these projects. The company is expanding its geographical footprint into Bihar, Assam, and Telangana. These wins mark a strong closure to the financial year and strengthen EIEL's position in the renewable energy and BESS segments, aligning with India's growing demand for energy storage solutions. The projects are from NTPC Limited and represent a step-up in scale for EIEL in executing large energy projects.

announcements.subject: Imagicaaworld Entertainment Ltd - 539056 - Imagicaaworld Entertainment Limited Entered Into An Operation And Management Agreement With Keshav Holiday Resort Private Limited (Shankus Water Park)
announcements.detail: Imagicaaworld Entertainment Limited entered into an Operation and Management Agreement with Keshav Holiday Resort Private Limited (Shankus Water Park)
announcements.ai_summary: Imagicaaworld Entertainment Limited has entered into an Operation and Management Agreement with Keshav Holiday Resort Private Limited (KHRPL), which operates Shankus Water Park in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Effective April 01, 2026, Imagicaaworld Entertainment Limited will manage and operate KHRPL's water park business. This agreement follows a previous disclosure on January 20, 2026, regarding a potential joint venture. Under the terms, Imagicaaworld Entertainment Limited is entitled to receive a management fee linked to pre-agreed milestones and has the option to use its Intellectual Property (IP) at the water park. The agreement is for providing operation and management services.

announcements.subject: Dhanlaxmi Bank Ltd - 532180 - Business Updates For The Year Ended March 31,2026
announcements.detail: Business updates for the Year ended March 31,2026
announcements.ai_summary: Dhanlaxmi Bank Ltd has provided business updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The bank reported a Total Business of INR 33,773 Crore for the provisional period ending March 31, 2026, representing a Year-on-Year growth of 19.68% compared to INR 28,219 Crore in the previous year. Total Deposits stood at INR 18,643 Crore, up 16.42% from INR 16,013 Crore. Gross Advances increased by 23.96% to INR 15,130 Crore from INR 12,206 Crore. Notably, Gold Loans saw a significant increase of 71.41% to INR 6,512 Crore, and MSME advances grew by 30.90% to INR 2,135 Crore. This data is provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: JTL Industries Ltd - 534600 - Q4FY26 And FY26 Business Performance Update
announcements.detail: Q4FY26 and FY26 Business Performance Update
announcements.ai_summary: JTL Industries Ltd has announced its highest-ever quarterly sales volume of 1,23,262 MT in Q4 FY26, a 50.5% year-on-year increase from 81,885 MT in Q4 FY25 and a 36.3% quarter-on-quarter increase from 90,429 MT in Q3 FY26. Export sales in Q4 FY26 reached 11,785 MT, up 72.2% year-on-year from 6,841 MT in Q4 FY25 and 22.9% quarter-on-quarter from 9,592 MT in Q3 FY26, contributing 10.6% to total sales. For the full fiscal year FY26, the company achieved its highest-ever sales volume of 3,95,900 MT, a 14.5% year-on-year growth from 3,45,690 MT in FY25. Export volume for FY26 was 37,301 MT, representing 10.4% of total sales, an increase from 33,700 MT (9.1% of total sales) in FY25. This performance is attributed to robust demand, improved capacity utilization, and the ramp-up of value-added products, including DFT pipes, with the expansion of the Mangaon facility yielding positive results.

announcements.subject: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd - 533271 - Intimation Regarding Extension Of Expected Date Of Completion Of Sale/Disposal Of Stake In Subsidiaries Of The Company And Ashoka Concessions Limited (ACL)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding extension of expected date completion of Sale of stake in SPVs up to 30-06-2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd has provided an update regarding the extension of the expected completion date for the sale of its stake in several subsidiaries and Ashoka Concessions Limited (ACL). The company had previously entered into Share Purchase Agreements with Epic Concesiones 2 Private Limited, Infrastructure Yield Plus II, and Infrastructure Yield Plus IIA (managed by EAAA India Alternatives Limited) for the sale of its entire share capital and management control of 11 Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs). The expected date for the completion of the sale for the remaining 6 SPVs has now been extended up to June 30, 2026. This extension is subject to the fulfillment of certain conditions precedent and other terms and conditions outlined in the respective transaction documents.

announcements.subject: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd - 544283 - Update On Commissioning Of Fourth Phase Of 33.333 MW Capacity Of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project Located In Rajsthan
announcements.detail: Update on commissioning of fourth phase of 33.333 MW capacity of BESS project located in Rajsthan
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary ACME Sun Power Private Limited, has commissioned the fourth phase of its Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project in Rajasthan. This commissioned phase adds 33.333 MW / 160.48 MWh to the project's capacity. The total commissioned capacity now stands at 133.336 MW / 641.980 MWh out of the total project capacity of 300 MW / 1409.34 MWh. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this fourth phase is April 03, 2026. This update follows previous intimations on March 06, 2026, March 12, 2026, and March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Atlanta Electricals Ltd - 544527 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Atlanta Electricals Limited receives Power Grid Corporation of India''s approval for up to 400KV class transformer manufacturing at its Vadod facility.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Atlanta Electricals Limited has received approval from Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (PGCIL) for manufacturing up to 400 kV class transformers at its Vadod facility. This approval, received on April 1, 2026, is a significant milestone, achieved within two years of the facility's groundbreaking. The approval validates Atlanta Electricals' capabilities in EHV class transformer supplies, subject to meeting qualifying requirements and completing a short-circuit test. Both PGCIL and NABL accreditations are expected to propel the company into large EHV tenders, potentially boosting its utilization towards 63,000 MVA. This development is crucial for India's grid modernization and renewable energy evacuation.

announcements.subject: Marsons Ltd - 517467 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) -Audio Recordings For Conference Call

This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: JTL Industries Ltd - 534600 - Announcement Under Reg. 30- Change In The Name Of Subsidiary Company As JTL Defence Limited
announcements.detail: Change in the name of Subsidiary Company-JTL Defence Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JTL Industries Limited has announced a change in the name of one of its subsidiary companies. Effective April 1, 2026, RCI Industries & Technologies Limited has been renamed "JTL Defence Limited". This change has been approved by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs. Additionally, JTL Defence Limited has formally adopted its official logo. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Vedanta Ltd - 500295 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended ('SEBI Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vedanta Limited's subsidiary, Talwandi Sabo Power Limited (TSPL), has received a direction from the Commission for Air Quality Management in National Capital Region and Adjoining Areas (CAQM) to deposit an Environmental Compensation of Rs. 33,02,56,800. This penalty is allegedly for not achieving the mandatory five percent blend of crop residue pellets or briquettes with coal for FY 2024-25, as per Rule 3 of the Environment (Utilization of Crop Residue by Thermal Power Plant) Rules, 2023. TSPL received this direction via email on April 01, 2026, and intends to file an appeal before the appropriate forum within the prescribed timeline. The company expects a favourable outcome and does not anticipate any material financial impact on TSPL or Vedanta Limited.

announcements.subject: V2 Retail Ltd - 532867 - Business Update For Q4 FY26 & FY26 - Growth Delivered, Strategy Reinforced
announcements.detail: The details are attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: V2 Retail Limited has reported a robust performance for Q4 FY26 and the full FY26, demonstrating accelerated network expansion and a transition to a national platform. In Q4 FY26, standalone revenue stood at ₹ 798 Cr, a 59% year-on-year growth from ₹ 499 Cr in Q4 FY25. The company achieved a solid Same Store Sales Growth (SSSG) of 7.74% in Q4 FY26, driven by its data-backed assortment strategy. Store productivity improved, with Monthly Sales Per Square Feet (PSF) reaching ₹ 794 during Q4 FY26. V2 Retail aggressively expanded its network, opening 33 new stores and closing 2 during the quarter, increasing its total retail footprint to approximately 35 lakh square feet across 325 stores as of March 31, 2026, with a strategic focus on Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. For the full FY26, standalone revenue grew by 61% to ₹ 3,060 Cr from ₹1,885 crore in FY25, and SSSG was approximately 8.58%.

announcements.subject: Sanathan Textiles Ltd - 544314 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Completion Of Phase I Ramp-Up At Punjab Facility.
announcements.detail: Please find attached the press release pertaining to completion of Phase I at Punjab Facility.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sanathan Textiles Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Sanathan Polycot Private Limited, has successfully completed the Phase I ramp-up at its Punjab facility. The facility, which commissioned its Continuous Polymerisation line with an initial capacity of 350 tonnes per day on August 27, 2025, is now operating at approximately 96% of its installed capacity. This achievement reflects strong execution capabilities and robust demand absorption, particularly from North India's textile ecosystem. The company is now focused on advancing its expansion roadmap, including the planned progression towards Phase II, to further enhance its position as an integrated and diversified polyester yarn manufacturer. The Executive Director, Mr. Sammir Dattani, highlighted the operational discipline and market positioning that enabled this successful ramp-up despite geopolitical challenges.

announcements.subject: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd - 544225 - Disclosure Of Shareholders' Communication Dated April 1, 2026, Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the exchange regarding the Shareholders communication dated April 1, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd has reported a significant surge in its business performance for March 2026. Daily orders for electric vehicles exceeded 1,000 units in the last week of March, indicating strong demand momentum. Vehicle registrations in March 2026 reached 10,117 units, a substantial increase of over 150% compared to 3,973 units in February 2026. This performance signifies a sharp market share recovery, driven by structural improvements in service operations, with over 80% of vehicles now serviced on the same day. The company has implemented operational changes to improve turnaround times and customer experience, thereby strengthening customer trust and boosting demand. Ola Electric has communicated these positive developments to shareholders on April 1, 2026, and the information will be hosted on their website.

announcements.subject: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust - 543225 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue

This notice was released by Data Link Investment Manager Private Limited, the Trust's Investment Manager, on April 1, 2026. The OFS details are reflected in the BENPOS dated March 27, 2026. The Trust has provided the necessary information to BSE Limited for record. The notice is available for Unitholders to review.
