announcements.subject: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd - 544447 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Capacity Addition
announcements.ai_summary: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd has announced a significant capacity addition through a new lease deed in Hyderabad. The new facility will add 1,25,906 Sq. Ft. to its operational capacity, with the expansion expected to be completed within April 2026. This expansion is supported by an investment of approximately INR 17.00 Crores, to be financed through internal accruals or issue proceeds. The company aims to support business growth and expand its operational footprint with this move. As of December 31, 2025, Smartworks had an operational capacity of 9.2 Million Sq. Ft. and a utilization rate of 84%.

announcements.subject: Lakhotia Polyesters (India) Ltd - 535387 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on the Proposed Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Lakhotia Polyesters (India) Ltd has provided an update on its proposed acquisition of 100% stake in New Nexus FZ LLC, a Dubai-based entity. The acquisition, initially expected to conclude by March 31, 2026, has been delayed due to the prevailing geopolitical situation impacting regulatory approvals. The company now anticipates completing the acquisition by June 30, 2026. Investors should monitor further updates regarding the progress of these regulatory clearances.

announcements.subject: InterGlobe Aviation Ltd - 539448 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: InterGlobe Aviation Limited, operating as IndiGo, has announced a revision in fuel charges for all new domestic and international bookings made after 0001 hrs on April 2, 2026, due to a significant increase in Air Turbine Fuel (ATF) costs. The Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas and Ministry of Civil Aviation have allowed a partial and staggered increase of 25% for domestic operations. Revised fuel charges per sector for domestic routes will range from ₹ 275 for distances up to 500 kms to ₹ 950 for routes above 2,000 kms. For international operations, revised fuel charges will vary by region, with charges for the Indian Subcontinent up to 500 kms at ₹ 900 and for UK & Europe at ₹ 10,000. These revisions are intended to mitigate the impact of rising fuel prices on the airline's operating costs.

announcements.subject: Prime Focus Ltd - 532748 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Pursuant to provisions of Regulation 30 of LODR Regulations, the subsidiaries of Prime Focus Limited have proposed to undertake certain steps for internal restructuring within the group to streamline the business operations and details of key restructuring steps.
announcements.ai_summary: Prime Focus Limited (PFL) is undertaking an internal restructuring of its subsidiaries to streamline business operations. This involves the transfer of 100% equity shareholding of Prime Focus Technologies Inc. (PFT US) from Brahma AI Services India Limited (Brahma India) to DNEG S.a.r.l. (DNEG). This transfer is contingent upon the conversion of optionally convertible redeemable preference shares and loans previously extended by Brahma India to PFT US into equity shares, which does not involve any fresh capital infusion. Additionally, DNEG will transfer its entire 100% equity shareholding in Brahma AI Services India Limited to Brahma AI Holdings Limited. Following these transactions, PFT US and Brahma India will remain step-down subsidiaries of PFL. The Audit Committee has approved these restructuring steps, which were finalized by the Board of Directors on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Diamines & Chemicals Ltd-$ - 500120 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR)- Non-Exercise Of Option To Convert Of Warrants
announcements.detail: We submit herewith disclosure under Reg 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations regarding non-exercise of option to convert warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Diamines & Chemicals Ltd announced that 6,36,988 convertible warrants have lapsed due to non-exercise of the conversion option within the stipulated 18-month period from the allotment date of October 1, 2024. The initial subscription amount received for these warrants, amounting to ₹ 8,79,04,344, has been forfeited as per SEBI regulations. The company had initially allotted 9,06,390 warrants at an issue price of ₹ 552 per warrant, with 25% of the issue price, or ₹ 138 per warrant, collected upfront. As of March 31, 2026, 3,23,388 warrants were allotted to promoters and 3,13,600 to non-promoters that have now lapsed. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

announcements.subject: ICICI Bank Ltd - 532174 - Update On ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Limited And ICICI Venture Funds Management Company Limited
announcements.detail: Update on ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Limited and ICICI Venture Funds Management Company Limited
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Bank Limited has provided an update on the transfer of the private equity, venture capital, and real estate fund management business from ICICI Venture Funds Management Company Limited (IVen) to ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Limited (IPru AMC). Following the receipt of requisite approvals, IPru AMC has completed the transfer of investment management rights for specific Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs) and executed the necessary agreements with IVen. Effective April 1, 2026, IPru AMC will manage the following AIFs: India Advantage Fund S4 I, India Advantage Fund S5 I, India Advantage Fund S5 II, India Real Estate Investment Fund Series 2, and Iven Amplifi Fund. This update follows previous disclosures made by the bank on May 9, 2025, and March 2, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd - 500570 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a statement containing details of the Company''s listed debt securities as per the formal specified by SEBI as on March 31, 2026 for reporting of debt securities issued through private placement..
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited has submitted a half-yearly report detailing its listed debt securities as of March 31, 2026, as per SEBI's requirements for debt securities issued through private placement. The report indicates that the E-30B Series (ISIN – INE155A08431) of Rated, Listed, Unsecured Non-Convertible Debentures worth ₹500 crore was fully redeemed on its due date. Additionally, the company has transferred outstanding Non-Convertible Debentures aggregating ₹2,300 crore, along with all associated rights, obligations, and liabilities, to the resulting company, Tata Motors Limited, following a Composite Scheme of Arrangement approved by the Board on August 8, 2025, and September 26, 2025.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - Disclosure Under Regulation 10(6), 29(1) & 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 Received By The Company.
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 10(6), 29(1) & 29(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 received by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: The Promoter and Promoter Group of G R Infraprojects Limited have informed the stock exchanges about an inter-se transfer of equity shares among qualifying persons, who are immediate relatives. This transaction, which is being conducted via gift, is in compliance with Regulations 10(6), 29(1), and 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company has received these intimations from its members and is requesting that the stock exchanges take this information on record. No specific share counts or percentages of voting capital were provided in this announcement, but the transfer is among immediate relatives within the promoter group.

announcements.subject: Nimbus Projects Ltd - 511714 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligation And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Listing Of Equity Shares Of Nimbus Projects Limited ("The Company") On National Stock Exchange Of India Limited ("NSE")
announcements.detail: Listing of Equity shares of Nimbus Projects Limited ("The Company") on National Stock Exchange of India ("NSE")
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nimbus Projects Limited has received listing and trading approval from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) for its equity shares. The company will have 19,318,735 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each listed on the NSE. The shares will be admitted to trading effective April 06, 2026, under the designated symbol "NIMBSPROJ". This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has been informed via a letter from NSE dated April 01, 2026, received at 18:26 hours. All future filings and submissions will be made through the NSE Electronic Application Processing System (NEAPS).

announcements.subject: Rathi Steel & Power Ltd-$ - 504903 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release- Revenue fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rathi Steel and Power Limited has reported strong revenue growth for the fourth quarter and the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company recorded revenue of approximately ₹ 244.8 Crores for Q4 FY26, representing a 63.5% year-on-year growth. For the full financial year FY26, the revenue surpassed ₹ 715 Crores, reaching approximately ₹ 716.7 Crores, an increase of 41.8% compared to ₹ 505.43 Crores in FY25. This robust performance demonstrates operational resilience amidst challenges like rising fuel costs due to geopolitical developments. The company's unique capability in direct charging for rolling stainless steel wire rod minimizes fuel consumption, which is particularly relevant given current energy disruptions. The diversified product portfolio of stainless steel and TMT products provides operational flexibility and higher capacity utilization.

announcements.subject: Choice International Ltd - 531358 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of 100% stake in Optimo Investment Adviser Private Limited by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Choice International Limited has entered into an arrangement to acquire 100% equity stake in Optimo Investment Adviser Private Limited, which will subsequently become a wholly owned subsidiary. The acquisition involves the purchase of 10,000 equity shares for a consideration of Rs. 1,000 from existing shareholders, Mr. Ajay Kejriwal and Mrs. Babita Kejriwal, who are related parties. Optimo Investment Adviser Private Limited had a turnover of NIL and a net worth of INR (98,022) as of March 31, 2025. The company also proposes to change Optimo's name to "Choice Unified Services Private Limited" and alter its object clause to align with proposed business activities, subject to necessary approvals from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs. This transaction is being executed on an arm's length basis based on independent valuation.

announcements.subject: Wipro Ltd - 507685 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, it is informed that Cardinal US Holdings, Inc. (step-down subsidiary) has transferred its entire shareholding in Capco Consulting Services LLC (step-down subsidiary) to The Capital Markets Company, LLC (step-down subsidiary), effective March 30, 2026 (Eastern Time). The Company received intimation to this effect on April 1, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Wipro Ltd has informed that its step-down subsidiary, Cardinal US Holdings, Inc., transferred its entire shareholding in Capco Consulting Services LLC to another step-down subsidiary, The Capital Markets Company, LLC. This transfer was effective March 30, 2026 (Eastern Time), and Wipro Ltd received intimation on April 1, 2026. The transaction aims to rationalize and simplify the overall group structure, with The Capital Markets Company, LLC now holding 100% of Capco Consulting Services LLC. No benefits are expected for the promoter or promoter group from this internal restructuring.

announcements.subject: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd - 544457 - The Company Has Entered Into Registrar And Transfer Agent Agreement With M/S Kfin Technologies Limited.
announcements.detail: The company has entered into Registrar and Transfer Agent Agreement with M/s. Kfin Technologies Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd has entered into a Registrar and Transfer Agent Agreement with M/s Kfin Technologies Limited, which holds SEBI Registration No. INR000000221. This agreement was disclosed pursuant to Regulation 7 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has made this information available on its website, www.bhvl.in.

announcements.subject: Marico Ltd - 531642 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Update on intra-group restructuring involving integration of business of Zed Lifestyle Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Marico Ltd has provided an update on its intra-group restructuring involving Zed Lifestyle Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary. The boards and shareholders of Zed approved its voluntary liquidation and the distribution of its entire business undertaking to Marico Ltd on April 1, 2026. This move is subject to creditor approval and other requisite statutory and regulatory approvals. Upon receiving creditor consent, Zed's liquidation will commence on April 1, 2026. Further details were previously disclosed on January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Dhampur Sugar Mills Ltd - 500119 - Certificate From Chief Financial Officer Confirming The Utilisation Of Proceeds From Commercial Paper
announcements.detail: Please find attached certificate from CFO confirming the utilisation of proceeds from Commercial Paper.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dhampur Sugar Mills Ltd has submitted a certificate from its Chief Financial Officer confirming the utilization of proceeds from Commercial Paper. This certificate pertains to the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and has been provided in compliance with SEBI circulars. The company has informed both the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd and BSE Limited about this submission.

announcements.subject: DCM Shriram Ltd - 523367 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Commissioning Of Epichlorohydrin (ECH) Plant
announcements.detail: Commissioning of ECH Plant at full capacity on 1st April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: DCM Shriram Ltd has announced the full commissioning of its Epichlorohydrin (ECH) plant located in Jhagadia, Bharuch District, Gujarat. The plant now operates at its total capacity of 52,000 TPA, with the remaining 17,000 TPA capacity being commissioned on April 1, 2026. This follows the earlier commissioning of 35,000 TPA capacity, as previously intimated on October 14, 2025. The company has made this information available on its investor website.

announcements.subject: Nestle India Ltd - 500790 - Regulation 30 And Schedule III Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations'): Intimation Regarding The Addition Of A New Maggi Noodles Production Line At The Sanand Factory, Gujarat
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding the addition of a new Maggi Noodles production line at the Sanand Factory, Gujarat
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 01, 2026, Nestlé India Ltd informed the stock exchanges about the addition of a new Maggi Noodles production line at its Sanand Factory in Gujarat. This expansion is part of the company's planned capital expenditure to increase overall capacities and meet future demand. The new production line will add approximately 20,500 tons per annum to the existing capacity of 141,600 tons per annum, which currently operates at an approximate utilization of 80%. The investment required for this expansion is approximately ₹90 crores, which will be financed through internal accruals. The addition of this new line is expected to be completed within the Financial Year 2026-27.

announcements.company: KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd
announcements.subject: KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd - 544263 - Agreement
announcements.detail: Agreement
announcements.ai_summary:
KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd - 544263 - Agreement
KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary KRN HVAC Products Private Limited, has entered into an agreement to purchase an industrial plot. The plot is located in the Rajasthan State Industrial Development & Investment Corporation Limited (RIICO) at Shahjahanpur, District Alwar, Rajasthan. The size of the industrial plot is 30,427.84 square meters. The purchase consideration for this plot is Rs. 8,51,98,000/- (Rupees Eight Crore Fifty One Lakhs Ninety Eight Thousand only). This acquisition is intended to expand the company's operational footprint and support its business growth.

announcements.subject: Orient Green Power Company Ltd - 533263 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI [Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements] Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI [Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements] Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary:
Nestle India Ltd - 500790 - Regulation 30 And Schedule III Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations'): Intimation Regarding The Addition Of A New Maggi Noodles Production Line At The Sanand Factory, Gujarat
Nestlé India Limited is adding a new Maggi Noodles production line at its Sanand Factory in Gujarat. This expansion will increase the annual production capacity by approximately 20,500 tons, bringing the total capacity to 141,600 tons per annum. The investment for this new line is approximately ₹90 crores, which will be financed through internal accruals. This initiative is part of the company's planned capital expenditure to enhance its overall production capacities and meet future demand for Maggi Noodles. The new production line is expected to be operational within the Financial Year 2026-27.

announcements.subject: Waaree Energies Ltd - 544277 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Waaree Energies Ltd. has received an appellate order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, IV Bandra, Mumbai, significantly reducing the total demand for financial years 2017-18 and 2018-19. The demand has been reduced to ₹23,62,494 and ₹25,86,704, respectively, from the original amounts of ₹6,95,25,249 and ₹6,02,70,052. Additionally, the company has received an assessment order from the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Maharashtra, for the tax period April 2019 to March 2020, with an aggregate demand of ₹7,52,36,584. The company received these intimations on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Indian Bank - 532814 - Intimation Under SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Provisional Business Figures of the Bank as on 31st March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Bank has reported its provisional business figures as of March 31, 2026. Total business reached Rs. 14.98 lakh crore, a 13.1% year-on-year increase and a 4.8% quarter-on-quarter increase. Total deposits stood at Rs. 8.30 lakh crore, up 12.6% year-on-year and 4.9% quarter-on-quarter. Savings Bank deposits grew by 10.3% year-on-year to Rs. 2.68 lakh crore, while Current Account deposits saw a significant 20.0% year-on-year increase to Rs. 0.48 lakh crore. Gross advances increased by 13.6% year-on-year to Rs. 6.68 lakh crore. These figures are subject to audit by the Bank's Statutory Central Auditors.

announcements.subject: Zuari Industries Ltd - 500780 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith the Press release on "Zuari Industries'' SPE Division Records Highest-Ever Sugarcane Crushing in FY26".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zuari Industries Limited's SPE Division has achieved a record sugarcane crushing of 159.7 lakh quintals in FY26, exceeding the previous FY25 record of 157.2 lakh quintals. This improvement is attributed to enhanced operational efficiency, higher capacity utilization, increased cane availability, and an earlier commencement of the crushing season. The company plans to extend crushing operations into April to gain a head start for FY27. This milestone underscores Zuari Industries' ongoing commitment to operational discipline within its Sugar, Power & Ethanol division.

announcements.subject: Kellton Tech Solutions Ltd - 519602 - Grant Of Employee Stock Options
announcements.detail: Intimation of Grant of Options Under Kellton Tech Solution Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee (NRC) of the Board of Directors of Kellton Tech Solutions Limited, at its meeting held on April 01, 2026, approved the grant of employee stock options. A total of 49,70,830 stock options have been granted to eligible employees. The exercise price for these options is Rs. 13.25 per share. The vesting and exercise periods for these options will be as per the terms of the Kellton Tech Solutions Limited Employees Stock Option Scheme, 2013. This grant is in compliance with the Scheme, the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: South Indian Bank Ltd - 532218 - Intimation Regarding Business Updates For The Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding Business Updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: South Indian Bank Ltd has provided provisional business updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Gross Advances have reached INR 1,01,295 Crore, marking a year-on-year growth of 15.66%. Total Deposits stand at INR 1,23,346 Crore, an increase of 14.71% year-on-year. CASA deposits have grown to INR 39,621 Crore, with a year-on-year increase of 17.47%. The CASA Ratio has improved to 32.12%, a 75 basis points increase compared to the previous year. This data is provisional and subject to audit by the bank's statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Ascensive Educare Ltd - 543443 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of Bagging of Order.
announcements.ai_summary: Ascensive Educare Limited has been awarded a significant work order from the Meghalaya State Skill Development Society (MSSDS). The order entails providing training to 2,005 candidates across 16 different trades, adhering to the Common Cost Norms. The total revenue expected from this contract is INR 5,56,99,875/-. This domestic order is to be executed during the financial year 2026-2027. The company views this as a testament to its team's dedication and expertise and is excited to collaborate with MSSDS on this initiative.

announcements.subject: Indegene Ltd - 544172 - Intimation Of Agreement
announcements.detail: Intimation of Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: Indegene Healthcare UK Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Indegene Limited, has entered into a Trade and Asset Purchase Agreement with Trilogy Writing and Consulting Limited on April 01, 2026. This agreement involves the purchase of the trade and business, including all assets, of Trilogy Writing and Consulting Limited as a going concern. This transaction follows Indegene Healthcare UK Limited's earlier purchase of the entire issued share capital of Trilogy Writing and Consulting Limited on March 1, 2026. The value of this agreement is GBP 1,90,679. Both entities are part of the same group, indirectly wholly owned by Indegene Limited.

announcements.subject: Man Infraconstruction Ltd - 533169 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - General Update
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed General Update w.r.t. Changes in partnership interest of Man Aaradhya Infraconstruction LLP a Subsidiary of Man Infraconstruction Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Capital Small Finance Bank Limited has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosure confirms that no encumbrance has been made on the equity shares of the bank by any person or entity falling under the promoter and promoter group, including persons acting in concert. The individuals and entities listed as promoters and promoter group include Mr. Sarvjit Singh Samra, Mr. Amarjit Singh Samra, Mrs. Navneet Kaur Samra, Mrs. Surinder Kaur Samra, Mrs. Amarpreet Kaur Hayer, Mr. Shahbaz Singh Samra, and various other entities.

announcements.subject: ESAF Small Finance Bank Ltd - 544020 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half Yearly Report on Listed Privately Placed NCDs as on March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: ESAF Small Finance Bank Limited has submitted its Half Yearly Report on Listed Privately Placed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) as of March 31, 2026. This report is in compliance with SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017 and Chapter VIII of SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The report details the International Securities Identification Numbers (ISINs) for debt securities issued by the bank. The outstanding amounts for these NCDs range from Rs. 50,00,00,000 to Rs. 150,00,00,000, with coupon rates varying from 11.00% to 11.65% and maturity dates extending up to 2034. The information covers the period from October 2025 to March 2026.

announcements.subject: Veefin Solutions Ltd - 543931 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of observation letter from BSE Limited in relation to the proposed scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation of GlobeTF Solutions limited and Estorifi Solutions Limited  with Veefin Solutions Limited and their respective shareholders.
announcements.ai_summary: Veefin Solutions Limited has received an Observation Letter from BSE Limited on April 1, 2026, concerning the proposed Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of GlobeTF Solutions Limited and Estorifi Solutions Limited with Veefin Solutions Limited and their respective shareholders. The company had previously informed about the Board's approval of this scheme on September 30, 2025, subject to regulatory approvals. BSE's observation letter is a requirement under Regulation 37 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The intimation is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Lancor Holdings Ltd - 509048 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Reg 30 of SEBI LODR- Merger
announcements.ai_summary: Lancor Holdings Limited has received sanction from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai, for the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, Lancor Maintenance & Services Limited, with the company. The NCLT's hearing for this sanction took place on April 1, 2026. Lancor Holdings Limited is currently awaiting the formal order from the NCLT. Upon receipt of the order, the company will provide a detailed intimation regarding the merger as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd - 544120 - Disclosure Under Regulation 31 (4) Of (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers), 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 01, 2026, Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd informed the stock exchanges that as per Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, no encumbrance has been made by any promoter or promoter group entity on the equity shares of the bank during the Financial Year 2025-26. This disclosure covers individuals like Mr. Sarvjit Singh Samra, Mr. Amarjit Singh Samra, Mrs. Navneet Kaur Samra, Mrs. Surinder Kaur Samra, and entities such as M/s Amarjit and Company, Jalandhar. The bank confirmed that this declaration is for the entire promoter and promoter group, including persons acting in concert. No further actions are immediately required as this is a confirmation of no encumbrance.

announcements.subject: Yatra Online Ltd - 543992 - Disclosure Regarding Outcome Of Appeal Before CESTAT, Chandigarh
announcements.detail: Disclosure regarding Outcome of Appeal before CESTAT, Chandigarh
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Yatra Online Ltd has disclosed the outcome of an appeal before the Customs, Excise & Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT), Chandigarh, which ruled in favor of the company and its subsidiary, TSI Yatra Pvt. Ltd. The CESTAT has set aside significant tax and penalty demands previously raised by the Revenue Department. For Yatra Online Limited, a total duty demand of approximately Rs.111.25 Crore (Rs.1,11,25,81,653/-) and penalties of approximately Rs.39.47 Crore (Rs.39,47,89,549/-) have been dropped. For TSI Yatra Pvt. Ltd., duty demands of approximately Rs.1.99 Crore (Rs.1,99,42,636/-) and penalties of approximately Rs.1.99 Crore (Rs.1,99,52,636/-) have also been set aside. The Tribunal held that incentives received from Computer Reservation System (CRS) companies are not subject to service tax. This order provides significant relief to the company regarding long-standing tax litigations.

announcements.subject: Advik Capital Ltd - 539773 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: SEBI Interim Findings in Elitecon and Update on Ongoing Judicial Proceedings New Delhi
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Advik Capital Limited has issued a media release regarding interim findings by SEBI in the Elitecon matter and an update on ongoing judicial proceedings. SEBI, through an Ex-Parte Interim Order dated March 30, 2026, has issued directions against Elitecon International Limited, its promoter, and connected persons for alleged regulatory violations. The order notes SEBI's prima facie observations regarding financial statement irregularities, misleading disclosures, changes in share capital and promoter shareholding, and abnormal price movements in Elitecon's scrip. Notably, SEBI has recorded the receipt of ₹64 crore by Advik Capital Limited through banking channels from Elitecon during August 2024, in line with Advik Capital's claim regarding a loan advanced to Elitecon. The legal nature and accounting treatment of this transaction remain sub-judice before the Hon’ble High Court of Delhi.

announcements.subject: eClerx Services Ltd - 532927 - Intimation Of Vesting Of Employee Stock Options Under Company''s Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022
announcements.detail: Intimation of Vesting of Employee Stock Options Under Company''s Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: eClerx Services Ltd has announced the vesting of 6,75,870 employee stock options under its Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022. These options were originally granted on May 25, 2023, to employees of the company and its subsidiaries. The vesting is effective from April 1, 2026, after completing a three-year time-based vesting period. The total number of equity shares covered by the options granted is 11,74,480, with a face value of Rs. 10 each. The exercise price for these options is Rs. 709.91, determined by the lower of the latest closing market price or the average of the two-week high and low price prior to the grant date. Employees have three years from the vesting date to exercise these options.

announcements.subject: Meta Infotech Ltd - 544441 - Intimation Of Commencement Of Operations At Bangalore Location
announcements.detail: We are delighted to announce that Company has commenced its business operations at Bangalore location effective from April 1, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Meta Infotech Ltd has commenced its business operations at its Bangalore location effective April 1, 2026. This expansion is part of the company's strategic growth initiatives. The operations are currently being conducted through a work-from-home arrangement. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this development. No specific financial implications or investment figures have been detailed in this announcement.

announcements.subject: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd - 543596 -  Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - General Updates
announcements.detail: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Provisional Business Figures of the Bank as on 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd has reported its provisional business figures as of March 31, 2026. The bank's total business reached Rs. 1,15,092 crore, showing a year-on-year growth of 17.37%. Total advances increased by 20.32% to Rs. 53,380 crore, and total deposits grew by 14.94% to Rs. 61,712 crore. CASA deposits saw a significant rise of 22.35% year-on-year, reaching Rs. 17,365 crore. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the Bank's Statutory Central Auditors. The bank also provided quarter-on-quarter growth figures, with total business increasing by 7.09%.

announcements.subject: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd - 590003 - Provisional Business Figures For The Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has informed BSE regarding the Provisional business figures for the year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has announced its provisional business figures for the year ended March 31, 2026. Total business reached Rs. 2,14,409 crore, marking a year-on-year growth of 14.92%. Advances stood at Rs. 98,743 crore, an increase of 16.87% year-on-year, while total deposits grew by 13.31% to Rs. 1,02,078 crore. CASA deposits increased by 11.82% to Rs. 31,122 crore. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the Statutory Auditors of the Bank. The bank has provided quarter-on-quarter growth figures as well, with total business growing by 1.31% in the last quarter.

announcements.subject: Everest Industries Ltd - 508906 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Update On Setting Up Of Steel Building Manufacturing Facility By Wholly Owned Subsidiary Viz. Everest Steel Building Private Limited
announcements.detail: Further to our intimation dated March 21, 2025 on captioned subject, we wish to inform you that the setting up of the manufacturing facility in R. Ananthpuram, in Andhra Pradesh, for the Steel Building Division is deferred to Financial Year 2026-27 and the same is being re-evaluated and discussed with Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Development Corporation Ltd (APIIDC). Kindly take the same on record.
announcements.ai_summary: Everest Industries Limited has provided an update regarding the setting up of a Steel Building manufacturing facility by its wholly owned subsidiary, Everest Steel Building Private Limited. Further to their intimation on March 21, 2025, the company has deferred the facility's establishment in R. Ananthpuram, Andhra Pradesh, to Financial Year 2026-27. The project is currently being re-evaluated and discussed with the Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Development Corporation Ltd (APIIDC).

announcements.subject: Justo Realfintech Ltd - 544542 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Justo Realfintech Limited has announced the incorporation of Chestertons India Private Limited as its wholly owned subsidiary. This move marks the company's entry into institutional real estate advisory services through a brand usage and business rights arrangement with Chestertons Global Network, a 220-year-old global brand established in London in 1805. This strategic initiative signifies Justo's evolution into a full-spectrum, institutionally capable real estate services group. Commercial operations for Chestertons India are expected to commence in Q1 FY27.

announcements.subject: Rushil Decor Ltd - 533470 - Intimation About Temporary Shutdown Due To Technological Upgradation At Manufacturing Unit, Mansa, Gujarat.
announcements.detail: Intimation about temporary shutdown due to Technological Upgradation at Manufacturing Unit, Mansa, Gujarat.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rushil Decor Limited is undertaking a technological upgradation at its laminate sheet manufacturing unit in Mansa, Gujarat. The company will replace its existing steam boiler system with a Thermic Fluid Heater system, which is expected to improve fuel efficiency, reduce water consumption, enhance plant efficiency, and improve product quality and productivity. This upgrade will also enable automation and reduce manpower dependency. The plant will be temporarily shut down until approximately April 20, 2026, with an estimated loss of sale of Rs. 4 Crores during this period. The other two manufacturing units of the company will continue operations without interruption.

announcements.subject: ADC India Communications Ltd-$ - 523411 - Pre-Offer Advertisement cum Corrigendum
announcements.detail: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Pre-Offer Advertisement in accordance with Regulation 18(7) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended, and Corrigendum to the Public Announcement and Detailed Public Statement for the attention of the Public Shareholders of  ADC India Communications Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Limited, acting as the Manager to the Open Offer for ADC India Communications Ltd, has issued a Pre-Offer Advertisement cum Corrigendum. This announcement is in accordance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, and serves as a continuation of the Public Announcement dated August 6, 2025, and the Detailed Public Statement dated January 14, 2026. The Offer Price remains INR 1,233.59 per Equity Share, comprising INR 1,179.92 and an enhancement of INR 53.67. The Tendering Period for the Open Offer is scheduled from April 2, 2026, to April 17, 2026, inclusive. The recommendation of the Committee of Independent Directors regarding the offer was approved on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd - 544209 - Stock Exchange Release Titled Sales Volume For The Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: Bansal Wire Industries Limited has informed the exchange regarding stock exchange release titled sales volume for the Q4 FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bansal Wire Industries Limited announced its sales volume performance for Q4 FY26, reporting a total volume of 1,17,644 Metric Tons (MT). This represents a year-over-year increase of 20.16% compared to 97,821 MT in Q4 FY25. For the full financial year FY26, the company achieved a sales volume of 4,58,054 MT, an increase of 32.88% from 3,44,710 MT in FY25. The company noted that while volumes were healthy, they were slightly impacted by geopolitical tensions in West Asia, which caused temporary disruptions in industrial gas supply. The company's highest ever sales volume was achieved in the previous quarter.

announcements.subject: Flomic Global Logistics Ltd - 504380 - Submission Of Investor Communication - Company Overview Document.
announcements.detail: Refer attached document
announcements.ai_summary: Flomic Global Logistics Ltd has submitted a Company Overview Document for investors and analysts, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015. The document contains information that is already publicly available and does not include any unpublished price-sensitive information. The company highlights its 38+ years of legacy, over 5000 active customers, 30 branches, and 30+ warehouses covering approximately 13.8 lakh sq. ft. For the nine months of FY26, the company handled over 32,000 shipments and achieved an EBITDA margin of 9% on a revenue of ₹10,861 lakh. The company's strategy includes expanding its presence in key logistics hubs, scaling warehousing and project logistics, and enhancing digital efficiency.

announcements.subject: Hero MotoCorp Ltd - 500182 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith a copy of the press release issued by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Hero MotoCorp Limited has reported a significant dispatch growth of 24% in March 2026, with 598,198 units dispatched compared to 549,604 units in the same period last year. The company closed the financial year 2026 with a 10% volume growth and total dispatches of 6.5 million units. The 100-125cc segment and the ICE scooter segment, which saw a 24% growth, were key drivers of this performance. Hero MotoCorp's Emerging Mobility business, VIDA, recorded its highest monthly VAHAN registrations of 21,434 units, a 70% month-on-month increase, and achieved a 154% growth in FY26. The company's Global Business also achieved its highest ever dispatches, with a 16% growth in March 2026 and an all-time high dispatch growth of approximately 40% in FY26.

announcements.subject: Cemindia Projects Ltd - 509496 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Retirement
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Cemindia Projects Limited has announced the retirement of Mr. Rupak Sarkar, Senior Executive Vice President, who is a member of the company's Senior Management. This retirement is effective from April 1, 2026, due to superannuation. The company has provided the necessary details as required by Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has enclosed these details as Annexure 1.

announcements.subject: Tera Software Ltd - 533982 - Submission Of Annual Disclosure Of Encumbrance Under Regulation 31(4) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: submission of Annual Disclosure of Encumbrance under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: The Promoter and Promoter Group of Tera Software Limited have submitted their annual disclosure of encumbrance on shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, as required by Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure confirms that any encumbrances created on the company's shares by the Promoter and Promoter Group have been in compliance with the SEBI regulations. Additionally, any encumbrances created through the depository system, which do not require separate disclosure under Regulation 31(1), have also been made in accordance with applicable rules. The company has requested that these disclosures be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd - 530965 - Operational Performance Highlights Of 2025-26 (Provisional)
announcements.detail: Operational Performance Highlights of 2025-26 (Provisional)
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd (IndianOil) has announced its provisional operational performance highlights for the financial year 2025-26. The company achieved a record crude throughput of 75.4 MMT with 99.5% operational reliability in its refineries. Pipeline throughput reached a record 105.3 MMT. Consolidated sales volume of petroleum products was a record 104.4 MMT, showing approximately 4% growth over the previous year's 100.3 MMT. IndianOil commissioned a record 909 retail outlets, positively impacting market share in the top 10 National Highways. The Lubes business recorded record sales of 855 TMT, a growth of around 15% against an industry growth of approximately 4%. Petrochemicals reported record sales of 3.22 MMT and production of 3.4 MMT. The Gas business recorded RLNG sales of approximately 5.60 MMT, excluding internal consumption. A comprehensive disclosure of financial results will be made upon Board approval.

announcements.subject: NMDC Ltd - 526371 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Details of Production and Sales of Iron Ore (Provisional) for and upto March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: NMDC Ltd has released its monthly business update for production and sales of Iron Ore (Provisional) for the period up to March 2026, covering the financial year 2025-26. In March 2026, total production was 5.35 million tonnes (MT) and sales were 5.90 MT. Cumulatively, up to March 2026, total production reached 53.15 MT and sales were 50.23 MT. For the Chhattisgarh sector, production in March 2026 was 4.01 MT with sales of 4.25 MT, and cumulative figures up to March 2026 were 37.52 MT production and 34.67 MT sales. The Karnataka sector reported 1.34 MT production and 1.65 MT sales in March 2026, with cumulative figures of 15.63 MT production and 15.56 MT sales up to March 2026. This information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: V-Mart Retail Ltd - 534976 - Business Update At The End Of Quarter 4 Of Financial Year 2025-26 (Q4FY26)
announcements.detail: Business Update for Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: V-Mart Retail Ltd has provided a business update for the fourth quarter of the financial year 2025-26 (Q4FY26), ending March 31, 2026. The company reported total revenue from operations of Rs. 971 Crores, a 24% year-on-year increase from Rs. 780 Crores in the corresponding quarter of the previous year. Same store sales growth (SSSG) stood at +12% for the quarter, with V-Mart at +12% and Unlimited at +9%. During Q4FY26, V-Mart opened 29 new stores and closed 6, bringing the total operating portfolio to 577 stores as of March 31, 2026. This year saw the highest ever store additions with 92 new stores opened and 12 closures. The new stores were primarily opened in Uttar Pradesh (11), Tamil Nadu (4), Bihar (3), and West Bengal (3). These revenue figures are provisional and subject to auditor review.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd - 505283 - Personnel(S) Authorised For The Purpose Of Determining Material Event And Making Relevant Disclosure(S) To Stock Exchange W.E.F April 1, 2026

Shah (Company Secretary & Head Legal) are authorized. This update follows previous letters dated April 1, 2026, and January 1, 2024. The company has provided their contact numbers and email addresses for these regulatory purposes. This is a routine update to ensure compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd - 540691 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange that Regional Director (North Western Region), Ahmedabad vide its order dated 31 March 2026 has sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Capital Limited (ABCL) has announced that the Regional Director (North-Western Region), Ahmedabad, sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Aditya Birla Stressed Asset AMC Private Limited (Amalgamating Company) with Aditya Birla Financial Shared Services Limited (Amalgamated Company). This sanction was granted via an order dated March 31, 2026. This follows the Board of Directors' approval of the scheme on November 14, 2025, and is subject to other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The company has submitted this intimation to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd - 507526 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting

The primary agenda of the meeting was to discuss the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) for the Financial Year 2026-2027, along with other related matters of the company. The outcome of this meeting has been communicated to both BSE Ltd and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.

The company has requested that this information be taken on record by BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Karnataka Bank Ltd - 532652 - Provisional Key Business Parameters As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Provisional Key Business Parameters as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Karnataka Bank Ltd has released its provisional key business parameters as of March 31, 2026. Deposits increased by 3.8% year-on-year to Rs. 108,840.95 crore from Rs. 104,807.49 crore as of March 31, 2025, and grew by 4.5% quarter-on-quarter to Rs. 104,111.52 crore as of December 31, 2025. CASA also saw a year-on-year increase of 10.0% to Rs. 36,621.16 crore and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 11.5% to Rs. 32,828.70 crore. The share of CASA to Total Deposits rose to 33.65% from 31.75% in the previous year. Gross Advances grew by 6.9% year-on-year to Rs. 83,336.92 crore. These figures are provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 524164 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced that the Registrar of Companies has approved the striking off of its wholly owned subsidiary, IOL Life Sciences Limited, from the Register of Companies. This follows an application filed on January 27, 2026. The Registrar of Companies issued a notice on April 1, 2026, approving the strike-off. The company states that this action will not have any material impact on its financials or operations. As of March 31, 2025, IOL Life Sciences Limited contributed Nil to the company's revenue and had a Net Worth of Rs. 638,838, representing 0% of the total.

announcements.company: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd

The Promoter, the President of India acting through the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), holds 2,01,58,23,529 equity shares, representing 71.76% of the company's total voting capital. IREDA confirms that the promoter has not made any encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, during the financial year 2025-26. This annual disclosure was submitted to both stock exchanges on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Piramal Pharma Ltd - 543635 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Completion Of Acquisition Of Kenalog®, A Branded Commercial Injectable Product
announcements.detail: Please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Pharma Limited, through its step-down wholly owned subsidiary Piramal Critical Care B.V., has completed the acquisition of Kenalog® and its associated brands from Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMS). This acquisition was previously announced on January 28, 2026. The completion of this transaction will enhance Piramal Pharma's Complex Hospital Generics portfolio and bolster its market presence in the United States, Europe, and Asia Pacific.

announcements.subject: Moil Ltd - 533286 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Submission of receipt of order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, Chhindwara Division, Jabalpur Zone, Madhya Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: BPL Limited has received an order from the Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT), Delhi, on March 19, 2026, concerning DRT ANR.OA NO. 24/2024, passed on January 19, 2026. The DRT has allowed ARCIL to invoke a corporate guarantee of ₹10 crore provided by BPL Limited in 2003 for a loan availed by its subsidiary, BPL Display Devices Limited (BDDL). BDDL has been in liquidation since October 2008. BPL Limited had considered this guarantee as time-barred and had shown it under contingent liabilities as claims not acknowledged as debt in its balance sheets. The company is examining the DRT order and will take appropriate legal steps.

announcements.subject: BPL Ltd - 500074 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: RBL Bank Limited has responded to a clarification sought by the exchange regarding a media report dated March 30, 2026, concerning alleged diversion of ₹137 crore through mule accounts in Telangana. The bank confirmed its awareness of FIR Nos. 68/2026 to 78/2026 registered at PS Karimnagar-III Town under relevant sections of the BNS and IT Act. The matter is sub judice and under police investigation, pending before the Hon’ble Junior Civil Judge-cum-Judicial First Class Magistrate at Karimnagar. The investigation pertains to the alleged misuse of current accounts at the Kisan Nagar branch, Karimnagar, with two employees taken into custody and granted bail. RBL Bank denies any knowledge of or authorization for wrongful acts or misuse of funds, stating that such assertions are matters under investigation. The bank asserts that these events do not warrant disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and it ensures compliance with applicable regulations.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - Clarification Sought From RBL Bank Ltd
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange about response on clarification sought with reference to media report appearing on https://www.siasat.com/dated March 30, 2026 titled "137 cr diverted through mule accounts of RBL Bank in Telangana.

announcements.subject: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd - 513554 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Sales Figures for the Month of March - 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd has announced its sales figures for the month of March 2026. The company reported sales of 13982.830 metric tons (MT) for the said period. announcements.subject: National Highways Infra Trust - 543385 - Unitholding pattern post capital restructuring
announcements.detail: National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern post capital restructuring
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: National Highways Infra Trust (NHIT) has submitted its Unitholding Pattern following a capital restructuring involving the issuance of units through Institutional Placement and on a Preferential basis. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and a SEBI Master Circular dated July 11, 2025. The unitholding pattern reflects changes after the allotment of units on March 25, 2026. The Sponsor(s) / Investment Manager / Project Manager(s) and their associates/related parties hold 22,44,54,500 units, representing 10.50% of the total outstanding units. Public holding includes various institutions such as Mutual Funds (2,86,95,251 units, 1.34%), Financial Institutions/Banks (1,75,04,751 units, 0.82%), Insurance Companies (8,64,12,365 units, 4.04%), Provident/pension funds (17,01,17,367 units, 7.95%), Foreign Portfolio Investors (15,41,20,671 units, 7.21%), and Foreign Bodies Corporate (1,00,52,75,300 units, 47.01%). The disclosure is made within the stipulated 10 days of the restructuring.

announcements.subject: Force Motors Ltd-$ - 500033 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly business update
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Force Motors Limited has released its monthly business update for March 2026. In the domestic market, sales of Small Commercial Vehicles (SCV), Light Commercial Vehicles (LCV), Utility Vehicles (UV), and Sports Utility Vehicles (SUV) increased by 14.42% to 4,126 units compared to 3,606 units in March 2025. However, export sales for the same categories saw a decrease of 22.34%, with 73 units sold in March 2026 compared to 94 units in March 2025. The company attributes the decline in export volumes to ongoing geopolitical tensions, particularly in the Middle East. Overall, domestic and export sales combined for these vehicle categories rose by 13.49% to 4,199 units in March 2026 from 3,700 units in March 2025. This information is provided as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: PMC Fincorp Ltd - 534060 - As Per Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') Read With SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 Dated January 30, 2026
announcements.detail: Disclousre as per Regulation 30 SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/1/3762/2026 Dated January 30, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PMC Fincorp Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 1, 2026, and approved several key decisions. Firstly, Mr. Puneet Arora's designation has been changed from Executive Director to Non-Executive Director, effective April 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. He will continue to be a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and will not be involved in daily operations. Secondly, M/s A. K. Choudhary & Associates has been appointed as the Scrutinizer for the upcoming Postal Ballot and e-voting process. Thirdly, the Board approved the draft notice for the Postal Ballot to seek shareholder approval. Lastly, National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) has been appointed to provide remote e-voting facilities for the Postal Ballot process. The Board meeting commenced at 3:00 PM IST and concluded at 3:40 PM IST.

announcements.subject: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd - 540168 - Intimation As Under Reg 92 Of SEBI (ICDR)Announcements Under Reg 30 SEBI (ICDR), 2018

announcements.subject: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd - 544307 - Intimation Of Grant Of 5,00,000 Stock Options Under Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019
announcements.detail: Intimation of grant of 5,00,000 stock options under Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019

announcements.subject: Bank of India - 532149 - Disclosure Of Compliance Of Regulation 31(4) And 31(5) Of SEBI SAST Regulations-2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Compliance of Regulation 31(4) and 31(5) of SEBI SAST Regulations-2011
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of India has submitted a declaration on April 01, 2026, confirming compliance with Regulation 31(4) and 31(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. The bank stated that its promoter, the 'President of India,' along with persons acting in concert, has not made any encumbrance, either directly or indirectly, during the financial year 2025-26. This disclosure is made to the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. and BSE Ltd. for their records.

announcements.subject: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd - 544141 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Revised Shareholding Pattern Of The Company
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015-Revised Shareholding Pattern of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd has issued a revised shareholding pattern disclosure for April 01, 2026, correcting an inadvertent misstatement made in a previous notice dated February 19, 2026. The revised pattern accounts for a preferential issue of convertible warrants. Before the preferential issue, promoters and the promoter group held 80,49,859 shares, representing 51.11% of the total voting capital, and the public held 77,00,999 shares, representing 48.89%. Post the assumed full conversion of outstanding warrants and the current issue, the promoters' holding is expected to be 96,69,859 shares (50.23%), and the public's holding will be 95,80,999 shares (49.77%), bringing the total to 1,92,50,858 shares. The company has also submitted the detailed shareholding pattern as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Varroc Engineering Ltd - 541578 - Submission Of Statement/ Confirmation W.R.T. Utilization Of Issue Proceeds Under Regulation 32 & 52(7) Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Nil Deviation report
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Varroc Engineering Limited has submitted a statement confirming no deviation in the utilization of funds raised through Commercial Papers during the financial year 2025-26. The company raised Rs. 50 Cr in Q1 FY 2025-26 (allotted May 21, 2025, redeemed August 19, 2025), Rs. 50 Cr in Q2 FY 2025-26 (allotted August 22, 2025, redeemed November 20, 2025), Rs. 50 Cr in Q4 FY 2025-26 (allotted January 1, 2026, redeemed January 27, 2026), and another Rs. 50 Cr in Q4 FY 2025-26 (allotted January 28, 2026, redeemed February 27, 2026). The total utilization of these proceeds aligns with the objects stated in the company's offer documents. No other fund-raising activities occurred during FY 2025-26.

announcements.subject: Race Eco Chain Ltd - 537785 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation For The Forfeiture Of The Convertible Warrants
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting informing Forfeiture of the Convertible Warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Race Eco Chain Ltd has announced the forfeiture of 19,55,000 convertible warrants due to non-exercise of conversion options by the holders. These warrants were initially allotted on October 01, 2024, at an issue price of Rs. 352.00 per warrant, with an initial subscription amount of Rs. 17,20,40,000 received, representing 25% of the issue price. The warrant holders failed to exercise their conversion option within the stipulated 18-month period, which ended on March 31, 2026. Consequently, the subscription amount received against these warrants has been forfeited as per Regulation 169(3) of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: SK Minerals & Additives Ltd - 544584 - Quarterly Update On Estimated Turnover Of SK Minerals & Additives Limited For The Quarter Ended 31St March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 regarding  estimated standalone quarterly Turnover for the Quarter ended 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SK Minerals & Additives Limited has announced its estimated standalone quarterly turnover for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a turnover of Rs. 12708.35 Lakhs for the quarter. This represents a significant year-over-year growth of 50.28% compared to the same quarter in the previous year. The turnover for the quarter ended December 2025 was Rs. 8112.68 Lakhs, and for the half-year ended April-September 2025, it was Rs. 10989.14 Lakhs. The total turnover for the fiscal year April-March 2026 reached Rs. 31810.17 Lakhs, up from Rs. 21167.24 Lakhs in the previous fiscal year.

announcements.subject: Avanti Feeds Ltd-$ - 512573 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On April 01, 2026
announcements.detail: As enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Avanti Feeds Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 01, 2026, approved the investment in Thai Union Feedmill Ecuador S.A.S. (TFME), a company to be incorporated in Ecuador, South America. TFME will be engaged in aquaculture feed manufacturing and distribution. The investment will be in the form of cash, amounting to USD 3 Million, with shares subscribed at a par value of USD One per share. TFME is an associate company and a joint venture partner of Avanti Feeds Limited, with its holding company being Thai Union Feed Mill Public Company Limited, Thailand. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are currently required for the incorporation of TFME.

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Axentra Corp Limited (formerly Dugar Housing Developments Limited) has disclosed on April 1, 2026, that it does not fall within the ambit of a "Large Corporate" (LC) category for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI circulars regarding fund raising by issuance of Debt Securities by Large Entities. The company's CIN is L62013TN1992PLC023689. This means Axentra Corp Limited is not subject to the specific disclosure requirements applicable to Large Corporates for debt issuances. Investors should note this classification in relation to the company's financing activities.

announcements.subject: Orient Electric Ltd - 541301 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Orient Electric Ltd announced on April 1, 2026, the launch of Aero O2, India's first oxygen-enriching ceiling fan. This innovative product utilizes patented Bio-Oxy Plasma ION+ Technology to enhance indoor air quality by enriching oxygen levels, reducing fatigue, and revitalizing homes. The fan is designed to break down pollutants such as PM2.5, smoke, and microbes, creating a cleaner and more energizing environment. This product launch, while not triggering materiality thresholds, is disclosed as a measure of good corporate governance. The company aims to address the growing concerns of urban consumers regarding indoor air quality and declining oxygen levels in air-conditioned spaces.

announcements.subject: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd - 532500 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Maruti Suzuki sales in March 2026 and FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Maruti Suzuki India Limited announced its sales figures for March 2026 and the financial year 2025-26 on April 1, 2026. In March 2026, the company sold a total of 225,251 units, comprising 169,428 domestic sales, 8,783 sales to other OEMs, and 47,040 exports. For FY 2025-26, Maruti Suzuki achieved a record total sales of 2,422,713 units, with domestic sales reaching an all-time high of 1,861,704 units and exports also hitting a record of 447,774 units. This marks the third consecutive year the company has surpassed annual total sales of 2 million units. The company's performance highlights strong demand across its mini, compact, and utility vehicle segments.

announcements.subject: Gayatri Highways Ltd - 541546 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Gayatri Highways Ltd has disclosed defaults on payment of interest and principal on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company is required to provide these quarterly disclosures as per regulatory requirements. Further details regarding the specific loans and the extent of the defaults are expected to be provided in the company's filings. Investors should monitor future announcements for updates on the company's financial health and any remedial actions being taken.

announcements.subject: Citizen Infoline Ltd - 538786 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: CERTIFIED COPY OF ORDER OF NCLT ALONG WITH CERTIFIED COPY OF SCHEME AND PETITION
announcements.ai_summary: Citizen Infoline Limited has received a certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Ahmedabad's order dated March 19, 2026, approving a Scheme of Amalgamation. The order, with case number CP (CAA) No. 47 (AHM) of 2025 in CA (CAA) No. 34 of 2025, sanctions the amalgamation of Citizen Solar Private Limited into Citizen Infoline Limited. The appointed date for the amalgamation is April 1, 2023, and the effective date will be the date of filing the certified copy of the order with the Registrar of Companies (RoC). The scheme involves the transfer of all assets, liabilities, rights, and obligations of Citizen Solar Private Limited to Citizen Infoline Limited, with employees transferring without a break in service. Citizen Solar Private Limited will stand dissolved without winding up. Citizen Infoline Limited will file the certified copy with the RoC within the prescribed timeline and undertake necessary corporate actions, including applying for listing and trading approval.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited - Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rain Industries Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Rain Carbon Canada Inc., in collaboration with Green Graphite Technologies Inc., has successfully completed a project to advance the production of coated spherical purified graphite. This critical material is used in lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles, micromobility, and energy storage systems. The project received CA$682,000 in support from the Government of Ontario through the Ontario Vehicle Innovation Network (OVIN), out of a total project value of CA$2.05 million. This initiative aims to address the domestic supply gap for battery materials, as over 90% of battery-grade graphite is currently sourced from China. The collaboration leverages Green Graphite Technologies' purification technology and Rain Carbon Canada's expertise in carbon precursors and processing. This press release was issued on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Ambika Cotton Mills Ltd - 531978 - Disclosure Of Encumbered Shares By Promoters - Regulation 31 Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeover) Regulations, 2011 - No-Encumbrance Shares - Applicability And Filing Of Declaration
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Encumbered Shares by promoters - Regulation 31 of SEBI Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011 - No encumbrance shares - Applicability and Filing of declaration
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ambika Cotton Mills Ltd has filed a declaration confirming no encumbrance on shares held by its promoters and promoter group, as required by Regulation 31 of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. Sri. P.V. Chandran, a promoter, holds 609,784 shares, representing 10.65% of the total equity. Smt. C. Bhavani, part of the promoter group (spouse of Sri. P.V. Chandran), holds 2,272,566 shares, representing 39.70% of the total equity. In total, the promoter and promoter group hold 2,882,350 shares, which is 50.35% of the company's total equity of 57,25,000 shares. This declaration was made on April 1, 2026.
