announcements.ai_summary: Summary: HCL Technologies Ltd. and CrowdStrike have expanded their strategic partnership by launching AI-powered Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) services. This joint offering aims to provide enterprises with continuous, intelligence-led identification, prioritization, and remediation of exposures across endpoints, cloud, identity, applications, and data. The expanded partnership leverages CrowdStrike's AI-native Falcon® platform and HCLTech's VERITY framework and GenAI-led service transformation platform, AI Force, to accelerate remediation and reduce enterprise attack surface risk. This announcement was made on March 31, 2026, and is intended for information and record purposes.

announcements.subject: Wipro Ltd - 507685 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, it is informed that merger of Rizing Consulting, USA, LLC (step-down subsidiary) with Rizing LLC (step-down subsidiary) is completed and effective from March 31, 2026 (Eastern Time).
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited has announced the completion of the merger between its step-down subsidiaries, Rizing Consulting USA, LLC, and Rizing LLC. The merger is effective from March 31, 2026 (Eastern Time). Rizing Consulting USA, LLC had a turnover of USD 46,715,994 as of March 31, 2025, while Rizing LLC had a turnover of USD 84,384,857 as of the same date. Both entities provide consulting and software support services. The rationale for this merger is to rationalize and consolidate the overall group structure.

announcements.subject: Accel Ltd - 517494 - Reg 30-Board Comment On Fine Levied By BSE
announcements.detail: Accel Limited would like to intimate regarding the Board Comments on fine levied by BSE.
announcements.ai_summary: Accel Limited's Board of Directors met on March 31, 2026, to discuss and comment on fines levied by the BSE. These fines, totaling INR 4,18,798 (basic fine) plus INR 75,384 (GST), amounting to INR 4,94,182, were for historical non-compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, spanning from March 2015 onwards. The Board acknowledged these procedural lapses and expressed regret for the delay in settlement. Accel Limited has now fully settled all outstanding fines, bringing the balance to NIL. The Board has directed management to implement robust internal monitoring mechanisms to ensure future compliance.

announcements.subject: Rossari Biotech Ltd - 543213 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Update on Capacity Addition at the Subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rossari Biotech Limited's material subsidiary, Unitop Chemicals Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the remaining 15000 MTPA ethoxylation capacity at its Dahej facility. This brings the total planned expansion of 30000 MTPA to completion, effective from March 31, 2026. Following this commissioning, Unitop's total installed ethoxylation capacity now stands at 66000 MTPA. This expansion is part of a project that was previously intimated to the exchange on October 19, 2023, October 17, 2024, and September 26, 2025.

announcements.subject: BLS International Services Ltd - 540073 - Update On Strike Off Of Reired BLS International Services Private Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of BLS International Services Limited.
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015, and in continuation of our earlier corporate announcement dated November 11, 2025, where it was informed to the Exchanges that the Company has approved closure/ strike off of Reired BLS International Services Private Limited (WOS of the Company). The said closure/ strike off was expected to be completed by March 31, 2026. 

We would like to update that the Reired ....
announcements.ai_summary: BLS International Services Ltd has provided an update on the strike-off of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Reired BLS International Services Private Limited. Following the company's earlier announcement on November 11, 2025, approving the closure, the subsidiary has submitted e-Form STK-2 with the Registrar of Companies, Delhi (RoC). The current status on the Ministry of Corporate Affairs master data is "Under process of Striking Off." The completion of the voluntary strike-off is now expected within the next three months, by June 30, 2026, subject to regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Elgi Equipments Ltd - 522074 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Elgi Equipments Ltd has provided an update regarding its manufacturing facility expansion project at Kinathukadavu, Coimbatore. The company had previously announced on May 27, 2024, plans to expand production capacity for air compressors and delivery of parts, with Phase I focusing on Diesel Powered Screw Air Compressor (DPSAC) and Global Support Center (GSC) capacities by Q4 FY 2025-26. Due to delays in obtaining statutory and regulatory approvals, the addition of GSC capacity is now expected in Q1 of FY 2026-27, and DPSAC capacity is anticipated in Q4 of FY 2027-28. These delays have not impacted the company's revenue.

announcements.subject: Larsen & Toubro Ltd - 500510 - Update On Transfer Of L&T Sufin Business To Sufin Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of The Company, Pursuant To Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) Executed On February 24, 2026.
announcements.detail: Update on transfer of L&T SuFin business to SuFin Limited, wholly owned Subsidiary of the Company, pursuant to Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) executed on February 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited has completed the transfer of its e-commerce platform business for industrial and construction goods, known as the "L&T SuFin business," to its wholly-owned subsidiary, SuFin Limited. This transfer was executed on a going concern basis through a slump sale. The Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) for this transaction was signed on February 24, 2026. The total consideration for this business transfer is ₹42.9 Cr, which is subject to post-closing adjustments. This update follows the company's earlier intimation on February 24, 2026, regarding the same transaction.

announcements.subject: Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd - 517286 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of work order from Andhra Pradesh State Skill Development Corporation (APSSDC), Government of Andhra Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RNIT AI Solutions Limited has been awarded a Work Order by the Andhra Pradesh State Skill Development Corporation (APSSDC), Government of Andhra Pradesh. The order is for additional scope of work related to the design, development, integration, and deployment of an AI-Enabled Skill & Employment Enhancement Platform. This platform will be integrated into the existing "Naipunyam" Unified Skill Development Portal. The scope includes developing AI-powered modules for automated resume generation, conversational discovery for skill trainings, personalized assessment recommendations, automated job scraping, conversational job discovery, and a suitability index for career fitment analysis. The engagement also covers platform integration, quality testing, deployment, and ongoing support.

announcements.subject: Northern Arc Capital Ltd - 544260 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Retirement
announcements.detail: Retirement of Ms. Kshama Fernandes (DIN: 02539429) as the Non-executive Non-independent Director of the Company due to completion of tenure
announcements.ai_summary: Ms. Kshama Fernandes (DIN: 02539429), a Non-executive Non-Independent Director of Northern Arc Capital Limited, has retired from her position effective from the close of business hours on March 31, 2026, upon completion of her tenure. The Board of Directors and management have expressed their appreciation for her valuable contributions and guidance during her association with the company.

announcements.subject: Dhunseri Tea & Industries Ltd - 538902 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 LODR_ Sale Of Balijan (North) Tea Estate
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 LODR_Sale of Balijan (North) Tea Estate
announcements.ai_summary: Dhunseri Tea & Industries Limited has executed a "Deed of Assignment" on March 31, 2026, for the sale of its 'BALIJAN (NORTH) TEA ESTATE' to M/s. Balijan Tea Estate Company. The possession of the tea estate has been handed over to the buyer. This transaction follows a previous communication on November 14, 2025, regarding the sale.

announcements.subject: Cupid Ltd-$ - 530843 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Cupid Limited is hereby informing BSE about press release on Cupid Limited set to deliver strongest quarter in its history and surpass annual guidance.
announcements.ai_summary: Cupid Limited has announced its strongest quarterly performance to date, exceeding its FY26 annual guidance of ₹335 Cr in revenue and ₹100 Cr in net profit. The company anticipates achieving at least ₹600 Cr in revenue and a net profit margin exceeding 30% in FY27. This positive outlook is supported by robust growth across key business segments, a favorable currency environment with USD-INR tailwinds, and secured raw material inventory for the next six months. The company is focused on scaling operations, improving margins, and expanding its global footprint. Detailed financial results will be announced after Board of Directors' approval.

announcements.subject: Kaynes Technology India Ltd - 543664 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015
announcements.detail: Inauguration of the Sanand Plant of Kaynes Semicon Private Limited wholly owned subsidiary of the company by the Honorable Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kaynes Technology India Limited has announced the inauguration of the Sanand plant of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kaynes Semicon Private Limited. The inauguration was performed by the Honorable Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi. This event signifies a significant step in the company's expansion, particularly in the semiconductor sector. The company has provided snapshots of the inauguration for reference. Kaynes Technology India Limited will continue to disclose material information as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd - 532527 - Commercial Production Of Horizontal Casting Line
announcements.detail: Commenced the commercial production of Horizontal Casting Line having production capacity of 28,800 metric tonnes per annum.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ramkrishna Forgings Limited has announced the commencement of commercial production for its Horizontal Casting Line, named "DISA FLEX 80," effective March 31, 2026. This new line has a production capacity of 28,800 metric tonnes per annum and is located at the company's manufacturing facility in Village Bholodih, Dist. Saraikela-Kharswan, Jharkhand. The investment in this new capacity is Rs. 249.00 Crores, financed through a mix of debt and internal accruals. The company aims to expand its presence in the automotive casting space to offer a comprehensive product range to existing and new customers. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: AvenuesAI Ltd - 539807 - Intimation - Filing Of Pre-DRHP By Rediff.Com India Limited, A Subsidiary Of Our Company In Relation To Proposed IPO Of Equity Shares
announcements.detail: Intimation - Filing of Pre-Filed Draft Red Herring Prospectus by Rediff.com India Limited, a Subsidiary of our Company in relation to proposed IPO of Equity Shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: AvenuesAI Limited has announced that its subsidiary, Rediff.com India Limited, has filed a Pre-Filed Draft Red Herring Prospectus (Pre-DRHP) with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), BSE Limited, and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. This filing is in relation to a proposed initial public offering (IPO) of equity shares by Rediff.com India Limited. The filing of the Pre-DRHP does not guarantee that the IPO will proceed. AvenuesAI Limited will provide further updates on material developments as they occur. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ventures Ltd - 543747 - Intimation Of Approval Of Issue Of Shares On Right Issue Basis By Kamdhenu Colour And Coatings Limited, A Wholly Owned And Material Subsidiary Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation of approval of Right Issue by the wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Ventures Limited has announced that its wholly-owned and material subsidiary, Kamdhenu Colour and Coatings Limited (KCCL), approved the issuance of 3,800 equity shares on a rights basis. The face value of these shares is Rs. 10 each, and they will be issued at a price of Rs. 36,000 per share, aggregating to Rs. 13,68,00,000. The rights issue offer letter is dated March 31, 2026, and the issue will be open for existing shareholders of KCCL from April 4, 2026, to April 10, 2026. The Investment Committee of Kamdhenu Ventures Limited will review, consider, and decide on the number of shares and the investment amount for the company in this rights issue. This decision was made by the Board of KCCL on March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Supreme Infrastructure India Ltd - 532904 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting For Allotment Of Equity Shares
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Supreme Infrastructure India Limited, in their meeting on March 31, 2026, approved the allotment of 7,67,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each to Mr. Vikas Vijaykumar Khemani. This allotment is a result of Mr. Khemani exercising his right to convert 7,67,000 warrants into equity shares. The conversion was made for cash, with the receipt of the remaining exercise price of Rs. 65.205 per warrant, totaling Rs. 6,66,82,980. These newly allotted shares will rank pari passu with existing equity shares. Following this conversion, the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 97,50,27,600, comprising 9,75,02,760 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The Board meeting commenced at 5:00 PM and concluded at 5:35 PM on March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Shanti Gold International Ltd - 544459 - Update - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shanti Gold International Limited has revised the expected date for the incorporation of its wholly-owned subsidiary in Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE). The incorporation is now tentatively scheduled for on or before June 30, 2026, a revision from the previously indicated date of March 31, 2026. This delay is attributed to ongoing geopolitical tensions and conflicts in the region, which have disrupted normal business operations, leading to delays in obtaining necessary approvals, documentation, and coordination with local authorities. The company is actively taking steps to complete the incorporation process as early as feasible.

announcements.subject: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd - 544200 -  Loan Sanction From MAS Financial Services Limited.
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that Company has received a Sanction of Term loan from MAS Financial Services Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Akme Fintrade (India) Limited has secured a Term Loan sanction of Rs. 8,00,00,000/- (Rupees Eight Crores only) from MAS Financial Services Limited. This sanction was received on March 31, 2026. The company has informed both the BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited about this development. Further details are available on the company's website, www.akmefintrade.com.

announcements.subject: Apollo Pipes Ltd - 531761 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India(Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Postponment In Commencement Of Commercial Production
announcements.detail: The Company now expects the commencement of Commercial production or commercial operations at the new manufacturing plant at Mirzapur(near Varanasi), Uttar Pradesh towards the end of April 2026, subject to operational readiness.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Apollo Pipes Ltd has announced a postponement in the commencement of commercial production at its new manufacturing plant located in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh. The company now anticipates that commercial operations will begin towards the end of April 2026, contingent upon operational readiness. This update revises previous intimations provided on May 20, 2024, May 10, 2025, and January 29, 2026. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited of this revised timeline.

announcements.subject: Bampsl Securities Ltd - 531591 - Submission Of Regulation 31(4) And 31(5) For The Year Ended 31 March, 2026
announcements.detail: regulation 31(4) and 31(5)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bhisham Kumar Gupta, a promoter of Bampsl Securities Limited, has declared that no encumbrance was made on the shares held by him in the company, directly or indirectly, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration is made under Regulation 31(4) and 31(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company has submitted this information to the BSE Limited for their records.

announcements.subject: Kitex Garments Ltd - 521248 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Investment in the equity shares of the Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: Kitex Garments Ltd, along with its promoter group company Kitex Childrenswear Limited, has made a further investment in its subsidiary, Kitex Apparel Parks Limited (KAPL). The total additional investment amounts to Rs. 171.23 Crores, with Kitex Garments Ltd contributing 70% of this amount. KAPL has a paid-up capital of Rs. 601.79 Crores and commenced its business operations in FY 2025-26, with no turnover reported until FY 2024-25. KAPL is a related party to Kitex Garments Ltd, as the investment is made by the company and another group member. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd
announcements.subject: Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd - 544530 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 intimation for allotment of secured unlisted and redeemable non-convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd has announced the allotment of 1,000 Secured, Unlisted, and Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on March 31, 2026. Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000, aggregating to a total of Rs. 10,00,00,000 (Rupees Ten Crores). These NCDs, designated as Series ARSSBLNA4/2025, were allotted through private placement to identified investors. The company has provided the terms and conditions of this issuance as required by SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Faze Three Ltd-$ - 530079 - Disclosure Of Re-Classification Of Status From Promoter Of Megamont Limited (Formerly Known As V R Woodart Limited) To Public Category
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed disclosure of Re-classification of status from Promoter of Megamont Limited (Formerly known as V R Woodart Limited) to Public Category
announcements.ai_summary: Faze Three Limited disclosed on March 31, 2026, its application for reclassification from the "Promoter" category to the "Public" category of Megamont Limited (formerly VR Woodart Limited). This follows the sale of its entire stake of 9,00,000 equity shares in Megamont Limited to Ms. Maddukuri Mounica and Mrs. Minal Patil, as per a Share Purchase Agreement. The company's shareholding in Megamont Limited is now Nil. This reclassification is in accordance with Regulation 31A(10) of the SEBI LODR Regulations and is a consequence of the completion of an Open Offer triggered by the share sale. Faze Three Limited confirmed it is no longer associated with Megamont Limited's business or management and is not a related party.

announcements.subject: VR Woodart Ltd - 523888 - Sale Of Shares By The Promoters Pursuant To Share Purchase Agreement
announcements.detail: Sale of Shares by the Promoters pursuant to Share Purchase Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: On March 31, 2026, VR Woodart Ltd (now Megamont Limited) informed the stock exchanges about a Share Purchase Agreement executed by its promoter entity, Faze Three Limited. Pursuant to this agreement, Faze Three Limited will sell its entire shareholding in VR Woodart Ltd to Ms. Mounica Maddukuri and Mrs. Minal Patil, who will become the new promoters of the company. This transaction signifies a change in the promoter group of VR Woodart Ltd. The company has provided this intimation under Regulations 30 and 30A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Windsor Machines Ltd - 522029 - Intimation Of Effectiveness Of The Scheme Of Amalgamation And Submission Of The Amended Memorandum Of Association Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation of Effectiveness of the Scheme of Amalgamation and submission of the Amended Memorandum of Association of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Windsor Machines Limited has announced the effectiveness of its Scheme of Amalgamation with its wholly-owned subsidiary, Global CNC Private Limited, as of March 31, 2026. This follows the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated March 19, 2026, which has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad. As a result of this amalgamation, the Memorandum of Association of Windsor Machines Limited has been amended, specifically Clause III concerning the company's objects and Clause V regarding its authorized share capital. Investors should note that the NCLT order, the Scheme of Amalgamation, and the amended Memorandum of Association are now on record.

announcements.subject: IB Infotech Enterprises Ltd - 519463 - Intimation Pursuant To The Requirements Of Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ("Listing Regulations").
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to the requirements of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that Board of Directors of the Company at their meeting held today i.e 31st March, 2026, have transacted the following business:
1) Approval for proposal for sub-division of shares.
2) Considered and recommended amendment to capital clause of Memorandum of Association.
3) Consider and recommended adoption of new set of Articles of Association.
announcements.ai_summary: IB Infotech Enterprises Ltd announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 31, 2026, approved a proposal for the sub-division of shares. The company plans to sub-divide each equity share of face value Rs. 10/- into 10 equity shares of face value Re. 1/- each. This sub-division is subject to shareholder approval via postal ballot. Additionally, the Board recommended amendments to the Capital Clause of the Memorandum of Association and the adoption of a new set of Articles of Association to reflect these changes and comply with the Companies Act, 2013. The rationale behind the share sub-division is to improve market liquidity and make the shares more affordable for small investors, thereby broadening the investor base. The Board meeting commenced at 3:00 PM and concluded at 4:30 PM.

announcements.subject: Refex Renewables & Infrastructure Ltd - 531260 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Completion of acquisition of 91.43% equity stake / voting rights in Spectrum Renewable Energy Private Limited during FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Refex Renewables & Infrastructure Ltd, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Refex Sustainability Solutions Limited (RSSL), has completed the acquisition of a 91.43% equity stake and voting rights in Spectrum Renewable Energy Private Limited (SREPL) during FY26. The acquisition was completed on March 30, 2026, with previous tranches of 26.07% on August 5, 2025, and 45.98% on August 8, 2025, fulfilling conditions outlined in the Share Purchase Agreement dated January 28, 2025. SREPL is involved in the generation of Compressed Bio-Gas (CBG) and organic manure. RSSL intends to acquire the remaining 8.57% equity stake as per the agreement. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and a SEBI Master Circular dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: PB Fintech Ltd - 543390 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: PB Fintech Ltd has provided an update on the utilization of its Initial Public Offering (IPO) proceeds, following shareholder approval granted via postal ballot on March 16, 2025. The company, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Icall Support Services Private Limited, has invested AED 1,20,06,140 (approximately ₹313.84 million) in the shares of Genesis Group Limited. Genesis Group Limited is the holding company of Policybazaar Middle East Insurance Brokers LLC, operating in the insurance broking business in the UAE. This investment fulfills the IPO proceeds earmarked for expanding the company's presence outside India. The disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and a SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026. The disclosure will also be hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Mukand Ltd - 500460 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Update (Intimation Regarding Completion Of The Slump Sale Pursuant To Business Transfer Agreement Entered With Mukand Heavy Engineering Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of Mukand Limited For Transfer Of Part Of Industrial Machinery Business Via Slump Sale)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding completion of Slump Sale pursuant to Business Transfer Agreement entered with Mukand Heavy Engineering Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Mukand Limited for transfer of pat of Industrial Machinery Business via Slump Sale
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mukand Limited has completed the Slump Sale of a part of its Industrial Machinery Business to its wholly-owned subsidiary, Mukand Heavy Engineering Limited (MHEL). This transfer, encompassing activities like designing, manufacturing, erecting, and commissioning EOT Cranes, materials handling, and process plant equipment, was executed on March 31, 2026, as per the Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) dated October 18, 2025. The purchase consideration for this slump sale was Rs. 45.78 Crores (Rupees Forty-Five crores and Seventy-Eight lacs), discharged through the allotment of 26,347 fully paid-up equity shares by MHEL to Mukand Limited. This completion is in furtherance of previous intimations made on May 16, 2025, and October 18, 2025.

announcements.subject: Oricon Enterprises Ltd-$ - 513121 - Announcement  Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI ( LODR) Regulation,2015
announcements.detail: Sale of shares of  Associate Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Oricon Enterprises Ltd has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement on March 31, 2026, to sell 2,46,833 equity shares, representing 25% of its stake, in its associate company, Tecnocap Oriental Private Limited. The buyer is TGP TECNOCAP GROUP PARTECIPAZIONI S.R.L. The consideration received from this sale is Rs. 5,50,00,000/-. In the last financial year ending March 31, 2025, Tecnocap Oriental Private Limited contributed a loss of Rs. (74.75 Lakhs) as an associate share of profit/(loss). The transaction is not with a promoter or group company and is considered an arms-length transaction.

announcements.subject: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd - 500103 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Rumour Verification regarding news item in https://economictimes.indiatimes.com
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd (BHEL) has clarified news regarding relaxations in land border norms for its tenders. The company confirms receipt of an Office Memorandum (OM) dated March 27, 2026, from the Department of Expenditure (DoE), Ministry of Finance, which grants BHEL a five-year relaxation under Rule 144(xi) of GFR for procuring 21 items from entities representing countries sharing land borders with India. BHEL states that no negotiations were taking place; however, a communication from DoE on December 31, 2025, sought details on items procured from non-land border sharing countries due to GFR rule 144(XI), to which BHEL provided inputs on January 6, 2026. The company is not aware of any other unannounced information that could explain trading movements and confirms there are no ongoing regulatory or legal proceedings.

announcements.subject: Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd - 543411 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd, in their meeting held on March 31, 2026, has approved the acquisition of 100% stake in Sain Software Systems Private Limited. Following this acquisition, Sain Software Systems Private Limited will become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd. Sain Software Systems Private Limited has an authorized share capital of Rs. 10,00,000 and a paid-up share capital of Rs. 2,00,000, with a turnover of Nil and Net Worth of Rs. 2.35 Crore as of March 31, 2025. The company will enter into a Share Purchase Agreement to formalize this transaction.

announcements.subject: Nilachal Refractories Ltd - 502294 - Board Meeting Outcome for Approval Of Voluntary Delisting By The Board Subject To Approval Of Shareholders
announcements.detail: Approval of Voluntary delisting by Board subject to approval of shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: Nilachal Refractories Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 31, 2026, approved the proposal for the voluntary delisting of the company's equity shares from the BSE Limited and the Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited. This approval is subject to the subsequent approval of the shareholders. The delisting is part of a delisting offer initiated by SFAL Speciality Alloys Limited, the Acquirer, who intends to acquire all equity shares held by public shareholders. The face value of each equity share is ₹10. This move follows the Initial Public Announcement and Detailed Public Statement issued by the Manager to the Offer, Narnolia Financial Services Limited, in accordance with SEBI SAST Regulations and SEBI Delisting Regulations.

announcements.subject: Mangalam Cement Ltd - 502157 - INTIMATION UNDER REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LISTING OBLIGATIONS AND DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS) REGULATIONS, 2015 // COMMISSIONING OF CEMENT CAPACITY
announcements.detail:
The Company is pleased to announce the commissioning of additional new grinding capacity of 1.20 mtpa at its Aligarh Unit in Uttar Pradesh. With this commissioning, the total cement capacity of the Aligarh unit now stands at 1.95 mtpa.

Consequent to the above, the Company''s total grey cement manufacturing capacity stands at 5.60 mtpa.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalam Cement Ltd has announced the commissioning of an additional new grinding capacity of 1.20 mtpa at its Aligarh Unit in Uttar Pradesh, effective March 31, 2026. This expansion brings the total cement grinding capacity of the Aligarh unit to 1.95 mtpa. Consequently, the company's total grey cement manufacturing capacity now stands at 5.60 mtpa. This strategic expansion is expected to enhance the company's ability to service markets more efficiently, improve market reach, and optimize logistics. Investors can anticipate potential benefits from increased production and improved operational efficiencies.

announcements.subject: BPL Ltd - 500074 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: outcome of Board meeting for AOP 2026-2027
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of BPL Ltd held a meeting on March 31, 2026, to discuss the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) for the financial year 2026-2027. The outcome of this meeting will provide insights into the company's strategic direction and financial targets for the upcoming fiscal year. Investors should review the detailed minutes of this meeting once they are released to understand the specific plans and initiatives approved by the board. This information will be crucial for assessing the company's future performance and investment potential.

announcements.subject: Insecticides (India) Ltd - 532851 - Intimation Of Receipt Of PATENT OF ADDITION (A SYNERGISTIC INSECTICIDAL COMBINATION OF DIAFENTHIURON AND ACETAMIPRID IN WETTABLE POWDER FORM AND A PROCESS OF PREPARING THE SAME)
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the Patent Office, Government of India has granted the Patent for an invention to Insecticides (India) Limited entitled A SYNERGISTIC INSECTICIDAL COMBINATION OF DIAFENTHIURON AND ACETAMIPRID IN WETTABLE POWDER FORM AND A PROCESS OF PREPARING THE SAME for the term of 20 years from 23rd day of July 2013 (Date of Filing of Main Patent).
announcements.ai_summary: Insecticides (India) Ltd has been granted a Patent of Addition by the Patent Office, Government of India. The patent covers an invention related to "A SYNERGISTIC INSECTICIDAL COMBINATION OF DIAFENTHIURON AND ACETAMIPRID IN WETTABLE POWDER FORM AND A PROCESS OF PREPARING THE SAME". This patent is valid for a period of 20 years, starting from July 23, 2013, which was the filing date of the main patent. This notification is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and is provided for informational purposes.

announcements.subject: PTC Industries Ltd - 539006 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: As enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: PTC Industries Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Aerolloy Technologies Limited, has completed the installation and successful trials of an advanced 4500/5100 Tonne Intelligent Open Die Forging System. This new system is located at the Strategic Materials Technology Complex in Lucknow and is capable of forging aerospace-grade materials such as Titanium and Superalloys. This acquisition significantly enhances Aerolloy's manufacturing capabilities, enabling the production of critical components for next-generation aeroengines, defence platforms, space systems, and industrial gas turbines. This development integrates melting (VIM), casting (VAR), and forging processes, creating a comprehensive aerospace manufacturing ecosystem. The company aims to capitalize on the multi-billion dollar global market for aerospace-grade forged components and promote import substitution, strengthening India's self-reliance.

announcements.subject: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd - 543978 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Approval Received Under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Approval received under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Limited announced on March 31, 2026, that it has received approval under the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS) on March 30, 2026. This approval is for a Copper Clad Laminate manufacturing project, involving a planned investment of approximately ₹338 Crore over the next three years. The company will establish one of India's first fully integrated Copper Clad Laminates manufacturing facilities in Vadodara, Gujarat, aiming to strengthen domestic manufacturing capabilities in critical electronic components and achieve 100% import substitution. announcements.subject: NIIT Ltd - 500304 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release for "AI, Cybersecurity, digital and data skills emerge as India''s most critical future capabilities: NIIT India Skills Gap Report"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NIIT Ltd has released a press release on March 31, 2026, detailing findings from the "NIIT India Skills Gap Report 2026." This nationwide study, conducted with YouGov and involving 3,500 respondents, highlights the critical importance of AI, cybersecurity, digital, and data skills for future employability and workforce growth in India. The report indicates that mid-career professionals represent a significant talent paradox, with high demand but constrained availability, as 46% of employers recruit from this segment while 38% find it the most constrained. Furthermore, 40% of employers anticipate a moderate-to-minimal impact of AI on roles, focusing on task redesign and productivity gains rather than job displacement. The study also reveals that digital and data skills are consistently ranked among the top three most critical capabilities for the next 3-5 years across all surveyed groups, including students, employees, recruiters, CXOs, and academia.

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sammaan Capital Limited announced on March 31, 2026, that International Holding Company PJSC (IHC), through its affiliate Avenir Investment RSC Ltd., will become the Promoter, acquiring a 41.5% stake via preferential allotment of equity shares and warrants. announcements.subject: Cargotrans Maritime Ltd - 543618 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: The Board has approved the incorporation of a Wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Cargotrans Maritime Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 31, 2026, approved the incorporation of a new wholly owned subsidiary named "CML INVESTMENTS PRIVATE LIMITED". This new entity will be incorporated in India with a paid-up capital of INR 100,000, comprising 10,000 Equity Shares. The proposed subsidiary will primarily engage in the real estate and financial investment & trading sectors. As a wholly owned subsidiary, it will be considered a related party to Cargotrans Maritime Limited, with promoters having an interest through their shareholding in the parent company. The incorporation is a step towards expanding the company's business activities into these sectors.

announcements.subject: Granules India Ltd-$ - 532482 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Granules India Limited announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Granules Life Sciences Private Limited (GLS), has received a Voluntary Action Indicated (VAI) classification following a recent US FDA inspection of its manufacturing facility in Shamirpet, Telangana. The inspection, which covered current Good Manufacturing Practice (cGMP) and pre-approval inspection (PAI) of oral solid dosage manufacturing operations, took place between December 15 and December 19, 2025. The Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) has been issued, and no regulatory actions were recommended, signifying the closure of the inspection. This VAI classification is a positive development that enhances Granules India's finished dosage manufacturing capabilities, allowing for multi-site manufacturing of approved products. The company emphasizes its ongoing commitment to quality across all its sites.

announcements.subject: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543942 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (SEBI Listing Regulations)
announcements.detail: Intimation about completion of transaction of sale of portfolio of unsecured stressed MFI Loan to ARC
announcements.ai_summary: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd has completed the sale of its portfolio of unsecured stressed Microfinance Institution (MFI) loans. This transaction, which includes both Non-Performing Assets (NPAs) and written-off accounts, was finalized on March 31, 2026. The sale was conducted using the Swiss Challenge Method. Pool 1, comprising 2,92,030 accounts with an aggregate principal outstanding of ₹1,016.24 crore, was sold to Asset Reconstruction Company India Limited (ARCIL) for ₹133.10 crore. Pool 2, consisting of 1,36,832 accounts with an aggregate principal outstanding of ₹474.75 crore, was sold to Shriram Asset Reconstruction Private Limited (SARC) for ₹62.19 crore. This disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: GEM Enviro Management Ltd - 544199 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: In continuation to our earlier corporate announcement dated December 26, 2025, we would like to infotm that due to operational difficulties the aquisition is now expected to be completed on or before June 30, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: GEM Enviro Management Ltd has announced a revised completion date for its acquisition of up to 26% stake in Solluz Energy Private Limited. Previously expected to be completed by March 31, 2026, the acquisition is now anticipated to conclude on or before June 30, 2026, due to operational difficulties. This update follows the company's earlier announcement on December 26, 2025, where the Board of Directors approved the acquisition. The company will continue to provide updates on the progress of this transaction.

announcements.subject: Tata Communications Ltd - 500483 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Tata Communications Maintains A leader Position for 13th Straight Year in Gartner Magic Quadrant
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Communications has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Global WAN Services for the 13th consecutive year. This recognition highlights their Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The company has enhanced its network fabric with AI and analytics, offering composable, high-speed, and on-demand connectivity for global enterprises. Key advancements include expanding the network-on-demand portfolio with IZOTM DC Dynamic Connectivity and multi-cloud on-demand options, investing in 800G wavelength services for AI cloud infrastructure, and extending global coverage through strategic partner PoPs. They have also strengthened Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) capabilities and plan to offer quantum-safe encryption services leveraging Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) algorithms.

announcements.subject: Investment & Precision Castings Ltd - 504786 - Commissioning Of Solar Power Plant.
announcements.detail: Investment & Precision Castings Limited wish to Informed that company has sucessfuly comissioned a solar power plant from 30th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Investment & Precision Castings Ltd has successfully commissioned a solar power plant with a capacity of 4 MWp (4000 kWp) on March 30, 2026. The plant is located at Village Ratanpar, Gujarat, and will be used for captive consumption. The commissioning of this solar power plant is anticipated to lead to cost optimization and a reduction in carbon emissions for the company. This development is in accordance with regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The Chairman & Managing Director, Mr. Piyush Tamboli, has signed off on the announcement.

announcements.subject:
NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Declaration Of COD Of NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, A
Stepdown Subsidiary Of NTPC Limited Through Its Subsidiary NTPC Green Energy Limited.
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Ltd has announced the declaration of Commercial Operations Date (COD) for NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, a stepdown subsidiary. This declaration is made through its subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL). Specifically, the twelfth and final part capacity of 78.02 MW out of the 1255 MW Khavda-I Solar PV Project in Gujarat has achieved COD effective March 31, 2026. Additionally, the sixth part capacity of 90 MW out of the 1200 MW Khavda-II Solar PV Project in Gujarat also achieved COD on March 31, 2026. With these additions, the total installed capacity of the NTPC group now stands at 89,057 MW, and the commercial capacity is 87,977 MW.

announcements.subject: Max India Ltd - 543223 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release-Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.ai_summary: Max India Ltd has announced a press release from its wholly owned subsidiary, Antara Assisted Care Services Limited (AACSL). The press release details the launch of AGEasy's new adult diaper pants featuring proprietary Smart Liquid Distribution™ technology. This in-house developed technology, currently awaiting patent grant, aims to address challenges such as sagging, leakage, and uneven absorption, offering up to 12 hours of protection with an anti-bacterial core. The product is designed specifically for seniors to enhance independence and dignity by addressing incontinence issues. AGEasy conducted extensive research to re-engineer existing adult hygiene products, which have historically fallen short in areas like leakage protection and fit. This innovation represents a significant step in improving the quality of life for seniors.

announcements.subject: Kellton Tech Solutions Ltd - 519602 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Conversion of warrants and allotment of Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Kellton Tech Solutions Ltd has allotted 36,00,000 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹ 1/- each to M/s. Matnic Finvest LLP, a promoter group entity, upon conversion of warrants. This allotment was made for cash, with the receipt of the remaining exercise price of ₹ 18.9/- per share warrant, aggregating to ₹ 6,80,40,000/-. The conversion is pursuant to the exercise of their right to convert share warrants. The equity shares allotted rank pari-passu with existing equity shares. Following this allotment, the paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹ 52,78,04,670/- to ₹ 53,14,04,670/-, and the number of equity shares has risen from 52,78,04,670 to 53,14,04,670. The Board of Directors passed a circular resolution on March 31, 2026, to effect this allotment.

announcements.subject: Tata Chemicals Ltd - 500770 - Intimation Regarding Simplification Of The Holding Structure Of The UK Operations Of Tata Chemicals Limited
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation regarding simplification of the holding structure of the UK operations of Tata Chemicals Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Chemicals Limited announced on March 31, 2026, a simplification of its UK operations' holding structure. Effective March 30, 2026, Gusiute Holdings (UK) Limited (GHUL) transferred all its assets and investments to Homefield Pvt. UK Limited (HFUK). Consequently, GHUL has ceased to be a material subsidiary, and HFUK is now considered the material subsidiary. This restructuring aims to rationalize intermediate entities and simplify the group's holding structure without altering the ultimate ownership of the company over its UK subsidiaries.

announcements.subject: Rossell Techsys Ltd - 544294 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: News Article by "The Week" Magazine - Senthil Balasubramanian - CEO - Rossell Techsys Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rossell Techsys Limited has announced the release of a news article by "The Week" magazine on March 31, 2026. The article, featuring Senthil Balasubramanian, CEO of Rossell Techsys, highlights the company's significant focus on India's defense sector and its plans for rapid scaling. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors are advised to refer to the provided link for the full details of the article.

announcements.subject: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd - 539607 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release (Revised)
announcements.detail: Press Release - 'Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd (BCSSL) Receives Purchase Orders from Hyderabad City Police for Blura Saga - AI Platform and IT Infrastructure'
announcements.ai_summary: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Limited (BCSSL) has received purchase orders from the Hyderabad City Police for the supply, installation, and commissioning of AI-enabled high-performance rack servers and GPUs. Additionally, the company will deploy its AI-powered social media monitoring and intelligence platform, "Blura Saga," for the Social Media Unit. The scope of work includes delivering advanced computing infrastructure and AI-based analytics solutions to enhance data processing, intelligence gathering, and mission-critical operations for the Hyderabad City Police. "Blura Saga" is designed to monitor, analyze, and interpret social media activity in real-time, enabling authorities to track trends, identify misinformation, and understand public sentiment. These orders demonstrate BCSSL's capability to deliver integrated AI platforms and high-performance computing solutions.

announcements.subject: NTPC Green Energy Ltd - 544289 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: NTPC Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release titled "NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) Signed Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement (GAPA) with Solar Energy Corporation Limited (SECI) for supply of Green Ammonia."
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NTPC REL), has signed a Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement (GAPA) with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). This agreement, executed on March 30, 2026, is for the supply of Green Ammonia under the SIGHT Scheme of the National Green Hydrogen Mission. Under the terms of the GAPA, NTPC REL will supply 70,000 MTPA of Green Ammonia to M/s Krishna Phoschem Limited, situated in Meghnagar, Madhya Pradesh. SECI will act as the intermediary procurer in this transaction. This development is a significant step for NGEL's Green Hydrogen and Green Ammonia portfolio, underscoring its dedication to India's decarbonization objectives.

announcements.subject: Capri Global Capital Ltd - 531595 - Intimation - Shelf Prospectus & Tranche 1 Prospectus
announcements.detail: Intimation - Shelf Prospectus & Tranche 1 Prospectus
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Ltd is launching a public issue of secured, rated, listed, redeemable, non-convertible debentures (NCDs) with a face value of ₹1,000 each. The Tranche I Issue has a Base Issue Size of ₹1,000 million and an option to retain oversubscription of up to ₹4,000 million, aggregating to a total of ₹5,000 million. This Tranche I Issue is part of a larger Shelf Limit of up to ₹20,000 million, approved by the Board of Directors on March 10, 2026. The Shelf Prospectus and Tranche I Prospectus have been adopted by the Management Committee of the Board via a Circular Resolution passed on March 30, 2026, and have been filed with the Registrar of Companies, SEBI, and BSE Limited. The company has also uploaded this intimation on its website.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Intimation Of Receipt Of RBI Approval With Respect To  Encora Transaction
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of RBI approval with respect to Encora Transaction
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) for Overseas Direct Investment exceeding USD One Billion under the Foreign Exchange Management (Overseas Investment) Rules. This approval is a significant step in the ongoing Encora acquisition transaction, which involves a share subscription and share purchase agreement with Encora US Holdco, Inc., Encora Holdings Ltd., Encora Holdco Ltd. (UK), and AI Altius Parent (Cayman) Limited. The company had previously announced receiving approvals from the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvement Act in the United States and competition-related approvals in Australia, along with shareholder approval for matters including preferential allotment and debt funding on January 28, 2026, and February 28, 2026. Coforge Limited is actively pursuing remaining regulatory approvals in various jurisdictions, which are currently in advanced stages of processing. The company will provide prompt updates to the stock exchanges upon the grant of these approvals.

announcements.company: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd
announcements.subject: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd - 534091 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Multi Commodity Exchange Clearing Corporation Limited (MCXCCL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd, has transferred Rs. 50 Lakh to its Core Settlement Guarantee Fund as a "Financial Disincentive" on March 27, 2026. This action was taken on account of a technical glitch that occurred on January 28, 2026. The disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/MRD1/DTCS/CIR/P/2021/590 dated July 05, 2021, and SEBI Circular no. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The company has stated that there is no impact on the operations or other activities of MCX and MCXCCL arising from this financial disincentive.

announcements.company: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd
announcements.subject: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd - 543490 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of additional equity stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited from IDFC by GMR Energy Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GMR Energy Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of GMR Power and Urban Infra Limited, has acquired an additional 2.37% equity stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited (GKEL) from IDFC First Bank Limited. The transaction involved the purchase of 5,09,80,769 equity shares for a consideration of Rs. 60 Crore. This acquisition is set to consolidate the company's stake in GKEL to nearly 100%, thereby enhancing its strategic control over GKEL, which operates a 1050 MW coal-based plant with a turnover of Rs. 3017 Crore for FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Ceat Ltd - 500878 - CEAT Limited Has Informed The Exchange About General Updates
announcements.detail: CEAT Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: The State Tax Officer, Group-VIII, Intelligence-II Chennai-6, Tamil Nadu has confirmed a demand of INR 4.7 Cr for the Financial Year 2019-20 against Ceat Ltd. In addition to the demand, an equal amount of penalty of INR 4.7 Cr has been levied, along with applicable interest, due to alleged availment and utilization of ineligible input tax credit. The communication regarding this order was received by the authorized officer(s) on March 30, 2026. Ceat Limited is exploring the option of preferring an appeal for this matter. The company believes that there will be no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities as a result of this order.

announcements.subject: Religare Enterprises Ltd - 532915 - Grant Of Stock Options
announcements.detail: Grant Of Stock Options
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Religare Enterprises Limited has announced the grant of 22,692 stock options to eligible employees under the Religare Enterprises Limited Employee Stock Option Plan 2019. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of the Company approved this grant at their meeting held on March 30, 2026. Each stock option is convertible into one equity share of face value Rs. 10/-. The exercise price for these stock options is Rs. 220.34 per equity share. The options will vest in five equal annual installments of 20% each year, with the first installment vesting upon completion of one year from the date of grant. The scheme is in conformity with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021, having been approved by the Board of Directors and Shareholders.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Update On Sale Of Joint Venture
announcements.detail: Update on sale of Joint Venture
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jost’s Engineering Company Limited has completed the divestment of its entire 50% equity investment in its joint venture, Suryavayu Renewable and Energy Solutions Private Limited (SRESPL). The transaction involved the sale of its stake to Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited (Kay Cee). On March 30, 2026, Jost’s Engineering Company Limited received consideration of Rs. 1,03,100/- and transferred its 50% equity investment in SRESPL. Consequently, SRESPL has ceased to be a joint venture of Jost’s Engineering Company Limited with effect from March 30, 2026. This update follows the company's prior intimation on March 24, 2026, regarding the approval of this divestment proposal.

announcements.subject: Thrive Future Habitats Ltd - 523120 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Completion of sale of subsidiary namely Aura Flow Private Limited (formerly known as Anatomicals Ador India Private Limited).
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Thrive Future Habitats Ltd has completed the sale of its entire 58% shareholding in its subsidiary, Aura Flow Private Limited (formerly known as Anatomicals Ador India Private Limited). The transaction involved the transfer of 1,73,998 equity shares from Thrive Future Habitats Limited to Ms. Mei Ling Foon Ming Lee. As a result of this sale, Aura Flow Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Thrive Future Habitats Limited, effective March 30, 2026. This divestment was approved by the Board of Directors of Aura Flow Private Limited in their meeting held on the same date. All other terms and details of the transaction remain as previously disclosed on November 14, 2025.

announcements.subject: National Highways Infra Trust - 543385 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: National Highways Infra Trust (NHIT) has announced the Appointed Date for its Round 5 Roads project, also known as "InvIT Bundle 5". The Appointed Date has been declared as April 1, 2026, effective at midnight on March 31, 2026 / April 1, 2026. This declaration follows the signing of the Concession Agreement between the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) and NHIT Western Projects Private Limited (NWPPL) on March 17, 2026, and the subsequent completion of all condition precedents. The Concession Agreements pertain to the Amravati-Chikhali-Tarsod and Gundugolanu-Chinna Avutapalli road projects. Investors should note this as a key operational milestone for the Round 5 projects.

announcements.subject: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd - 543985 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Recognition
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has been featured as one of ''India''s Leading ESG Entities'' in Dun & Bradstreet''s report titled ''ESG Horizons: Now and Next 2026''.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has been recognized as one of "India's Leading ESG Entities" in Dun & Bradstreet's report titled "ESG Horizons: Now and Next 2026". This announcement was made on March 30, 2026. The company has provided a copy of this recognition for record.

announcements.subject: Speciality Restaurants Ltd - 534425 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: As Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Speciality Hotels India Private Limited ("SHIPL"), a subsidiary of Speciality Restaurants Limited, has allotted 61,728 equity shares of face value ₹100 each at an issue price of ₹838.57 per share on March 30, 2026. The total consideration for this allotment was ₹5,17,63,249 (Rupees Five Crore Seventeen Lakhs Sixty-Three Thousand Two Hundred Forty-Nine Only) through a rights issue. This allotment has increased SHIPL's paid-up share capital to ₹2,00,61,500. Consequently, Speciality Restaurants Limited's shareholding in SHIPL has been diluted from 98.28% to 68.04%, with SHIPL continuing to be a subsidiary.

announcements.subject: NIBE Ltd - 535136 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Sale of Step down Subsidiary of the Company i.e Nibe Aeronautics Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nibe Defence and Aerospace Limited ("NDAL"), a subsidiary of Nibe Limited, has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on March 30, 2026, with Mr. Nibe Ganesh Ramesh ("Purchaser") for the sale of equity shares of Nibe Aeronautics Limited ("NAL"). Upon completion of the transaction, NAL will cease to be a subsidiary of NDAL and a step-down subsidiary of Nibe Limited. The transaction is expected to be completed by May 30, 2026. The consideration received is not less than the original investment amount of ₹1,52,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty-Two Lakhs only). In the financial year ended March 31, 2025, NAL contributed ₹0.00 to turnover/revenue/income and ₹191.19 Lakhs to net worth, representing 0.000% and 0.003% respectively.

announcements.subject: Majestic Auto Ltd-$ - 500267 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Completion of Sale of Property of the Company situated at B-6, B-7 and B-9 Ecotech I Extension, Sector - Ecotech-I, Greater Noida, Distt. Gautam Budh Nagar (U.P.)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Majestic Auto Ltd has completed the sale of its leasehold property located at B-6, B-7, and B-9 Ecotech I Extension, Sector-Ecotech-I, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, measuring approximately 54,312 sq. mtrs. The company executed the Sale Deed on March 30, 2026, with Cyrrus Manufacturing LLP (the "Buyer") after receiving the full sale consideration. An advance of ₹5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crore only) was previously received. The sale of these plots contributed 11.85% to the company's net worth and 6.30% to its revenue in the last financial year (2024-25).

announcements.subject: Bank of Baroda - 532134 - Clarification On News Item Appearing In Media/Publication
announcements.detail: Clarification on news item appearing in Media/Publication
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bank of Baroda has provided a clarification regarding a news item that appeared in the media. The bank's branch received an email on March 26, 2026, for a fund transfer from an MP Government savings account, but there was a mismatch in the available balance. A revised email was received later that day. On March 27, 2026, an email with an attached letter from the State Government Department was received for fund transfer on the same day, which was a holiday. After necessary arrangements and approvals, funds were remitted on March 27, 2026. However, on the same day, the Commissioner, DIF, Bhopal, issued a letter debarring Bank of Baroda from conducting government business. On March 28, 2026, the bank submitted a written representation, and subsequently, on the same day, the debarment letter was cancelled with immediate effect. The bank stated that since the order was revoked within 24 hours, it was not disclosed, and there is no material impact on the bank.

announcements.subject: Refex Industries Ltd - 532884 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 - Acquisition of equity shares in Venwind Refex Power Limited,  a subsidiary, pursuant to conversion of Optional Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Refex Industries Limited has announced the acquisition of equity shares in its subsidiary, Venwind Refex Power Limited (VRPL), through the conversion of Class B Optional Convertible Debentures (OCDs). Pursuant to the terms of these OCDs, Refex Industries Limited has been allotted 24,866 equity shares of VRPL, each with a face value of ₹10/-, at a fair valuation. This conversion has increased Refex Industries Limited's shareholding in VRPL by 4.11%, from 73.28% to 77.39%. VRPL's paid-up capital before conversion was ₹13,67,450, comprising 1,36,745 equity shares, and after conversion, it stands at ₹16,16,110, comprising 1,61,611 equity shares. VRPL is an existing subsidiary and its turnover for 2024-2025 was NIL.

announcements.subject: Ambuja Cements Ltd - 500425 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Ambuja Cements Limited has informed the stock exchange about the Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited and their respective shareholders.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ambuja Cements Limited has received sanction for the Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited, along with their respective shareholders. The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench (NCLT Ahmedabad), pronounced its order sanctioning the scheme on March 30, 2026. The Appointed Date for the Scheme is August 16, 2024. The scheme will become effective upon the completion of all stipulated steps. Ambuja Cements Limited will provide further updates to the exchanges once the Scheme is effective. The company will also upload this intimation on its website.

announcements.subject: 3M India Ltd - 523395 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Reg 30 of SEBI (LODR) update on PG&F business
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: 3M India Limited has announced an update regarding its Precision Grinding & Finishing (PG&F) business. Following the agreement by 3M Company, USA, to sell its global PG&F business to Nimbus, a European private equity firm, 3M India will cease its PG&F operations in India. The PG&F business in India generated approximately INR 26 crore in sales during FY 2024-25 and is supported by two employees. The global sale is expected to close on April 1, 2026, after which 3M India will no longer be able to continue these operations. The company will provide limited post-closing support for up to 12 months, extendable by an additional 6 months, under a Transition Distribution Services Agreement to ensure customer supply continuity.

announcements.subject: Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd - 514316 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of the company today i.e. 30 March 2026 .
announcements.ai_summary: Raghuvir Synthetics Limited announced the successful completion of the sale of its entire 51% shareholding in its subsidiary, Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited, on March 30, 2026. This transaction, which was approved by the Board of Directors on March 27, 2026, means that Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited is no longer a subsidiary of Raghuvir Synthetics Limited. The sale was conducted at a consideration of Rs. 51,000 and was made to Mr. Yash Sunil Agarwal and Mr. Hardik Sunil Agarwal, who are also promoters of Raghuvir Synthetics Limited. The transaction was conducted on an arms-length basis.

announcements.subject: JK Paper Ltd - 532162 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: JK Paper Ltd has provided an update on the commissioning of its Hardwood Bleach Chemical Thermo-Mechanical Pulp (BCTMP) Plant. The plant's commercial production, initially expected to begin in the 4th quarter of FY 2025–26, is now anticipated to commence in the 1st quarter of FY 2026–27. The company stated that the erection and commissioning of the plant are currently in advanced stages. This information is a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, referencing a previous communication dated September 29, 2025.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Capital Services Ltd - 511766 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Raising of Funds
announcements.detail: Raising of funds through securitization
announcements.ai_summary: Muthoot Capital Services Limited announced the completion of two securitization transactions on March 30, 2026, successfully raising funds through the assignment of Two-Wheeler Loan receivables. The first transaction raised ₹1,03,70,01,698.70 by assigning receivables aggregating to ₹1,11,50,55,590. The second transaction raised ₹72,67,42,353 by assigning receivables totaling ₹77,31,30,163. These transactions represent the seventh and eighth securitization/direct assignment activities undertaken by the company during FY 2025-26. The entire pool of receivables is from the non-priority sector and was undertaken in compliance with Reserve Bank of India guidelines.

announcements.subject: Novartis India Ltd - 500672 - Intimation Of The Receipt Of Delhi High Court Order Admitting Company Petition In The Matter Of Novartis India Limited Vs. Commissioner Of Trade And Taxes (W.P.(C) 3892/2026)
announcements.detail: Intimation of the receipt of Delhi High Court Order admitting Company Petition in the matter of Novartis India Limited vs. Commissioner of Trade and Taxes (W.P.(C) 3892/2026)
announcements.ai_summary: Novartis India Limited received an order dated March 27, 2026, from the Delhi High Court admitting its petition against the Commissioner of Trade and Taxes. The petition challenges the DVAT assessment for AY 2013-14, which had resulted in a demand of approximately ₹10.89 crore for tax and interest, plus a penalty of ₹6.85 crore. The High Court's order is procedural and does not represent a final decision on the matter. The company received this order on March 29, 2026. A favorable outcome could lead to a refund of INR 54.45 Lacs. Novartis India Limited will continue to update the stock exchanges on further developments.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 30.03.2026
announcements.detail: Please find the attached
announcements.ai_summary: Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 30, 2026, and approved a borrowing program for the Financial Year 2026-27. This program includes the issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures up to an overall limit of Rs. 7,400 Crore, which can be done through private placement or public issue in one or more tranches. The Board also approved an additional investment of up to Rs 7,90,59,04,996/- in its subsidiary, Asirvad Micro Finance Limited, and an investment of up to Rs 1,50,00,00,000/- in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Manappuram Home Finance Limited. Furthermore, Mr. Narayanan Easwaran was appointed as the Group Chief Technology Officer, effective March 30, 2026. The meeting commenced at 5:00 PM and concluded at 6:30 PM.

announcements.company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd
announcements.subject: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd - 542760 - Issuance Of Parent Company Guarantee
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para B of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/25 dated February 25, 2025, titled Industry Standards on Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, we hereby notify that the Company has issued Parent Company Guarantee to ABSA Bank Limited (Lender) for an amount of USD 31 million (equivalent to approx. INR 293.04 Crore) as security for the Guarantees ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited has issued a Parent Company Guarantee (PCG) to ABSA Bank Limited (Lender) for an amount of USD 31 million, equivalent to approximately INR 293.04 Crore. This guarantee is provided as security for a Guarantees facility (Non-fund based working capital facility) availed by Sterling and Wilson Engineering (Pty) Ltd., a step-down subsidiary of the company. The facility is intended for solar power projects in South Africa. The PCG is issued on an arm's length basis and the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this transaction. The guarantee will be valid for up to six years from its issuance date.

announcements.subject: Aditya Vision Ltd - 540205 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR (Opening Of Showroom)
announcements.detail: Opening of Showroom
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Vision Limited has expanded its retail presence by opening three new showrooms on March 30, 2026. These new showrooms are located in Bhilai, Bilaspur, and Durg in the state of Chhattisgarh. This expansion marks Chhattisgarh as the fourth state of operation for the company, strengthening its presence in Central India. With these openings, Aditya Vision Limited has now surpassed a milestone of 200 showrooms across Bihar, Jharkhand, Uttar Pradesh, and Chhattisgarh. The company is pursuing a growth strategy that involves increasing its retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Prism Johnson Ltd - 500338 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Sale of stake in wholly owned subsidiary companies
announcements.ai_summary: Prism Johnson Ltd has divested its entire equity shareholding in three wholly owned subsidiaries: Venkataramiah Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, Samiyaz Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, and Tescon Buildcon Private Limited, on March 30, 2026. Consequently, these companies have ceased to be wholly owned subsidiaries of Prism Johnson Ltd. The consideration received for the sale of shares includes Rs. 4,31,932 for Venkataramiah Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, Rs. 6,48,510 for Samiyaz Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, and Rs. 10,000 for Tescon Buildcon Private Limited. The revenue and net worth contributed by these subsidiaries to Prism Johnson Ltd as of March 31, 2025, were minimal, with revenues reported as Rs. 0.00 and net worth contributions of Rs. 0.06 crore, Rs. 0.08 crore, and Rs. 0.002 crore respectively.

announcements.subject: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd - 534623 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 In Respect Of Its Material Unlisted Subsidiary 'Jineshvar Securities Private Limited'.
announcements.detail: As per annexure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd has disclosed changes in the Board of Directors of its material unlisted subsidiary, Jineshvar Securities Private Limited, effective March 30, 2026. Mr. Anshul Laxkar (DIN: 11100544) has been appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive and Independent) for a term of five years. Concurrently, Mr. Umesh Vasantlal Modi (DIN: 01570180) and Mrs. Manisha Umesh Modi (DIN: 02057625) have resigned from their positions as Directors. These changes have been approved by the Board of Directors of Jineshvar Securities Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Oil India Ltd - 533106 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Oil India and CSIR-IMMT signs MoU to pursue joint Research in Critical Minerals
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Oil India Limited (OIL), a Maharatna CPSE, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with CSIR - Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (IMMT) on March 30, 2026. This collaboration aims to pursue joint Research & Development (R&D) projects in the critical minerals sector, aligning with the National Critical Mineral Mission (NCMM). The MoU was signed by the Director (Exploration & Development) of OIL and the Director of CSIR-IMMT, in the presence of the CMD of OIL and senior officials from both organizations. This initiative is expected to foster R&D activities in the critical mineral domain.

announcements.subject: Bilcare Ltd-$ - 526853 - Update On Voluntary Liquidation Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015,
announcements.detail: Bilcare Limited has informed the Exchange about the update on Voluntary Liquidation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bilcare Limited has redeemed 31,50,000 preference shares of Caprihans India Limited for an aggregate of ₹3.15 crore on March 23, 2026. Furthermore, the company exercised its right to convert 12,90,000 warrants into equity shares of Caprihans India Limited, at a price of ₹200 per warrant, with each warrant convertible into one equity share of ₹10 face value. Following these conversions on March 20, 23, 24, and 25, 2026, Bilcare Limited's shareholding in Caprihans India Limited increased from 55.99% to 59.56%, with the number of equity shares held rising from 81,88,325 to 94,78,325. The company also reviewed the voluntary winding up status of its wholly owned subsidiary, Bilcare GCS Limited, in a board meeting held on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tube Investments of India Ltd - 540762 - Update On Incremental Investment In TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.detail: Update on Incremental Investment in TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Ltd has announced an incremental investment in its subsidiary, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited. On March 30, 2026, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited allotted 2,50,00,000 Series C Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares to Tube Investments of India Limited. This transaction is an update under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Dev Accelerator Ltd - 544513 - Monthly Newsletter - March 2026 Edition
announcements.detail: A Monthly Newsletter of March 2026 edition issued by the Company is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Accelerator Limited has issued its Monthly Newsletter for March 2026, providing an update on its business activities and market outlook.
