The company has informed the stock exchanges about this decision as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On 50:50 Joint Venture Between JSW Steel Limited And JFE Steel Corporation, Japan For The Steel Business Of Bhushan Power And Steel Limited
announcements.detail: Update on 50:50 Joint Venture between JSW Steel Limited and JFE Steel Corporation, Japan for the Steel Business of BPSL.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JSW Steel Limited and JFE Steel Corporation of Japan have provided an update on their 50:50 joint venture for the steel business of Bhushan Power and Steel Limited. JFE Steel Corporation has invested Rs 7,875 crores as the first tranche, resulting in the allotment of 2,26,94,524 equity shares of JSW Kalinga Steel Limited to JFE, giving them a 25% shareholding on a fully diluted basis. Consequently, JSW Steel and JFE have established joint control over JSW Kalinga and its subsidiary, JSW Sambalpur Steel Limited, as of March 30, 2026. The acquisition of an additional 25% stake by JFE for Rs 7,875 crores is expected to be completed as per the Joint Venture Agreement.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Welspun Corp Ltd has announced the receipt of a significant order for pipe supply from its US facility, valued at approximately Rs 1,000 Crore. This new order, combined with previously secured orders since January 30, 2026, brings the company's consolidated global order book to Rs 24,700 Crore, equivalent to approximately US$ 2.6 billion. This substantial order book provides clear business visibility and continuity for both its Indian and USA operations. The execution of these orders is scheduled to take place across FY26, FY27, and FY28.

announcements.subject: Voltas Ltd - 500575 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Voltas Ltd has received an Order from the Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, demanding payment of differential customs duty of ₹10.76 crores along with applicable interest and a penalty of ₹12.76 crores. This action stems from an alleged mis-classification of certain imported goods for the period between 14th June, 2019, and 21st July, 2022. The company received this order on 27th March, 2026, and is currently analyzing it. Voltas Ltd plans to take appropriate action, which includes filing an appeal before the CES TAT. The company has stated that there will be no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities due to this penalty. The disclosure was made on 30th March, 2026, as it was the first working day after the order was received and analyzed.

announcements.company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd
announcements.subject: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd - 500312 - Monetisation Of DUDP Project
announcements.detail: Monetisation of DUDP Project
announcements.ai_summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) has announced the successful monetization of its Daman Upside Development Project (DUDP) in the western offshore. The project achieved a significant milestone on March 29, 2026, with the commencement of gas flow from Platform B-12-24P to the Hazira Plant. This project, with a capital expenditure of approximately USD 1 billion, was executed in less than two years from its award date, highlighting strong project execution and innovative practices. Production from all wells will be progressively ramped up. This update marks the beginning of gas monetization from the DUDP.

announcements.subject: Signatureglobal (India) Ltd - 543990 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 29, 2026, approved the acquisition of a "Residential Project" from its wholly-owned subsidiary, Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL), for a lumpsum consideration of Rs. 50,00,00,000. This transaction is being executed through a Business Transfer Agreement, Joint Development Agreement, and other related documents. Concurrently, the Board also approved the sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL, held by Signatureglobal (India) Ltd, to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) at Rs. 158.84 per share, aggregating to approximately Rs. 56.70 crores. Upon this share transfer, GCL will no longer be a wholly-owned subsidiary of Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. This follows a previous disclosure on February 14, 2026, regarding RMZ's potential acquisition of 50% of GCL's share capital.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Intimation Of Store Opening
announcements.detail: Intimation of store opening
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has emerged as the L1 bidder for a significant construction project. The company will be responsible for building 12 high-rise residential buildings, each with G+13 floors, utilizing monolithic construction technology. This project also includes the development of associated parking facilities, a sewerage treatment plant, utility infrastructure, and roadworks, all adjacent to the existing Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township of IOCL in Haryana. The total project value for this package is Rs.474.25 crores. Upon the formal award of this project, Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited's total value of projects in hand will increase to approximately Rs. 2,000 Crores.

announcements.subject: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd - 543989 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd's Audit Committee and Board of Directors, in their meetings on March 29, 2026, approved an extension for the utilization of balance IPO proceeds. The company raised ₹566.23 Crore (net of expenses) through its IPO, with an original utilization timeline up to March 31, 2026. The extension is primarily due to optimization in capital utilization and savings. As of March 28, 2026, ₹39.86 Crore remained unutilized, with ₹19.19 Crore for new stores and ₹20.67 Crore for warehouse expansion. The company has already exceeded its targeted retail footprint and is in discussions for a strategic warehouse location in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu.

announcements.company: Deepak Builders and Engineers India Ltd
announcements.subject: Deepak Builders and Engineers India Ltd - 544276 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has emerged as the lowest (L1) bidder for a residential project valued at ₹474.25 crore at the Indian Oil Panipat Refinery Township in Haryana. The project involves constructing 12 high-rise residential buildings with advanced monolithic construction technology, including parking, sewerage treatment plant, and internal roads. Upon formal award, the company's total order book is expected to reach approximately ₹32,000 crore, enhancing its revenue visibility. This L1 status highlights the company's capabilities in executing large-scale infrastructure projects for marquee clients.

announcements.subject: Dalmia Bharat Ltd - 542216 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - General Update
announcements.detail: Please find attached an update.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Dalmia Bharat Limited has provided an update regarding a breakdown in one of its three kilns at Rajgangpur, Odisha, which occurred on March 13, 2026. This kiln is crucial for supplying clinker to grinding units in Odisha, West Bengal, and Jharkhand. Following repairs, the kiln was successfully relit on March 27, 2026, and operations have since stabilized. Due to the 14-day disruption and existing low inventory levels, cement sales in key eastern markets were impacted by approximately 2.5 to 3.0 Lac Tons in March 2026. The company is taking measures to normalize supply chains and regrets any disruption to channel partners during this peak demand period. While not considered a material event under SEBI regulations, this update is being provided voluntarily out of caution.

announcements.subject: Setco Automotive Ltd - 505075 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') And Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On March 28, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') and Outcome of the Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Setco Automotive Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the sale of its stake in its material subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited (SASPL). The company will sell 4,47,847 equity shares, representing approximately 41% of SASPL's paid-up share capital on a fully diluted basis, to RSB Transmissions (I) Limited for approximately INR 185 Crores. This consideration is subject to adjustments based on SASPL's net debt and working capital position as of the closing date. Additionally, Setco Automotive Limited may receive deferred consideration upon the achievement of EBITDA-linked milestones, as outlined in the Share Subscription and Purchase Agreement (SPSSA). The company has also executed a Deed of Indemnity and an Undertaking related to these transactions. The Board also approved a Shareholders’ Agreement to govern the rights and obligations of the parties involved. The company will retain the balance 2,62,153 equity shares in SASPL, representing approximately 24% of the paid-up share capital.

announcements.subject: EPL Ltd - 500135 - Board Meeting Outcome for Scheme Of Amalgamation Of Indovida India Private Limited With EPL Limited And Their Respective Shareholders
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company has, at its meeting held today i.e. on March 29, 2026, inter alia considered and approved the Scheme of amalgamation (by way of merger by absorption) of Indovida India Private Limited with EPL Limited and their respective shareholders ('Scheme'), along with the execution of requisite agreements in relation to the Scheme, details of which are enclosed as a part of the intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: EPL Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 29, 2026, has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation by way of merger by absorption of Indovida India Private Limited with EPL Limited and their respective shareholders. This merger will be executed on a going concern basis under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The consideration for the merger will be the issuance and allotment of equity shares of EPL Limited to the shareholders of Indovida India, based on a stipulated share exchange ratio. The company has also approved the execution of a Merger Implementation Agreement with Indovida India and Indorama Netherlands B.V., a Shareholders’ Agreement, and a Transition Services Agreement. The merger is subject to various statutory and regulatory approvals, including from the Stock Exchanges, SEBI, shareholders and creditors of both companies, the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), and the Competition Commission of India (CCI).

announcements.subject: Midwest Gold Ltd - 526570 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of Equity Shares On Preferential Basis
announcements.detail: Allotment of equity shares on Preferential basis
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Midwest Gold Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 29, 2026, approved the allotment of 4,50,750 equity shares at a price of Rs. 2,000 per share on a preferential basis. These shares, with a face value of Rs. 10 each, are being allotted to proposed allottees in the Promoter, Promoter Group, and Non-Promoter Public categories. The total consideration received for this allotment is not explicitly stated as a lump sum but can be calculated from the annexure. For instance, Soumya Kukreti, a Promoter, is allotted 2,00,000 shares for Rs. 400,000,000. The company has received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for this issuance on March 25, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's issued and paid-up equity share capital has increased from 1,20,47,946 equity shares to 1,24,98,696 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The company will make an application for listing and trading approval from the stock exchange in due course.

announcements.subject: Medplus Health Services Ltd - 543427 - Update Under Regulation 30 Read With Para A Part A Of Schedule III Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 read with Para A Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: MedPlus Health Services Limited's subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, has received a three-day suspension order for a drug license for a store located in Parkal Main Road, Telangana. The order was issued by the Assistant Director, Drugs Control Administration, Warangal, Telangana, and was received on March 28, 2026. This suspension is due to alleged violations of Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945. The company estimates a potential revenue loss of Rs 0.60 lacs as a result of this suspension. This information is being disclosed as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD -PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 and SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/CIR/P/2024/185.

announcements.subject: NLC India Ltd - 513683 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 And 51 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: NLC India Limited has announced the commencement of coal production from the Pachwara South Open Cast Project on March 29, 2026. This coal block, located in Dumka District, Jharkhand, was allotted to the company by the Ministry of Coal on October 3, 2016, and has an estimated extractable coal reserve of 264.84 million tonnes with a normative mining capacity of 9 million tonnes per annum. The project is crucial for meeting the fuel requirements of the 3 x 660 MW Ghatampur Thermal Power Plant being established by Neyveli Uttar Pradesh Power Limited (NUPPL), a joint venture between NLC India Limited and U.P. Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited, where NLC India Limited holds a 51% equity stake. Overburden removal for the project had commenced on December 19, 2025.

announcements.subject: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd - 539787 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding the execution of the (i) Second Amendment Agreement to the Share Purchase Agreement entered into for the acquisition of shares of Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited ("Vizag Hospital") by the Company from the Selling Shareholders and (ii) Second Amendment Agreement to the Shareholders Agreement by and between the Company, Vizag Hospital and its Continuing Shareholders.
announcements.ai_summary: HealthCare Global Enterprises Limited has executed a Second Amendment Agreement to the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) for the acquisition of shares in Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited. This amendment, dated March 29, 2026, extends the Second Closing Date by three weeks. The original SPA, entered into on June 28, 2024, and amended on October 01, 2024, stipulated that the company would acquire an additional 34% of Vizag Hospital's equity share capital within 18 months of the First Closing Date, which was October 2, 2024. This extension means HealthCare Global Enterprises Limited will now acquire the additional 34% stake prior to 18 months and 3 weeks from the First Closing Date. The company has also entered into a Second Amendment Agreement to the Shareholders Agreement with Vizag Hospital and its Continuing Shareholders.

announcements.subject: IFCI Ltd - 500106 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR - Order passed by the Hon''ble NCLT dated 12.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: IFCI Limited has received a copy of a Petition filed by the Union of India through the Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) before the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Principal Bench, New Delhi. This filing is pursuant to an order dated March 12, 2026, passed by the Hon’ble NCLT. The company received parts of the communication on March 23, 2026, and March 24, 2026, though several other mentioned documents have not yet been obtained. The company is providing these details in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: CMS Info Systems Ltd - 543441 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media release with title "CMS info Systems strengthens ATM Management Solutions Platform through acquisition of FSS''s Managed Services business".
announcements.ai_summary: CMS Info Systems Limited has announced the acquisition of the ATM Managed Services business of Financial Software and Systems Private Limited (FSS) for a purchase consideration of up to ₹115 crores. This transaction, expected to close in Q1 FY27, involves the transfer of operating assets and novation of customer contracts. The acquisition is expected to add approximately 8,000 units and new private sector banking relationships to CMS's platform. This move aligns with CMS's publicly stated consolidation strategy and its 2030 goals, aiming to become a platform of choice for banks seeking larger, more capable partners in the consolidating managed services industry. The company will upload this media release on its website, www.cms.com.

announcements.subject: Syngene International Ltd - 539268 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The company has received an order dated February 6, 2026, which gives effect to a previous order passed by the National Faceless Appeal Centre (NFAC) for Assessment Year (AY) 2016-17. This order is related to tax litigations previously intimated to the stock exchanges, including a Writ Petition filed before the Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka concerning the adjustment of refunds for AY 2010-11 and AY 2011-12 against outstanding demands, and the non-issue of a refund for AY 2012-13. The Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka had previously allowed the company's Writ Petition, and the NFAC has now partially allowed the company's appeal for AY 2016-17. Further details are provided in Form A as required by SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Letter of Award from Telangana Power Generation Corporation Limited
announcements.ai_summary: CMS Info Systems Ltd has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from Telangana Power Generation Corporation Limited for the setting up of a 750 MWh (187.5 MW for 4 hours) BESS Plant at Choutuppal. The order is for a domestic entity and is to be executed within 18 months from the signing of the BESPA. The broad consideration for the order is based on a tariff of Rs. 3.14 lakh/MW/Month for the 187.5 MW capacity, with an estimated project cost of Rs. 1057.09 Cr. Coal India Limited is required to submit the necessary documents within 15 days and thereafter sign the BESPA, along with submitting a Performance Bank Guarantee (PBG). There is no interest of the promoter, promoter group, or group companies in the entity awarding the order.

announcements.subject: TVS Holdings Ltd - 520056 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: On March 28, 2026, TVS Holdings Limited (formerly Sundaram-Clayton Limited) subscribed to and was allotted an additional 229,139,017 equity shares of ₹10/- each in Home Credit India Finance Private Limited (HCIFPL), a subsidiary of the company. This acquisition's aggregate cost exceeds the materiality threshold specified under SEBI LODR Regulations. HCIFPL is a non-deposit-taking non-banking financial company registered with the RBI, categorized as a middle layer NBFC, engaged in providing loans to the retail segment for consumer durables and cash loans, and offering non-credit value-added services. The company is making this disclosure in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd - 507514 - Update On License Suspension - Disclosure / Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015
announcements.detail: Update on License Suspension - Disclosure/intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation
announcements.ai_summary: Som Distilleries & Breweries Limited provided an update on its license suspension, stating that there has been no change in the status since their press release on February 5, 2026. The company's petition seeking validation of the license was not favorably considered by the Single Bench of the Hon’ble Madhya Pradesh High Court on March 23, 2026. Subsequently, on March 24, 2026, the company approached the Double Bench, which granted relief by permitting their associate company to participate in the country liquor tender process. The final order in this matter is still awaited. The company is making all necessary efforts to resolve the deadlock and will promptly communicate any material developments.

announcements.subject: S.A.L. Steel Ltd - 532604 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 28.03.2026 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on 28.03.2026 - Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of S.A.L. Steel Ltd. met on March 28, 2026, and approved availing credit facilities from YES Bank Limited. The company will borrow Rs. 1,50,00,00,000 (Rupees One Hundred Fifty Crore Only) by way of a Working Capital Facility, including a Cash Credit Limit, as per the bank's sanction letter dated March 25, 2026. These funds will be utilized for working capital requirements. The borrowing is secured by the hypothecation of current assets and all movable fixed assets (present and future) of the company, excluding those exclusively financed by other banks. Additionally, an equitable mortgage will be created on the industrial property located at Survey No. 245, Village Bharapar, Tal. Gandhidham, Kutch Dist., Gujarat – 382721. The facility is further secured by unconditional and irrevocable personal guarantees from Mahesh Kumar Agarwal and Kaustubh Agarwal, and a corporate guarantee from Sree Metaliks Limited, all valid during the tenor of the facility. The Managing Director, Shri Mahesh Kumar Agarwal, has been authorized to execute all necessary documents and filings to complete the transaction.

announcements.subject: HFCL Ltd - 500183 - Issuance Of Corporate Guarantee On Behalf Of HTL Limited, A Subsidiary Of The Company ('HTL')
announcements.detail:
We would like to inform all our stakeholders that the Company has today given a Corporate Guarantee in favour of Axis Finance Limited, to secure the rupee term loan facility availed/to be availed by HTL, to the extent of Rs.30 Crore.

The Company holds 74% of the paid-up share capital of HTL, while the remaining 26% is owned by the Government of India. HTL is engaged in the manufacturing of Optical Fiber Cables ('OFC') and providing passive connectivity ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of HFCL Ltd. has approved the issuance of a Corporate Guarantee on behalf of its subsidiary, HTL Limited. This guarantee is to secure a rupee term loan facility of Rs. 30 Crore availed or to be availed by HTL from Axis Finance Limited. HFCL Ltd. holds a 74% stake in HTL, with the remaining 26% owned by the Government of India. HTL is involved in the manufacturing of Optical Fiber Cables and passive connectivity solutions, as well as key raw materials for OFC and electrical wiring interconnect solutions for aerospace, defence, automotive, and industrial sectors. The transaction is considered to be at arm's length, with no other promoter or group company interest beyond HFCL's shareholding in HTL. This guarantee will be disclosed as a contingent liability in the company's financial statements.

announcements.subject: Simplex Castings Ltd - 513472 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please find the Intimation regarding Allotment of Equity Shares on Preferential Basis Dated: 28th March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Simplex Castings Ltd announced on March 28, 2026, the allotment of 4,20,043 fully paid-up Equity Shares of face value ₹10 each on a preferential basis. The issue price per share is ₹494/-, including a premium of ₹484/-, aggregating to ₹20,75,01,242/-. The shares have been allotted to India Emerging Giants Fund Limited (4,04,860 shares), Priya Amar Shah (5,061 shares), Amar Jayantkumar Shah (5,061 shares), and Sushil kumar Singh (5,061 shares). This allotment was approved by shareholders on March 2, 2026, and received in-principle approval from BSE Limited on March 16, 2026. The company will apply for listing and trading approval in due course.

announcements.subject: India Cements Ltd - 530005 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Updates
announcements.detail: Update on Scheme of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: The India Cements Ltd announced on March 28, 2026, that the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, ICL Financial Services Limited, ICL International Limited, ICL Securities Limited, and India Cements Infrastructures Limited, with the Company has been made effective. This follows the receipt of the certified copy of the order sanctioning the Scheme from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench. The Scheme is effective from March 28, 2026, with an Appointed Date of January 1, 2025. All assets and liabilities of the transferor companies have been transferred to India Cements Ltd, and the four transferor companies stand dissolved without winding up.

announcements.subject: Shradha AI Technologies Ltd - 543976 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: The Company has divested its 45.00% equity Shareholding in Moodscope AI Pvt Ltd (Subsidiary Co. of the Co.) on 28.03.2026.Consequently, the Moodscope AI Pvt Ltd ceased to be the Subsidiary Co. of the Co.
announcements.ai_summary: Shradha AI Technologies Ltd announced on March 28, 2026, that it has divested its 45.00% equity shareholding in Moodscope AI Private Limited. Consequently, Moodscope AI Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Shradha AI Technologies Ltd, effective from March 28, 2026. This divestment was previously discussed and approved in the company's 4th Board Meeting of FY 2025-26 held on February 7, 2026.

announcements.subject: Ramky Infrastructure Ltd - 533262 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Has Approve The Sale Of Shares Held Y RIL In Visakha Pharmacity Limited
announcements.detail: Board has approve the sale of shares held y RIL in Visakha Pharmacity Limited
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Ramky Infrastructure Limited (RIL) met on March 28, 2026, and approved the sale of shares held by RIL in Visakha Pharmacity Limited (VPCL) to Brij Gopal Construction Company Private Limited (BGCCPL). The Managing Director and CFO have been authorized to finalize the terms and execute the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA). This decision aligns with the approval received from shareholders via a postal ballot on January 28, 2024. Further details required by SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015 will be provided after the SPA is signed. The meeting commenced at 05:45 PM and concluded at 06:15 PM.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On March 28, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of IIRM Holdings India Ltd, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the issuance of a corporate guarantee in favor of its material wholly-owned subsidiary, India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited ("India Insure"). This corporate guarantee is for an amount of Rs. 65 crores, plus interest, and will serve as security for the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) by India Insure. The facility has a tenure of 4 years from the date of the first disbursement. The transaction is at arm's length, and the promoter/promoter group/group companies have no interest in it. The Board also approved the sale, disposal, and lease of assets of the material subsidiary, amounting to more than twenty percent of its assets on an aggregate basis, subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Rain Industries Limited - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition Of Shares
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited - Disclosure under Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition of Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Nivee Holdings Private Limited, a promoter of Rain Industries Limited, has acquired 4,000 equity shares of the company on March 27, 2026, from the open market. This acquisition represents 0.0012% of the total voting capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this acquisition.

announcements.subject: PG Electroplast Ltd - 533581 - Approval For Disbursement Of 3Rd Tranche Of Incentive Under Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme For White Goods
announcements.detail: Approval for disbursement of 3rd tranche of incentive under Production Linked incentive (PLI) Scheme for the White Goods
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of PG Electroplast Ltd has approved the disbursement of the 3rd tranche of incentive under the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods. PG Technoplast Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary, received a sanction letter dated March 27, 2026, from IFCI Limited for this incentive. The approved amount is Rs. 37,50,00,000 (Rupees Thirty-Seven Crore Fifty Lakhs only), which is for the Determined Sales Value of FY 2024-25 under the PLI Scheme for Air Conditioner, LED Lights Motors, and Display Panel (LCD/LED). The acceptance of this sanction was confirmed on March 28, 2026. This disclosure will be hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 20,09,70,560 equity shares on conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants & consequential changes in the paid-up equity share capital
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Ltd's Board of Directors, through a resolution passed by circulation on March 28, 2026, has allotted 20,09,70,560 equity shares. These shares were allotted on the conversion of 2,00,97,056 Fully Convertible Warrants, with a face value of ₹ 1/- each, to allottees belonging to the 'Promoter Group' and 'Non-Promoter, Public Category'. The allotment was made upon receipt of the balance amount of ₹ 84,70,90,910.40, at a price of ₹ 42.15 per warrant. This conversion follows the sub-division of shares from ₹ 10 to ₹ 1 face value, effective December 16, 2024. Consequent to this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹ 836,85,87,325 to ₹ 856,95,57,885.

announcements.subject: Magna Electro Castings Ltd-$ - 517449 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 28Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed the Outcome of Board Meeting held on 28th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Magna Electro Castings Ltd held a Board of Directors meeting on March 28, 2026, from 4:45 PM to 5:40 PM. During this meeting, the Board considered and approved the Annual Operating Budget and Capital Expenditure Budget for the Financial Year 2026-27. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Ram Ratna Wires Ltd-$ - 522281 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') - Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation regarding capacity addition pursuant to Reg 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Ram Ratna Wires Ltd announced a significant capacity expansion and process enhancement at its manufacturing units in Silvassa. The Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved a capital expenditure of approximately Rs. 86 Crores for this initiative. This expansion will add 3,600 MT/Annum to the existing capacity of 45,500 MT/Annum, which is currently utilized at around 80%. The company aims to complete this addition within 12 months, by March 2027, to meet increasing demand and improve processes. The investment will be financed through internal accruals and debt.

announcements.subject: Oberoi Realty Ltd - 533273 - Execution Of Development Agreement In Respect Of Lands Situated At Peddar Road, Mumbai
announcements.detail: Execution of Development Agreement in respect of lands situated at Peddar Road, Mumbai
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Oberoi Realty Ltd announced on March 28, 2026, that it has executed a Development Agreement for the redevelopment of lands situated at Peddar Road, Mumbai. The agreement is with two adjacent housing societies located on M.L. Dahanukar Marg and Dr. G. Deshmukh Marg. The total land area involved in this redevelopment project is approximately 4,800 square meters, subject to set-back areas. The company's estimated entitlement of free sale component from this project is up to 1.40 lakh square feet (RERA Carpet area). This entitlement is subject to the provisions of the Development Control & Promotion Regulations for Greater Mumbai, 2034, and other applicable laws. This development agreement signifies a strategic expansion of the company's real estate portfolio in a prime Mumbai location.

announcements.subject: Interarch Building Solutions Ltd - 544232 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI(LODR) Regulations,2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI(LODR) Regulations,2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Interarch Building Solutions Ltd announced that its shareholders approved key resolutions via postal ballot on March 27, 2026. These resolutions include approving a variation in the objects of a previous issue, appointing Mr. Manish Kumar Garg as an Executive Director, and crucially, approving the raising of funds through a Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP). This QIP will allow the company to issue equity shares to eligible institutional investors, which is a significant step for its future funding and operational plans. The company is now proceeding with the necessary steps to implement these shareholder-approved decisions.

announcements.subject: SPML Infra Ltd - 500402 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: SPML Infra Ltd's Board of Directors, during their meeting on March 28, 2026, identified several Senior Managerial Personnel (SMPs) as part of their annual review of the organization structure. This identification is based on changes in reporting lines to the Managing Director and their respective roles and functions within the company, in accordance with Regulation 16(1)(d) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The identified SMPs are Mr. Malay Kanti Chakraborti (Executive Vice President), Mr. Samir Maheshbhai Patel (Chief Operating & Technical Officer), Mr. Sumit Bhattacharya (Chief Human Resource Officer), Mr. Subhakar Rudra (Chief Technology Officer), and Mr. Partha Roy (Chief Legal Officer).

announcements.subject: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd - 533155 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') - Business Update
announcements.detail: Please find attached Intimation regarding Business Update
announcements.ai_summary: Jubilant FoodWorks Limited has issued a business update regarding supply constraints on commercial LPG distribution across India due to the ongoing geopolitical situation in the Middle East. This has led to a constrained supply of LPG cylinders to certain parts of the company's store network, although the operational impact is currently limited and being actively managed. The company is implementing measures to conserve LPG and is transitioning to alternative energy sources such as electricity and piped natural gas (PNG). Jubilant FoodWorks is in continuous dialogue with oil marketing companies to stay informed about the evolving situation and to adapt its operational strategies accordingly. The company emphasizes its resilient systems and processes to manage short-term operational challenges.

announcements.subject: Rnit Ai Solutions Ltd - 517286 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of 52,66,537 Equity Shares Of Face Value ?10/- Each On A Preferential Basis To Strategic Investors Forming Part Of The Public (Non-Promoter) Category At A Price Of ?50/- Per Share (?10/- Face Value And ?40/- Premium Per Share).
announcements.detail: Allotment of 52,66,537 (Fifty-Two Lakh Sixty-Six Thousand Five Hundred and Thirty-Seven) equity shares of face value ?10/- each on a preferential basis to strategic investors forming part of the Public (Non-Promoter) Category at a price of ?50/- per share (?10/- face value and ?40/- premium per share).
announcements.ai_summary: RNIT AI Solutions Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the allotment of 52,66,537 equity shares to strategic investors. These shares, with a face value of ₹10 each, are being allotted on a preferential basis to entities within the Public (Non-Promoter) Category. The issue price for these shares is ₹50 per share, comprising ₹10 face value and ₹40 premium per share. This allotment is in furtherance of the Resolution Plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Jaipur Bench, on September 23, 2024. The list of allottees includes Sageone-Flagship Growth OE Fund, Anupama K Katkar, Chhaya S Katkar, Sanjay Katkar, Visionary Vibes Consultancy Private Limited, Sunil Aggarwal, and Augmenta Value Trust - Scheme 1, among others.

announcements.subject: NTPC Green Energy Ltd - 544289 - NTPC Green Energy Limited Has Informed The Exchange About Declaration Of Commercial Operation Of Third And Last Part Capacity Of 75 MW Out Of 500 MW Bhadla Solar PV Project Located In Phalodi, Rajasthan Of NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, A Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of NTPC Green Energy Limited, Is Declared On Commercial Operation W.E.F. 25.03.2026.
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited announced the declaration of commercial operation for the third and last part capacity of 75 MW from the 500 MW Bhadla Solar PV Project in Phalodi, Rajasthan. This project is undertaken by NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Green Energy Limited. The commercial operation is effective from March 25, 2026. This addition brings the total commercial capacity of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group to 9,802.68 MW, an increase from its previous capacity of 9,727.68 MW. The company received the certificate for this declaration from Rajasthan Renewable Energy Corporation Limited on March 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: Adf Foods Ltd-$ - 519183 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - Commencement Of Commercial Production.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 w.r.t. Commencement of Commercial Production at the Company''s new Green Field manufacturing facility at Surat.
announcements.ai_summary: ADF Foods Limited has commenced commercial production at its new Greenfield manufacturing facility located at Gujarat Agro Infrastructure Mega Food Park, Mangrol, Surat. This commencement of production took place on March 28, 2026. The new facility has a potential installed capacity of 10,000 MT per annum and involved an investment of approximately Rs. 90 crore in Phase 1. This expansion is intended to cater to both international and domestic markets, aiming to strengthen the company's production capabilities, improve operational efficiencies, and support future growth plans. The information has been made available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd - 544209 - Announcemnt Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Bansal Wire Industries Limited has informed the exchange regarding temporary disruption in supply of natural gas to our manufacturing facilities due to prevaling geopolitical situation
announcements.ai_summary: Bansal Wire Industries Limited has informed the stock exchanges about a temporary disruption in the supply of natural gas to its manufacturing facilities. This disruption is a consequence of ongoing geopolitical tensions in the West Asian region, leading to restrictions from Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs) due to a force majeure situation. As a result, the company's production capacity has been impacted by 35% since mid-March. Bansal Wire Industries Limited is implementing measures such as enhancing the operationalization of electric furnaces and using alternative heating systems to mitigate the impact and ensure operational continuity. The company is coordinating with natural gas distribution partners and relevant authorities to restore affected production capacity and minimize adverse financial effects.

announcements.subject: Urban Company Ltd - 544515 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled- Urban Company''s ''Instahelp'' Crosses 1 Million Monthly Delivered Bookings; Becomes Fastest-Growing Vertical in Company History"
announcements.ai_summary: Urban Company Limited announced that its quick-service housekeeping vertical, InstaHelp, has achieved over 1 million monthly delivered bookings as of March 28, 2026, making it the fastest-growing vertical in the company's history. This milestone follows the reporting of over 50,000 daily orders in February 2026. InstaHelp is currently operational in Mumbai, Bengaluru, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, and Pune, offering services like cleaning, dishwashing, laundry, and meal preparation within 10-15 minutes of booking. The company's CEO & Co-founder, Abhiraj Singh Bhal, highlighted the strong consumer trust in the platform for immediate, everyday needs. Urban Company Limited is a technology-driven platform connecting customers with professionals for home and beauty services.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail:
We hereby certify that our Company has made timely payment of interest amount in respect of the Secured Redeemable NCDs issued by our Company through Public Issue and listed on the Stock Exchanges.

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has certified the timely payment of interest on its Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued through a public issue and listed on the stock exchanges. For the NCD series with ISIN INE148I07NN5, an interest amount of Rs. 0.0480 lacs was due on March 28, 2026, and was paid on March 27, 2026. For the NCD series with ISIN INE148I07ND6, an interest amount of Rs. 5.30658 lacs was due on March 28, 2026, and was paid on March 27, 2026. Both payments were made on time, with the last interest payment date being February 28, 2026. This certification is in compliance with Regulation 57 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bhageria Industries Ltd - 530803 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Update
announcements.detail: 7 MW Solar Power Project commissioned under the MSKVY 2.0
announcements.ai_summary: Bhageria Industries Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Rahuri Cleantech Private Limited, has successfully commissioned a 7 MW Solar Photovoltaic (PV) Power Plant located at Bhatkudgaon, Taluka Shevgaon, District Ahilyanagar, Maharashtra, on March 27, 2026. This commissioning is part of the aggregate 32 MW capacity being developed under the Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana (MSKVY) 2.0 scheme. The project is grid-connected and is now operational. The commissioning of this solar power plant enhances Bhageria Industries' renewable energy portfolio and supports its sustainability initiatives.

announcements.subject: Sagar Cements Ltd-$ - 502090 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 26, 2026 for Sreekanth Reddy Sammidi
announcements.ai_summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding "Opening of New Branches"
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited will be opening two new branches on March 30, 2026. The first branch will be located at Sri Basawa Square, Gandhi Nagar 2nd Cross, Ballari, Karnataka -583 101. The second branch will be situated at S.No.2739, T.P.No.2, Plot No.417, Shop No.G/4,G/5,G/6,Ground Floor “Radhasoami Sulay” Opp to Fire Station Sardar Gunj, Baliyadev Chowkdi,Vyayam Shala Road Anand, Gujarat – 388 001. Additionally, a third branch will open at No.8/139 A3, Sooranayakkanpatti Street, Pandalkudi, Aruppukottai Taluk Virudhunagar District, Tamilnadu – 626 113. This expansion is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bharti Hexacom Ltd - 544162 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The Department of Telecommunications (DoT) has issued a notice to Bharti Hexacom Ltd imposing a penalty of Rs.264,000. This penalty is for alleged violations of subscriber verification norms as identified during a Customer Application Form Audit for the quarter ending December 2025. The company is required to ensure adequate customer verification before enrolling subscribers as per its license agreement. Bharti Hexacom Limited received this notice on March 27, 2026. The company is evaluating the details of the alleged violations.

announcements.subject: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd - 544344 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Certificate of registration of the Special Resolution confirming alteration of Object Clause (s)
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has officially altered its Memorandum of Association (MOA) by substituting the existing sub-clause (1) of Clause III with a new sub-clause (1) of Clause III(A). This alteration was approved by the company's shareholders through a special resolution via postal ballot. The Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) has confirmed this change, issuing a certificate of alteration on March 27, 2026. The updated MOA now encompasses a broader scope for the company's business, including the design, development, manufacturing, assembly, and dealing in a wide array of automotive and engine components, such as pistons, piston rings, cylinder liners, engine valves, gaskets, and various types of gears. This expansion also covers components for internal combustion engines, steam engines, compressors, and other machinery, reflecting a strategic move to broaden its operational activities.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Ltd - 500032 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 988937706 Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Rs.1/- each at par on preferential basis on conversion of loan in accordance with the Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Ltd has allotted 98,89,37,706 Series A 0.01% Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Re. 1/- each, at par, on a preferential basis. This allotment, aggregating to Rs. 98.89 Crores, is a conversion of loan in accordance with the "Resolution Plan" and a Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026. The Committee of Directors approved this allotment in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, which commenced at 12:45 P.M. and concluded at 01:00 P.M. The allotment for one remaining lender will be completed upon their loan conversion process.

announcements.subject: Glen Industries Ltd - 544444 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Reglation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 - Acquisition of Shares by Promoter and Promoter Group
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Glen Industries Limited has announced that Lalit Agrawal (HUF), part of the Promoter Group, acquired 1,200 equity shares of the company on March 27, 2026. The acquisition was made from public shareholders at a prevailing market price of Rs. 65/- per share, aggregating to Rs. 78,000.00/-. Following this acquisition, the total shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group has increased from 73.42% to 73.43% of the total paid-up equity share capital. This acquisition was completed in compliance with minimum public shareholding requirements.

announcements.subject: Avantel Ltd - 532406 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Supply Order worth of Rs.137.12 Cr from the India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Avantel Limited has received a Supply Order worth Rs. 137.12 Crores (exclusive of taxes) from the India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India. The order is for the supply, warranty, and comprehensive annual maintenance contract (COAMC) of seven (7) Wind Profiler Systems. The order includes a 5% Performance Bank Guarantee, a three (3) year warranty, and seven (7) years of COAMC. The execution of this order is expected by September 2027.

announcements.subject: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd - 544333 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 28, 2026 for Katragadda Venkata Ramani
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Exchange has received disclosures regarding the reasons for encumbrance by promoter Katragadda Venkata Ramani. These disclosures are made under Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, and were received on March 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 544319 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 28, 2026
announcements.detail: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding outcome of Board meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the allotment of 11,70,000 warrants convertible into equity shares. Each warrant carries the right to subscribe to one equity share at an exercise price of ₹812/- per warrant. The company has received ₹203/- per warrant, which is 25% of the issue price, amounting to ₹23,75,10,000/- as warrant subscription price from the allottees. The total value of the warrants, upon full exercise, will aggregate to ₹95,00,40,000/-. These warrants are allotted on a preferential basis and will be subject to lock-in restrictions as per SEBI ICDR Regulations. The board meeting commenced at 11:45 A.M. and concluded at 12:07 P.M.

announcements.subject: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd - 544080 - Intimation For Sale Of Equity Shares By The Promoter Under Sr. No. 7 (Ii) Of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/Pod2/P/CIR/2023/18 Dated February 03, 2023 Of Manner Of Achieving Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS)
announcements.detail: Intimation for sale of Equity shares by M/s MP Entertainment and Developers Private Limited, part of the Promoter Group, pursuant to the compliance of MPS Requirements.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Limited has provided prior intimation regarding the sale of equity shares by M/s MP Entertainment and Developers Private Limited, a part of the Promoter Group. This sale is intended to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements, as the promoter group's shareholding increased beyond permissible limits due to an Open Offer by Century 21 Officespace Private Limited. The sale will be conducted in the open market to ensure the company maintains the prescribed public shareholding levels as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 03, 2023. The company had attempted to upload this intimation on the previous day but faced a technical failure.

announcements.subject: Cords Cable Industries Ltd - 532941 - Intimation Of Inclusion Of Naveen Sawhney HUF In Promoter Group
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Reg 30 and other applicable provisions of SEBI (LODR) Reg, 2015, We hereby inform you that Naveen Sawhney HUF represented by its Karta Mr. Naveen Sawhney, Promoter of the company has been included in the "Promoter Group" of  the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cords Cable Industries Limited has announced the inclusion of Naveen Sawhney HUF, represented by its Karta Mr. Naveen Sawhney, into the "Promoter Group" of the company. This inclusion is in accordance with the definition of "Promoter Group" under SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. Naveen Sawhney HUF holds 12,700 equity shares, representing 0.098% of the company's total voting capital, as of March 27, 2026. This inclusion does not result in any change in the control or management of the company.

announcements.subject: Crizac Ltd - 544439 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Strategic in-house development of AI-based Education Technology Platform"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Crizac Limited is strategically developing an AI-based Education Technology Platform named EduMentor through in-house development, committing $2.5 million over a five-year roadmap. This initiative aims to integrate AI and machine learning to create a structured, AI-driven mentorship marketplace connecting prospective students with verified mentors globally. The project is being steered by Chairman and Managing Director Dr. Vikash Agarwal and will be developed under the leadership of IIM Calcutta alumnus Mr. Dishant Kharbanda, who brings nearly two decades of edtech experience. This development signifies Crizac's mission to lead innovation and dominate the Edtech industry.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Read With Regulation 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble Revisional Authority, Ministry of Coal, Government of India, dated March 24, 2026, which was received on March 27, 2026. This order relates to Revision Applications (Nos. 38, 39, and 40 of 2026) filed by Tata Steel Limited challenging demand notices issued by the District Mining Officer, Dhanbad, Jharkhand. The aggregate demand was ₹385.19 crore, alleging excess coal production beyond permissible limits at its collieries in Jharia, Jharkhand, during FY2000-01 to FY2016-17. The Hon’ble Revisional Authority has admitted the Revision Applications for consideration and has directed the State Authorities of Jharkhand not to take any coercive steps against the Company during the pendency of these applications.

announcements.subject: Real Touch Finance Ltd - 538611 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of Non Convertible Debenture (Ncds)
announcements.detail: we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company, vide their resolution passed by circulation today, i.e. Saturday, March 28, 2026, have approved the allotment of 256 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid Non-Convertible Debentures, of face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each at an issue price of Rs. 1,00,000/- each aggregating to INR 2,56,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Fifty-Six Lakhs Only) on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Real Touch Finance Ltd. has approved the allotment of 256 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- and was issued at the same price, aggregating to INR 2,56,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Fifty-Six Lakhs Only). This allotment was approved by the Board of Directors via a resolution passed by circulation on March 28, 2026. This issuance is part of the company's fundraising strategy.

announcements.subject: KNR Constructions Ltd - 532942 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of letter of award
announcements.ai_summary: KNR Constructions Ltd. has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from the National Highways Authority of India on March 27, 2026, for the construction of a 4-laning project. The project involves upgrading NH-167 from Gudebellur to Mahabubnagar in Telangana, covering a length of 80.01 km. The bid project cost for this contract is Rs. 1734.00 Crores. The project will be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM), with a construction period of 730 days and an operation period of 15 years from the Commercial Operation Date (COD).

announcements.subject: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd - 524226 - Commencement Of Commercial Production Of New Maltodextrin Facility At Hubli, Karnataka
announcements.detail: Intimation for Commencement of Commercial Production of New Maltodextrin Facility at Hubli, Karnataka.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd. has successfully commenced commercial production at its new Maltodextrin facility in Hubli, Karnataka, effective March 28, 2026. This expansion increases the company's total installed capacity for Maltodextrin production at Hubli from 7,000 MTPA to 23,000 MTPA. This development is in line with the company's growth strategy and is expected to enhance its market presence in the Maltodextrin segment.

announcements.subject: Tarc Ltd - 543249 - Intimation Of Payment Of Interest On Ncds
announcements.detail: Intimation of payment of interest on NCDs.
announcements.ai_summary: TARC Limited has confirmed the payment of interest on its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with ISIN INE0EK9G0TO5O. The company made an interest payment of Rs. 68,62,39,323 on March 27, 2026, which was the actual payment date, falling before the due date of March 31, 2026. The total issue size of these NCDs was Rs. 409,00,00,000. This payment is being made on a quarterly basis.

announcements.subject: India Finsec Ltd - 535667 - Revised Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the revised Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 20, 2026 for Gopal Bansal HUF
announcements.ai_summary: The promoter, Gopal Bansal HUF, has submitted revised disclosures regarding the reasons for encumbrance of shares. This submission is in accordance with Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The revised disclosures were filed on March 20, 2026. Investors should monitor any further updates or implications arising from these revised disclosures.

announcements.subject: Nilachal Refractories Ltd - 502294 - Draft Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Draft Letter of Offer for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Draft Letter of Offer to BSE for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Limited. The offer is being made by SFAL Speciality Alloys Limited, the Acquirer, to acquire up to 59,83,928 Equity Shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited. The offer price for each equity share is ₹ 22.00, and these shares represent 29.39% of the total voting share capital. The equity shares to be acquired have a face value of ₹ 10/- each. This open offer is being made in accordance with regulations 16(1) and 18(1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Draft Letter of Offer is intended to inform public shareholders about the terms of the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Moschip Technologies Ltd - 532407 - NCLT Hyderabad Approval For Scheme Of Amalgamation Of Softnautics Inc And Softnautics Private Limited With Moschip Technologies Limited.
announcements.detail: Receipt of NCLT Hyderabad order approving  Scheme of Amalgamation of Softnautics Inc and Softnautics Private Limited with MosChip Technologies Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Moschip Technologies Limited has received a certified true copy of the order from the Hon’ble NCLT, Hyderabad Bench, approving the Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of Softnautics Private Limited and Softnautics Inc, which are wholly owned subsidiaries, with Moschip Technologies Limited. The NCLT's approval was granted by its order dated March 25, 2026. The amalgamation is effective from the appointed date of April 04, 2025. Moschip Technologies Limited had previously submitted the required disclosure to the stock exchanges on April 08, 2025, as per SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. The company has enclosed the NCLT order as "Annexure – A" for the records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Thermax Ltd - 500411 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Thermax Limited has submitted Press Release regarding conclusion of order by its wholly owned subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Thermax Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Thermax Babcock & Wilcox Energy Solutions Limited (TBWES), has secured a significant boiler package supply order valued at approximately Rs. 1,600 crore. This order is for a 1x800 MW ultra-supercritical thermal power plant being developed by a leading thermal power projects company in Central India. The scope of work encompasses manufacturing, supply, installation supervision, commissioning, and performance testing of the boiler package. The execution of this order will be managed in alignment with the project milestones and delivery schedules stipulated in the contract. This order represents a breakthrough for Thermax, reinforcing its expertise in large-scale energy solutions and its commitment to delivering projects with accelerated timelines and successful execution.

announcements.subject: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd - 544407 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015- Execution Of Share Purchase Agreements And Shareholders Agreement
announcements.detail: Intimation is attached
announcements.ai_summary: Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 1) and a Shareholders' Agreement with Itochu Corporation and its subsidiary, Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL), on March 27, 2026. Through this agreement, Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited will sell 10% of the equity stake in ATPL, representing 5,000 equity shares of INR 10 each, to Itochu Corporation for an aggregate consideration of INR 80,32,00,000 (Indian Rupees Eighty Crores Thirty Two lakhs Only). Following this transaction, Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited will continue to hold an 86% equity stake in ATPL, down from its current 96%. The agreement includes significant terms such as special rights for Itochu, including the right to appoint directors and a first right to share subscription, and indemnification clauses for Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Updates On Fibromun And Nidlegy
announcements.detail: Updates on Fibromun and Nidlegy
announcements.ai_summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has provided clinical updates on its drug candidates, Fibromun and Nidlegy, from its partner Philogen. The Phase II FLASH study for Fibromun in soft tissue sarcoma did not meet its primary endpoint for Progression Free Survival (PFS). Similarly, the Phase II GLIOSTAR trial for glioblastoma also did not meet its primary endpoint, although an improvement in survival was observed in a subgroup of patients with limited exposure to alkylating agents. The company remains committed to the GLIOSUN trial for treatment-naïve glioblastoma patients, which is initiating its dose expansion phase, and the GLIOSTELLA study, which is expected to report survival data in September 2026. Following encouraging signals from the FIBROSARC study, a request for Parallel Scientific Advice with the FDA and EMA has been submitted to define the design of a new Phase III registrational study, FIBROSARC-2, planned to start in the second quarter of 2026.

announcements.subject: Cigniti Technologies Ltd - 534758 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 -Reservation Of Order Of Second Motion Petition By The Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal ('NCLT')
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Cigniti Technologies Limited has announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has reserved its order for formal pronouncement regarding the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with and into Coforge Limited. This reservation of order took place on March 27, 2026. The statutory authorities have also indicated their no-objection to the sanctioning of the Scheme. Cigniti Technologies Limited, which is a Coforge Company, had previously made several disclosures related to this amalgamation, starting from December 27, 2024. The company will provide further notification to the stock exchanges and update its website once the NCLT order is received.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Receipt Of All Regulatory Approvals For The Proposed Transaction - Preferential Issue Of Equity Shares And Warrants
announcements.detail:
We wish to inform that all regulatory approvals have now been received with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited by Avenir Investment RSC Limited which is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC. The Company and the Investor are now engaged to conclude the Proposed Transaction at the earliest.

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has announced that all regulatory approvals have been received for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Limited, which is owned by International Holding Company PJSC. This transaction involves a preferential issue of equity shares and warrants. The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has approved applications made by Sammaan Asset Management Limited (SAML), a wholly-owned subsidiary, under the SEBI (Portfolio Managers) Regulations, 2020, and SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012. The investor, Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, proposes to invest approximately INR 8,849,99,99,794/-. Upon completion of the preferential issue, the investor is expected to hold approximately 41.2% of the company's paid-up equity share capital, potentially increasing to 63.3% after an open offer. The company and the investor are now working to conclude the transaction.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 - Reservation Of Order Of Second Motion Petition By The Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal ('NCLT')
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has reserved its order for formal pronouncement concerning the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with and into Coforge Limited. This reservation of order occurred on March 27, 2026. The statutory authorities have also recorded their no-objection to the sanctioning of the Scheme. Coforge Limited had previously made several disclosures regarding this amalgamation, starting from December 27, 2024. The company will further notify the stock exchanges and make the information available on its website upon receipt of the copy of the NCLT order.

announcements.subject: One 97 Communications Ltd - 543396 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Loan waiver by other Shareholder in First Games Technology Private Limited; no financial impact on the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: The step-down subsidiary of One 97 Communications Limited, First Games Technology Private Limited (FGTPL), has had its outstanding loan of approximately ₹142 Crore, including accrued interest, waived by its shareholder, AGTech Media Holdings Limited. This waiver was approved by FGTPL's Board on March 27, 2026. FGTPL had previously discontinued its real money gaming business due to regulatory changes. One 97 Communications Limited had already fully impaired its investment and shareholder loan related to FGTPL, therefore, this loan waiver will have no adverse financial impact on the company. The disclosure was made on March 27, 2026, and the details are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: UNO Minda Ltd-$ - 532539 - Disclosure Under Sub-Para 20 Of Para A Of Part A Of Schedule III Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Related To Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Please Refer the attached file for disclosure of penalty order received by Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: Minda Westport Technologies Limited (MWTL), a subsidiary of Uno Minda Limited, has received an order from the Principal Commissioner of Customs (ICD Patparganj), New Delhi, on March 27, 2026. The order pertains to the CTH/HSN misclassification of imported components used in vehicle CNG systems. MWTL has been demanded to pay ₹25,56,79,094/- as tax and an equal amount as penalty, plus applicable interest. MWTL disagrees with the order and plans to file an appeal. The company does not foresee any material impact on its financial or operational activities.

announcements.subject: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd - 539787 - Outcome Of Rights Issue Committee- March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: The Rights Issue Committee at its meeting held today, i.e., March 27, 2026, inter alia, considered and approved the allotment of 82,94,566 Equity Shares of Face Value of Rs. 10 each on Rights Basis to the eligible shareholders and/or renouncee(s) in terms of Letter of Offer dated February 24, 2026, at a price of Rs. 512 per Equity Share (including premium of Rs. 502 per Equity Share).
announcements.ai_summary: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd. has approved the allotment of 82,94,566 Equity Shares, each with a Face Value of Rs. 10, on a rights basis. The allotment was made to eligible shareholders and/or renouncee(s) at a price of Rs. 512 per Equity Share, which includes a premium of Rs. 502 per Equity Share. This decision was made by the Rights Issue Committee at its meeting held on March 27, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from Rs. 141,00,76,370 (14,10,07,637 shares) to Rs. 149,30,22,030 (14,93,02,203 shares).

announcements.subject:
Reliance Communications Ltd - 532712 - Intimation In Accordance With Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of
India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations 2015 related to Central Bureau of Investigation visit on 26th March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Communications Limited has informed the exchanges that officials from the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) conducted a search and seizure operation at the office premises of Reliance Telecom Limited (RTL), a wholly owned subsidiary of the company. The operation took place on March 26, 2026, at RTL's office located in Navi Mumbai. The company and RTL are continuing to operate their businesses as usual. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd - 532966 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today i.e. 27th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Titagarh Rail Systems Limited (TRSL) met on March 27, 2026, and approved the sale of its entire 100% shareholding in Titagarh Singapore Pte. Limited (TSPL), a wholly owned subsidiary. This sale is subject to necessary approvals and is governed by the terms of a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 27, 2026, executed with Worldvmc Singapore Pte. Limited (WSPL). TSPL, incorporated in 2008 for overseas business expansion, has remained dormant and is not part of TRSL's current strategic vision. Upon completion, TSPL will cease to be a subsidiary of TRSL.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has announced that it will present 14 abstracts at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting, scheduled from March 27 to March 31, 2026, in Denver, Colorado. These presentations will highlight advances in Alopecia Areata, Psoriasis, and Acne research, underscoring the company's expertise in dermatology and immunology. Notable presentations include data from a Phase 3b study evaluating ILUMYA® (tildrakizumab-asmn) for moderate-to-severe psoriasis affecting the nails. The data aims to demonstrate the company's commitment to developing safe and effective medications for patients with chronic dermatological conditions.

announcements.subject: Markolines Pavement Technologies Ltd - 543364 - General Updates As To Scheme Of Amalgamation Documents Filed By The Company.
announcements.detail: General updates as to Scheme of Amalgamation documents filed by the Company with BSE and NSE
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Markolines Pavement Technologies Limited has provided an update regarding its Scheme of Amalgamation with Markolines Infra Limited. The company has filed the necessary documents with both the BSE and NSE. In a clarification, the company corrected an inadvertent clerical error in its previous board meeting outcome dated March 6, 2026. Sobhagya Capital Options Private Limited, a SEBI registered Category I Merchant Banker, has issued a fairness opinion stating that the Share Exchange Ratio is financially fair. The name Aftertrade Broking Private Limited was mistakenly mentioned instead of Sobhagya Capital Options Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Suditi Industries Ltd - 521113 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, we wish to update that the Company has successfully completed the acquisition of 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited. Consequent to this acquisition,  SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited has become wholly owned subsidiary of Suditi Industries Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Suditi Industries Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited. This acquisition was made from Project Anushka Sharma Lifestyles Private Limited on an arm's length basis, based on an independent valuation report. As a result of this transaction, SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited has now become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Suditi Industries Limited. The acquired entity is involved in the manufacturing of all types of textile garments and clothing accessories.

announcements.subject: Swan Corp Ltd - 503310 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of LODR Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Issuance of Corporate Guarantee
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Swan Corp Limited has issued a Corporate Guarantee amounting to Rs. 72.57 Crores (Rupees Seventy Two Crores and Fifty Seven Lakhs). This guarantee is provided to secure the repayment obligation of Swan LNG Private Limited, a subsidiary company. The issuance of this guarantee does not have an immediate pecuniary impact on Swan Corp Limited. The transaction is being conducted at arm's length, with Swan LNG Private Limited being a subsidiary of Swan Corp Limited.
