announcements.subject: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd - 543596 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - "Opening Of New Branches"
announcements.detail: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding "Opening of New Branches"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has announced the opening of three new branches. The branches will be located in Ballari, Karnataka; Anand, Gujarat; and Pandalkudi, Tamil Nadu. The Ballari branch is scheduled to open on March 30, 2026. The opening dates for the Anand and Pandalkudi branches are not explicitly stated but are implied to be around the same period. This expansion aims to increase the bank's reach and customer service points.

announcements.subject: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd - 544526 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Saatvik Green Energy Limited's material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has secured a new order valued at INR 14.48 Crores. This order is from a renowned Independent Power producer/EPC Player for the supply of Solar PV Modules. The order is for a domestic entity and is commercial in nature. The execution of this order is expected to be completed by March 2026. This development signifies a new business opportunity for the company in the solar energy sector.

announcements.subject: Century Enka Ltd - 500280 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Company has made application  for an additional 37,96,086 equity shares of ABREL Century Energy Ltd., a Special Purpose Vehicle by way of right issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Century Enka Ltd. has applied to acquire an additional 37,96,086 equity shares of ABREL Century Energy Ltd., a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV), through a rights issue. This acquisition is necessary to maintain a minimum of 26% equity in the Power Producer, which is a requirement to qualify as a Captive User under the Electricity Act, 2003. ABRELCEL was incorporated on March 10, 2022, and had a turnover of Rs. 1,949.10 Lakhs as of March 31, 2025. The shares are being acquired at par value, making this an arm's length transaction. The acquisition is part of the group's strategy to qualify its power plant as a group captive power plant.

announcements.subject: Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd - 538685 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please refer file attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Shemaroo Entertainment Limited's Preferential Issue Committee has approved the allotment of 14,10,000 equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 110 per share (including a premium of Rs. 100 per share) on a preferential basis. The total amount raised through this allotment is Rs. 15.51 crores. These shares are being allotted to promoters and promoter group members, including Atul Hirji Maru (3,52,500 shares), Raman Hirji Maroo (3,52,500 shares), Hiren Uday Gada (3,52,500 shares), and Jai Buddhichand Maroo (3,52,500 shares), towards repayment or appropriation of existing unsecured debt. This approval was granted on March 27, 2026, following in-principle approval from stock exchanges and shareholder approval on March 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Polycab India Ltd - 542652 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of Effective date of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: Polycab India Limited has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Uniglobus Electricals and Electronics Private Limited with Polycab India Limited has become operative and effective from March 27, 2026. This follows the pronouncement of an order by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, approving the scheme on February 27, 2026. The certified copy of the NCLT order has been filed with the respective jurisdictional Registrar of Companies on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation of Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has announced the launch of its new store in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, on March 27, 2026. This marks the 76th overall store for the brand and its 4th store in Uttar Pradesh. The new store, located in a prime retail area, is 6000 sq ft and features a wide range of gold, diamond, and bridal jewellery, including collections like Saptam, Katha, Pratha, Eiina, and Polmi. This expansion is aimed at intensifying the company's retail strength in Central India.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - G R Infraprojects Limited Has Emerged As L-1 Bidder For A Project.
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has emerged as L-1 Bidder for a project.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has emerged as the L-1 bidder for a project titled "Upgradation of Existing Two-Lane Carriageway to Four Lane Divided Carriageway from Ch. 208+90 (Existing Km. 535.93) in Nasarpore Village in Umarpada Taluka to Ch. 269+11 (Existing Km. 608.51) in Malotha Village in Vyara Taluka (Length 60.21 Km.) Section of NH-56 in Gujarat on HAM (Pkg-VI)." The contract price for this project is INR 1453.57 Crores, to be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM) with a completion period of 910 days from the appointed date. This information is disclosed in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kranti Industries Ltd - 542459 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: As per the Regulation 30 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform you that pursuant to the execution of Share Purchase Agreement dated March 27, 2026 between Kranti Industries Limited ("Company") and Mr. Sunil Gadiya and Mr. Kunal Vora, the Company has transferred 8,00,000 Equity Shares of Preciso Metall Pvt. Ltd. Consequently, Preciso Metall Pvt. Ltd. ceased ....
announcements.ai_summary: Kranti Industries Limited has divested 8,00,000 equity shares of Preciso Metall Private Limited, each with a face value of ₹10, on March 27, 2026. This transaction was executed through a Share Purchase Agreement with Mr. Kunal Vijay Vora and Mr. Sunil Rameshlal Gadiya. Consequently, Preciso Metall Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Kranti Industries Limited and has become an associate company. For the financial year ending March 31, 2025, Preciso Metall Private Limited contributed Rs. 737.9 Lakhs (9.40%) to consolidated turnover and had a net worth of Rs. (190.04) Lakhs (4.58% of consolidated net worth). The expected date of completion of this disinvestment is on or before March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd - 500247 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Clarification attached
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited has responded to a news item published on www.moneycontrol.com regarding an alleged Rs. 160-crore FD fraud linked to Panchkula Municipal Corp. The bank clarifies that there is no material impact in terms of Regulation 30(4) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Kotak Mahindra Bank is examining the matter as per instructions from the Municipal Corporation of Panchkula and is cooperating fully with government authorities and law enforcement agencies.

announcements.subject: Landmark Property Development Company Ltd - 533012 - Announcement Under Reg 30
announcements.detail: Announcement of agreement with related party
announcements.ai_summary: Landmark Property Development Company Ltd has executed a Refund and Settlement Agreement with Eterna Living Private Limited, a related party. This agreement is for the cancellation of a balance space booking arrangement and the refund of an outstanding advance amounting to ₹35,26,15,047/. Eterna Living Private Limited is obligated to refund the full amount within six months from the agreement's execution date. Upon execution, Landmark Property Development Company Ltd received ₹15,00,000/- as a part payment, which will be adjusted against the outstanding advance. This transaction received prior approval from the Audit Committee, Board of Directors, and shareholders.

announcements.subject: TruCap Finance Ltd - 540268 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail:
Sundae Capital Advisors Private Limited ("Manager to the Offer") with respect to the open offer to the shareholders of Trucap Finance Limited ('Target Company') has informed BSE as under -

"This in continuation to our submission made on February 25, 2026, we are hereby submitting the following update on the matter.

The matter was listed for hearing on March 25, 2026, wherein, the Hon'ble Tribunal has allowed the appellant a time of ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sundae Capital Advisors Private Limited, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has provided an update on the open offer concerning Trucap Finance Limited. In a hearing on March 25, 2026, the Hon'ble Tribunal granted the appellant two weeks to file a rejoinder. Crucially, the interim order related to the open offer will remain in effect until the next hearing. The matter is now scheduled for its next hearing on April 24, 2026. This update is a continuation of previous submissions made on February 25, 2026, and indicates ongoing legal proceedings affecting the open offer process.

announcements.company: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd
announcements.subject: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd - 532898 - POWERGRID Has Successfully Commissioned The Project
announcements.detail: POWERGRID has successfully commissioned the project.
announcements.ai_summary: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd (POWERGRID) has successfully commissioned a significant project titled “Transmission System for Power Evacuation from Arun -3 (900 MW) HEP, Nepal of M/s SAPDC – Indian Portion”. This commissioning is effective from September 3, 2023, in accordance with Regulation 5(2) of CERC (Terms and Conditions of Tariff) Regulations, 2019. The project's commissioning was referenced in a CERC Order dated March 10, 2026. This development signifies the operationalization of a key transmission infrastructure, contributing to the power evacuation capabilities from the Arun-3 Hydroelectric Project in Nepal.

announcements.subject: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd - 542933 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI(LODR)-Updates
announcements.detail: General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Universus Photo Imagings Limited (formerly JINDAL PHOTO IMAGING LIMITED) has approved the relocation of its Corporate Office. The office will move from Plot No. 87, Sector 32, Gurugram, Haryana -122001 to Plot No. 12, Local Shopping Complex Sector B-1, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi, 110070. This change will be effective from April 1, 2026. The company's Books of Account will also be kept at the new New Delhi address from the same effective date. This regulatory update informs stakeholders about the administrative change in the company's operational base.

announcements.subject: NHPC Ltd - 533098 - Signing Of Implementation Agreement
announcements.detail: In continuation to earlier letter dated 20.02.2026 and in compliance to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR, signing of implementation agreement on 27.03.2026 between NHPC Limited and JKSPDCL is submitted. The details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited has signed an Implementation Agreement with Jammu & Kashmir State Power Development Corporation Limited (JKSPDCL) on March 27, 2026, in Jammu. This agreement is for the development of the 240 MW Uri-I Stage-II and 260 MW Dulhasti Stage-II Hydroelectric Projects in the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir. NHPC will develop these projects on a Build-Own-Operate-Transfer (BOOT) basis for a period of 40 years. This signing is in continuation of a previous letter dated February 20, 2026, and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd - 511754 - Disclosure In Terms Of Regulation 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure in terms of Regulation 29(2) of SEBI(SAST), Regulation  2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalibhadra Finance Limited has disclosed an acquisition of shares under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Ayushi Doshi, who is part of the promoter group, acquired 78,500 shares through an open market transaction on March 27, 2026. Before this acquisition, Ayushi Doshi held 6,75,600 shares, representing 2.19% of the total voting capital. After the acquisition, her total holding increased to 7,54,100 shares, which represents 2.44% of the total voting capital. The acquisition was made via the open market.

announcements.subject: Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd - 543748 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find our intimation in captioned subject
announcements.ai_summary: Aarti Pharmalabs Limited has announced the completion of its US-FDA inspection at Unit-IV, Tarapur. The inspection concluded on March 27, 2026, and resulted in the issuance of one observation on Form 483. This observation is procedural in nature. The company will submit corrective and preventive actions to the US FDA within the stipulated period. This update is crucial for investors to monitor the company's compliance and operational status with international regulatory bodies.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd has completed the acquisition of 24,800 equity shares of M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited (“Shri Gang”) from Mr. Ritesh Gupta. Following this acquisition, Suraj Industries Ltd's shareholding in Shri Gang has increased to 20.15% of Shri Gang's paid-up equity share capital. This update follows the company's previous intimation on March 26, 2026, regarding the acquisition.

announcements.subject: SJVN Ltd - 533206 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: SJVN"s 412 MW Rampur Hydro Power Station surpassed Highest-Ever Generation
announcements.ai_summary: SJVN Ltd announced that its 412 MW Rampur Hydro Power Station in Himachal Pradesh has surpassed its highest-ever generation record. On March 26, 2026, the station generated 2098.03 million units, exceeding the previous record set in FY 2019-20. The Head of Project, Rampur HPS, dedicated this achievement to the SJVN Management's leadership and the teamwork of all employees. The Rampur HPS had previously achieved its Design Energy target of 1,878 million units for FY 2025-26 on December 8, 2025, marking the fastest achievement since its commissioning.

announcements.subject: Omax Autos Ltd - 520021 - Intimation Of Cyber Security Incident.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation of cyber Security incident on Company''s IT Infrastructure.
announcements.ai_summary: Omax Autos Ltd has confirmed a ransomware attack on its IT infrastructure, which was initially suspected on March 26, 2026. The company has stated that the incident has not impacted its core systems and operations. Omax Autos is currently assessing the extent of any potential loss or impact and conducting a detailed investigation with ongoing remedial actions. The company is also strengthening its cybersecurity systems to prevent future occurrences and will provide updates on material developments.

announcements.subject: Ethos Ltd - 543532 - Opening Of Ethos Watch Boutiques At Srinagar
announcements.detail: Opening of Ethos Watch Boutiques at Srinagar
announcements.ai_summary: Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, on March 27, 2026. Located at Unit No-3, The Edition Mall, Sanat Nagar, this opening marks a significant step in strengthening the company's luxury brand portfolio and its presence in a key luxury retail market. This expansion aligns with the company's strategic vision to make exclusive brands more accessible to customers across India. With this new boutique, Ethos Limited now operates a total of 92 boutiques nationwide.

announcements.subject: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd - 532527 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 6,40,000 Equity Shares to Riddhi Portfolio Private Limited (Promoter) pursuant to exercise of warrants allotted on preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd has approved the conversion of 6,40,000 warrants into equity shares and the allotment of these shares to Riddhi Portfolio Private Limited, a promoter. This action was taken by the Capital Market Committee on March 27, 2026. The conversion involved an aggregate amount of Rs. 100,80,00,000/- received from the warrant holder at a rate of Rs. 1,575/- per warrant. These warrants were initially allotted on a preferential basis on August 14, 2025, with a face value of Rs. 2/- each. The allotment increases the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital to Rs. 36,33,41,208/-, comprising 18,16,70,604 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Time Technoplast Ltd - 532856 - Intimation of Repayment of Commercial Paper (CP)
announcements.detail:
We hereby certify that the Company has made timely repayment of maturity amount of below mentioned commercial paper in full:
Scrip Code: 731121
ISIN No.: INE508G14IL4
Maturity Date: 27-03-2026
Date of Repayment: 27-03-2026
announcements.ai_summary: Time Technoplast Limited has certified that it has made timely repayment of the maturity amount in full for a commercial paper. The commercial paper had a maturity date of March 27, 2026, and the repayment was made on the same date. The Scrip Code for this commercial paper is 731121, and its ISIN No. is INE508G14IL4. This notification is in accordance with SEBI's Operational Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021.

announcements.subject: Ceigall India Ltd - 544223 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: In continuation to our earlier letter dated 20th March 2026 we are pleased to inform you that Ceigall Infra projects Private Limited ('CIPPL'), a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited ('CIL') has received Letter of Award (LOA) dated 27th March 2026 from National Highways Authority of India for the Construction of 6-lane access-controlled Spur connectivity starting from Ch. 15+100 of Ambala - Chandigarh section of NH-205A and terminating ....
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall Infra projects Private Limited (CIPPL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited (CIL), has received a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 27, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India. This award is for the construction of a 6-lane access-controlled Spur connectivity project, spanning 10.300 Km, on the Ambala-Chandigarh section of NH-205A and terminating at the Zirakpur Bypass in Punjab. The contract is to be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM). The construction period is 18 months, followed by a 15-year Operation & Maintenance period. The broad consideration or size of the order is Rs. 603.00 Crore (Bid Cost). This is a domestic order, and neither the promoter nor group companies have any interest in the awarding entity.

announcements.subject: Apcotex Industries Ltd - 523694 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 27Th March 2026
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Outcome of Board Meeting held on 27th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: A meeting of the Board of Directors of Apcotex Industries Limited was held on March 27, 2026, where several key decisions were made. The Board approved entering into a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) and a Share Subscription Cum Shareholders Agreement (SSSHA) with Amplus Ceres Solar Private Limited. As part of this, the company will subscribe to a minimum of 2.55% of the equity shares of Amplus Ceres Solar Private Limited, a subsidiary of Amplus Energy Solutions PTE Limited, for a total value of INR 72,00,000/-. Additionally, the Board approved a similar PPA and SSSHA with Amplus Energy One Private Limited, subscribing to a minimum of 2.14% of its equity shares for INR 1,32,00,000/-. The face value of these shares is INR 10/- each. Furthermore, Mr. Ravishankar Sharma was re-appointed as an Executive Director for two years, effective May 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: JNK India Ltd - 544167 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of order
announcements.ai_summary: JNK India Limited has announced the receipt of a major order on March 27, 2026, from JNK Global Co., Ltd., Korea. This order is for providing support services and supplies for a Cracker Furnace Package of a refinery project in India. JNK Global is a promoter of JNK India Limited, and the company has confirmed there is no potential conflict of interest arising from this transaction. The project delivery schedule is set for February 2, 2028. This order is classified as "Major" based on its value, and it is an international order to be executed in India.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On 50:50 JV Between JSW Steel Limited And JFE Steel Corporation, For The Steel Business Of Bhushan Power And Steel Limited.
announcements.detail: Update on 50:50 Joint Venture between JSW Steel LImited and JFE Steel Corporation, Japan for the Steel Business of Bhushan Power and Steel Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Steel Limited has announced the completion of the transfer of the steel business undertaking of Bhushan Power and Steel Limited (BPSL) to JSW Sambalpur Steel Limited, a subsidiary of JSW Steel. This transfer was executed via a slump sale on a going concern basis and was completed on March 27, 2026. This is a key step in the previously approved 50:50 joint venture partnership between JSW Steel Limited and JFE Steel Corporation, Japan, for the steel business of BPSL.

announcements.company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT
announcements.subject: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT - 543261 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Brookprop Management Services Private Limited, acting as the Manager for Brookfield India Real Estate Trust (“Brookfield India REIT”), conducted meetings with various investors on March 25, 2026, and March 27, 2026. These meetings provided business and financial updates for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025, for Brookfield India REIT.

announcements.subject: Onelife Capital Advisors Ltd - 533632 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 27/03/2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith Outcome of Board Meeting dated 27/03/2026
announcements.ai_summary: Onelife Capital Advisors Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved several loan grants and an investment. The Board approved a loan of Rs. 1,50,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty Lakhs) to Mr. JayKishor Chatuvedi. Additionally, loans were approved for Abhidev Consultancy Services Private Limited (up to Rs. 5,50,00,000 at 12% per annum), Jeevan Jyoti Vanijya Limited (up to Rs. 2,00,00,000), Gandhi Nagar Leasing and Finance Limited (up to Rs. 2,00,00,000), and Gandhi Nagar Leasing and Finance (up to Rs. 1,50,00,000). The Board also approved an investment of up to Rs. 1,50,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty Lakhs) in Dealmoney Real Estate Private Limited, a subsidiary. The meeting was held from 1:00 PM to 3:35 PM.

announcements.subject: Tata Communications Ltd - 500483 - Intimation Regarding Issuance, Allotment And Listing Of Commercial Paper Amounting To Rs 750 Crore
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding issuance, allotment and listing of Commercial Paper amounting to Rs 750 Crore
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Communications Limited has issued and allotted Commercial Paper aggregating to an amount of ₹750 crore on March 25, 2026. The Commercial Paper has a face value of ₹5,00,000/- per security and a discount rate of 7.85% per annum. The redemption date for this issuance is April 24, 2026. The Commercial Paper, with ISIN INE151A14263, was listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd - 543848 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Amendment in Capital Clause and Object Clause of MOA of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital. The authorized share capital will be increased from Rs. 15,00,00,000 (Rupees Fifteen Crore) divided into 1,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each, to Rs. 25,00,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Five Crore) divided into 2,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each. This increase is subject to shareholder approval via postal ballot and other necessary regulatory approvals. Additionally, the Board approved the alteration of the Object Clause of the Memorandum of Association and the sub-division of equity shares, where 1 Equity Share of Rs. 10 will be split into 2 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each, also subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Eicher Motors Ltd - 505200 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The 2026 Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450: Sportier Performance meets urban agility
announcements.ai_summary: Eicher Motors Ltd has announced the launch of the 2026 Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450, featuring an all-new APEX variant. This variant offers sportier design and new road-focused tyres, enhancing urban agility and performance. The existing Dash and Flash variants will also receive improved grippier tyres, with the Dash variant getting a new colorway. Bookings for the 2026 Guerrilla 450 APEX commence today, March 27, 2026, with pan-India retail sales beginning on March 31, 2026. The APEX variant is built around the Sherpa engine and features a lower, more committed riding posture with road-biased 17” Vredestein Centuro ST tyres for enhanced grip. It also includes updated ride modes with mode retention and sharper visual aesthetics with new colourways.

announcements.subject: YOGI Ltd - 511702 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find the attached Intimation of receipt of Purchase order.
announcements.ai_summary: YOGI Ltd has received purchase orders from Companion Vinimay Trading Private Limited for the supply and delivery of various industrial components, including Structure Assembly, Head Assembly, Rotary Table & Electrical Accessories, Tool Changer & Additional Axis, and Accessories. The total value of these orders is approximately Rs. 102.36 Crores, excluding all taxes. The company has received four purchase orders, each for one complete set of the specified equipment. The products will be delivered within an agreed timeline of approximately 15 days, with standard terms related to quality, delivery schedule, and pricing mutually agreed upon by both parties.

announcements.subject: Chemtech Industrial Valves Ltd - 537326 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For The Meeting Held On Friday, 27Th March 2026.
announcements.detail: Kindly find enclosed herewith the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e. Friday, 27th March 2026 for conversion of the Convertible Warrants to Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Chemtech Industrial Valves Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 5,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at a premium of Rs. 190 each to Promoter/Promoter Group. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of Convertible Warrants, which were initially issued and allotted on a preferential basis on October 1, 2024. The conversion was approved in compliance with SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2018, and received in-principle approval from BSE. The allottees are Harsh Pradeep Badkur and Puneet Pradeep Badkur, each receiving 2,50,000 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Nucleus Software Exports Ltd - 531209 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Nucleus Software Exports Limited has informed the Exchange regarding press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Nucleus Software Marks 30 years on BSE, Advances Customer-Centric, AI-Led Global Growth Strategy"
announcements.ai_summary: Nucleus Software Exports Ltd has achieved a significant milestone, marking 30 years of its listing on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) on March 27, 2026. The company, listed in 1995, has established a global presence, serving over 200 financial institutions in more than 50 countries with its digital lending and transaction banking solutions, FinnOne Neo® and FinnAxia®. Nucleus Software attributes its sustained growth to deep customer-centricity and domain-led innovation, enabling financial institutions to transform their operations. Looking ahead, the company is focused on scaling its AI-led capabilities to support the industry's shift towards AI-driven, real-time, and embedded financial services.

announcements.subject: Birlanu Ltd - 509675 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: In-principal approval for enhancement of the corporate guarantee limit from Euro 45 million to Euro 55 million
announcements.ai_summary: BirlaNu Ltd's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, granted in-principal approval to enhance the corporate guarantee limit from Euro 45 million to Euro 55 million. This enhanced guarantee, which may include a Stand-by Letter of Credit, will be provided on behalf of BirlaNu International GmbH, Germany, a wholly-owned subsidiary, and its subsidiaries. The purpose of this guarantee is to secure existing and future loan facilities availed or to be availed by BirlaNu International GmbH and its subsidiaries. Further details will be submitted at the time of execution of the corporate guarantee.

announcements.subject: iStreet Network Ltd - 524622 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to conversion of warrants through circular resolution.
announcements.ai_summary: iStreet Network Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the conversion of 11,16,667 warrants into 11,16,667 equity shares of face value ₹ 4 each. This conversion was made for cash upon receipt of the exercise price of ₹ 4.5 per warrant, aggregating to ₹ 50,24,999. The allotment was made to public category warrant holders, including Viral S. Acharya, Shahana Sen Mishra, Vipin Mishra, and Deldan Otsal. These newly allotted equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹ 27,32,00,008 to ₹ 27,76,66,676.

announcements.subject: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd - 516072 - Update On Closure Of Vishnu International Trading FZE, UAE, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Update on closure of Vishnu International Trading FZE, UAE, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd has provided an update on the closure of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Vishnu International Trading FZE, located in the UAE. The voluntary winding-up process is still ongoing and has taken longer than initially expected due to prevailing geopolitical conditions in the Middle East. The company now anticipates that the closure of this subsidiary will be completed within approximately six additional months. This information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd - 539301 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release dated 27th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd (ASL) has announced its entry into the society redevelopment segment with its first residential apartment project in Mumbai. The project, located in Santacruz (West), has a top-line potential of approximately Rs. 300 crore and a total estimated carpet area for sale of 42,000 sq. ft. This marks ASL's second project in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR) and its first in the society redevelopment category. The company has also reported that its cumulative new business development top-line potential for the year now stands at approximately Rs. 3,140 crore.

announcements.subject: Gateway Distriparks Ltd - 543489 - Disclosures Under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: refer the attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Perfect Communications Private Limited, a promoter of Gateway Distriparks Limited, has acquired 3,566,930 equity shares of the company. This acquisition, disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, was made on March 27, 2026. The specific percentage of total voting capital before and after this transaction is not provided in the announcement, but the acquisition by a promoter indicates a potential increase in their stake in Gateway Distriparks Limited.

announcements.company: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd
announcements.subject:
Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd - 532921 - Media Release Regarding 'APSEZ Sets Up India'S First
Port Of Refuge To Boost Maritime Safety.'
announcements.detail: Media Release
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd (APSEZ) has launched India's first Port of Refuge (PoR) to enhance maritime safety. This initiative addresses a critical gap in maritime emergency infrastructure and establishes a structured mechanism for handling distressed vessels. APSEZ has entered into a tripartite MoU with SMIT Salvage, the salvage and emergency response division of Royal Boskalis Westminster NV, and the Maritime Emergency Response Centre (MERC), bringing global expertise to the operation. The PoR initiative aligns with international maritime conventions and aims to bolster safety and environmental protection. APSEZ will designate Dighi Port on the west coast and Gopalpur Port on the east coast as Ports of Refuge, serving key global shipping routes.

announcements.subject:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd - 532532 - Intimation In Accordance With Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jaiprakash Associates Limited (JAL) has informed the Exchange about a consented arbitral award dated March 25, 2026, in relation to a pending arbitration with UltraTech Cement Limited (UTCL). Upon receipt of settlement proceeds amounting to INR 1,000,00,00,000 (INR One Thousand Crores) from UTCL, all claims and liabilities concerning Series A Redeemable Preference Shares issued by UTCL in favor of JAL will be extinguished. Consequently, UTCL will be entitled to continue holding, using, and operating the JP Super Plant and associated mines and infrastructure at Kajrahat, Uttar Pradesh, free from any claims by JAL.

announcements.subject: Jindal Stainless Ltd - 532508 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has announced a partnership with Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH), a T20 league team, as their Official Stainless Partner. This marks Jindal Stainless's debut association with the Indian Premier League (IPL) and is a strategic move to enhance brand visibility and connect with the youth. The partnership includes exclusive branding rights for Jindal Stainless across key product segments such as stainless steel pipes and tubes, rebars, and kitchenware and sinks. Managing Director, Mr. Abhyuday Jindal, highlighted the partnership's role in showcasing the versatility of stainless steel, while SRH CEO, Mr. K Shanmugam, emphasized the shared values of performance and resilience.

announcements.subject: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd - 543806 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, - Formation Of Advisory Committee
announcements.detail: The Advisory Committee of the Board has been constituted effective from March 27, 2026, the members of the Advisory Committee will  provide guidance to the Board on business strategy, long term planning, operational and financial performance. For more details please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd has constituted an Advisory Committee to the Board, effective from March 27, 2026. The committee members, including Alok Aggarwal (Chairman), Deepak Kumar Srivastava (Member), and Sanjay Kumar Verma (Member), will provide guidance on business strategy, long-term planning, and operational and financial performance. Mr. Deepak Kumar Srivastava has been appointed for a period of one year commencing March 27, 2026, and brings over four decades of legal experience, including 31 years in the Uttar Pradesh Judiciary. The formation of this committee is expected to offer valuable industry insights and financial expertise to support the company's growth.

announcements.subject: Xpro India Ltd - 590013 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Commencement Of Commercial Production/Operations
announcements.detail: The Company informs that the new dielectric film line at Barjora, WB was commissioned on March 27, 2026 and is operational.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Xpro India Limited has announced the commencement of commercial production for its new dielectric film line at Barjora, West Bengal, on March 27, 2026. This new line is now operational. Additionally, the company provided an update on its UAE project, being implemented by its subsidiary, Xpro Dielectric Films FZ-LLC. Xpro India Limited is actively monitoring evolving regional conditions and any potential impact on this project.

announcements.subject: Axis Solutions Ltd - 511144 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Execution of Loan agreement with Vivriti Capital Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Axis Solutions Limited has executed a Deed of Hypothecation with Vivriti Capital Limited on March 27, 2026, to secure a working capital facility of Rs. 25.00 crores. This facility is intended to support the expansion of the company's business operations. The agreement involves a subservient and continuing charge on all company assets, including current assets, book debt, and movable fixed assets. Additionally, a first-ranking exclusive charge is placed on a debt service reserve account or cash collateral, equivalent to 15.77% of the facility amount, held as an interest-free security deposit with a lien and set-off in favor of Vivriti Capital Limited. This transaction is not with a related party and is being undertaken in the ordinary course of business.

announcements.subject: Emami Paper Mills Ltd - 533208 - Intimation Of Redemption Of Unlisted Series II Tranche III Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) Having ISIN - INE830C04038
announcements.detail: Please find the intimation for the redemption of OCRPS.
announcements.ai_summary: Emami Paper Mills Limited has redeemed its 2,70,000 unlisted Series II - Tranche III Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) on March 27, 2026. Each OCRPS had a face value of Rs.100/- and a redemption premium of Rs.500/-. The redemption was carried out in accordance with the terms of the issue and was funded from the company's available profits/reserves. This action follows a Board of Directors' resolution communicated on February 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: K.P. Energy Ltd - 539686 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Letter Of Award (Loa) For Development Of A Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project In Gujarat Aggregating To 91.4 MW.
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Receipt of Letter of Award (LoA) for Development of a Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project in Gujarat aggregating to 91.4 MW. Detailed disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: K.P. Energy Limited has received a Letter of Award (LoA) from JK Paper Limited for the development of a 91.4 MW Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project in Gujarat. The project will be executed on a complete turnkey basis, including engineering, procurement, installation, commissioning, and development of evacuation infrastructure for grid connectivity. K.P. Energy Limited will also be responsible for obtaining all necessary statutory and regulatory clearances and providing operation & maintenance (O&M) services for the Balance of Plant (BoP) of the wind capacity and the complete installed capacity of the solar project. This award strengthens K.P. Energy Limited's position in the renewable energy sector.

announcements.subject: Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd - 532796 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On Friday, March 27, 2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on Friday, March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved a proposal for investment in Lumax Alps Alpine India Private Limited (LAAIPL), a Joint Venture Company. The investment will be in the form of equity, amounting to up to Rs. 7 Crores. LAAIPL operates in the Automotive Components industry. The company currently holds a 50% equity share capital in LAAIPL, and this transaction will be conducted on an arm's length basis. The disclosure provides details for FY 2024-25 for LAAIPL, including a Net Worth of Rs. 2,634.46 Lakhs, Profit After Tax of Rs. 270.52 Lakhs, and Turnover of Rs. 4,917.60 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Disclosure Under Regulation 10(6) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Limited (formerly SMIFS Capital Markets Limited) has made a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of equity shares by the Promoters and Promoter Group, specifically by Lend Lease Company (India) Limited. This acquisition is in compliance with Regulation 10(4)(a) and 10(4)(b) read with Regulation 10(6) of the SAST Regulations, 2011, and relates to the subscription of a Rights Issue of Shares, including additional shares allotted by Nexome Capital Markets Limited.

announcements.subject: Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd - 543980 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: The Company has received a letter from Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) conveying the acceptance of its tender for allotment of land on lease basis
announcements.ai_summary: Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd has received a letter from the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) confirming the acceptance of its tender for land allotment on a lease basis. The allotment pertains to a land parcel of approximately 10,026.44 sqm, located at plot no. SF5 in the GTxT-Block of Bandra-Kurla Complex, Maharashtra. The lease will be for a period of 80 years, with a total consideration of approximately Rs. 354 Crores. This land is intended for the development of a hospital with approximately 400 beds, subject to various statutory and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd - 500040 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release of Birla Estates Private Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Estates Private Limited (BEPL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited, has announced its first redevelopment project in Mumbai. The company is entering into a joint redevelopment arrangement with Parinee Real Estate Builders to redevelop Anmol Co-operative Housing Society and Bhartiya Bhavan Co-operative Housing Society in Khar West, Mumbai. This project is expected to have a saleable area of 2.9 lakh sq.ft and an estimated revenue potential of INR 1,700 crore. The development will focus on luxury residential apartments. This initiative strengthens Birla Estates' presence in Mumbai, leveraging the city's demand for quality housing through redevelopment.

announcements.subject: JK Cement Ltd - 532644 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today on March 27, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of JK Cement Limited, in its meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved entering into an Asset Purchase Agreement to acquire cement grinding assets and land. The company will acquire 0.24 MnTPA cement grinding assets from Sri Chakra Cement Limited and approximately 34 acres of land from Envean Enterprises Private Limited, Sri Chakra Cement Limited, and K Sanjay Kumar. The aggregate consideration for this acquisition is Rs. 28.79 crores. These cement grinding assets have been non-operational since April 2025. The transaction is contingent upon the finalization and execution of definitive agreements and the fulfillment of customary conditions precedents.

announcements.subject: Cemindia Projects Ltd - 509496 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Approved the elevating Mr. Soumitra Ghosh, Vice President -Operations, in the category of Senior Management Personnel with effect from 02nd April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Cemindia Projects Ltd, at their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the elevation of Mr. Soumitra Ghosh, Vice President - Operations, to the category of Senior Management Personnel. This elevation is effective from April 02, 2026, and is intended to enhance his contribution to the company's growth and operational excellence. Mr. Ghosh holds a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering and has over 28 years of experience in project management, having been associated with the company since 2003. His performance will be reviewed during annual appraisals.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: The Chief Financial Officer of Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, acting as the Investment Manager to Interise Trust, has certified that proceeds from the issue of Commercial Papers (CPs) were used for disclosed purposes and listing conditions were adhered to. The Commercial Papers were issued on February 17, 2026, with a face value of Rs. 5,00,000/- and an issue price of Rs. 4,95,961/-, yielding 7.25% p.a. A total of 1,714 CPs were issued, maturing on March 30, 2026. This certification is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd - 544250 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: The transcript of the Institutional Investor Meet held on Tuesday, 24th March 2026 is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Limited has provided the transcript of its Institutional Investor Meet held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. The transcript has been uploaded on the company's website and will also be available on the websites of BSE and NSE. The meeting included presentations by Mr. Himanshu Bakshi, Managing Director, and Mr. Richard D'Souza, Chief Financial Officer, covering business updates and strategic priorities. A question-and-answer session of approximately 30 minutes was also conducted.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Committee Of Directors - Preferential Issue In Terms Of Regulations 30, 51 And Other Applicable Provisions Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Please find the attached
announcements.ai_summary: Manappuram Finance Limited's Committee of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the allotment of equity shares through a preferential issue. This approval follows the receipt of necessary approvals from the Reserve Bank of India and other applicable regulatory bodies. The company will allot 9,29,01,373 fully paid-up equity shares, each with a face value of INR 2, at a price of INR 236 per share. This preferential issue, on a private placement basis, will raise an aggregate amount of INR 2192,47,24,028. The shares are being subscribed to by BC Asia Investments XXV Limited.

announcements.subject: Desco Infratech Ltd - 544387 - Intimation Regarding Updation Of Listing Status And Related Details On MCA Portal
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding updation of Listing Status and related details on MCA Portal
announcements.ai_summary: Desco Infratech Ltd has updated its listing status and related details on the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) portal. The company's Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has been changed from U45201GJ2011PLC063710 to L45201GJ2011PLC063710. Additionally, the field indicating whether the company is listed on a stock exchange has been updated from "No" to "Yes". These changes ensure that the MCA records accurately reflect Desco Infratech Ltd's status as a listed entity.

announcements.subject: Larsen & Toubro Ltd - 500510 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: L&T Wins (Significant*) Order for Buildings & Factories Business
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro (L&T) has secured multiple orders for its Buildings & Factories (B&F) business across various Indian states. In Gujarat, the company has received an order for the design and construction of a Float Glass Plant, encompassing civil, steel, mechanical, electrical, and plumbing works. In Andhra Pradesh, L&T will construct a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility for a leading two-wheeler company, including civil, steel, and architectural works. Additionally, the business has secured multiple add-on orders for existing projects. These orders reflect L&T's strong execution capabilities and customer confidence in delivering EPC solutions for diverse industrial structures. The classification of these orders falls under the "Significant" category, with values ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹2,500 crore.

announcements.subject: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd - 544536 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release for Intimation of grant of Final License by SEBI to Subsidiary Company to act as Asset Management Company for Mutual Fund.
announcements.ai_summary: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd has announced that its subsidiary, Lakshya Asset Management Private Limited (Lakshya AMC), has received the final license from SEBI to act as an Asset Management Company (AMC) for launching and managing mutual funds. Lakshya AMC has onboarded key members of the founding team of Benchmark Asset Management Company, pioneers of Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) in India, including Mr. Sanjiv Shah, Mr. Rajan Mehta, and Mr. Sanjay Gaitonde. Benchmark AMC was known for introducing India's first ETF, Nifty BeES, and other innovative products. This development marks a significant step for Wealth First Portfolio Managers in building an innovation-led asset management platform.

announcements.subject: Mobavenue AI Tech Ltd - 539682 - Business Update: Mobavenue Strengthens AI-Led Two-Tower Modelling To Enhance  Advertising Outcomes.
announcements.detail: Business Update: Mobavenue strengthens AI-Led Two-Tower Modelling to enhance advertising outcomes
announcements.ai_summary: Mobavenue AI Tech Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Mobavenue Media Private Limited (MMPL), has enhanced its advanced two-tower neural network modelling framework. This upgrade is part of MMPL's transition towards AI-native platforms to improve advertising outcomes for its clients. The two-tower approach independently models and matches high-intent users with relevant offerings, with one tower focusing on predicting high-conversion users and the other on optimising bidding and budget allocation. The framework continuously learns from campaign and user data for real-time recalibration and performance optimisation, leading to improved targeting precision and campaign scalability. MMPL has observed improved conversion outcomes compared to conventional methods.

announcements.subject: Shine Fashions (India) Ltd - 543244 - Clarification Regarding Disclosure Of Share Transaction Of Mr. Anish Anil Mehta
announcements.detail:
We wish to clarify that the disclosure appearing under the BSE Listing Centre reflecting a transaction of disposal of shares by Mr. Anish Anil Mehta was inadvertently made while carrying out rectification as per BSE mail.

Kindly note that no Transaction involving disposal of shares has taken place on March 26th, 2026. The disclosure pertains only to the revision of the earlier filing dated 03.01.2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shine Fashions (India) Ltd has clarified that a disclosure filed on March 26, 2026, reflecting a share disposal by Promoter and Director Mr. Anish Anil Mehta, was an inadvertent error. The disclosure was made while rectifying an earlier filing from January 3, 2026, and the "revised" option was not selected. No transaction involving share disposal actually occurred on March 26, 2026; the filing was solely a revision of the January 3, 2026 disclosure related to a transaction on January 2, 2026. The company requests shareholders and stakeholders not to be misled by the initial filing, which has since been rectified.

announcements.subject: Reliance Industries Ltd - 500325 - Statement
announcements.detail: Statement
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Reliance Industries Ltd has categorically rejected recent media reports alleging the purchase of crude oil of Iranian origin, stating these claims are entirely baseless, factually incorrect, and misleading. The company urges media outlets to verify facts thoroughly before publication and to refrain from disseminating unsubstantiated reports that could misinform stakeholders and the public. This statement was issued on March 26, 2026, and copies were sent to the Luxembourg Stock Exchange and Singapore Exchange Limited.

announcements.subject: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543942 - Sale Of Unsecured Stressed MFI Loan Portfolio To ARC
announcements.detail: As per intimation appended herewith
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the authorized Management Committee of Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd approved a proposal for the sale of NPA and written-off loans to an Asset Reconstruction Company (ARC). This sale includes two portfolios of Unsecured Stressed MFI Loans. Pool 1 has an Aggregate Principal Outstanding as of December 31, 2025, of approximately ₹1,016.24 crore, with a Reserve Price/Binding Offer of ₹133.10 crore, to be settled in Cash + Security Receipts. Pool 2 has an Aggregate Principal Outstanding of approximately ₹474.75 crore, with a Reserve Price/Binding Offer of ₹62.19 crore, also to be settled in Cash + Security Receipts. The bank will separately intimate upon completion of the deal.

announcements.subject: Sadbhav Engineering Ltd - 532710 - Please Find Enclosed Announcement For Signing Of Master Restructuring Agreement By Sadbhav Engineering Limited With Majority Consortium Lenders.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed announcement for signing of Master Restructuring Agreement by Sadbhav Engineering Limited with majority consortium lenders.
announcements.ai_summary: Sadbhav Engineering Limited announced on March 26, 2026, that it has signed a Master Restructuring Agreement (MRA) with a majority of its consortium lenders. This agreement, executed on March 25, 2026, involves IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited as the security trustee and debenture trustee, along with lenders including Punjab National Bank, Union Bank of India, Axis Bank Limited, Assets Enterprise Limited, Bank of India, and Yes Bank Limited. The MRA formally records the terms of the debt restructuring plan, prepared in accordance with the Reserve Bank of India's stressed assets restructuring framework. The debt being restructured aggregates to ₹1,516.71 Crores, comprising ₹906.35 Crore in fund-based exposure and ₹610.36 Crore in non-fund based limits, with the fund-based exposure to be restructured as convertible debentures. A significant term of the MRA is that the lenders have the right to appoint nominee directors.

announcements.subject: Cipla Ltd - 500087 - General Updates
announcements.detail: Mr Pradeep Bhadauria, Global Chief Scientific Officer has resigned to pursue interests outside Cipla and his last working day will be 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Cipla Ltd has announced that Mr. Pradeep Bhadauria, Global Chief Scientific Officer and a member of the Management Council, has resigned from his position. Mr. Bhadauria, who is also an employee of Cipla USA Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary, is leaving to pursue interests outside of Cipla. His last working day will be March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE and NSE of this development.

announcements.subject: DCX Systems Ltd - 543650 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Purchase Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Purchase Order
announcements.ai_summary: DCX Systems Limited has announced the receipt of purchase orders totaling approximately INR 8.92 Crores in the normal course of business. These orders are for the manufacture and supply of Cable and Wire Harness Assemblies from both domestic and international customers. Additionally, its wholly-owned subsidiary, Raneal Advanced Systems Pvt. Ltd., has secured purchase orders amounting to approximately INR 9.95 Crores for the manufacture and supply of Printed Circuit Board Assemblies from its customers.

announcements.subject: Laxmi Dental Ltd - 544339 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Board of Directors at its meeting held today i.e Thursday, March 26, 2026 has approved Scheme of Amalgamation between Bizdent Devices Private Limited, Wholly owned subsidiary company (Transferor Company) and Laxmi Dental Limited (Transferee Company).
announcements.ai_summary: Laxmi Dental Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved a Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of Bizdent Devices Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Laxmi Dental Limited, with Laxmi Dental Limited itself. The amalgamation is being undertaken under Sections 230 and 233 of the Companies Act, 2013, and is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including those from the Regional Director and stock exchanges. Bizdent Devices Private Limited, incorporated in 2021, is the Transferor Company, and Laxmi Dental Limited is the Transferee Company.

announcements.subject: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd-$ - 531381 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Prestige Group and Arihant Group jointly acquire prime land parcel in Padi, Chennai, adding GDV of INR 5,000 crores".
announcements.ai_summary: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd, as part of a joint venture with Prestige Group, has acquired a prime 16.331-acre land parcel in Padi, Chennai, on March 26, 2026. The acquisition, undertaken through Canopy Living LLP, a joint venture between Prestige Estates Projects Limited and Arihant Foundations and Housing Ltd, is projected to have a Gross Development Value (GDV) of ₹5,000 crore. The land will be developed into a premium residential project with an estimated saleable area of 3.6 million square feet. The project's strategic location near Anna Nagar is expected to capitalize on the consistent growth in Chennai's residential market.

announcements.subject: B-Right Realestate Ltd - 543543 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: BRRL surpasses Rs. 1,000 Crore Market Capitalisation Milestone.
announcements.ai_summary: B-Right Realestate Ltd has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing ₹1,000 crore in market capitalization as of March 26, 2026. This achievement reflects strong investor confidence and the company's consistent business performance. The company has a pipeline of over 30 lakh sq. ft. in prime Mumbai locations and reported a 153% revenue growth for FY25, reaching ₹103.43 crore. In the first nine months of FY26, B-Right Realestate Ltd achieved pre-sales of ₹208.42 crore, with Q3 FY26 alone contributing ₹124.03 crore. The company remains committed to delivering high-quality residential and mixed-use projects and enhancing shareholder value.

announcements.subject: Trent Ltd - 500251 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E. 26Th March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today i.e. 26th March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Trent Ltd, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the issuance of unsecured, redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The total amount for this issuance will not exceed ₹500 crore, falling within the company's permissible borrowing limits under Section 180 of the Companies Act, 2013. This move is subject to all applicable regulatory and statutory approvals. The Borrowing and Investment Committee has been authorized to finalize the terms of issuance and allotment of these NCDs. Further details regarding the issuance and allotment will be provided upon completion. The Board meeting commenced at 2:00 p.m. and concluded at 6:45 p.m.

announcements.subject: AIA Engineering Ltd - 532683 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Update (Clarification)
announcements.detail: Clarification under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: AIA Engineering Limited has issued a clarification under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, to address apprehensions regarding the shortage of commercial LPG impacting its production. The company uses PNG as its primary fuel source, with LPG used in a very limited capacity in its heat treatment processes. AIA Engineering Limited confirms that there is no disruption in the availability of either PNG or LPG at its facilities, and all plants are operating normally. Furthermore, the company is in the process of modifying its fuel system to also utilize Light Diesel Oil (LDO) in addition to PNG and LPG.

announcements.subject: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd - 505700 - Intimation For Incorporation Of Grupo Radicon SA De CV, Step-Down Subsidiary Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation for Incorporation of Step-down subsidiary is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Elecon Engineering Company Limited has informed the incorporation of its step-down subsidiary, "Grupo Radicon SA de CV," in Mexico. This subsidiary was incorporated by Elecon Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of Elecon Engineering Company Limited. The Government's Tax Agency of Mexico issued a Tax Identification Number on March 24, 2026, based on documents submitted on January 8, 2026, making January 8, 2026, the effective date of incorporation. A formal certificate of incorporation from the Public Registry of Commerce is still awaited. The newly incorporated entity is eligible to commence operations as per Mexican law after obtaining the tax identification number. Grupo Radicon SA de CV will be involved in the sales, marketing, and servicing of industrial engineering products in Mexico and Latin America.

announcements.subject: Landmark Cars Ltd - 543714 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Landmark Cars Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 26, 2026, titled "Landmark Cars exits Volkswagen operations in Delhi NCR."
announcements.ai_summary: Landmark Cars Limited has issued a press release dated March 26, 2026, announcing its exit from Volkswagen operations in Delhi NCR, effective March 31, 2026. This dealership comprised one showroom and one workshop. The company has taken this decision to reduce losses from non-performing operations and align with its strategy to rationalize costs and improve operational efficiency. Landmark Cars will continue to operate its Volkswagen dealerships in Gujarat, which are profitable. Due to the assets in Delhi NCR being depreciated over multiple years, minimal financial impact is expected on the company's books. Landmark Cars is a premium automotive retail network with dealerships for various brands.

announcements.subject: Aegis Logistics Ltd - 500003 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Aegis Logistics Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026. The Board approved the issuance of consent for assignment to Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL). This relates to a previously disclosed Framework Agreement dated June 19, 2025, with Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited (AVTL) for the transfer of a specialized storage terminal for Ammonia at Pipavav Port. The Board's approval allows AVTL to assign its rights to transfer the terminal to ATPL, a subsidiary of AVTL. The Company will execute a separate Business Transfer Agreement with ATPL upon project completion. Further details will be provided upon the execution of this agreement.

announcements.subject: Precision Wires India Ltd - 523539 - Intimation For Start Of Commercial Production Of Copper Rod At Valvada
announcements.detail: Intimation for start of commercial production of Copper Roa at Valvada
announcements.ai_summary: Precision Wires India Ltd has announced the commencement of commercial production of Copper Rod at its Valvada plant. This follows the earlier intimation on March 18, 2026, regarding the receipt of BIS certification for the same plant. This marks a significant step in the company's operational expansion.

announcements.subject: Transpek Industry Ltd-$ - 506687 - Remarks Made By Board Of Directors On Fine Levied By BSE
announcements.detail: Remarks made by the Board of Directors on fine levied by BSE
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the Board of Directors of Transpek Industry Limited reviewed the fine levied by BSE for delayed submission of a reclassification application from Promoter to Public Category. The Board opined that the fine was unjustified, considering the application was submitted in time but in a different category, deeming it a technical error rather than a violation. The company paid the fine under protest and has ensured adherence to BSE requirements, with the Board suggesting extra caution to prevent future occurrences.

announcements.subject: Archean Chemical Industries Ltd - 543657 - Intimation Of Agreement
announcements.detail: Intimation of  Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: Archean Chemical Industries Limited has entered into a loan agreement with its Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS), Neun Infra Private Limited, for Rs. 260 Crores. This loan is intended to fund the procurement of long-lead machinery and equipment for the compound semiconductor manufacturing facility of SiCSem Private Limited, which is part of the overall capital expenditure for the facility. Neun Infra Private Limited is the holding company for SiCSem Private Limited, which has received approval under the India Semiconductor Mission.

announcements.subject: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd - 539787 - Intimation Regarding Winding Up Of Healthcare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, Wholly Owned Indirect Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: This is to inform that, the HealthCare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, a non-operating wholly owned indirect subsidiary of the Company incorporated in Tanzania has been wound up with effect from March 02, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd has informed that its non-operating wholly owned indirect subsidiary, Healthcare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, incorporated in Tanzania, has been wound up effective March 02, 2026. The company received the formal notification regarding the winding up on March 26, 2026. This subsidiary was not involved in any operational activities.

announcements.subject: Privi Speciality Chemicals Ltd - 530117 - Subscription Towards Equity Share Capital In Joint Venture Company, Prigiv Specialties Private Limited
announcements.detail: Subscription towards equity share capital in joint venture company, Prigiv Specialties Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, both joint venture parties, Privi Speciality Chemicals Limited and Givaudan SA, Switzerland, subscribed to the equity share capital of Prigiv Specialties Private Limited as per their Joint Venture Agreement dated July 29, 2021, and subsequent amendment agreements. The Board of Directors of Prigiv Specialties Private Limited approved a circular resolution for this allotment of equity share capital. Post-allotment, the paid-up capital of the joint venture company is INR 85,00,00,000, with Privi Speciality Chemicals Limited holding 51% (INR 4,33,50,000) and Givaudan SA holding 49% (INR 4,16,50,000).

announcements.subject: Gamco Ltd - 540097 - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 ("SEBI SAST Regulations'''''''').
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that our company has received disclosure from Rashi Goenka belonging to promoter group  of our company, regarding purchase of share of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Rashi Goenka, belonging to the promoter group of GAMCO LIMITED, has acquired 6,206 Equity Shares of face value Rs. 2 each through an open market transaction on March 25, 2026. This acquisition increases her total holding to 1,411,933 Equity Shares, representing 2.61% of the issued and paid-up equity share capital of the company. Before this transaction, her holding was 1,405,727 shares, representing 2.60% of the total voting capital. This disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd - 544407 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the Board of Directors of Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd approved the sale of 10% of the equity stake, representing 5,000 Equity Shares of INR 10 each, in its subsidiary Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL) to Itochu Corporation for an aggregate consideration of INR 80,32,00,000. Post-sale, Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd will retain an 86% equity stake in ATPL. The Board also approved the assignment of rights to acquire a specialized storage terminal for Ammonia at Pipavav Port to ATPL. This assignment relates to a Framework Agreement dated June 19, 2025, with promoter Aegis Logistics Limited. A Business Transfer Agreement will be executed between ATPL and Aegis Logistics Limited upon project completion.

announcements.subject: JSW Energy Ltd - 533148 - Material Litigation Under Regulation 30(4) Of The Securities Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')- Update
announcements.detail: Material litigation under Regulation 30(4) of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')- Update
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Energy Ltd provided an update on March 26, 2026, regarding a writ petition filed by the Indian Wind Power Association, in which its subsidiary, JSW Neo Energy Limited, is a member. The petition challenged an order from the Andhra Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission (APERC) that permitted deductions from energy payments for Generation Based Incentive (GBI). The Hon’ble Supreme Court, in a judgment dated March 25, 2026, dismissed the appeal filed by Andhra Pradesh DISCOMs against the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity's order, which had set aside the APERC order. The Supreme Court held that GBI is to be disbursed to generating companies over and above the tariff.

announcements.subject: MSTC Ltd - 542597 - Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release regarding exclusive partnership with EaseMyTrip
announcements.ai_summary: MSTC Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, an exclusive partnership with EaseMyTrip (Easy Trip Planners Ltd.) to provide travel services for the government sector. Under this agreement, EaseMyTrip will integrate its APIs with MSTC’s system, offering services like flights, hotels, and holiday packages. MSTC will facilitate corporate travel for government sector organizations, leveraging EaseMyTrip's inventory and technology. This collaboration aims to expand EaseMyTrip's presence in the institutional and government travel segment and streamline procurement processes for MSTC.

announcements.subject: Vivid Mercantile Ltd - 542046 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: The Board of Director at its meeting held on Thursday, 26 March, 2026 to consider and approve the Draft letter of offer to be filed with BSE Limited for their prior Approval for issue of right Equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Vivid Mercantile Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on March 26, 2026, considered and approved a Draft Letter of Offer for a Rights Issue of equity shares. The company plans to issue up to 5,01,28,200 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹1 each at an issue price of ₹5 per share, aggregating up to ₹2506.41 Lakhs. Each share includes a premium of ₹4. The Draft Letter of Offer will be filed with BSE Limited for prior approval and submitted to SEBI. The payment terms require the full issue price of ₹5 per share (₹1 face value and ₹4 premium) to be paid on application.

announcements.subject: Sandhar Technologies Ltd - 541163 - Board Meeting Outcome
announcements.detail: Board Meeting Outcome
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Sandhar Technologies Ltd, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved a proposal to establish an assembling/manufacturing facility in Mexico. This expansion aims to strengthen the company's international presence, improve proximity to key customers and OEMs, and enhance operational and supply chain efficiencies. The facility will be set up through a branch office, a wholly-owned subsidiary, or another permissible entity under Mexican law. Further details will be disclosed upon finalization of the structure and receipt of all necessary regulatory and statutory approvals.

announcements.company: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd
announcements.subject: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd - 523874 - Receipt Of Letter Of Acceptance From Central PSU - Indian Oil Corporation Limited - Selvassa.
announcements.detail: Receipt of Letter of Acceptance from Central PSU - Indian Oil Corporation Limited - Selvassa.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from Indian Oil Corporation Limited for the procurement and supply of 1.0 mm MS Plain and Epoxy Coated Barrels. The contract, valued at ₹4,59,90,000 (Rupees Four Crore Fifty-Nine Lakh Ninety Thousand only), is for a period of 12 months and will supply barrels to various locations including Silvassa. This LOA, bearing reference number MnC/LUB-36/PT-115/25-26/371 dated March 25, 2026, signifies a strong relationship with Indian Oil Corporation Limited and is expected to positively impact the company's operational performance by strengthening its order book. The company is fulfilling this order from its Silvassa facility.

announcements.subject: Sundaram-Clayton Ltd - 544066 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sundaram-Clayton Limited has successfully completed the sale of its 16.33-acre land parcel located in Korattur Village, Ambattur Taluk, Chennai District, Tamil Nadu, to Canopy Living LLP. This transaction, which was initiated with an Agreement to Sell on January 8, 2026, was finalized on March 26, 2026, with the execution and registration of the sale deed. The company received the balance consideration of ₹533.62 crore, in addition to the ₹25 crore advance previously paid, bringing the total sale proceeds to ₹558.62 crore. This divestment is a material development for the company, and the transaction was completed at 3:50 p.m. IST on March 26, 2026.

announcements.subject: Azad Engineering Ltd - 544061 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Azad Engineering Limited has been chosen as a Single Source Supplier Partner and signed a Long term contract and price agreement for 8 years term with Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Limited , Japan (MHI) for supply of highly engineered and complex hot-section Nozzle Vanes Segments of gas turbine engines, marking a rare achievement for any Indian precision engineering manufacturing Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Azad Engineering Limited has been appointed as a Single Source Supplier Partner by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Limited, Japan (MHI). The company has signed a Long Term Contract & Price Agreement (LTCPA) for an 8-year term. This agreement is for the supply of highly engineered and complex hot-section Nozzle Vanes Segments of gas turbine engines. This marks a significant advancement for the company, moving from manufacturing compressor airfoils to producing critical combustion hot-section components.

announcements.subject: Paradeep Phosphates Ltd - 543530 - Intimation Regarding Change Of Corporate Identification Number (CIN) Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has officially changed its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) from "L24129OR1981PLC001020" to "L20122OR1981PLC001020".
