announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Divestment of entire Stake in Erkunt Sanayii Anonim Şirketi, a step-down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Mahindra Overseas Investment Company (Mauritius) Limited (MOICML) and its subsidiary Erkunt Traktör Sanayii Anonim Şirketi, has entered into a Stock Purchase Agreement on April 10, 2026, to sell their entire 99.04% stake in Erkunt Sanayi Anonim Şirketi (Erkunt Foundry) to Hisarlar Makina Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., Mr. Oguzhan Sahinkaya, and Mr. Bunyamin Sarioglu. This divestment of the foundry business is in line with the company's capital allocation framework. Upon completion, Erkunt Foundry will cease to be a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited. Detailed information regarding the turnover, revenue, income, and net worth contributed by Erkunt Foundry for the year ended March 31, 2025, is provided in Annexure – A.

announcements.subject: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has received a certified true copy of the order dated March 26, 2026, from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Division Bench - II, Chennai, regarding a composite scheme of arrangement. This order was uploaded on the Tribunal's website on April 2, 2026, and received by the company on April 9, 2026. The scheme involves Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited, Apollo Healthco Limited (Transferor Company 1), Keimed Private Limited (Transferor Company 2), and Apollo Healthtech Limited (Resultant Company), along with their respective shareholders and creditors. This is a continuation of previous intimations regarding the scheme under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

Director Vinod Kumar Baid confirmed on behalf of the promoter and its group, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PAC), that no encumbrance was made over the company's shares, directly or indirectly, beyond what was already disclosed for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosure has been submitted to BSE Limited, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, and The Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited for their records.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Coal India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 10, 2026, titled "CIL Press release on CIL insulates Indian coal users from increasing input costs.".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Coal India Limited (CIL) has issued a press release on April 10, 2026, stating that it is absorbing increased operational costs to insulate Indian coal users from rising prices. Despite a 44 percent increase in Ammonium Nitrate (AN) prices from Rs. 50,500 per metric ton to Rs. 72,750 per metric ton as of April 1, 2026, and a 26% rise in the average cost of explosives from Rs. 39,588 per metric ton in February 2026 to Rs. 49,783 per metric ton by March end, CIL is not passing these costs on. CIL consumes approximately 9 Lakh metric tons of explosives annually. The company is also compensating contractors for increased industrial diesel prices.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ajmera Realty & Infra India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding operations update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026 dated April 10, 2026, titled "Ajmera Realty scales new heights with INR 1,701 Cr pre-sales; beats FY26 guidance and clocks highest ever annual collections".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ajmera Realty & Infra India Limited announced its operational update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with pre-sales reaching INR 1,701 crore, exceeding the FY26 guidance and marking the highest ever annual collections. The company achieved sales area of 6,60,246 sq. ft, up 11% YoY, and collections of INR 1,103 crore, up 71% YoY. Ajmera Realty launched four projects in FY26, aggregating an estimated GDV of INR 3,088 crore, with strong buyer interest in its flagship developments. This announcement was made on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Mangalam Worldwide Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 10, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mangalam Worldwide Limited (MWL) has announced its empanelment as an approved vendor with leading global and domestic institutions, including QatarEnergy, Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL), Engineers India Limited (EIL), and Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited (GSFC). This development, effective April 10, 2026, is expected to open new revenue streams for MWL through sector diversification and strengthen its position in international energy, refinery, infrastructure, power, and industrial sectors. The empanelment validates MWL's product quality, manufacturing capabilities, and operational reliability, enabling participation in high-specification projects and expanding its presence in both international and domestic markets. Partnerships with QatarEnergy will grant access to global oil and gas supply chains, while collaborations with BHEL and EIL will establish footholds in India's power infrastructure and refinery-petrochemical sectors, respectively.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts

announcements.ai_summary: On April 9, 2026, Railtel Corporation Of India Ltd. received a work order from The Goa Building And Other Construction Workers Welfare Board for the development of an exclusive online portal. The value of this domestic order is ₹23,18,08,625 (including tax). The execution of this contract is scheduled to be completed by June 8, 2026. There are no promoter or promoter group interests in the awarding entity, and the transaction is considered an arm's length deal.

announcements.subject: Product launch
announcements.detail: Park Medi World Limited has informed the Exchange about launch of Hospital in Panchkula
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Park Medi World Limited has announced the successful launch of its new multi-super specialty hospital in Panchkula on April 10, 2026. This expansion aims to address the growing demand for advanced healthcare services in Haryana, Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, and Chandigarh, reducing the need for patients to travel to metropolitan areas for specialized treatments. The new facility is equipped with advanced diagnostics, modular operation theatres, and critical care infrastructure, offering comprehensive care across specialties like oncology, neurosciences, orthopedics, and cardiology, including robotic-assisted procedures. The hospital is designed with a significant proportion of beds dedicated to high-acuity critical care services. This launch, combined with the ongoing expansion of its Mohali facility, will bring the Group's total bed capacity in the Tricity region to approximately 850 beds, strengthening its integrated healthcare ecosystem in North India.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Highway Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange about Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Highway Infrastructure Limited, has decided to withdraw its Letter of Acceptance (LOA) for the Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh, issued by the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI). As a consequence of not accepting the LOA, NHAI has debarred the company, including its directors and owners, from the list of pre-qualified bidders for a period of three months. This decision impacts the company's ability to participate in future bidding processes for a specified duration. The detailed disclosure regarding this action is enclosed as 'Annexure – A'.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Firstsource Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Firstsource earns  A  in CDP Supplier Engagement Assessment; Secures  B  rating in CDP Climate and Water Security Disclosures for FY25".
announcements.ai_summary: Firstsource Solutions Limited has announced a press release dated April 09, 2026, detailing its environmental performance and supplier engagement for FY25. The company has earned an 'A' rating in CDP's Supplier Engagement Assessment (SEA) and a 'B' rating in CDP Climate Disclosure and Water Security Disclosures. This recognition places Firstsource among leading global organizations actively engaging suppliers on climate-related priorities. The company's FY25 performance builds upon its FY24 results, where it also received a 'B' rating for Climate Disclosure and an 'A' for Supplier Engagement. Firstsource has a commitment to achieving Net Zero by 2050.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Tata Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about acquisition of equity stake in Tata Steel Colors Private Limited (Formerly Tata BlueScope Steel Private Limited)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Steel Limited has completed the acquisition of the remaining 10,000 equity shares of face value ₹10/- each in its subsidiary, Tata Steel Colors Private Limited (formerly Tata BlueScope Steel Private Limited), for a consideration of ₹0.03 crore. This transaction, which took place on April 9, 2026, was executed as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated November 12, 2025, with BlueScope Steel Asia Holdings Pty Ltd. Following this acquisition, Tata Steel Limited's shareholding in Tata Steel Colors Private Limited has increased from 99.99% to 100%, making it an indirect wholly owned subsidiary. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Nimbus Projects Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Nimbus Group Reports 77% YoY Growth in Q4 FY26 Pre-Sales".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nimbus Projects Limited has announced a significant 77% year-on-year growth in pre-sales for the fourth quarter of FY26, with pre-sales booking value reaching Rs. 281.24 crore compared to Rs. 158.90 crore in the corresponding period last year. Customer collections also saw a substantial increase of 121%, rising to Rs. 100.63 crore from Rs. 45.51 crore. For the full FY26, the company reported pre-sales of Rs. 545 crore and customer collections of Rs. 285 crore. This strong performance, detailed in a press release dated April 09, 2026, reflects sustained homebuyer confidence and effective sales strategies. The information is available on the company's website.

announcements.ai_summary: BSE Limited has received approval from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) to launch derivative contracts on the "BSE Focused IT Index". This index tracks the performance of 14 companies within the Information Technology sector. The launch of these derivative contracts is expected to provide new trading and hedging opportunities for market participants interested in the IT sector. BSE Limited will issue separate exchange circulars detailing the launch and contract specifications. Investors should monitor these upcoming circulars for specific information on contract sizes, expiry dates, and margin requirements. This regulatory approval signifies an expansion of BSE's product offerings and could potentially increase trading volumes on the exchange.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Amagi Media Labs Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Amagi Unveils Agentic Capabilities Across Its Industry Cloud Platform, Enabling Autonomous Media Operations".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Amagi Media Labs Limited has announced the unveiling of agentic capabilities across its industry cloud platform, enabling autonomous media operations. This significant development allows for the automation of metadata enrichment, artwork generation, ad-break identification, captioning, and localization, effectively putting media operations on autopilot. By integrating reasoning agents powered by Amagi Intelligence, the company aims to help media enterprises scale their operations without a linear increase in costs, addressing the bottlenecks of traditional manual workflows in the face of surging content volumes and global distribution. These new capabilities are designed to handle the heavy lifting of media preparation, allowing media teams to manage large content libraries efficiently.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Eicher Motors Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "FLYING FLEA C6 IS HERE - UNLOCKING A WHOLE NEW LEVEL OF CITY+CAPABILITY".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eicher Motors Limited has issued a press release dated April 09, 2026, announcing the launch of its new city+ electric mobility brand, Royal Enfield's Flying Flea, and its first motorcycle, the Flying Flea C6. The Flying Flea C6 will be available for bookings and test rides starting at 12 PM on April 10, 2026, at its first store in Jayanagar, Bengaluru. The motorcycle is priced at ₹ 2.79 Lakh (ex-showroom) or ₹ 1.99 Lakh (Battery-as-a-Service). Deliveries are scheduled to commence at the end of May 2026. The Flying Flea C6 boasts a top speed of 115 km/h, over 400 Nm of wheel torque, and a lightweight of 124 kgs.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Lyka Labs Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lyka Labs Limited has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Lyka Exports Limited with Lyka Labs Limited has been sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, via an order dated March 16, 2026. The certified true copy of the NCLT order was received on March 24, 2026, and subsequently filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, on April 8, 2026, making the Scheme effective from April 8, 2026. The Appointed Date for the Scheme is April 1, 2022. Upon effectiveness, the authorized share capital of Lyka Labs Limited has automatically increased to Rs. 59,00,00,000, divided into 5,70,00,000 Equity shares of Rs. 10 each and 2,00,000 Redeemable Preference Shares of Rs. 100 each, replacing the previous Clause V of the Memorandum of Association.

announcements.ai_summary: Ravi Kant Jaipuria, as a promoter/promoter group member of Varun Beverages Limited, has submitted a declaration under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This declaration confirms that no shares of the company have been encumbered, directly or indirectly, by the promoter group or persons acting in concert during the financial year ended December 31, 2025, and the period ended March 31, 2026, other than those already disclosed. The company's financial year runs from January 1st to December 31st, as approved by the Company Law Board. This disclosure is for the information and records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Dev Information Technology Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Limited has secured a significant work order from National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) on behalf of the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System of the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). The order, valued at approximately INR 26 Crore, encompasses the design, development, integration, and maintenance of software/applications/platforms, along with cybersecurity services for the Pharmacy Council of India's existing IT infrastructure. This includes the development of web-based software infrastructure and applications for the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System. The company will proceed with the execution of this order as per the terms agreed upon.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Madhav Copper Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Non applicability of large entity criteria as per SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated 26th Nov., 2018'.
announcements.ai_summary: Madhav Copper Limited has confirmed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a "Large Corporate" as defined by SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. This confirmation, dated April 09, 2026, means that the company is not subject to the disclosure and compliance requirements stipulated for Large Corporates concerning the issuance of debt securities. The company has assessed its position as of March 31, 2026, and found that it does not fulfill the specified criteria in Para 2.2 of the SEBI circular. Therefore, the disclosure requirements under para 4 of the said circular are not applicable to Madhav Copper Limited.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Datamatics Global Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Datamatics Launches TruAI Underwriting to Transform Insurance Underwriting with Agentic AI.".
announcements.ai_summary: Datamatics Global Services Limited has issued a press release on April 09, 2026, announcing the launch of "TruAI Underwriting." This new solution is an Agentic AI-based platform designed to significantly enhance and streamline the insurance underwriting process. TruAI Underwriting aims to assist insurers in assessing financial and medical risks with greater speed, consistency, and accuracy, particularly for complex, data-intensive cases. The solution ingests and analyzes data from various structured and unstructured sources, extracts relevant parameters, identifies risk indicators, and provides contextual recommendations to underwriters. It is designed to reduce underwriting turnaround time by up to 70%, lower costs by up to 50%, and improve accuracy by up to 25%. The final underwriting decision remains with the human underwriter, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited announced on April 9, 2026, its decision to acquire a 26% stake in Neon Hybren Private Limited. This acquisition is a strategic move to comply with the Electricity Rules 2005, which require a minimum 26% shareholding to qualify as a captive user for power supply from Neon's captive power plant in Punjab. Neon Hybren Private Limited is a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited, being a subsidiary of Mahindra Susten Private Limited, which is in turn a subsidiary of Mahindra Holdings Limited. The Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement (SSSHA) has been executed with Neon and MSPL. Upon completion, MSPL's shareholding in Neon will reduce from 100% to 74%, but Neon will continue to be a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has entered into a Technology Collaboration Agreement (TCA) with E2S Company Limited, Republic of Korea. This international agreement focuses on Static Excitation Systems (SEE) and Brushless Excitation Systems (AVR) for synchronous machines. The TCA will enable BHEL to design, engineer, manufacture, install, commission, service, test, retrofit, and sell both static and brushless excitation systems in India and overseas. This collaboration is expected to help BHEL maintain its competitive edge, strengthen its capabilities in the excitation system business, and contribute to the Government's 'Make in India' initiative. Specific details regarding consideration and significant terms are confidential.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Bharat Forge Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Forge Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 9, 2026, reviewed a proposal for the phased restructuring of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bharat Forge CDP GmbH (BF CDP), located in Germany. The restructuring may involve an orderly wind-down and solvent liquidation of BF CDP due to market challenges and cost disadvantages in Germany. To support this proposed restructuring, the Board has approved a financing arrangement of up to EUR 30 million. The Board has authorized a sub-committee to oversee the further evaluation and implementation of this proposal. The company will communicate subsequent developments to the stock exchanges as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Star Paper Mills Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Non applicability of large entity criteria as per SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated 26th Nov., 2018'.
announcements.ai_summary: Star Paper Mills Limited has informed the stock exchanges that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a "Large Corporate" for the year ended March 31, 2026, as per the SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. Consequently, the company is not subject to the disclosure requirements stipulated for large entities in relation to fundraising through debt securities. The company confirmed that it had no outstanding borrowings as of March 31, 2026.

announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Limited informed the exchange on April 09, 2026, that its vessel, "SEAMEC AGASTYA," has been temporarily taken out of operation due to technical reasons, effective from April 9, 2026, at 08:30 hrs. The company had previously communicated the vessel's deployment status on January 17, 2026. Seamec Limited will provide a further update once the technical defect has been rectified. The company is a member of the IMCA and holds ISO certifications for quality, environmental, and occupational health and safety management systems.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Oil Country Tubular Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Oil Country Tubular Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026. The Board of Directors approved a Term Loan Agreement dated April 9, 2026, to avail a Term Loan facility amounting to Rs. 6.82 Crores (Rupees Six Crores Eighty-Two Lakhs Only) from Cosmos Co-Operative Bank Ltd. This loan will be utilized for the purchase of new machinery/equipment. The meeting commenced at 11:30 A.M. (IST) and concluded at 12:25 P.M. (IST). announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Dilip Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Dilip Buildcon Limited, through its joint venture DBL -RBL (JV), has been declared the L-1 bidder for a significant project by the Narmada Water Resources Water Supply & Kalpasar Department, Government of Gujarat. The project involves the "Designing and Construction of Ged Barrage, Protection work & Other allied activities across river Sabarmati between Hirpura barrage & Lakroda weir" on an EPC mode. The order value is Rs. 268 Crores, excluding GST, and the completion period is 24 months. This includes a 10-year period for Operation and Maintenance. The company is required to submit further disclosures as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Persistent Launches Merchant Risk Management Solution Powered by Databricks AI".
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Persistent Systems Limited, has announced the launch of its new Merchant Risk Management and Fraud Detection solution. This solution is powered by the Databricks Data Intelligence platform and utilizes Agentic AI for proactive risk assessment and fraud prevention. It enables financial institutions to reduce fraud losses and improve detection accuracy by analyzing merchant profiles, compliance history, and transaction patterns in real-time. The solution is designed as a Databricks accelerator and can unify batch and streaming data for continuous monitoring and AI-driven actions before losses occur. This launch is part of Persistent Systems' ongoing efforts in digital engineering and enterprise modernization.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 & 51 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF 11TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES V (INE153A08089)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited (MTNL) has confirmed the funding of the 11th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series V (INE153A08089). The funding for this payment, due on April 12, 2026, was completed on April 8, 2026, and has been deposited into the designated escrow account maintained with the Bank of India. This action is in compliance with Regulations 30 & 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This update assures bondholders of timely interest payments and demonstrates the company's adherence to its financial obligations.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Steel Strips Wheels Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026. It is informed that the Board of Directors of the Company in its meeting held today i.e. Thursday, April 9, 2026, inter alia, have approved to execute a  Amendment Agreement To Shareholders Agreement  with NuPower Renewables Private Limited (holding company of EUPL) and Echanda Urja Private Limited (EUPL), as well as  Amendment Agreement to Energy Sale Agreement  with EUPL, for further acquiring 37582 equity shares of Face value of Rs. 10/- each of EUPL at a consideration of Rs. 3.76 lakhs. The said acquisition of shares is for the purpose of procuring additional renewable (wind) power from EUPL for the Chennai plant of company under Group Captive Scheme.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Steel Strips Wheels Limited, in a board meeting held on April 9, 2026, approved the execution of an Amendment Agreement to the Shareholders Agreement with NuPower Renewables Private Limited and Echanda Urja Private Limited (EUPL). Additionally, an Amendment Agreement to the Energy Sale Agreement with EUPL was also approved. The company will acquire an additional 37,582 equity shares of EUPL, each with a face value of Rs. 10/-, for a total consideration of Rs. 3.76 lakhs. This acquisition is intended to secure additional renewable (wind) power for the company's Chennai plant under a Group Captive Scheme. The board meeting commenced at 10:30 a.m. and concluded at 11:35 a.m.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of execution of Joint Venture Agreement by wholly-owned subsidiary with Minerva Holding RSC Ltd for Minerva Renewables Holding RSC Limited'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has announced the execution of a Joint Venture Agreement by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Adani Renewable Energy Middle East Ltd (AGEL UAE), with Minerva Holding RSC Ltd. The joint venture, named Minerva Renewables Holding RSC Limited (JVCo), was established on April 08, 2026. The purpose of this agreement is for the development, construction, and operation of renewable energy projects in India. AGEL UAE will invest up to a 20% interest in JVCo. Minerva is wholly owned by EPointZero Holding RSC Ltd, the energy and infrastructure arm of International Holding Company PJSC.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Micro Systems Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Business Update'.
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Micro Systems Limited has successfully completed blast trials for Limpet Mines, which are diver-carried mines used in Naval Defence. This achievement positions the company as the sole Indian entity to have successfully developed this product for the Indian Navy. This milestone is significant as it strengthens the company's capabilities in providing a complete spectrum of underwater mines, including shallow water, deep water, and limpet mine categories, thereby enhancing its expertise in underwater electronic warfare systems. This update is provided for the information of stakeholders.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Asian Granito India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates - Receipt of Listing and Trading Approval of equity shares allotted pursuant to Scheme of Arrangement.
announcements.ai_summary: Asian Granito India Limited has received listing and trading approval from both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for 6,45,63,636 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted pursuant to the Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Asian Granito India Limited, Adicon Ceramica Tiles Private Limited, and Adicon Ceramics Limited. The listing approval was granted by BSE on March 30, 2026, and by NSE on March 30, 2026. Trading approval from both exchanges was received on April 08, 2026. The shares are expected to be listed and admitted to dealings upon confirmation from NSDL/CDSL for credit of beneficiaries' accounts or dispatch of physical share certificates.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Rategain Travel Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "RateGain s UNO Platform Powers Direct GDS Connectivity for Hotelogix Worldwide".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RateGain Travel Technologies Limited announced a strategic partnership with Hotelogix, a cloud-based Property Management System. This collaboration will enable Hotelogix customers worldwide to access direct GDS (Global Distribution System) connectivity via RateGain's UNO Platform. This integration allows hotels to connect directly with Amadeus, Sabre Corporation, and Travelport, reaching over 600,000 travel agents and corporate travel programs. The partnership aims to simplify GDS distribution for hotels, eliminating the need for third-party providers and reducing costs. Hotels using Hotelogix PMS can now manage GDS connectivity within their existing system, enhancing their distribution capabilities and driving bookings.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Premier Energies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Premier Energies Secures Orders Worth ₹ 2,577 Crores in Q4 FY26".
announcements.ai_summary: Premier Energies Limited announced on April 09, 2026, that it has secured new orders worth ₹2,577 Crores in Q4 FY26 for the supply of 1,600 MW of solar cells and modules. The execution of these orders is scheduled to take place across FY 2027 and FY 2028. These contracts were awarded by a mix of leading domestic Independent Power Producers (IPPs), module manufacturers, and EPC contractors in India. This significant order inflow reflects the company's growing scale, with its cell capacity expected to reach 10.6 GW by September 2026 and module manufacturing capacity recently expanded to 11.1 GW.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Coforge Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Coforge launches  Mod Squads    Outcome-based human-agent pods under a subscription pricing construct".
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has issued a press release dated April 08, 2026, announcing the launch of "Mod Squads." These are outcome-based human-agent pods offered under a subscription pricing construct, aiming to replace traditional Time & Material models with predictable costs and faster time-to-market. Enterprises can assemble custom AI-native teams tailored to specific industry and engineering workflows. Coforge is offering over 130 pre-built AI agents across industry-specific (e.g., fraud detection for banking, claims triaging for insurance) and engineering-focused (e.g., legacy code reverse engineering, QA automation) categories. These agents can be deployed on customer-hosted or Coforge-hosted Forge-X infrastructure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Signature Global Cuts Net Debt by 77% to INR 2.0 Billion in FY26; Achieves Pre-Sales of INR 82.2 Billion".
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has issued a press release announcing significant financial and operational achievements for FY26. The company has successfully reduced its net debt by 77%, bringing it down to INR 2.0 billion at the end of FY26 from INR 8.8 billion at the end of FY25, reaching a historic low. This strong balance sheet is further supported by INR 27.70 billion in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2026. The company reported robust pre-sales of INR 82.2 billion for FY26 and collections of INR 40.0 billion during the same period. The average sales realization saw a substantial increase to INR 15,250 per sq. ft. in FY26, up from INR 12,457 per sq. ft. in FY25, attributed to higher sales in premium markets and price adjustments. Additionally, the company received INR 12.93 billion from Millennia Realtors Private Limited for a joint venture, signaling its expansion into large-scale commercial development in the NCR region.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Key Operational updates for Q4FY26 and FY26'.
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has provided key operational updates for the fourth quarter (Q4FY26) and the full fiscal year (FY26). In FY26, the company achieved pre-sales of INR 82.2 billion, a decrease from INR 102.9 billion in FY25, with Q4FY26 pre-sales at INR 15.4 billion compared to INR 16.2 billion in Q4FY25. The average sales realization increased to INR 15,250 per sq. ft. in FY26 from INR 12,457 per sq. ft. in FY25, driven by premium market sales and price increases. Collections for FY26 were INR 40.0 billion, down from INR 43.8 billion in FY25, with Q4FY26 collections at INR 9.1 billion versus INR 11.7 billion in Q4FY25. Notably, the company received INR 12.93 billion from Millennia Realtors Private Limited as consideration for a joint venture in a subsidiary, marking its entry into large-scale commercial development in the NCR region. The company's net debt significantly reduced to INR 2.0 billion at the end of FY26 from INR 8.8 billion at the end of FY25, and it holds INR 27.70 billion in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has informed the Exchange about Commissioning of additional 4 MW out of 100 MW capacity of Wind power project in Gujarat.
announcements.ai_summary: ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, has commissioned an additional 4 MW of its 100 MW wind power project located in Gujarat. This commissioning brings the total commissioned capacity of the project to 96 MW out of the planned 100 MW. The commissioning has been confirmed by officials from Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA) and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited (PGVCL), with a formal certificate expected shortly. This expansion signifies progress in the company's renewable energy capacity.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Redemption of Optional Convertible Debentures and acquisition of equity shares pursuant to conversion of loan
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Refex Industries Limited has announced the redemption of Optional Convertible Debentures (OCDs) amounting to ₹3,00,00,000 by its subsidiary, Venwind Refex Power Limited (VRPL), on April 08, 2026. Furthermore, VRPL has converted an outstanding loan of ₹4,85,03,664, provided by Refex Industries Limited, into equity shares. This conversion resulted in Refex Industries Limited being allotted 2,768 equity shares of VRPL, increasing its shareholding from 77.39% to 77.77%, a rise of 0.38%. The face value of each equity share is ₹10, and the conversion was at a fair value of ₹17,523 per share.

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sanjay Prakash Mangal, a promoter of Hindprakash Industries Limited, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. As of March 31, 2026, Sanjay Prakash Mangal and the promoter group, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PAC), collectively hold 85,50,955 equity shares in the company. The disclosure confirms that no encumbrance on these shares has been made, either directly or indirectly, during the financial year. The annexed table details the shareholding of individual promoters and promoter group members, including Sanjay Prakash Mangal (22,32,590 shares), Om Prakash Mangal (10,70,000 shares), and Hindprakash Global Private Limited (4,67,950 shares), among others.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Almondz Global Securities Limited has informed the Exchange regarding   Revised Clarification on Shareholding Pattern pursuant to NSE Observatio
announcements.ai_summary: Almondz Global Securities Limited has provided a revised clarification on its shareholding pattern pursuant to an observation from NSE. The company had previously sought in-principle approval for a preferential issue of convertible warrants, with shareholder approval obtained on March 27, 2026. NSE had raised observations regarding disclosures in the Explanatory Statement to the EGM Notice, specifically concerning the shareholding pattern. Almondz Global Securities Limited clarifies that 15,078,408 equity shares, initially proposed for allotment, were reflected in the pre-issue shareholding pattern but have since been withdrawn as they had not been allotted at the time of the notice. Consequently, these shares are not considered in either the pre or post-issue shareholding pattern. The company is submitting a revised shareholding pattern and confirms this clarification does not impact the validity of the resolutions passed at the EGM.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: BSE Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Equity Shares in Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation
announcements.ai_summary: BSE Limited has announced the acquisition of equity shares in Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation, a Section 8 Company. This follows SEBI approval received under Regulation 38(2) of Securities Contracts (Regulation) (Stock Exchanges and Clearing Corporations) Regulations, 2018. The Section 8 Company, named "Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation" (SSE CBF), was incorporated on April 7, 2026. BSE Limited, along with NABARD, SIDBI, and NSE, are jointly promoting this entity. The acquisition is related to the developmental/social impact sector, focusing on capacity building and training for Social Stock Exchange activities. This intimation is made in continuation to an earlier intimation dated December 17, 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: CMI Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: CMI Limited has informed the Exchange about general updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended. The filing includes yearly disclosures received from the Promoter and Promoter Group/PAC of the Company. Investors should refer to the full disclosure for specific details regarding any substantial acquisitions or changes in promoter holdings. This is for the information and record of the Exchange.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Lupin Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Lupin Announces Approval of Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets in the United States ".
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Limited has announced the approval of its Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets by the United States Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA). The approved strengths include 5 mg/500 mg, 5 mg/1,000 mg, 10 mg/500 mg, and 10 mg/1,000 mg. Additionally, the company received tentative approval for the 2.5 mg/1,000 mg strength. These tablets are bioequivalent to Xigduo® XR for the indicated uses. This U.S. FDA approval marks a significant milestone for Lupin, expanding its product offerings in the anti-diabetic segment in a key market. Lupin is a global pharmaceutical company with a strong presence in over 100 markets.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: Innovision Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: Innovision Limited has been awarded a work order for the engagement of a user fee collection agency for the Vanagaram fee plaza on the Chennai Bypass Phase-I. The contract, awarded by the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI), includes the upkeep and maintenance of adjacent toilet blocks and the recouping of consumable items. The contract was digitally signed on April 6, 2026, and is set to commence on April 15, 2026, and conclude on April 15, 2027, for a duration of one year. This domestic contract falls under the category of toll collection and facility maintenance.

(Listed On NSE Debt Segment)'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Karnataka Bank Limited has provided an update regarding debt securities issued on a private placement basis for the half-year ended March 31, 2026. The bank has issued Non-Convertible Securities amounting to Rs. 300.00 crore with a coupon rate of 10.70% per annum, maturing on March 30, 2032. These securities have an embedded call option, subject to prior RBI approval, allowing the bank to redeem them after five years from the allotment date. The total amount outstanding remains Rs. 300.00 crore. This information is submitted in accordance with SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed regarding Resolution Plan submitted by the Company under CIRP for Gwalior Bypass Project Ltd (Corporate Debtor) in 2020 - Plan not approved - Settlement reached by the Company with the erstwhile Promoter/Director of the Corporate Debtor - Rs. 20.00 Crore Compensation received by the Company towards costs incurred by it as part of settlement.
announcements.ai_summary: PNC Infratech Limited has announced a settlement regarding the Gwalior Bypass Project Ltd (Corporate Debtor) CIRP. The company's resolution plan, approved by the Committee of Creditors (CoC) in 2020, was not approved by the NCLT due to protracted legal proceedings involving Mr. Nakul Bharana, an erstwhile director. To resolve the matter, PNC Infratech entered into an amicable settlement with Mr. Bharana and received Rs. 20.00 Crore as compensation for costs incurred. The company has also issued a No Objection Certificate (NOC) to Mr. Bharana on April 7, 2026. This settlement aims to finally resolve the dispute, which involved a performance bank guarantee of Rs. 29.51 Crores that had been valid for nearly six years.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aaron Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Achieves Highest Ever Turnover of Rs.92.01 Crore in FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Aaron Industries Limited has reported its highest ever turnover for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, reaching Rs. 92.01 Crore. This represents a substantial year-on-year growth of 18.06% compared to Rs. 77.93 Crore in FY 2024-25. The Elevator Division contributed Rs. 68.95 Crore, while the Stainless Steel Polishing Division generated Rs. 23.05 Crore. In the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, the company's total revenue was Rs. 27.32 Crore, an increase of 13.31% from Rs. 24.11 Crore in Q4 FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Rajputana Stainless Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "A defining Milestone: Debt-free Status Achieved".
announcements.ai_summary: Rajputana Stainless Limited has announced achieving debt-free status as of April 8, 2026, marking a significant milestone post-listing. The company has successfully repaid its entire outstanding debt amounting to Rs. 96.01 Crores. This repayment includes term loans, working capital facilities, and unsecured borrowings, aligning with the stated utilization of its IPO proceeds. This strategic move signifies a strengthened financial position for the company.

This communication was dated April 7, 2026. The company is treating this as an intimation under Regulation 30(2) read with Schedule III Part A Para A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The information has also been made available on the company's website, www.pipavav.com.

announcements.subject: Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: SML Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Report for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: SML Mahindra Limited has provided its production, sales, and export figures for the month of March 2026. In March 2026, the company produced 1,652 commercial vehicles, an increase from 1,594 in March 2025. Sales for March 2026 stood at 2,393 commercial vehicles, up from 2,129 in March 2025. Export figures for March 2026 show 64 commercial vehicles, a decrease from 186 in March 2025. These figures are reported as part of the company's monthly business updates.

This fine was imposed for non-compliance with SEBI LODR (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company is providing an update on this regulatory matter. Further details on the Board's comments are expected.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of controlling stake in 250 bed Kalinga Hospital Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Limited announced on April 8, 2026, its approval to acquire a controlling stake of approximately 58.39% in Kalinga Hospital Ltd. This acquisition pertains to a 250-bedded multi-specialty hospital located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, known as ‘Kalinga Hospital’. The company will enter into a share purchase agreement to facilitate this transaction. To support Kalinga Hospital Ltd.'s operational and developmental needs, Max Healthcare has approved providing loans up to ₹100 Crore for construction, renovation, and equipment. Additionally, the company will issue a corporate guarantee to a bank or financial institution for the refinancing of $5 million in External Commercial Borrowings of Kalinga Hospital Ltd.'s existing promoter. The acquisition is being financed by a Senior Secured Term Loan of up to ₹300 Crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Max Healthcare forays in Bhubaneswar, Odisha; to acquire controlling stake in 250 bed Kalinga Hospital".
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has issued a press release on April 8, 2026, announcing its foray into Bhubaneswar, Odisha, through the acquisition of a controlling stake in Kalinga Hospital Ltd. This 250-bed multi-specialty hospital will operate under the name ‘Kalinga Hospital’. The company's board has approved the share purchase agreement for this acquisition, which represents approximately 58.39% of Kalinga Hospital Ltd. To support the hospital's growth, Max Healthcare will provide loans up to ₹100 Crore for construction, renovation, and equipment upgrades. Furthermore, a corporate guarantee will be issued for $5 million in External Commercial Borrowings related to the refinancing of the existing promoter's debt. The acquisition will be financed through a Senior Secured Term Loan of up to ₹300 Crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vidya Wires Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Press Release on Sales Number for Q4 and FY 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Vidya Wires Limited has issued a press release on April 08, 2026, detailing its sales numbers for the fourth quarter and the full financial year 2025-26. The company reported consolidated sales of INR 5,979.29 million for Q4 FY26, a 57.5% increase compared to Q4 FY25's INR 3,796.20 million. For the full financial year FY26, consolidated sales reached INR 18,347.43 million, up from INR 14,742.87 million in FY25, representing a 24.4% year-on-year growth. A significant milestone for the group during the quarter was the commencement of commercial production at its wholly-owned subsidiary, ALCU Industries Private Limited. The reported sales figures for Q4 FY26 and FY26 are provisional and subject to review by the company's statutory auditor.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Bartronics India Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Tejas Networks Ltd. has announced that it has won the Golden Peacock Innovative Product/Service Award 2026 for its WavePlexus™ portfolio of Radio Access Network (RAN) products. This award is administered by the Institute of Directors and is considered a benchmark for corporate innovation and governance. The company also received certification for meeting the rigorous standards of the Golden Peacock Excellence Model, demonstrating a commitment to sustainability-driven excellence. The judging panel for the award was chaired by former Chief Justice of India, Hon’ble Justice Uday U. Lalit, along with other distinguished members. The WavePlexus™ portfolio consists of modular, energy-efficient 4G and 5G radio and baseband products, including advanced 32TR and 64TR Massive MIMO solutions, which comply with both 3GPP and O-RAN standards. These products are deployed in carrier-grade networks globally and are designed for world-class performance, lower power consumption, and reduced total cost of ownership.

announcements.detail: Tejas Networks Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Tejas Networks wins the Golden Peacock Innovative Product / Service Award 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tejas Networks Limited has announced that it has won the Golden Peacock Innovative Product/Service Award 2026 for its WavePlexus™ portfolio of Radio Access Network (RAN) products. This award is administered by the Institute of Directors and is recognized for corporate innovation and governance. The WavePlexus™ portfolio consists of indigenously designed, modular, and energy-efficient 4G and 5G radio and baseband products, including advanced 32TR and 64TR Massive MIMO solutions, compliant with 3GPP and O-RAN standards. These products are deployed in carrier-grade networks globally and are designed for high performance, lower power consumption, and reduced total cost of ownership. The award was adjudicated by an eminent jury chaired by Hon’ble Justice Uday U. Lalit, former Chief Justice of India.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: PAKKA LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 07, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pakka Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 7, 2026, approved a preferential issue of up to 27,20,000 fully paid-up equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 110 per share, including a premium of Rs. 100, aggregating up to Rs. 29,92,00,000. Additionally, the board approved the preferential issue of up to 90,90,000 fully convertible warrants at an issue price of Rs. 110 per warrant, including a premium of Rs. 100, aggregating up to Rs. 99,99,00,000. These issues are subject to shareholder approval and other regulatory clearances. The shares and warrants are to be allotted to non-promoter, public individuals as per Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: The Indian Hotels Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "IHCL ACCELERATES PORTFOLIO EXPANSION; REACHES 628 HOTELS MARKS A YEAR OF INORGANIC & SUSTAINED ORGANIC GROWTH WITH 373 IN OPERATIONS AND A PIPELINE OF 255 HOTELS".
announcements.ai_summary: The Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL) announced on April 07, 2026, that it has reached a portfolio of 628 hotels, marking a year of significant inorganic and sustained organic growth. The company currently has 373 hotels in operation and a pipeline of 255 hotels. IHCL's Executive Vice President - Real Estate & Development, Ms. Suma Venkatesh, highlighted a record of 250 signings through inorganic and organic growth, expanding its brandscape and presence in the midscale segment. This includes the onboarding of Claridges Collection, acquisition of a controlling stake in Atmantan, and Brij hospitality. Ginger has expanded its portfolio to over 250 hotels across 150+ locations. IHCL also signed 19 hotels under the Taj brand, including one in Cairo and a 500-key hotel in Patna. The company opened over 30 hotels this fiscal year, entering new markets and strengthening its presence in existing ones, bringing the total operating hotels to 373 with over 33,000 rooms. IHCL is on track to achieve its goal of a 700-hotel portfolio under its "Accelerate 2030" strategy.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Zota Health Care Limited has informed the Exchange about Davaindia Stores Update for Q4FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zota Health Care Limited has provided an update on its Davaindia stores for the fourth quarter of the financial year 2025-26 (Q4FY26) as of March 31, 2026. During Q4FY26, the company opened 248 new Davaindia stores, contributing to a total of 997 stores opened during the entire FY26. The total number of COCO (Company-owned, Company-operated) stores managed by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Davaindia Health Mart Limited, increased to 1656 from 1438 at the end of Q3FY26. Similarly, the total number of FOFO (Franchisee-owned, Franchisee-operated) stores grew to 923 from 893. Consequently, the total operative Davaindia stores across all types reached 2579 as of March 31, 2026. This robust expansion in store count signifies active business development for the company.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Arvind Skyline Private Limited (ASPL), has acquired 4,900 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each for Rs. 49,000, representing 49% of the paid-up share capital of Oxford Navrang Realtors Pvt. Ltd. (ONRPL). This acquisition was finalized on April 6th, 2026. Concurrently, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has sold 1,300 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, equivalent to 13% of ASPL's equity share capital, to Mr. Khetshi Barot and Mr. Kaushal Agarwal for a total consideration of Rs. 13,000. Following these transactions on April 6th, 2026, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited will retain an 87% equity share capital in ASPL. The company has also announced a significant high-rise project in Mumbai with a top-line potential of approximately Rs. 2,400 Cr.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Arvind Skyline Private Limited (ASPL), has acquired a 49% stake in Oxford Navrang Realtors Pvt. Ltd. (ONRPL) for a total consideration of ₹49,000. This acquisition involved 4,900 equity shares of ₹10 each and was executed via a Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement dated April 6, 2026. Concurrently, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited sold 13% of its equity share capital in ASPL, comprising 1,300 equity shares of ₹10 each, to Mr. Khetshi Barot and Mr. Kaushal Agarwal for ₹13,000. Post these transactions, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited will retain an 87% equity share capital in ASPL. ONRPL, incorporated on July 4, 2025, operates in the real estate development and construction industry and had a Nil turnover as of March 31, 2026. The company also issued a media release on April 7, 2026, announcing the signing of its largest high-rise project in Mumbai with a top-line potential of approximately ₹2,400 crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Press Release of Birla Estates Private Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Birla Estates Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited, has achieved bookings exceeding ₹1,600 crores for its luxury project, Birla Arika Phase 2 in Gurugram. Nearly 97% of the residences, which amounts to 152 out of 156 units, were sold within a month of its launch on April 07, 2026. The project is a luxury residential development located in Central Gurugram. The strong performance is attributed to buyer confidence in the brand's luxury offerings and a shift towards spacious residences with expansive landscaped areas and lifestyle amenities. The project is envisioned as a low-density community featuring four exclusive clubs.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Ola Electric Announces Readiness of Indigenous 46100 LFP Cell, Advancing Its End ICE Age Vision".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited issued a press release on April 7, 2026, announcing the readiness of its in-house developed indigenous 46100 LFP cell, a significant step in its mission to accelerate electric mobility and build a full-stack energy ecosystem. This new LFP cell is larger than the current NMC 4680 Bharat Cell and is expected to enter Ola's products starting next quarter, offering improvements in scale, cost efficiency, and applicability for mobility and energy storage. The company's Gigafactory is scaling up its capacity to 6 GWh, with thousands of vehicles already powered by its 4680 Bharat Cells on Indian roads. This development underscores Ola Electric's commitment to innovation, scale, and self-reliance in advanced battery manufacturing in India.

As of March 31, 2026, the total shareholding of the Promoters and Promoter Group was 2,68,25,623 shares, representing 40.91% of the total voting capital. Key shareholders include Ajay Thakker with 1,35,97,829 shares (20.74%) and Ankit Thakker with 43,75,789 shares (6.67%). This declaration is in compliance with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates regarding social media communication by the promoter and CMD of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has announced general updates regarding social media communication from its Promoter and Chairman & Managing Director. The communication highlights the readiness of their LFP cell, the progress of their Gigafactory ramp-up, and the deployment of vehicles powered by their 4680 cells. The new 46100 format LFP cell, which is larger than their current NMC cell, will start entering products from the next quarter. The company believes LFP technology will lead to further reduction in vehicle cost, accelerate EV adoption, and serve as a foundation for battery storage products, supporting the next phase of Gigafactory scale-up.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: EFC (I) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "EFC ACHIEVES OVER 90 PERCENT OCCUPANCY IN RECORD TIME AT SPRINT BUSINESS CENTER WAKADEWADI, PUNE, A FULLY OWNED ASSET OF THE COMPANY.".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: EFC (I) Limited has announced a significant operational milestone with its fully owned asset, Sprint Business Center in Wakadewadi, Pune, achieving over 90% occupancy in record time. This premium A-Grade commercial workspace, spread over 49,556 sq. ft., has been leased to large enterprise and multinational clients. This rapid stabilization of occupancy highlights strong market absorption for premium office infrastructure, EFC's brand credibility, and efficient leasing capabilities, strengthening recurring revenue visibility from owned assets.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Servotech Renewable Power System Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Servotech Renewable Secures 67% share across multiple tenders of DC Fast EV Chargers floated by PSUs/OMCs".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Servotech Renewable Power System Limited has announced securing approximately 67% of the awarded capacity across multiple tenders for DC Fast EV Chargers floated by Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) and Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs). The company secured orders for 423 units out of a total tendered quantity of approximately 631 units. These orders are for 60kW and 120KW DC Fast EV Chargers and will be implemented in FY2026-27. This achievement reinforces Servotech's strong position in the EV charging infrastructure segment and is expected to significantly strengthen its order pipeline.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Hexaware Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Hexaware Ranked #1 in Value for Money in Whitelane Research2026 Netherlands IT Sourcing Study'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hexaware Technologies Limited has been recognized as the #1 company in "Value for Money" in the Whitelane Research 2026 Netherlands IT Sourcing Study, achieving an 89% satisfaction score. The company also secured strong positions in other key performance indicators, ranking #5 in Account Management Quality (85%), #4 in Security (86%), and #7 in Service Delivery Quality (83%). This evaluation by Whitelane Research, in collaboration with Eraneos, is based on input from over 350 leading organizations in the Netherlands. Hexaware was among the top 15 IT service providers in General Satisfaction, placing 13th overall with an 80% satisfaction score, and was one of only five new entrants in the rankings. Furthermore, in Application Services, Hexaware broke into the top 10 by market share, ranking 13th with 80% provider service satisfaction and a strong renewal intention rate. The company also placed among the top three in the Use of AI category, with half of respondents acknowledging its positive track record in applying AI to improve services.

announcements.subject: Updates

This payment covers partial redemption and interest on Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with ISIN: INE365D08026. The NCDs are part of Series 8%AHL 2041, with an issue size of INR 97 Crores/- (INR Ninety-seven Crores). The interest amount paid was INR 1,75,59,800/- (Indian Rupees One Crore Seventy-Five Lakhs Fifty-Nine Thousand Eight Hundred only), with the due date for payment being April 06, 2026. This intimation is in compliance with Regulation 57(1) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: S. P. Apparels Limited has informed the Exchange about Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.ai_summary: S. P. Apparels Limited has issued a corporate guarantee to The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited for an amount of Rs. 27,96,26,400 (Rupees Twenty-Seven Crores Ninety-Six Lakhs Twenty-Six Thousand Four Hundred Only). This guarantee, dated April 6, 2026, serves as security for a term loan facility availed by Jumeirah Lanka Pvt Limited, an associate company. Notably, Mr. P. Sundararajan, the Chairman & Managing Director of S. P. Apparels Limited, is also a director in Jumeirah Lanka Pvt Limited, and this transaction is considered to be at "arm's length." The guarantee is not expected to have any impact on S. P. Apparels Limited other than its disclosure as a contingent liability in the financial statements.

announcements.subject: Amendment to AOA/MOA
announcements.detail: Amagi Media Labs Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Amendment to AOA/MOA of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Amagi Media Labs Limited has announced that its shareholders have approved the alteration of the company's Articles of Association (AOA) through a Special Resolution passed via postal ballot and remote e-voting on April 03, 2026. This alteration involves the insertion of Article 64B. The company had previously adopted restated AOA on July 24, 2025, comprising Part A and Part B. Part B will automatically terminate upon the commencement of listing and trading of the company's equity shares on recognized stock exchanges, with Part A continuing in full force. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: CREDITACCESS GRAMEEN LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Interim Business Update - March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CreditAccess Grameen Limited has released an interim business update for March 2026, indicating strong momentum and positioning for growth acceleration in FY27. The Gross Lending Portfolio (GLP) grew by 14% year-on-year (YoY) to ₹29,590 Crores in FY26, meeting guidance. Disbursements for FY26 reached ₹24,860 Crores, up 24% YoY, with Q4 FY26 disbursements at ₹8,313 Crores, a 28% YoY increase. The company added 9.8 lakh new borrowers in FY26, and its asset quality has normalized, with an overall X-Bucket CE of 99.84% in March 2026. The branch network expanded by 183 branches in FY26.

The total issue size was aggregating up to ₹13920.85 Lakhs. This announcement follows previous communications regarding the rights issue process.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gallantt Ispat Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Gallantt Ispat Limited has provided an update on its production and revenue data for the fourth quarter (Q4) and the full fiscal year (FY) 2026. In Q4 FY26, power production increased by 14% YoY to 2,23,789 Mega Units, and pellet production saw a significant 59% YoY rise to 2,21,612 MT. For the full FY26, total steel production reached 0.88 million tonnes (mt), a 3% YoY increase, with sales also up 3% YoY to 0.85 mt. The company reported a capacity utilization of 91% in Q4 FY26 and 86% for the full FY26.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Radha Madhav Corporation Limited has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, from Vijay Patel, Proprietor of Vama Corporation and a promoter of the company. As of March 31, 2026, Vijay Patel, on behalf of himself and the promoter group, declared that no encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, was made during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration is in compliance with the SEBI regulations. The company also noted that its existing capital was cancelled on September 29, 2022, reducing shares from 9,12,95,775 to 6,82,185, which are yet to be listed and dematerialized. Post the Resolution Plan approval by NCLT Ahmedabad Bench on August 1, 2022, the existing promoter shareholding became NIL. The company has allotted shares on September 29, 2022 (15,00,000 shares), December 26, 2022 (40,000 shares), and December 26, 2022 (1,11,70,000 shares), which are also pending listing and dematerialization.

The company secretary of GMDC has submitted this information, and it has been forwarded to the Audit Committee of Gujarat Alkalies and Chemicals Limited.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Quarterly Business Update - Q4 FY 2025-2026'.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited has released its Quarterly Business Update for the Fourth Quarter of FY 2025-2026, ending March 31, 2026. The company reported Revenue from Operations of Rs. 1,382.14 Million in Q4 FY26, showing a strong year-on-year growth of 96.90% excluding Gold sales. During the festive period, revenue for Gudhi Padwa was approximately Rs. 70 Million, a 2.5x increase from the previous year. The company also expanded its retail footprint by launching one COCO store and one SIS store in March 2026, bringing the total store count to 36 as of March 31, 2026. The revenue figures are subject to a limited review or audit by the statutory auditors.
